     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { fetchFoodById, clearCurrentFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     5→import { addToCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     6→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     7→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
     8→import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    10→
    11→const FoodDetailPage = () => {
    12→  const { id } = useParams();
    13→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    14→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    15→  const { currentFood: food, loading, error } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→
    17→  useEffect(() => {
    18→    dispatch(fetchFoodById(id));
    19→    return () => dispatch(clearCurrentFood());
    20→  }, [id, dispatch]);
    21→
    22→  const handleAddToCart = () => {
    23→    dispatch(addToCart(food));
    24→    toast.success(`Đã thêm "${food.name}" vào giỏ hàng!`, {
    25→      icon: <ShoppingBag className="w-4 h-4" />,
    26→    });
    27→  };
    28→
    29→  if (loading) {
    30→    return (
    31→      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
    32→        <LoadingSpinner size="lg" />
    33→      </div>
    34→    );
    35→  }
    36→
    37→  if (error || !food) {
    38→    return (
    39→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    40→        <div className="text-6xl">😕</div>
    41→        <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy món ăn</h2>
    42→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    43→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay về trang chủ
    44→        </Link>
    45→      </div>
    46→    );
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  const imageUrl = food.image
    50→    ? food.image.startsWith('http')
    51→      ? food.image
    52→      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}`
    53→    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    54→
    55→  return (
    56→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    57→      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    58→        {/* Back button */}
    59→        <Link
    60→          to="/"
    61→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
    62→        >
    63→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
    64→          Quay về thực đơn
    65→        </Link>
    66→
    67→        <div className="card overflow-hidden animate-scale-in">
    68→          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-0">
    69→            {/* Image */}
    70→            <div className="relative aspect-square md:aspect-auto">
    71→              <img
    72→                src={imageUrl}
    73→                alt={food.name}
    74→                className="w-full h-full object-cover"
    75→                onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    76→              />
    77→              {/* Availability overlay */}
    78→              <div className="absolute top-4 left-4">
    79→                {food.isAvailable ? (
    80→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/30">
    81→                    <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    82→                    Còn món
    83→                  </span>
    84→                ) : (
    85→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-red-500/30">
    86→                    <XCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    87→                    Hết món
    88→                  </span>
    89→                )}
    90→              </div>
    91→            </div>
    92→
    93→            {/* Info */}
    94→            <div className="p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-center">
    95→              {/* Category */}
    96→              <span className="badge-primary mb-4 w-fit">{food.category}</span>
    97→
    98→              {/* Name */}
    99→              <h1 className="font-display text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4">
   100→                {food.name}
   101→              </h1>
   102→
   103→              {/* Price */}
   104→              <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-primary-600 mb-6">
   105→                {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   106→              </div>
   107→
   108→              {/* Description */}
   109→              {food.description && (
   110→                <div className="mb-6">
   111→                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Mô tả</h3>
   112→                  <p className="text-stone-600 leading-relaxed">{food.description}</p>
   113→                </div>
   114→              )}
   115→
   116→              {/* Divider */}
   117→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 my-6" />
   118→
   119→              {/* Actions */}
   120→              <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
   121→                <button
   122→                  onClick={handleAddToCart}
   123→                  disabled={!food.isAvailable}
   124→                  className="btn-primary flex-1 py-3 text-base"
   125→                >
   126→                  <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5" />
   127→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Đặt món ngay' : 'Món tạm hết'}
   128→                </button>
   129→                <Link
   130→                  to="/cart"
   131→                  className="btn-outline flex-1 py-3 text-base justify-center"
   132→                >
   133→                  Xem giỏ hàng
   134→                </Link>
   135→              </div>
   136→            </div>
   137→          </div>
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    </div>
   141→  );
   142→};
   143→
   144→export default FoodDetailPage;
   145→
```

```text
     1→import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux';
     2→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { selectCartItems, selectCartTotal, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     4→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     5→import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, ShoppingBag, ArrowLeft, Receipt } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     7→import ConfirmDialog from '../../components/ui/ConfirmDialog';
     8→import { useState } from 'react';
     9→
    10→const CartPage = () => {
    11→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    12→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
    13→  const cartTotal = useSelector(selectCartTotal);
    14→  const [showClearDialog, setShowClearDialog] = useState(false);
    15→
    16→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    17→    return (
    18→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
    19→        <EmptyState
    20→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    21→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    22→          description="Hãy chọn món ăn yêu thích và thêm vào giỏ hàng nhé!"
    23→          actionLabel="Khám phá thực đơn"
    24→          action={() => window.location.href = '/'}
    25→        />
    26→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary mt-6">
    27→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    28→        </Link>
    29→      </div>
    30→    );
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    35→      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    36→        {/* Header */}
    37→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
    38→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    39→            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
    40→              <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
    41→            </div>
    42→            <div>
    43→              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Giỏ hàng</h1>
    44→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{cartItems.length} món trong giỏ</p>
    45→            </div>
    46→          </div>
    47→          <button
    48→            onClick={() => setShowClearDialog(true)}
    49→            className="btn-ghost text-sm text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50"
    50→          >
    51→            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    52→            Xóa tất cả
    53→          </button>
    54→        </div>
    55→
    56→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
    57→          {/* Cart items */}
    58→          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-4">
    59→            {cartItems.map((item, idx) => {
    60→              const imageUrl = item.image
    61→                ? item.image.startsWith('http')
    62→                  ? item.image
    63→                  : `${UPLOAD_URL}${item.image}`
    64→                : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    65→
    66→              return (
    67→                <div
    68→                  key={item._id}
    69→                  className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4 animate-slide-up"
    70→                  style={{ animationDelay: `${idx * 50}ms` }}
    71→                >
    72→                  {/* Image */}
    73→                  <img
    74→                    src={imageUrl}
    75→                    alt={item.name}
    76→                    className="w-20 h-20 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
    77→                    onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    78→                  />
    79→
    80→                  {/* Info */}
    81→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
    82→                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 truncate">{item.name}</h3>
    83→                    <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{item.category}</span>
    84→                    <div className="mt-1.5 text-sm text-stone-500">
    85→                      {formatCurrency(item.price)} × {item.quantity}
    86→                    </div>
    87→                  </div>
    88→
    89→                  {/* Subtotal */}
    90→                  <div className="text-right flex-shrink-0">
    91→                    <div className="font-bold text-primary-600">
    92→                      {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
    93→                    </div>
    94→                  </div>
    95→
    96→                  {/* Quantity controls */}
    97→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-stone-100 rounded-xl p-1">
    98→                    <button
    99→                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ id: item._id, quantity: item.quantity - 1 }))}
   100→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200"
   101→                    >
   102→                      <Minus className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-600" />
   103→                    </button>
   104→                    <span className="w-8 text-center font-semibold text-sm text-stone-900">{item.quantity}</span>
   105→                    <button
   106→                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ id: item._id, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }))}
   107→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200"
   108→                    >
   109→                      <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-600" />
   110→                    </button>
   111→                  </div>
   112→
   113→                  {/* Remove */}
   114→                  <button
   115→                    onClick={() => dispatch(removeFromCart(item._id))}
   116→                    className="p-2 text-stone-300 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
   117→                  >
   118→                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   119→                  </button>
   120→                </div>
   121→              );
   122→            })}
   123→          </div>
   124→
   125→          {/* Summary */}
   126→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   127→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   128→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-5">
   129→                <Receipt className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600" />
   130→                <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Tổng cộng</h3>
   131→              </div>
   132→
   133→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5">
   134→                {cartItems.map((item) => (
   135→                  <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   136→                    <span className="text-stone-500 truncate flex-1">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   137→                    <span className="text-stone-700 font-medium ml-2">
   138→                      {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   139→                    </span>
   140→                  </div>
   141→                ))}
   142→              </div>
   143→
   144→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4 mb-5">
   145→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   146→                  <span className="font-medium text-stone-700">Tạm tính</span>
   147→                  <span className="font-bold text-lg text-primary-600">
   148→                    {formatCurrency(cartTotal)}
   149→                  </span>
   150→                </div>
   151→                <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-1">Phí giao hàng sẽ được tính khi xác nhận</p>
   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              <Link to="/checkout" className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center">
   155→                Xác nhận đặt món
   156→              </Link>
   157→              <Link to="/" className="btn-ghost w-full mt-2 justify-center text-sm">
   158→                <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Tiếp tục chọn món
   159→              </Link>
   160→            </div>
   161→          </div>
   162→        </div>
   163→      </div>
   164→
   165→      <ConfirmDialog
   166→        isOpen={showClearDialog}
   167→        title="Xóa giỏ hàng?"
   168→        message="Tất cả các món trong giỏ hàng sẽ bị xóa. Bạn có chắc chắn không?"
   169→        confirmLabel="Xóa tất cả"
   170→        danger
   171→        onConfirm={() => {
   172→          dispatch(clearCart());
   173→          setShowClearDialog(false);
   174→        }}
   175→        onCancel={() => setShowClearDialog(false)}
   176→      />
   177→    </div>
   178→  );
   179→};
   180→
   181→export default CartPage;
   182→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     2→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     3→import * as yup from 'yup';

     5→import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';

    13→
    14→const schema = yup.object({
    15→  customerName: yup
    16→    .string()
    17→    .required('Tên khách hàng không được để trống')
    18→    .min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    19→  phone: yup
    20→    .string()
    21→    .required('Số điện thoại không được để trống')
    22→    .matches(/^(0[0-9]{9})$/, 'Số điện thoại phải gồm 10 số và bắt đầu bằng 0'),
    23→  address: yup
    24→    .string()
    25→    .required('Địa chỉ không được để trống')
    26→    .min(5, 'Địa chỉ phải có ít nhất 5 ký tự'),
    27→  note: yup.string().default(''),
    28→});
    29→
    30→const CheckoutPage = () => {
    31→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    32→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    33→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
    34→  const cartTotal = useSelector(selectCartTotal);
    35→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    36→
    37→  const {
    38→    register,
    39→    handleSubmit,
    40→    formState: { errors },
    41→  } = useForm({
    42→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    43→    defaultValues: { customerName: '', phone: '', address: '', note: '' },
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    47→    return (
    48→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    49→        <EmptyState
    50→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    51→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    52→          description="Bạn chưa có món nào trong giỏ hàng."
    53→        />
    54→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    55→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    56→        </Link>
    57→      </div>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    62→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    63→    try {
    64→      const bookingData = {
    65→        customerName: data.customerName,
    66→        phone: data.phone,
    67→        address: data.address,
    68→        note: data.note || '',
    69→        items: cartItems.map((item) => ({
    70→          foodId: item._id,
    71→          foodName: item.name,
    72→          quantity: item.quantity,
    73→          price: item.price,
    74→          image: item.image || '',
    75→        })),
    76→        total: cartTotal,
    77→      };
    78→
    79→      await dispatch(createBooking(bookingData)).unwrap();
    80→
    81→      toast.success('Đặt món thành công!', {
    82→        description: 'Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ bạn sớm nhất.',
    83→        icon: <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />,
    84→      });
    85→
    86→      dispatch(clearCart());
    87→      navigate('/');
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Đặt món thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại!');
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  return (
    96→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    97→      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    98→        {/* Header */}
    99→        <Link
   100→          to="/cart"
   101→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
   102→        >
   103→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   104→          Quay về giỏ hàng
   105→        </Link>
   106→
   107→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
   108→          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
   109→            <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
   110→          </div>
   111→          <div>
   112→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Xác nhận đặt món</h1>
   113→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Vui lòng điền thông tin để hoàn tất đơn hàng</p>
   114→          </div>
   115→        </div>
   116→
   117→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   118→          {/* Form */}
   119→          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
   120→            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="card p-6 space-y-5">
   121→              {/* Customer name */}
   122→              <div>
   123→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   124→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   125→                  Tên khách hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   126→                </label>
   127→                <input
   128→                  {...register('customerName')}
   129→                  className="input-field"
   130→                  placeholder="VD: Nguyễn Văn A"
   131→                />
   132→                {errors.customerName && (
   133→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.customerName.message}</p>
   134→                )}
   135→              </div>
   136→
   137→              {/* Phone */}
   138→              <div>
   139→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   140→                  <Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   141→                  Số điện thoại <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   142→                </label>
   143→                <input
   144→                  {...register('phone')}
   145→                  type="tel"
   146→                  className="input-field"
   147→                  placeholder="VD: 0987654321"
   148→                />
   149→                {errors.phone && (
   150→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.phone.message}</p>
   151→                )}
   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              {/* Address */}
   155→              <div>
   156→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   157→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   158→                  Địa chỉ giao hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   159→                </label>
   160→                <input
   161→                  {...register('address')}
   162→                  className="input-field"
   163→                  placeholder="VD: Số 123, Đường ABC, Quận 1, TP.HCM"
   164→                />
   165→                {errors.address && (
   166→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.address.message}</p>
   167→                )}
   168→              </div>
   169→
   170→              {/* Note */}
   171→              <div>
   172→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   173→                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   174→                  Ghi chú (tùy chọn)
   175→                </label>
   176→                <textarea
   177→                  {...register('note')}
   178→                  rows={3}
   179→                  className="input-field resize-none"
   180→                  placeholder="VD: Giao giờ hành chính, ít đá..."
   181→                />
   182→              </div>
   183→
   184→              {/* Order summary preview */}
   185→              <div className="bg-stone-50 rounded-xl p-4">
   186→                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-600 mb-3">Món đã chọn ({cartItems.length})</h4>
   187→                <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
   188→                  {cartItems.map((item) => (
   189→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   190→                      <span className="text-stone-600">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   191→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-800">
   192→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   193→                      </span>
   194→                    </div>
   195→                  ))}
   196→                </div>
   197→              </div>
   198→
   199→              {/* Submit */}
   200→              <button
   201→                type="submit"
   202→                disabled={isSubmitting}
   203→                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center"
   204→              >
   205→                {isSubmitting ? (
   206→                  <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   207→                ) : (
   208→                  <>
   209→                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
   210→                    Xác nhận đặt món
   211→                  </>
   212→                )}
   213→              </button>
   214→            </form>
   215→          </div>
   216→
   217→          {/* Summary */}
   218→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   219→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   220→              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 mb-5">
   221→                Tóm tắt đơn hàng
   222→              </h3>
   223→
   224→              {/* Items preview */}
   225→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
   226→                {cartItems.map((item) => {

   232→
   233→                  return (

   235→                      <img
   236→                        src={imageUrl}
   237→                        alt={item.name}
   238→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   239→                        onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
   240→                      />
   241→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   242→                        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-800 truncate">{item.name}</div>
   243→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">× {item.quantity}</div>
   244→                      </div>

   248→                    </div>
   249→                  );
   250→                })}

   252→
   253→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4">
   254→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import { fetchBookings } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     5→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     6→import { UtensilsCrossed, ClipboardList, Clock, CheckCircle, TrendingUp, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';
     7→import { formatCurrency } from '../../constants';
     8→
     9→const StatCard = ({ icon: Icon, label, value, color, trend }) => (
    10→  <div className="card p-6">
    11→    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
    12→      <div>
    13→        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500">{label}</p>
    14→        <p className="text-3xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900 mt-1">{value}</p>
    15→        {trend && (
    16→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
    17→            <TrendingUp className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-500" />
    18→            <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 font-medium">{trend}</span>
    19→          </div>
    20→        )}
    21→      </div>
    22→      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${color}`}>
    23→        <Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
    24→      </div>
    25→    </div>
    26→  </div>
    27→);
    28→
    29→const AdminDashboardPage = () => {
    30→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    31→  const { items: foods } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    32→  const { items: bookings } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ limit: 100 }));
    36→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    37→  }, [dispatch]);
    38→
    39→  const pendingCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'pending').length;
    40→  const confirmedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed').length;
    41→  const completedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'done').length;
    42→  const availableFoods = foods.filter((f) => f.isAvailable).length;
    43→
    44→  return (
    45→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    46→      {/* Header */}
    47→      <div className="mb-8">
    48→        <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Tổng quan</h1>
    49→        <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Chào mừng bạn quay trở lại trang quản trị</p>
    50→      </div>
    51→
    52→      {/* Stats */}
    53→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8">
    54→        <StatCard
    55→          icon={UtensilsCrossed}
    56→          label="Tổng món ăn"
    57→          value={foods.length}
    58→          color="bg-primary-500"
    59→          trend={`${availableFoods} đang bán`}
    60→        />
    61→        <StatCard
    62→          icon={ClipboardList}
    63→          label="Tổng booking"
    64→          value={bookings.length}
    65→          color="bg-blue-500"
    66→        />
    67→        <StatCard
    68→          icon={Clock}
    69→          label="Chờ xác nhận"
    70→          value={pendingCount}
    71→          color="bg-amber-500"
    72→          trend={pendingCount > 0 ? 'Cần xử lý' : 'Không có'}
    73→        />
    74→        <StatCard
    75→          icon={CheckCircle}
    76→          label="Hoàn thành"
    77→          value={completedCount}
    78→          color="bg-emerald-500"
    79→        />
    80→      </div>
    81→
    82→      {/* Recent bookings */}
    83→      <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
    84→        {/* Recent food */}
    85→        <div className="card p-6">
    86→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
    87→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Món ăn gần đây</h2>
    88→            <Link to="/admin/foods" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
    89→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
    90→            </Link>
    91→          </div>
    92→          <div className="space-y-3">
    93→            {foods.slice(0, 5).map((food) => (
    94→              <div key={food._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
    95→                <div className="flex-1">
    96→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{food.name}</div>
    97→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{food.category}</div>
    98→                </div>
    99→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   100→                  {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   101→                </div>
   102→                <span className={`badge ${food.isAvailable ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-danger'} text-[10px]`}>
   103→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn' : 'Hết'}
   104→                </span>
   105→              </div>
   106→            ))}
   107→            {foods.length === 0 && (
   108→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có món ăn nào</p>
   109→            )}
   110→          </div>
   111→        </div>
   112→
   113→        {/* Recent bookings */}
   114→        <div className="card p-6">
   115→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   116→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Booking gần đây</h2>
   117→            <Link to="/admin/bookings" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
   118→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   119→            </Link>
   120→          </div>
   121→          <div className="space-y-3">
   122→            {bookings.slice(0, 5).map((booking) => (
   123→              <div key={booking._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   124→                <div className="flex-1">
   125→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{booking.customerName}</div>
   126→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{booking.phone}</div>
   127→                </div>
   128→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   129→                  {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   130→                </div>
   131→                <StatusBadgeInline status={booking.status} />
   132→              </div>
   133→            ))}
   134→            {bookings.length === 0 && (
   135→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có booking nào</p>
   136→            )}
   137→          </div>
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    </div>
   141→  );
   142→};
   143→
   144→const StatusBadgeInline = ({ status }) => {
   145→  const config = {
   146→    pending: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
   147→    confirmed: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
   148→    done: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
   149→    cancelled: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
   150→  };
   151→  return (
   152→    <span className={`badge ${config[status] || config.pending} text-[10px]`}>
   153→      {status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Xong' : 'Hủy'}
   154→    </span>
   155→  );
   156→};
   157→
   158→export default AdminDashboardPage;
   159→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminFoodsPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import FoodTable from '../../features/foods/FoodTable';
     5→import FoodFormModal from '../../features/foods/FoodFormModal';
     6→import ConfirmDialog from '../../components/ui/ConfirmDialog';
     7→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     8→import Pagination from '../../components/ui/Pagination';
     9→import { Plus, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
    10→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    11→import { PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    12→
    13→const AdminFoodsPage = () => {
    14→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    15→  const { items: foods, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
    17→  const [editingFood, setEditingFood] = useState(null);
    18→  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null);
    19→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    20→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    24→  }, [page, dispatch]);
    25→
    26→  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {
    27→    setPage(newPage);
    28→  };
    29→
    30→  const handleOpenForm = (food = null) => {
    31→    setEditingFood(food);
    32→    setShowForm(true);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleCloseForm = () => {
    36→    setShowForm(false);
    37→    setEditingFood(null);
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  const handleSubmit = async (data) => {
    41→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    42→    try {
    43→      if (editingFood) {
    44→        await dispatch(updateFood({ id: editingFood._id, data })).unwrap();
    45→        toast.success('Cập nhật món ăn thành công!');
    46→      } else {
    47→        await dispatch(createFood(data)).unwrap();
    48→        toast.success('Thêm món ăn mới thành công!');
    49→      }
    50→      handleCloseForm();
    51→      dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    52→    } catch (error) {
    53→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại!');
    54→    } finally {
    55→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    56→    }
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  const handleDelete = async () => {
    60→    if (!deleteTarget) return;
    61→    try {
    62→      await dispatch(deleteFood(deleteTarget._id)).unwrap();
    63→      toast.success(`Đã xóa món "${deleteTarget.name}"`);
    64→    } catch (error) {
    65→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Xóa thất bại!');
    66→    } finally {
    67→      setDeleteTarget(null);
    68→    }
    69→  };
    70→
    71→  return (
    72→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    73→      {/* Header */}
    74→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    75→        <div>
    76→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý món ăn</h1>
    77→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Thêm, sửa, xóa và theo dõi thực đơn</p>
    78→        </div>
    79→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    80→          <button
    81→            onClick={() => dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }))}
    82→            className="btn-secondary"
    83→            title="Reload"
    84→          >
    85→            <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    86→          </button>
    87→          <button onClick={() => handleOpenForm()} className="btn-primary">
    88→            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
    89→            Thêm món ăn
    90→          </button>
    91→        </div>
    92→      </div>
    93→
    94→      {/* Table */}
    95→      {foods.length > 0 ? (
    96→        <>
    97→          <FoodTable
    98→            foods={foods}
    99→            onEdit={handleOpenForm}
   100→            onDelete={(food) => setDeleteTarget(food)}
   101→          />
   102→          <Pagination
   103→            currentPage={pagination.currentPage}
   104→            totalPages={pagination.totalPages}
   105→            onPageChange={handlePageChange}
   106→          />
   107→        </>
   108→      ) : (
   109→        <div className="card">
   110→          <EmptyState
   111→            icon={EmptyStateIcon}
   112→            title="Chưa có món ăn nào"
   113→            description="Bắt đầu bằng cách thêm món ăn đầu tiên vào thực đơn"
   114→            actionLabel="Thêm món ăn"
   115→            action={() => handleOpenForm()}
   116→          />
   117→        </div>
   118→      )}
   119→
   120→      {/* Form Modal */}
   121→      <FoodFormModal
   122→        isOpen={showForm}
   123→        onClose={handleCloseForm}
   124→        onSubmit={handleSubmit}
   125→        initialData={editingFood}
   126→        isLoading={isSubmitting}
   127→      />
   128→
   129→      {/* Delete confirmation */}
   130→      <ConfirmDialog
   131→        isOpen={!!deleteTarget}
   132→        title="Xóa món ăn?"
   133→        message={`Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món "${deleteTarget?.name}"? Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.`}
   134→        confirmLabel="Xóa"
   135→        danger
   136→        onConfirm={handleDelete}
   137→        onCancel={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
   138→      />
   139→    </div>
   140→  );
   141→};
   142→
   143→const EmptyStateIcon = () => (
   144→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   145→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M12 6v6m0 0v6m0-6h6m-6 0H6" />
   146→  </svg>
   147→);
   148→
   149→export default AdminFoodsPage;
   150→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchBookings, updateBookingStatus, setStatusFilter } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     4→import BookingActions from '../../features/bookings/BookingActions';
     5→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     6→import StatusBadge from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     7→import { RefreshCw, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
     8→import { formatCurrency, BOOKING_STATUSES, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     9→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    10→
    11→const AdminBookingsPage = () => {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items: bookings, loading, statusFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    14→
    15→  useEffect(() => {
    16→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    17→  }, [dispatch]);
    18→
    19→  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id, newStatus) => {
    20→    try {
    21→      await dispatch(updateBookingStatus({ id, status: newStatus })).unwrap();
    22→      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!');
    23→    } catch (error) {
    24→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Cập nhật thất bại!');
    25→    }
    26→  };
    27→
    28→  const filteredBookings =
    29→    statusFilter === 'Tất cả'
    30→      ? bookings
    31→      : bookings.filter((b) => b.status === statusFilter);
    32→
    33→  const formatDate = (dateStr) => {
    34→    return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('vi-VN', {
    35→      day: '2-digit',
    36→      month: '2-digit',
    37→      year: 'numeric',
    38→      hour: '2-digit',
    39→      minute: '2-digit',
    40→    });
    41→  };
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    45→      {/* Header */}
    46→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    47→        <div>
    48→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý booking</h1>
    49→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">
    50→            {filteredBookings.length} booking
    51→            {statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' && ` (${statusFilter})`}
    52→          </p>
    53→        </div>
    54→        <button
    55→          onClick={() => dispatch(fetchBookings({}))}
    56→          className="btn-secondary"
    57→          title="Reload"
    58→        >
    59→          <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    60→        </button>
    61→      </div>
    62→
    63→      {/* Status filter */}
    64→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6 flex-wrap">
    65→        <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mr-1" />
    66→        {BOOKING_STATUSES.map((status) => (
    67→          <button
    68→            key={status}
    69→            onClick={() => dispatch(setStatusFilter(status))}
    70→            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    71→              statusFilter === status
    72→                ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-sm'
    73→                : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
    74→            }`}
    75→          >
    76→            {status === 'Tất cả' ? 'Tất cả' : status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
    77→          </button>
    78→        ))}
    79→      </div>
    80→
    81→      {/* Table */}
    82→      {filteredBookings.length > 0 ? (
    83→        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
    84→          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
    85→            <table className="admin-table">
    86→              <thead>
    87→                <tr>
    88→                  <th>Thời gian</th>
    89→                  <th>Khách hàng</th>
    90→                  <th>Liên hệ</th>
    91→                  <th>Món đã đặt</th>
    92→                  <th>Tổng tiền</th>
    93→                  <th>Trạng thái</th>
    94→                  <th className="text-right">Thao tác</th>
    95→                </tr>
    96→              </thead>
    97→              <tbody>
    98→                {filteredBookings.map((booking) => (
    99→                  <tr key={booking._id}>
   100→                    {/* Time */}
   101→                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
   102→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-500 font-medium">{formatDate(booking.createdAt)}</div>
   103→                    </td>
   104→
   105→                    {/* Customer */}
   106→                    <td>
   107→                      <div className="font-medium text-stone-900">{booking.customerName}</div>
   108→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 max-w-[150px] truncate">{booking.address}</div>
   109→                    </td>
   110→
   111→                    {/* Contact */}
   112→                    <td>
   113→                      <div className="text-sm text-stone-700">{booking.phone}</div>
   114→                      {booking.note && (
   115→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 italic max-w-[120px] truncate">
   116→                          Ghi chú: {booking.note}
   117→                        </div>
   118→                      )}
   119→                    </td>
   120→
   121→                    {/* Items */}
   122→                    <td>
   123→                      <div className="space-y-1">
   124→                        {booking.items.slice(0, 3).map((item, idx) => (
   125→                          <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   126→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-600">{item.foodName}</span>
   127→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">×{item.quantity}</span>
   128→                          </div>
   129→                        ))}
   130→                        {booking.items.length > 3 && (
   131→                          <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">+{booking.items.length - 3} món khác</div>
   132→                        )}
   133→                      </div>
   134→                    </td>
   135→
   136→                    {/* Total */}
   137→                    <td>
   138→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 whitespace-nowrap">
   139→                        {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   140→                      </span>
   141→                    </td>
   142→
   143→                    {/* Status */}
   144→                    <td>
   145→                      <StatusBadge status={booking.status} size="sm" />
   146→                    </td>
   147→
   148→                    {/* Actions */}
   149→                    <td>
   150→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end">
   151→                        <BookingActions booking={booking} onUpdateStatus={handleUpdateStatus} />
   152→                      </div>
   153→                    </td>
   154→                  </tr>
   155→                ))}
   156→              </tbody>
   157→            </table>
   158→          </div>
   159→        </div>
   160→      ) : (
   161→        <div className="card">
   162→          <EmptyState
   163→            icon={EmptyBagIcon}
   164→            title={statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' ? 'Không có booking nào' : 'Chưa có booking nào'}
   165→            description={
   166→              statusFilter !== 'Tất cả'
   167→                ? 'Thử chọn bộ lọc khác để xem kết quả'
   168→                : 'Booking từ khách hàng sẽ xuất hiện tại đây'
   169→            }
   170→          />
   171→        </div>
   172→      )}
   173→    </div>
   174→  );
   175→};
   176→
   177→const EmptyBagIcon = () => (
   178→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   179→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2" />
   180→  </svg>
   181→);
   182→
   183→export default AdminBookingsPage;
   184→
```

     1→import { Clock, CheckCircle, CheckCheck, XCircle } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const STATUS_CONFIG = {
     4→  pending: { label: 'Chờ xác nhận', className: 'badge-warning', icon: Clock },
     5→  confirmed: { label: 'Đã xác nhận', className: 'badge-info', icon: CheckCircle },
     6→  done: { label: 'Hoàn thành', className: 'badge-success', icon: CheckCheck },
     7→  cancelled: { label: 'Đã hủy', className: 'badge-danger', icon: XCircle },
     8→};
     9→
    10→const StatusBadge = ({ status, size = 'md' }) => {
    11→  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status] || STATUS_CONFIG.pending;
    12→  const Icon = config.icon;
    13→
    14→  return (
    15→    <span className={`${config.className} ${size === 'sm' ? 'text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5' : ''}`}>
    16→      <Icon className={`${size === 'sm' ? 'w-3 h-3' : 'w-3.5 h-3.5'} mr-1`} />
    17→      {config.label}
    18→    </span>
    19→  );
    20→};
    21→
    22→export const AvailabilityBadge = ({ isAvailable }) => (
    23→  isAvailable
    24→    ? <span className="badge-success">Còn món</span>
    25→    : <span className="badge-danger">Hết món</span>
    26→);
    27→
    28→export default StatusBadge;
    29→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/components/ui/Pagination.jsx`

```text
     1→import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const Pagination = ({ currentPage, totalPages, onPageChange }) => {
     4→  if (totalPages <= 1) return null;
     5→
     6→  const pages = [];
     7→  for (let i = 1; i <= totalPages; i++) {
     8→    if (i === 1 || i === totalPages || (i >= currentPage - 1 && i <= currentPage + 1)) {
     9→      pages.push(i);
    10→    } else if (pages[pages.length - 1] !== '...') {
    11→      pages.push('...');
    12→    }
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 mt-8">
    17→      <button
    18→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
    19→        disabled={currentPage === 1}
    20→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    21→      >
    22→        <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
    23→      </button>
    24→
    25→      {pages.map((page, idx) =>
    26→        page === '...' ? (
    27→          <span key={`ellipsis-${idx}`} className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400">
    28→            ···
    29→          </span>
    30→        ) : (
    31→          <button
    32→            key={page}
    33→            onClick={() => onPageChange(page)}
    34→            className={`w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    35→              currentPage === page
    36→                ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md shadow-primary-500/30'
    37→                : 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100'
    38→            }`}
    39→          >
    40→            {page}
    41→          </button>
    42→        )
    43→      )}
    44→
    45→      <button
    46→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}
    47→        disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
    48→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    49→      >
    50→        <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
    51→      </button>
    52→    </div>
    53→  );
    54→};
    55→
    56→export default Pagination;
    57→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:19:58Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/components/ui/ConfirmDialog.jsx`

```text
     1→import { X } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const ConfirmDialog = ({ isOpen, title, message, onConfirm, onCancel, confirmLabel = 'Xác nhận', danger = false }) => {
     4→  if (!isOpen) return null;
     5→
     6→  return (
     7→    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
     8→      {/* Backdrop */}
     9→      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onCancel} />
    10→
    11→      {/* Dialog */}
    12→      <div className="relative bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-md animate-scale-in">
    13→        <button
    14→          onClick={onCancel}
    15→          className="absolute top-4 right-4 p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    16→        >
    17→          <X className="w-5 h-5" />
    18→        </button>
    19→
    20→        <div className="p-6">
    21→          <h3 className="text-lg font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 mb-3">{title}</h3>
    22→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mb-6">{message}</p>
    23→
    24→          <div className="flex gap-3 justify-end">
    25→            <button onClick={onCancel} className="btn-secondary">
    26→              Hủy
    27→            </button>
    28→            <button
    29→              onClick={onConfirm}
    30→              className={danger ? 'btn-danger' : 'btn-primary'}
    31→            >
    32→              {confirmLabel}
    33→            </button>
    34→          </div>
    35→        </div>
    36→      </div>
    37→    </div>
    38→  );
    39→};
    40→
    41→export default ConfirmDialog;
    42→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { Search, Grid3X3, List, X } from 'lucide-react';
     2→import { CATEGORIES, SORT_OPTIONS } from '../../constants';
     3→
     4→const SearchFilterBar = ({
     5→  search,
     6→  category,
     7→  sort,
     8→  viewMode,
     9→  onSearchChange,
    10→  onCategoryChange,
    11→  onSortChange,
    12→  onViewChange,
    13→}) => {
    14→  return (
    15→    <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-soft p-4 mb-6 animate-fade-in">
    16→      {/* Top row: search + view toggle */}
    17→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 mb-4">
    18→        {/* Search */}
    19→        <div className="relative flex-1">
    20→          <Search className="absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4.5 h-4.5 text-stone-400" />
    21→          <input
    22→            type="text"
    23→            placeholder="Tìm kiếm món ăn..."
    24→            value={search}
    25→            onChange={(e) => onSearchChange(e.target.value)}
    26→            className="input-field pl-10 pr-10"
    27→          />
    28→          {search && (
    29→            <button
    30→              onClick={() => onSearchChange('')}
    31→              className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-1 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 transition-colors"
    32→            >
    33→              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
    34→            </button>
    35→          )}
    36→        </div>
    37→
    38→        {/* View toggle */}
    39→        <div className="flex items-center bg-stone-100 rounded-xl p-1">
    40→          <button
    41→            onClick={() => onViewChange('grid')}
    42→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 ${
    43→              viewMode === 'grid'
    44→                ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-primary-600'
    45→                : 'text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600'
    46→            }`}
    47→            title="Grid view"
    48→          >
    49→            <Grid3X3 className="w-4.5 h-4.5" />
    50→          </button>
    51→          <button
    52→            onClick={() => onViewChange('table')}
    53→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 ${
    54→              viewMode === 'table'
    55→                ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-primary-600'
    56→                : 'text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600'
    57→            }`}
    58→            title="Table view"
    59→          >
    60→            <List className="w-4.5 h-4.5" />
    61→          </button>
    62→        </div>
    63→      </div>
    64→
    65→      {/* Bottom row: filters + sort */}
    66→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 items-stretch sm:items-center">
    67→        {/* Category filter */}
    68→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
    69→          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Danh mục:</span>
    70→          {CATEGORIES.map((cat) => (
    71→            <button
    72→              key={cat}
    73→              onClick={() => onCategoryChange(cat)}
    74→              className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    75→                category === cat
    76→                  ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-sm'
    77→                  : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
    78→              }`}
    79→            >
    80→              {cat}
    81→            </button>
    82→          ))}
    83→        </div>
    84→
    85→        {/* Sort */}
    86→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-auto">
    87→          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Sắp xếp:</span>
    88→          <select
    89→            value={sort}
    90→            onChange={(e) => onSortChange(e.target.value)}
    91→            className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-stone-100 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium text-stone-700 border-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30 cursor-pointer"
    92→          >
    93→            {SORT_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
    94→              <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
    95→                {opt.label}
    96→              </option>
    97→            ))}
    98→          </select>
    99→        </div>
   100→      </div>
   101→    </div>
   102→  );
   103→};
   104→
   105→export default SearchFilterBar;
   106→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { Edit2, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
     2→import { formatCurrency, UPLOAD_URL, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE } from '../../constants';
     3→import { AvailabilityBadge } from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     4→
     5→const FoodTable = ({ foods, onEdit, onDelete }) => {
     6→  return (
     7→    <div className="card overflow-hidden">
     8→      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
     9→        <table className="admin-table">
    10→          <thead>
    11→            <tr>
    12→              <th>Hình ảnh</th>
    13→              <th>Tên món</th>
    14→              <th>Danh mục</th>
    15→              <th>Giá</th>
    16→              <th>Trạng thái</th>
    17→              <th className="text-right">Thao tác</th>
    18→            </tr>
    19→          </thead>
    20→          <tbody>
    21→            {foods.map((food) => {
    22→              const imageUrl = food.image
    23→                ? food.image.startsWith('http')
    24→                  ? food.image
    25→                  : `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}`
    26→                : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    27→
    28→              return (
    29→                <tr key={food._id}>
    30→                  <td>
    31→                    <img
    32→                      src={imageUrl}
    33→                      alt={food.name}
    34→                      className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover"
    35→                      onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    36→                    />
    37→                  </td>
    38→                  <td>
    39→                    <div className="font-medium text-stone-900">{food.name}</div>
    40→                    <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-1 max-w-[200px]">
    41→                      {food.description || '-'}
    42→                    </div>
    43→                  </td>
    44→                  <td>
    45→                    <span className="badge-primary">{food.category}</span>
    46→                  </td>
    47→                  <td className="font-semibold text-stone-900">
    48→                    {formatCurrency(food.price)}
    49→                  </td>
    50→                  <td>
    51→                    <AvailabilityBadge isAvailable={food.isAvailable} />
    52→                  </td>
    53→                  <td>
    54→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
    55→                      <button
    56→                        onClick={() => onEdit(food)}
    57→                        className="p-2 text-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    58→                        title="Sửa"
    59→                      >
    60→                        <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    61→                      </button>
    62→                      <button
    63→                        onClick={() => onDelete(food)}
    64→                        className="p-2 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    65→                        title="Xóa"
    66→                      >
    67→                        <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    68→                      </button>
    69→                    </div>
    70→                  </td>
    71→                </tr>
    72→              );
    73→            })}
    74→          </tbody>
    75→        </table>
    76→      </div>
    77→    </div>
    78→  );
    79→};
    80→
    81→export default FoodTable;
    82→
```

     4→import { AvailabilityBadge } from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     5→
     6→const FoodCard = ({ food }) => {

     8→    ? food.image.startsWith('http')
     9→      ? food.image
    10→      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}`
    11→    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    12→
    13→  return (
    14→    <div className="card overflow-hidden group animate-fade-in">
    15→      {/* Image */}
    16→      <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden bg-stone-100">
    17→        <img
    18→          src={imageUrl}
    19→          alt={food.name}
    20→          className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
    21→          onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    22→        />
    23→        {/* Category badge */}
    24→        <div className="absolute top-3 left-3">
    25→          <span className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg text-xs font-medium text-stone-700 shadow-sm">
    26→            {food.category}
    27→          </span>
    28→        </div>
    29→        {/* Availability */}

    31→          <AvailabilityBadge isAvailable={food.isAvailable} />
    32→        </div>
    33→      </div>
    34→
    35→      {/* Content */}
    36→      <div className="p-4">
    37→        <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 mb-1 line-clamp-1">
    38→          {food.name}
    39→        </h3>
    40→        <p className="text-stone-500 text-sm mb-3 line-clamp-2 leading-relaxed">
    41→          {food.description || 'Món ăn ngon miệng'}
    42→        </p>
    43→
    44→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    45→          <span className="text-primary-600 font-bold text-lg">
    46→            {formatCurrency(food.price)}
    47→          </span>
    48→          <Link
    49→            to={`/foods/${food._id}`}
    50→            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-stone-100 hover:bg-primary-50 text-stone-600 hover:text-primary-700 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200"
    51→          >
    52→            <Eye className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    53→            Chi tiết
    54→          </Link>
    55→        </div>
    56→      </div>
    57→    </div>
    58→  );
    59→};
    60→

    70→        <div className="h-8 bg-stone-100 rounded-lg w-20 skeleton-shimmer" />

    72→    </div>
    73→  </div>
    74→);

    76→export default FoodCard;

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/features/foods/FoodFormModal.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     3→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     4→import * as yup from 'yup';
     5→import { X, Upload, Image as ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { CATEGORIES } from '../../constants';
     7→import { uploadApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
     8→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
     9→
    10→const schema = yup.object({
    11→  name: yup.string().required('Tên món ăn không được để trống').min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    12→  category: yup.string().required('Danh mục không được để trống'),
    13→  price: yup
    14→    .number()
    15→    .typeError('Giá phải là số')
    16→    .required('Giá không được để trống')
    17→    .min(1000, 'Giá phải lớn hơn 1.000đ'),
    18→  description: yup.string().default(''),
    19→  image: yup.string().default(''),
    20→  isAvailable: yup.boolean().default(true),
    21→});
    22→
    23→const FoodFormModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, onSubmit, initialData, isLoading }) => {
    24→  const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState('');
    25→  const [imageMode, setImageMode] = useState('url'); // 'url' | 'upload'
    26→  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
    27→
    28→  const {
    29→    register,
    30→    handleSubmit,
    31→    reset,
    32→    setValue,
    33→    watch,
    34→    formState: { errors },
    35→  } = useForm({
    36→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    37→    defaultValues: {
    38→      name: '',
    39→      category: '',
    40→      price: '',
    41→      description: '',
    42→      image: '',
    43→      isAvailable: true,
    44→    },
    45→  });
    46→
    47→  const imageValue = watch('image');
    48→
    49→  // Reset form when modal opens/closes or data changes
    50→  useEffect(() => {
    51→    if (isOpen) {
    52→      if (initialData) {
    53→        reset({
    54→          name: initialData.name || '',
    55→          category: initialData.category || '',
    56→          price: initialData.price || '',
    57→          description: initialData.description || '',
    58→          image: initialData.image || '',
    59→          isAvailable: initialData.isAvailable ?? true,
    60→        });
    61→        setImagePreview(initialData.image || '');
    62→        if (initialData.image) {
    63→          setImageMode('url');
    64→        }
    65→      } else {
    66→        reset({ name: '', category: '', price: '', description: '', image: '', isAvailable: true });
    67→        setImagePreview('');
    68→        setImageMode('url');
    69→      }
    70→    }
    71→  }, [isOpen, initialData, reset]);
    72→
    73→  const handleImageUrlChange = (url) => {
    74→    setValue('image', url);
    75→    setImagePreview(url);
    76→  };
    77→
    78→  const handleFileUpload = async (e) => {
    79→    const file = e.target.files[0];
    80→    if (!file) return;
    81→
    82→    setIsUploading(true);
    83→    try {
    84→      const response = await uploadApi.upload(file);
    85→      const url = response.data.data.url;
    86→      setValue('image', url);
    87→      setImagePreview(url);
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      console.error('Upload failed:', error);
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsUploading(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  if (!isOpen) return null;
    96→
    97→  return (
    98→    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    99→      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
   100→
   101→      <div className="relative bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-lg max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto animate-scale-in">
   102→        {/* Header */}
   103→        <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-stone-100 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between rounded-t-2xl">
   104→          <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900">
   105→            {initialData ? 'Sửa món ăn' : 'Thêm món ăn mới'}
   106→          </h2>
   107→          <button
   108→            onClick={onClose}
   109→            className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
   110→          >
   111→            <X className="w-5 h-5" />
   112→          </button>
   113→        </div>
   114→
   115→        {/* Form */}
   116→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-5">
   117→          {/* Name */}
   118→          <div>
   119→            <label className="input-label">Tên món ăn <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   120→            <input {...register('name')} className="input-field" placeholder="VD: Cơm gà xối mỡ" />
   121→            {errors.name && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.name.message}</p>}
   122→          </div>
   123→
   124→          {/* Category */}
   125→          <div>
   126→            <label className="input-label">Danh mục <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   127→            <select {...register('category')} className="input-field cursor-pointer">
   128→              <option value="">Chọn danh mục</option>
   129→              {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat) => (
   130→                <option key={cat} value={cat}>{cat}</option>
   131→              ))}
   132→            </select>
   133→            {errors.category && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.category.message}</p>}
   134→          </div>
   135→
   136→          {/* Price */}
   137→          <div>
   138→            <label className="input-label">Giá (VNĐ) <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   139→            <input
   140→              {...register('price')}
   141→              type="number"
   142→              min="0"
   143→              step="1000"
   144→              className="input-field"
   145→              placeholder="VD: 45000"
   146→            />
   147→            {errors.price && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.price.message}</p>}
   148→          </div>
   149→
   150→          {/* Description */}
   151→          <div>
   152→            <label className="input-label">Mô tả</label>
   153→            <textarea
   154→              {...register('description')}
   155→              rows={3}
   156→              className="input-field resize-none"
   157→              placeholder="Mô tả ngắn về món ăn..."
   158→            />
   159→          </div>
   160→
   161→          {/* Image */}
   162→          <div>
   163→            <label className="input-label">Hình ảnh</label>
   164→            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-3">
   165→              <button
   166→                type="button"
   167→                onClick={() => setImageMode('url')}
   168→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   169→                  imageMode === 'url'
   170→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'
   171→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
   172→                }`}
   173→              >
   174→                Nhập URL
   175→              </button>
   176→              <button
   177→                type="button"
   178→                onClick={() => setImageMode('upload')}
   179→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   180→                  imageMode === 'upload'
   181→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'
   182→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
   183→                }`}
   184→              >
   185→                Upload file
   186→              </button>
   187→            </div>
   188→
   189→            {imageMode === 'url' ? (
   190→              <input
   191→                type="text"
   192→                value={imageValue || ''}
   193→                onChange={(e) => handleImageUrlChange(e.target.value)}
   194→                className="input-field"
   195→                placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   196→              />
   197→            ) : (
   198→              <div className="relative">
   199→                <input
   200→                  type="file"
   201→                  accept="image/*"
   202→                  onChange={handleFileUpload}
   203→                  className="hidden"
   204→                  id="image-upload"
   205→                />
   206→                <label
   207→                  htmlFor="image-upload"
   208→                  className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full py-3 border-2 border-dashed border-stone-200 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-primary-400 hover:bg-primary-50/30 transition-all duration-200"
   209→                >
   210→                  {isUploading ? (
   211→                    <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   212→                  ) : (
   213→                    <>
   214→                      <Upload className="w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
   215→                      <span className="text-sm text-stone-500">
   216→                        {imageValue ? 'Chọn ảnh khác...' : 'Chọn file ảnh'}
   217→                      </span>
   218→                    </>
   219→                  )}
   220→                </label>
   221→              </div>
   222→            )}
   223→
   224→            {/* Image preview */}
   225→            {imagePreview && (
   226→              <div className="mt-3 relative">
   227→                <img
   228→                  src={imagePreview}
   229→                  alt="Preview"
   230→                  className="w-full h-40 object-cover rounded-xl border border-stone-200"
   231→                  onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; }}
   232→                />
   233→                <button
   234→                  type="button"
   235→                  onClick={() => { setImagePreview(''); setValue('image', ''); }}
   236→                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors"
   237→                >
   238→                  <X className="w-4 h-4" />
   239→                </button>
   240→              </div>
   241→            )}
   242→          </div>
   243→
   244→          {/* Availability */}
   245→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   246→            <label className="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer">
   247→              <input type="checkbox" {...register('isAvailable')} className="sr-only peer" />
   248→              <div className="w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 peer-focus:outline-none peer-focus:ring-2 peer-focus:ring-primary-500/30 rounded-full peer peer-checked:after:translate-x-5 rtl:peer-checked:after:-translate-x-full peer-checked:after:border-white after:content-[''] after:absolute after:top-[2px] after:start-[2px] after:bg-white after:rounded-full after:h-5 after:w-5 after:transition-all peer-checked:bg-primary-500"></div>
   249→            </label>
   250→            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700">
   251→              Còn món (hiển thị cho khách)
   252→            </span>
   253→          </div>
   254→
   255→          {/* Actions */}
   256→          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-2">
   257→            <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="btn-secondary flex-1">
   258→              Hủy
   259→            </button>
   260→            <button type="submit" disabled={isLoading} className="btn-primary flex-1">
   261→              {isLoading ? <LoadingSpinner size="sm" /> : initialData ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Thêm món'}
   262→            </button>
   263→          </div>
   264→        </form>
   265→      </div>
   266→    </div>
   267→  );
   268→};
   269→
   270→export default FoodFormModal;
   271→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/features/bookings/BookingActions.jsx`

```text
     1→import { CheckCircle, Clock, XCircle, CheckCheck } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const STATUS_TRANSITIONS = {
     4→  pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
     5→  confirmed: ['done', 'cancelled'],
     6→  done: [],
     7→  cancelled: [],
     8→};
     9→
    10→const ACTION_CONFIG = {
    11→  confirmed: {
    12→    label: 'Xác nhận',
    13→    icon: CheckCircle,
    14→    className: 'btn-primary',
    15→    nextStatus: 'confirmed',
    16→  },
    17→  done: {
    18→    label: 'Hoàn thành',
    19→    icon: CheckCheck,
    20→    className: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600',
    21→    nextStatus: 'done',
    22→  },
    23→  cancelled: {
    24→    label: 'Hủy',
    25→    icon: XCircle,
    26→    className: 'btn-danger',
    27→    nextStatus: 'cancelled',
    28→  },
    29→};
    30→
    31→const BookingActions = ({ booking, onUpdateStatus }) => {
    32→  const transitions = STATUS_TRANSITIONS[booking.status] || [];
    33→
    34→  if (transitions.length === 0) return null;
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    38→      {transitions.map((nextStatus) => {
    39→        const config = ACTION_CONFIG[nextStatus];
    40→        if (!config) return null;
    41→        const Icon = config.icon;
    42→
    43→        return (
    44→          <button
    45→            key={nextStatus}
    46→            onClick={() => onUpdateStatus(booking._id, nextStatus)}
    47→            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-[1.02] ${config.className}`}
    48→          >
    49→            <Icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    50→            {config.label}
    51→          </button>
    52→        );
    53→      })}
    54→    </div>
    55→  );
    56→};
    57→
    58→export default BookingActions;
    59→
```
</details></tool-use>
