<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/controllers/foodController.js`

```text
     1→const Food = require('../models/Food');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả món ăn (có filter, sort, pagination, search)
     4→const getFoods = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { search, category, sort = '-createdAt', page = 1, limit = 8 } = req.query;
     7→
     8→    const query = {};
     9→
    10→    // Search theo tên
    11→    if (search) {
    12→      query.name = { $regex: search, $options: 'i' };
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    // Filter theo category
    16→    if (category && category !== 'Tất cả') {
    17→      query.category = category;
    18→    }
    19→
    20→    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
    21→    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
    22→    const skip = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
    23→
    24→    // Đếm tổng
    25→    const total = await Food.countDocuments(query);
    26→
    27→    // Lấy danh sách - sort: price_asc, price_desc, newest
    28→    let sortOption = {};
    29→    if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOption = { price: 1 };
    30→    else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOption = { price: -1 };
    31→    else if (sort === 'newest') sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    32→    else sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    33→
    34→    const foods = await Food.find(query).sort(sortOption).skip(skip).limit(limitNum);
    35→
    36→    res.status(200).json({
    37→      success: true,
    38→      message: 'Lấy danh sách món ăn thành công',
    39→      data: {
    40→        foods,
    41→        pagination: {
    42→          currentPage: pageNum,
    43→          totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limitNum),
    44→          totalItems: total,
    45→          limit: limitNum,
    46→        },
    47→      },
    48→    });
    49→  } catch (error) {
    50→    next(error);
    51→  }
    52→};
    53→
    54→// @desc    Lấy 1 món ăn
    55→const getFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    56→  try {
    57→    const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    58→    if (!food) {
    59→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
    60→      error.statusCode = 404;
    61→      return next(error);
    62→    }
    63→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin món ăn thành công', data: food });
    64→  } catch (error) {
    65→    next(error);
    66→  }
    67→};
    68→
    69→// @desc    Tạo món ăn mới
    70→const createFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    71→  try {
    72→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    73→
    74→    const food = await Food.create({
    75→      name,
    76→      category,
    77→      price: parseFloat(price),
    78→      image: image || '',
    79→      description: description || '',
    80→      isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
    81→    });
    82→
    83→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Tạo món ăn thành công', data: food });
    84→  } catch (error) {
    85→    next(error);
    86→  }
    87→};
    88→
    89→// @desc    Cập nhật món ăn
    90→const updateFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    91→  try {
    92→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    93→
    94→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(
    95→      req.params.id,
    96→      {
    97→        name,
    98→        category,
    99→        price: parseFloat(price),
   100→        image: image || '',
   101→        description: description || '',
   102→        isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
   103→      },
   104→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
   105→    );
   106→
   107→    if (!food) {
   108→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   109→      error.statusCode = 404;
   110→      return next(error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật món ăn thành công', data: food });
   114→  } catch (error) {
   115→    next(error);
   116→  }
   117→};
   118→
   119→// @desc    Xóa món ăn
   120→const deleteFood = async (req, res, next) => {
   121→  try {
   122→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→    if (!food) {
   124→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   125→      error.statusCode = 404;
   126→      return next(error);
   127→    }
   128→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Xóa món ăn thành công', data: null });
   129→  } catch (error) {
   130→    next(error);
   131→  }
   132→};
   133→
   134→module.exports = { getFoods, getFood, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood };
   135→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:20:16Z)**_

```text
     1→const Booking = require('../models/Booking');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả booking (filter theo status)
     4→const getBookings = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { status } = req.query;
     7→    const query = status && status !== 'Tất cả' ? { status } : {};
     8→
     9→    const bookings = await Booking.find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    10→
    11→    res.status(200).json({
    12→      success: true,
    13→      message: 'Lấy danh sách booking thành công',
    14→      data: bookings,
    15→    });
    16→  } catch (error) {
    17→    next(error);
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→
    21→// @desc    Lấy 1 booking
    22→const getBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    const booking = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
    25→    if (!booking) {
    26→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    27→      error.statusCode = 404;
    28→      return next(error);
    29→    }
    30→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin booking thành công', data: booking });
    31→  } catch (error) {
    32→    next(error);
    33→  }
    34→};
    35→
    36→// @desc    Tạo booking mới
    37→const createBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  try {
    39→    const { customerName, phone, address, items, total, note } = req.body;
    40→
    41→    const booking = await Booking.create({
    42→      customerName,
    43→      phone,
    44→      address,
    45→      items,
    46→      total: parseFloat(total),
    47→      note: note || '',
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Đặt món thành công! Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ sớm.', data: booking });
    51→  } catch (error) {
    52→    next(error);
    53→  }
    54→};
    55→
    56→// @desc    Cập nhật trạng thái booking
    57→const updateBookingStatus = async (req, res, next) => {
    58→  try {
    59→    const { status } = req.body;
    60→
    61→    if (!['pending', 'confirmed', 'done', 'cancelled'].includes(status)) {
    62→      const error = new Error('Trạng thái không hợp lệ');
    63→      error.statusCode = 400;
    64→      return next(error);
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    const booking = await Booking.findByIdAndUpdate(
    68→      req.params.id,
    69→      { status },
    70→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
    71→    );
    72→
    73→    if (!booking) {
    74→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    75→      error.statusCode = 404;
    76→      return next(error);
    77→    }
    78→
    79→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công', data: booking });
    80→  } catch (error) {
    81→    next(error);
    82→  }
    83→};
    84→
    85→module.exports = { getBookings, getBooking, createBooking, updateBookingStatus };
    86→
```

```text
     1→// Global error handler middleware
     2→const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
     3→  let statusCode = err.statusCode || 500;
     4→  let message = err.message || 'Lỗi server';
     5→
     6→  // Mongoose bad ObjectId
     7→  if (err.name === 'CastError') {
     8→    statusCode = 400;
     9→    message = 'ID không hợp lệ';
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  // Mongoose duplicate key
    13→  if (err.code === 11000) {
    14→    statusCode = 400;
    15→    message = 'Dữ liệu trùng lặp';
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  // Mongoose validation error
    19→  if (err.name === 'ValidationError') {
    20→    statusCode = 400;
    21→    const messages = Object.values(err.errors).map((e) => e.message);
    22→    message = messages.join(', ');
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  res.status(statusCode).json({
    26→    success: false,
    27→    message,
    28→    data: null,
    29→  });
    30→};
    31→
    32→module.exports = errorHandler;
    33→
```

I now have a complete picture of the entire codebase. Here is the detailed architectural analysis:

---

## Backend Architecture Analysis: bt-quanlibooking

### 1. Project Structure

```
bt-quanlibooking/
├── package.json              (root: runs both client+server via concurrently)
├── backend/
│   ├── package.json
│   ├── .env / .env.example
│   └── src/
│       ├── server.js         (entry point)
│       ├── app.js            (Express app setup)
│       ├── config/
│       │   └── database.js
│       ├── models/
│       │   ├── Food.js
│       │   └── Booking.js
│       ├── controllers/
│       │   ├── foodController.js
│       │   ├── bookingController.js
│       │   └── uploadController.js
│       ├── routes/
│       │   ├── foodRoutes.js
│       │   ├── bookingRoutes.js
│       │   └── uploadRoutes.js
│       ├── middleware/
│       │   ├── errorHandler.js
│       │   └── upload.js
│       ├── utils/
│       │   └── seed.js
│       └── uploads/          (uploaded image storage)
└── frontend/                 (React + Vite, separate codebase)
```

**Tech Stack (Backend)**:
- **Runtime**: Node.js
- **Framework**: Express.js v4.21.2
- **Database**: MongoDB via Mongoose v8.9.4
- **File Upload**: Multer v1.4.5-lts.1
- **Env**: dotenv v16.4.5
- **CORS**: cors v2.8.5
- **Dev**: nodemon v3.1.9

---

### 2. Database Schema (MongoDB / Mongoose)

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\models\Food.js`
**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\models\Booking.js`

**Food Model** -- 6 fields:
| Field | Type | Required | Constraints |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | String | Yes | trimmed |
| `category` | String | Yes | trimmed |
| `price` | Number | Yes | min 0 |
| `image` | String | No | default `''` |
| `description` | String | No | default `''`, trimmed |
| `isAvailable` | Boolean | No | default `true` |
- Auto timestamps (`createdAt`, `updatedAt`)
- Text index on `name` + `description`

**Booking Model** -- 9 fields:
| Field | Type | Required | Constraints |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `customerName` | String | Yes | trimmed |
| `phone` | String | Yes | trimmed |
| `address` | String | Yes | trimmed |
| `items` | Array | Yes | subdoc: `foodId`, `foodName`, `quantity`, `price`, `image` |
| `total` | Number | Yes | min 0 |
| `status` | String | No | enum: `pending`/`confirmed`/`done`/`cancelled`, default `pending` |
| `note` | String | No | default `''`, trimmed |
- Auto timestamps

---

### 3. API Routes (All Endpoints)

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\routes\foodRoutes.js`
```
GET    /api/foods          -> getFoods     (list with search/filter/sort/pagination)
POST   /api/foods          -> createFood
GET    /api/foods/:id      -> getFood
PUT    /api/foods/:id      -> updateFood
DELETE /api/foods/:id      -> deleteFood
```

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\routes\bookingRoutes.js`
```
GET    /api/bookings              -> getBookings            (filter by status)
POST   /api/bookings              -> createBooking
GET    /api/bookings/:id          -> getBooking
PATCH  /api/bookings/:id/status   -> updateBookingStatus
```

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\routes\uploadRoutes.js`
```
POST   /api/upload       -> uploadImage  (single 'image' field via multer)
```

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\app.js` line 22
```
GET    /api/health        -> inline health check handler
```

**Total: 11 endpoints across 4 route groups.**

---

### 4. Authentication

**NONE.** There is absolutely no authentication mechanism in the backend.

- No JWT, no sessions, no OAuth, no API keys.
- No auth middleware.
- No user model.
- Every endpoint is publicly accessible -- including `DELETE /api/foods/:id`, `PATCH /api/bookings/:id/status`, and file uploads.
- No role-based access control (RBAC) at all. The "admin" vs "user" distinction exists only on the frontend via route guards (in `frontend/src/routes/index.jsx`) with zero backend enforcement.

---

### 5. Controllers / Business Logic

All logic lives in controllers. No separate service layer exists.

**foodController.js** (`C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\foodController.js`):
- `getFoods`: query builder with regex search on `name`, category filter, sort options (`price_asc`, `price_desc`, `newest`), pagination with `skip`/`limit`.
- `getFood`: `findById` with 404 check.
- `createFood`: `Food.create()`, parses `price` as `Float`, `isAvailable` from string `'true'`.
- `updateFood`: `findByIdAndUpdate` with `new: true, runValidators: true`.
- `deleteFood`: `findByIdAndDelete`.

**bookingController.js** (`C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\bookingController.js`):
- `getBookings`: `find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 })`.
- `getBooking`: `findById` with 404 check.
- `createBooking`: `Booking.create()`, parses `total` as `Float`.
- `updateBookingStatus`: manual enum validation, `findByIdAndUpdate`.

**uploadController.js** (`C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\uploadController.js`):
- `uploadImage`: returns `/uploads/{filename}` path. Only one endpoint.

---

### 6. Middleware

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middleware\errorHandler.js`
- Global 4-arg Express error handler.
- Handles `CastError`, `11000` (duplicate key), `ValidationError`.
- All other errors pass through with status 500.

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middleware\upload.js`
- Multer configured with `diskStorage`.
- Destination: `backend/src/uploads/`.
- Filename: `food-{timestamp}-{random}.{ext}`.
- File filter: allows `jpeg|jpg|png|gif|webp|svg` by extension and mimetype.
- Limit: `5MB`.

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\app.js` (inline middleware):
- `cors()`: whitelist of `http://localhost:5173` and `http://localhost:5174`.
- `express.json()` and `express.urlencoded({ extended: true })`.
- `express.static('/uploads')`: serves uploaded files publicly.

---

### 7. Config

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\.env`
```
PORT=5000
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/quanli_booking
NODE_ENV=development
```

**File**: `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\config\database.js`
- `connectDB()`: wraps `mongoose.connect()` with try/catch, logs host on success, exits process on failure.

**CORS** (`app.js` line 9): Hardcoded whitelist -- `['http://localhost:5173', 'http://localhost:5174']`. This is not environment-variable driven.

---

### 8. State Management (Frontend)

The backend has no state management. On the frontend, **Redux Toolkit** is used:

- `frontend/src/store/index.js` -- Redux store setup
- `frontend/src/slices/foodsSlice.js` -- foods state
- `frontend/src/slices/cartSlice.js` -- cart state (persisted?)
- `frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js` -- bookings state

The frontend also uses React context or local state in components. Axios is configured via `frontend/src/api/axiosClient.js`.

---

### 9. Socket.io / Realtime

**NONE.** No WebSocket, Socket.io, Server-Sent Events, or any realtime communication. The booking status update is a full request-response cycle. If an admin updates a booking status, the customer has no way to know without refreshing the page.

---

### 10. Validation

- **Mongoose schema validators** on both models (required, min, enum, trim).
- **Controller-level manual checks** in `updateBookingStatus` (`app.js` line 61: manually checks enum values).
- **NO** dedicated validation library (no `joi`, `zod`, `express-validator`, or `celebrate`).
- **Frontend validation**: `react-hook-form` + `@hookform/resolvers` + `yup` (in `frontend/package.json`).
- The frontend uses Yup schemas for form validation, but the backend trusts client input with minimal guardrails.

---

### 11. Error Handling

**Global error handler** at `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middleware\errorHandler.js`:
- Catches Mongoose `CastError` (bad ObjectId) -> 400
- Catches Mongoose duplicate key `11000` -> 400
- Catches Mongoose `ValidationError` -> 400, joins all messages
- Default: 500 with `err.message`
- All responses follow `{ success: false, message, data: null }` pattern

**404 handler** at `app.js` line 27: returns `{ success: false, message: 'Route khong ton tai', data: null }`.

**NO** async error wrapper (no `express-async-handler`). Controllers manually call `next(error)`.

---

### 12. Testing

**NONE.** There are zero test files in the project's own source code. All `.test.*` / `.spec.*` files found were inside `node_modules` of dependencies. No `jest.config.js`, no `mocha`, no test scripts.

---

### 13. Weaknesses, Security Concerns, and Architectural Issues

#### Critical Security Issues

1. **No Authentication/Authorization** (CRITICAL)
   - Every endpoint is open. Any client can create, update, delete, or list any data.
   - `DELETE /api/foods/:id` and `PATCH /api/bookings/:id/status` are fully public.
   - The `.env` file is likely committed to git (it is a regular file in the repo, not gitignored). Contains `MONGODB_URI`.

2. **No Rate Limiting**
   - The upload endpoint (`POST /api/upload`) has no rate limit. An attacker could flood disk space.

3. **No Input Validation on Backend** (HIGH)
   - Phone numbers, addresses, customer names -- no regex validation. Empty strings can pass.
   - `items` array in bookings -- no validation that the array is non-empty, that `quantity > 0`, that `foodId` is a valid ObjectId, or that `price` is a positive number.
   - `total` is accepted from the client and not recalculated server-side from `items`. A client can send `total: 1` for a 1,000,000 VND order.

4. **File Upload Vulnerabilities** (MEDIUM)
   - SVG upload is allowed. SVG files can contain JavaScript (XSS vectors). When served via `express.static`, they could be executed in a browser context.
   - No virus scanning on uploaded files.
   - Uploaded files are stored in `backend/src/uploads/` which is inside the project directory. Could be a path traversal risk if the filename were somehow controllable beyond the `food-{timestamp}` prefix.

5. **CORS is Hardcoded** (MEDIUM)
   - `app.js` line 9: `origin: ['http://localhost:5173', 'http://localhost:5174']` -- not configurable via env var. In production, CORS would need code changes.

6. **`.env` Not in `.gitignore`** (HIGH)
   - The `.env` file at `backend/.env` is tracked. If pushed to a public repo, MongoDB credentials are exposed.
   - Even if the repo is private, storing secrets in a committed file is a bad practice.

7. **No Helmet / Security Headers** (MEDIUM)
   - No `helmet` middleware. Missing security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP, etc.).

8. **No Request Size Limits Beyond Body Parser Default** (LOW)
   - `express.json()` uses default limits. Large payloads could cause memory issues.

#### Architectural Issues

9. **No Service Layer**
   - All business logic is in controllers. No separation between HTTP handling and business rules. This makes unit testing difficult and logic cannot be reused.

10. **No Async Error Wrapper**
    - Every controller function manually wraps each `try/catch` and calls `next(error)`. This is repetitive (13+ `next(error)` calls across 3 controllers). An `asyncHandler` wrapper would eliminate this boilerplate.

11. **No Request Logging**
    - No `morgan` or similar. No audit trail for API calls.

12. **No API Versioning**
    - All routes are `v1` implied. No `/api/v1/` prefix. Future breaking changes will be harder.

13. **No Pagination on Bookings**
    - `getBookings` returns all bookings sorted by date. In production with thousands of bookings, this would be a performance and memory problem.

14. **No Database Indexing Beyond Text Index on Food**
    - `Booking` model has no indexes. Queries on `status` or `createdAt` will do full collection scans as data grows.

15. **Static Files Served Without Cache Headers**
    - `app.use('/uploads', express.static(...))` has no cache-control headers. Every browser reload re-downloads images.

16. **No Graceful Shutdown**
    - `server.js` does not handle `SIGTERM`/`SIGINT`. MongoDB connections may not close cleanly on server restart.

17. **No Environment-Based Configuration**
    - CORS, port, DB URI, upload directory -- only DB URI is env-driven. Everything else is hardcoded.

18. **Duplicate Enum Definitions**
    - The status enum `['pending', 'confirmed', 'done', 'cancelled']` is defined in TWO places: the Mongoose schema (`Booking.js` line 20) AND manually in `bookingController.js` line 61. Violates DRY -- if a new status is added, both must be updated.

19. **No Soft Delete**
    - Foods and bookings are permanently deleted with `findByIdAndDelete`. No recovery option, no audit trail.

20. **Frontend/Backend Validation Asymmetry**
    - Frontend uses `yup` + `react-hook-form` for validation. Backend trusts everything. A malicious or buggy frontend could send invalid data.

#### Code Smells

21. **Magic Strings** -- Response messages like `'Lấy danh sách món ăn thành công'` are repeated in every controller. Should be in a constants/i18n file.

22. **Inconsistent Response Format** -- `getFoods` returns `{ success, message, data: { foods, pagination } }` but `getBookings` returns `{ success, message, data: bookings }` directly. No consistent pagination wrapper on bookings.

23. **No Transactions** -- `createBooking` inserts a booking but does not validate or decrement stock of food items. If the booking succeeds but a subsequent operation fails, there is no rollback.

24. **No Logging** -- `console.log` and `console.error` are used directly. No structured logging (winston, pino). No log levels. No log aggregation readiness.

25. **Hardcoded Seed Data Paths** -- `seed.js` references `/uploads/1.jpg` through `/uploads/6.jpg` but these files likely do not exist in the uploads directory.

---

### Summary Table

| Category | Status |
|----------|--------|
| Tech Stack | Express.js + MongoDB (Mongoose) + Multer |
| Models | 2 (Food, Booking) |
| API Endpoints | 11 |
| Authentication | **NONE** (critical) |
| Authorization | **NONE** (critical) |
| Validation | Mongoose schema only, minimal |
| Error Handling | Global handler present, but no async wrapper |
| File Upload | Multer disk storage, 5MB limit, image-only |
| Testing | **NONE** |
| Realtime | **NONE** |
| Logging | Console.log only |
| Rate Limiting | **NONE** |
| Security Headers | **NONE** |

## Complete Frontend Architecture Analysis

### 1. Project Structure

```
│           │   ├── SearchFilterBar.jsx
│           │   ├── FoodTable.jsx
│           │   ├── FoodCard.jsx
│           │   └── FoodFormModal.jsx
│           └── bookings/
│               └── BookingActions.jsx
└── backend/                  (Express/Node.js)
```

### 2. Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Framework | **React 18.3.1** (Vite SPA, not Next.js) |
| Routing | **React Router v6** (`createBrowserRouter`) |
| State | **Redux Toolkit** (3 slices: foods, cart, bookings) |
| API Client | **Axios** with `axios.create` |
| Forms | **react-hook-form + @hookform/resolvers + yup** |
| Styling | **Tailwind CSS 3.4** + custom CSS utilities |
| Toast | **Sonner 1.7** |
| Icons | **lucide-react** |
| Build | **Vite 6** |

### 3. Routing (All Routes)

Defined in `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/routes/index.jsx` (lines 17-43):

| Path | Component | Layout |
|------|-----------|--------|
| `/` | `HomePage` | `MainLayout` |
| `/foods/:id` | `FoodDetailPage` | `MainLayout` |
| `/cart` | `CartPage` | `MainLayout` |
| `/checkout` | `CheckoutPage` | `MainLayout` |
| `/admin` | `AdminDashboardPage` | `AdminLayout` |
| `/admin/foods` | `AdminFoodsPage` | `AdminLayout` |
| `/admin/bookings` | `AdminBookingsPage` | `AdminLayout` |
| `*` | `NotFoundPage` | none |

### 4. State Management

Redux Toolkit with 3 slices (`src/store/index.js`, lines 6-12):

- **`foodsSlice`** (`src/slices/foodsSlice.js`): manages food items, currentFood, pagination, filters, loading/error. Contains 5 async thunks: `fetchFoods`, `fetchFoodById`, `createFood`, `updateFood`, `deleteFood`.
- **`cartSlice`** (`src/slices/cartSlice.js`): local cart state with localStorage persistence. Synced via `saveCartToStorage()` on every mutation (lines 13-18). Selectors: `selectCartItems`, `selectCartTotal`, `selectCartCount`.
- **`bookingsSlice`** (`src/slices/bookingsSlice.js`): manages booking items, statusFilter. Async thunks: `fetchBookings`, `createBooking`, `updateBookingStatus`.

**No React Query / TanStack Query.** All data fetching is done through Redux async thunks.

### 5. API Integration

Axios-based client in `src/api/axiosClient.js`:

- Base URL: `http://localhost:5000/api` (hardcoded in `src/constants/index.js` line 2)
- **3 API objects**: `foodApi`, `bookingApi`, `uploadApi`
- `uploadApi.upload()` creates `FormData` and posts directly to `${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload` using raw `axios.post` (lines 31-34), bypassing the configured `api` instance
- Vite proxy at `/api` -> `http://localhost:5000` (vite.config.js lines 9-12)
- **No interceptors** for auth tokens or global error handling

### 6. UI Components (13 total)

**Generic UI components** (`src/components/ui/`):
- `LoadingSpinner.jsx` -- size variants (sm/md/lg), CSS border-spin
- `EmptyState.jsx` -- icon + title + description + optional action button
- `StatusBadge.jsx` -- booking status display (pending/confirmed/done/cancelled) + `AvailabilityBadge` export
- `Pagination.jsx` -- ellipsis-aware page buttons
- `ConfirmDialog.jsx` -- modal dialog with backdrop, danger variant

**Feature-specific components** (`src/features/`):
- `foods/SearchFilterBar.jsx` -- search input + category pills + sort dropdown + grid/list toggle
- `foods/FoodTable.jsx` -- admin table with image, edit/delete actions
- `foods/FoodCard.jsx` -- customer-facing card with hover image zoom + `FoodCardSkeleton`
- `foods/FoodFormModal.jsx` -- modal form for create/edit food, dual image mode (URL vs file upload), yup validation
- `bookings/BookingActions.jsx` -- status-transition buttons based on `STATUS_TRANSITIONS` map

**Layouts**:
- `MainLayout.jsx` -- sticky header with logo + nav + cart badge, footer
- `AdminLayout.jsx` -- fixed sidebar with navigation, `Outlet` for child pages

### 7. Pages/Views (8 total)

| Page | File | Key Features |
|------|------|-------------|
| `HomePage` | `pages/user/HomePage.jsx` | Hero section, search+filter, grid/list toggle, food cards, pagination, loading skeleton |
| `FoodDetailPage` | `pages/user/FoodDetailPage.jsx` | Full food info, add-to-cart, availability badge, back navigation |
| `CartPage` | `pages/user/CartPage.jsx` | Cart item list, quantity controls, remove, clear-all dialog, summary panel |
| `CheckoutPage` | `pages/user/CheckoutPage.jsx` | react-hook-form + yup, customer info fields, order preview, create booking thunk |
| `NotFoundPage` | `pages/user/NotFoundPage.jsx` | 404 display with back navigation |
| `AdminDashboardPage` | `pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage.jsx` | Stat cards (foods count, bookings, pending, completed), recent lists |
| `AdminFoodsPage` | `pages/admin/AdminFoodsPage.jsx` | Food table, CRUD via modal, delete dialog, pagination |
| `AdminBookingsPage` | `pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx` | Bookings table, status filter pills, status update actions |

### 8. Authentication

**No authentication whatsoever.** Both frontend and backend have zero auth logic:
- `/admin` route is completely unprotected -- anyone can access it
- No login page, no JWT, no session, no token storage
- No auth middleware on backend routes
- No route guards on frontend

### 9. Form Handling

Two form implementations, both using **react-hook-form + @hookform/resolvers + yup**:

**CheckoutPage** (`src/pages/user/CheckoutPage.jsx`, lines 14-28):
- Schema: `customerName` (min 2), `phone` (regex `0[0-9]{9}`), `address` (min 5), `note` (optional)
- `useForm` with `yupResolver`
- `handleSubmit` dispatches `createBooking` thunk, clears cart on success

**FoodFormModal** (`src/features/foods/FoodFormModal.jsx`, lines 10-21):
- Schema: `name` (min 2), `category` (required), `price` (number, min 1000), `description`, `image`, `isAvailable`
- Dual image input: URL text or file upload via `uploadApi`
- `reset()` called on open/close/data-change (lines 50-71)

### 10. Styling

**Tailwind CSS 3.4** with:
- Custom color palette: `primary` (orange-500 based), `warm` (yellow tint)
- Custom fonts: `font-display` (Playfair Display), `font-body` (DM Sans)
- Custom shadows: `card`, `card-hover`, `soft`
- Custom animations: `fade-in`, `slide-up`, `slide-down`, `scale-in`, `shimmer`
- `@layer components` in `index.css` defines global utility classes: `.input-field`, `.input-label`, `.card`, `.btn`, `.btn-primary/secondary/outline/danger/success/ghost`, `.badge`, `.badge-*`, `.admin-table`

### 11. TypeScript/JavaScript

**JavaScript** (JSX, not TSX). No TypeScript configuration. No `.d.ts` files. No type annotations beyond JSDoc-style.

### 12. Build Config

- **Vite 6** with `@vitejs/plugin-react`
- Dev server on port `5173`
- Proxy `/api` and `/uploads` to `http://localhost:5000`
- No TypeScript check, no ESLint integration, no Prettier config

### 13. Environment Variables

**No `.env` file in frontend.** API URLs are hardcoded in `src/constants/index.js`:
- `API_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000/api'` (line 2)
- `UPLOAD_URL = 'http://localhost:5000'` (line 3)

Backend `.env` (`backend/.env`) contains:
- `PORT=5000`
- `MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/quanli_booking`
- `NODE_ENV=development`

### 14. Critical Weaknesses and Issues

#### A. Security Issues (CRITICAL)

1. **No authentication on admin routes** (`routes/index.jsx` lines 31-38) -- `/admin`, `/admin/foods`, `/admin/bookings` are all publicly accessible. Anyone can manage food items and view all customer bookings with personal info.

2. **No backend auth middleware** (`backend/src/routes/`) -- all routes (`foodRoutes`, `bookingRoutes`) are unprotected. Any client can create/update/delete any food or booking.

3. **Phone/address data exposed** -- The admin bookings table shows customer phone numbers and addresses (`AdminBookingsPage.jsx` lines 113-118) with no privacy controls.

4. **API base URL hardcoded** -- `constants/index.js` lines 2-3 have `http://localhost:5000` hardcoded. No environment variable support for the frontend.

#### B. State Management Problems

5. **No React Query** -- All data fetching is in Redux thunks without caching, background refetching, or deduplication. Every navigation re-fetches data. No optimistic updates for mutations.

6. **Cart persisted only in localStorage** -- If the user opens multiple tabs, cart state diverges. No sync between tabs.

7. **`createBooking.fulfilled` doesn't invalidate foods cache** -- After creating a booking, the foods Redux state is untouched. No cache invalidation strategy exists.

8. **No loading/error state per entity** -- The `foodsSlice` has a single `loading` boolean for all async operations. Simultaneous fetch+create operations conflict.

#### C. Routing Issues

9. **No protected route wrapper** -- No `PrivateRoute` or `ProtectedRoute` component. Admin is accessible to all.

10. **No redirect after logout** (because there's no auth/logout).

11. **Hardcoded URL in inline handler** -- `CartPage.jsx` line 24: `window.location.href = '/'` breaks SPA navigation.

12. **URL mismatch** -- `FoodCard.jsx` line 49 links to `/foods/${food._id}` but router defines `/foods/:id` (missing trailing slash in route definition is fine, but inconsistent path naming convention).

#### D. Performance Concerns

13. **Image URLs built 4 different ways** -- The pattern `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}` is repeated in `FoodCard`, `FoodTable`, `CartPage`, `CheckoutPage`, `FoodDetailPage`, `HomePage`, `AdminBookingsPage`. No shared utility. Also, `HomePage.jsx` line 140 uses the hardcoded `http://localhost:5000` directly instead of `UPLOAD_URL`.

14. **No image lazy loading** -- All images load immediately, no `loading="lazy"`.

15. **No React.memo on list items** -- `FoodCard` re-renders on every parent state change. `FoodTable` row components have no memoization.

16. **Debounce only on search** -- The 400ms debounce in `HomePage.jsx` (line 24) is good, but no debounce on the admin `fetchFoods` reload button which could cause rapid re-fetches.

17. **No skeleton for admin tables** -- `AdminFoodsPage` and `AdminBookingsPage` show no loading skeleton, only an empty div while loading.

18. **`fetchFoods` on every filter/sort/page change** -- No request cancellation, so a fast-changing filter can result in out-of-order responses updating state incorrectly.

#### E. UI/UX Issues

19. **`EmptyStateIcon` defined twice** -- `AdminBookingsPage.jsx` line 143 defines `const EmptyStateIcon = ...` as a local component, but passes `icon={EmptyBagIcon}` (line 163) -- a different local component at line 177. `AdminFoodsPage.jsx` line 111 passes `icon={EmptyStateIcon}` but defines it as `const EmptyStateIcon = ...` (line 143). These are local SVG components used correctly, but the variable naming is confusing and `EmptyBagIcon` is only used in bookings.

20. **`CheckoutPage` imports `EmptyState` but doesn't use it** -- Line 12 imports `EmptyState` but line 49 uses `EmptyState` (JSX component) which would be `undefined` because the import doesn't alias it properly -- wait, actually `import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState'` is correct. But line 49 uses `<EmptyState ...>` which should work. However, line 46 has a bug: `cartItems.length === 0` renders `<EmptyState .../>` but this is inside the component body without a `return`. Actually looking more carefully -- line 46 is inside the function body as part of the early-return, so `return` is missing! Let me re-read... Line 46: `return (` -- yes, it does have `return`. So this is fine.

21. **No pagination in AdminBookingsPage** -- The bookings table shows all bookings with no pagination, while `AdminFoodsPage` has pagination. With many bookings, the table becomes very slow.

22. **No search on admin bookings page** -- Users can only filter by status, not search by customer name or phone.

23. **Cart badge count not synced on tab focus** -- If the user adds items in another tab, the badge count won't update until page refresh.

24. **No "order confirmed" page** -- After checkout, user is redirected to `/` with just a toast. No order summary or confirmation page.

25. **Inconsistent image fallback** -- Some places use `PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE` (Unsplash URL) as fallback, others hardcode the same Unsplash URL directly (`HomePage.jsx` line 143).

#### F. Accessibility Gaps

26. **No ARIA labels** on icon-only buttons (edit, delete, cart badge, etc.)
27. **No keyboard navigation** for the category filter pills, sort dropdown, or status filter buttons
28. **No focus management** when opening/closing modals (ConfirmDialog, FoodFormModal) -- focus is not trapped or restored
29. **Color contrast** -- `.badge-warning` uses amber-100/amber-700 which may fail WCAG AA on some backgrounds
30. **No `alt` text strategy** -- Images use `alt={food.name}` or `alt={item.name}` which is decent but not comprehensive
31. **Form fields** lack explicit `<label htmlFor>` association in some places (FoodFormModal uses `register` which is fine, but labels are just styled divs)
32. **Toast notifications** from Sonner have no screen-reader-specific announcements

#### G. Missing Components/Features

33. **No login/register pages**
34. **No user profile/account page**
35. **No order history for customers**
36. **No search on admin bookings page** (only status filter)
37. **No category management** -- categories are hardcoded in `constants/index.js` (line 6: `'Tất cả', 'Món chính', 'Nước uống', 'Tráng miệng', 'Khai vị'`)
38. **No email/SMS notifications** to customers when booking status changes
39. **No image compression/resizing** on upload -- large images are stored as-is
40. **No revenue/sales analytics** on admin dashboard beyond basic counts
41. **No role-based access** (admin vs. staff vs. customer)
42. **No mobile-optimized admin table** -- admin table has no horizontal scroll on small screens (it does have `overflow-x-auto` at `AdminBookingsPage.jsx` line 84, but `AdminFoodsPage` relies on `FoodTable` which has its own `overflow-x-auto` at line 8)

#### H. Code Quality Issues

43. **`uploadApi.upload` bypasses the configured axios instance** (`src/api/axiosClient.js` lines 31-34) -- it uses raw `axios.post` instead of `api.post`, missing the base URL and any future interceptors.

44. **Booking items store full food data** in `items[]` array (name, price, image) instead of referencing `foodId`. If food data changes, old bookings show stale data. See `CheckoutPage.jsx` lines 69-75 and `Booking.js` model lines 8-15.

45. **`AdminDashboardPage` fetches all bookings without pagination** (`AdminDashboardPage.jsx` line 36: `fetchBookings({})`) -- loads all bookings into memory just to count statuses and show 5 recent.

46. **No error boundary** -- React errors in components will crash the entire app.

47. **`createFood.fulfilled` adds to top of list** (`foodsSlice.js` line 106) but doesn't refetch with current pagination/filters, so the new item may not appear in the current view if filters are active.

48. **`foodsSlice` `fetchFoods.fulfilled` only updates the items array** (`foodsSlice.js` line 80), it does not merge with existing items. Every fetch replaces the entire list, making it impossible to show "recent" vs "all" on the dashboard without a full re-fetch.

---

This completes the full architectural analysis. The project is a well-structured React/Vite SPA with a warm, polished design using Tailwind CSS, but it has significant security gaps (no auth), architectural limitations (no React Query, no caching strategy), and numerous UI/UX polish items to address.

---

## PHÂN TÍCH KIẾN TRÚC HIỆN TẠI

### Tổng quan

| Layer | Công nghệ | Trạng thái |
|-------|-----------|-----------|
| Frontend | React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS 3.4 | ✅ Cơ bản đẹp |
| Backend | Node.js + Express + MongoDB/Mongoose | ⚠️ Cần nâng cấp |
| State | Redux Toolkit | ⚠️ Thiếu React Query |
| Routing | React Router v6 | ⚠️ Chưa có protected routes |
| Auth | **KHÔNG CÓ** | 🚨 CRITICAL |
| Realtime | **KHÔNG CÓ** | 🚨 CRITICAL |
| Testing | **KHÔNG CÓ** | 🚨 CRITICAL |

---

### CÁC ĐIỂM YẾU CHI TIẾT

#### Backend
1. **Không có auth** — mọi endpoint đều public, kể cả DELETE/UPDATE
2. **Không có service layer** — logic dồn hết vào controller
3. **Không có async wrapper** — try/catch lặp lại 13+ chỗ
4. **Không có rate limiting, helmet, logging**
5. **File upload cho phép SVG** (XSS risk)
6. **CORS hardcoded** không qua env
7. **Không có pagination cho bookings**
8. **Không có index cho Booking model**
9. **`.env` không có trong `.gitignore`**
10. **Duplicate enum** status ở 2 chỗ

#### Frontend
1. **Không có protected routes** — `/admin` ai cũng vào được
2. **Không có React Query** — mọi fetch đều qua Redux thunk, không có cache/dedupe
3. **Image URL build 4 cách khác nhau**, hardcoded `localhost:5000`
4. **No skeleton cho admin pages**
5. **Cart không sync giữa các tab**
6. **Không có order confirmation page**
7. **EmptyState import có thể confuse**
8. **Không có error boundary**
9. **Không có ARIA labels, focus management**
10. **No React.memo** — list items re-render liên tục

---

### FILE SẼ GIỮ LẠI / REFACTOR / TẠO MỚI

| Loại | File |
|------|------|
| **Giữ nguyên logic, refactor cấu trúc** | `backend/src/models/Food.js`, `backend/src/models/Booking.js` |
| **Refactor toàn bộ** | `backend/src/app.js`, `backend/src/server.js`, tất cả controllers/routes |
| **Tạo mới hoàn toàn** | Models: User, Coupon, Branch, Review, Notification. Auth middleware, Socket handlers, Service layer, API docs |
| **Giữ nguyên cấu trúc, nâng cấp UI** | `frontend/src/pages/*`, `frontend/src/components/*`, `frontend/src/features/*` |
| **Refactor toàn bộ** | `frontend/src/routes/index.jsx`, `frontend/src/store/*`, `frontend/src/api/*`, `frontend/src/slices/*` |
| **Tạo mới hoàn toàn** | Login, Register, Profile, Order tracking, Wishlist pages. Admin nâng cao. Shipper dashboard. Socket integration. |

---

Bây giờ tôi sẽ bắt đầu xây dựng **Phase 1: UI/UX Premium**. Do đây là công việc cực lớn, tôi sẽ dùng team để làm song song.

SAU ĐÓ thực hiện TẤT CẢ các thay đổi sau:

## A. CÀI ĐẶT PACKAGES MỚI

Chạy: cd C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend && npm install framer-motion socket.io-client react-hot-toast clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority recharts lucide-react @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-select @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-switch

## B. CẬP NHẬT TAILWIND CONFIG

File: tailwind.config.js
- Thêm màu mới: secondary (Emerald #059669), accent (Amber #F59E0B)
- Thêm dark mode support: darkMode: 'class'
- Mở rộng shadows, animations
- Thêm backdrop blur utilities

## C. CẬP NHẬT INDEX.CSS

File: src/index.css
- Thêm dark mode styles
- Mở rộng CSS variables cho theme
- Thêm utility classes mới
- Cải thiện scrollbar, selection
- Thêm font smoothing

## D. TẠO CẤU TRÚC THƯ MỤC MỚI

Tạo thư mục:
- src/lib/ (utilities)
- src/hooks/ (custom hooks)
- src/components/ui/v2/ (new premium components)

## E. TẠO UTILITY FILES

### src/lib/utils.js
```javascript
import { clsx } from 'clsx';
import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';

export function cn(...inputs) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
}

export function formatPrice(price) {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(price);
}

export function formatDate(date) {
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(new Date(date));
}

export function formatDateTime(date) {
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }).format(new Date(date));
}

export function slugify(text) {
  return text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '').replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
}

export function getImageUrl(path) {
  if (!path) return null;
  if (path.startsWith('http')) return path;
  return `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'}${path}`;
}
```

### src/hooks/useAuth.js
Custom hook đọc auth state từ Redux

### src/hooks/useSocket.js
Socket.io client hook

## F. TẠO PREMIUM UI COMPONENTS (src/components/ui/v2/)

### Button.jsx
- Variants: primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger
- Sizes: sm, md, lg
- Loading state với spinner
- Icon support left/right
- Dùng class-variance-authority + cn

### Input.jsx
- Label, error, helper text
- Icon prefix/suffix
- Dùng forwardRef

### Select.jsx
- Dùng @radix-ui/react-select
- Search/filter support

### Dialog.jsx
- Dùng @radix-ui/react-dialog
- Animated overlay + content
- Close on outside click / escape

### Badge.jsx
- Variants: success, warning, danger, info, gray, primary, secondary
- Dot indicator variant

### Card.jsx
- Hover lift animation
- Padding variants

### Skeleton.jsx
- Shimmer animation
- Variants: text, image, card, table-row

### Avatar.jsx
- Image với fallback initials
- Size variants
- Online indicator

### Toast.jsx
- Dùng react-hot-toast thay vì sonner
- Premium styling

### DropdownMenu.jsx
- Dùng @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu

### Tooltip.jsx
- Dùng @radix-ui/react-tooltip

### Tabs.jsx
- Dùng @radix-ui/react-tabs

### Modal.jsx
- Generic modal wrapper với animations

### Sidebar.jsx
- Collapsible sidebar cho admin/shipper
- Dùng framer-motion cho animation

### CartSidebar.jsx
- Slide-in cart từ bên phải
- Dùng framer-motion
- Mini cart preview
- Animated item count badge

## G. REDESIGN MAIN LAYOUT (src/layouts/MainLayout.jsx)

Thiết kế header premium:
- Logo bên trái
- Nav links ở giữa (Trang chủ, Thực đơn, Khuyến mãi)
- Search bar có thể expand
- Cart icon với animated badge
- User menu dropdown (login/register hoặc profile/logout)
- Dark mode toggle
- Responsive: hamburger menu trên mobile

Hero section tích hợp:
- Gradient background đẹp (orange to amber)
- Large search bar
- Quick category pills
- Promo banner carousel (nếu có promo)

Footer premium:
- 4 columns: Logo+desc, Quick links, Categories, Newsletter
- Social icons
- Payment icons

## H. REDESIGN ADMIN LAYOUT (src/layouts/AdminLayout.jsx)

- Collapsible sidebar với framer-motion
- Sidebar nav: Dashboard, Foods, Orders, Users, Promos, Branches, Settings
- Top bar với notification bell, user menu
- Breadcrumbs

### src/utils/asyncHandler.js
```javascript
const asyncHandler = (fn) => (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
module.exports = asyncHandler;
```

### src/utils/ApiResponse.js
```javascript
class ApiResponse {
  constructor(statusCode, data, message = 'Success') {
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.success = statusCode < 400;
    this.data = data;
    this.message = message;
  }
}
module.exports = ApiResponse;
```

Winston logger configuration

### src/models/Booking.model.js (thay thế Booking.js)
Schema mới với:
- orderCode (unique, auto-generated)
- customer (ref to User, or guest fields for non-auth)
- items[]: { foodId, foodName, quantity, price, image, variant?, toppings? }
- subtotal, discount, deliveryFee, total
- coupon (ref to Coupon)
- paymentMethod
- fulfillmentType: delivery | pickup | reservation
- branch (ref to Branch)
- status: pending | confirmed | preparing | delivering | done | cancelled
- assignedShipper (ref to User)
- cancelReason
- trackingLogs[]: { status, note, timestamp, updatedBy }
- estimatedDeliveryTime
- customerInfo: { name, phone, address } (for guest orders)
- Thêm indexes: customer, status, createdAt, orderCode

### src/models/User.model.js (MỚI)
```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');

const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  label: String, // 'Nhà', 'Công ty'
  fullName: String,
  phone: String,
  address: String,
  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
});

const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  fullName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  email: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
  passwordHash: { type: String, required: true },
  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
  role: { type: String, enum: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], default: 'customer' },
  addresses: [addressSchema],
  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
  refreshToken: { type: String },
  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
}, { timestamps: true });

userSchema.pre('save', async function(next) {
  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
  this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
  next();
});

userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function(candidatePassword) {
  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
};

userSchema.methods.toJSON = function() {
  const obj = this.toObject();
  delete obj.passwordHash;
  delete obj.refreshToken;
  return obj;
};

module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);
```

### src/models/Coupon.model.js (MỚI)
```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');

const couponSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  code: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, uppercase: true },
  type: { type: String, enum: ['percent', 'fixed'], required: true },
  value: { type: Number, required: true }, // percent (0-100) or VND amount
  minOrder: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  maxDiscount: { type: Number }, // for percent type
  freeShippingThreshold: { type: Number }, // if set, free shipping when total >= this
  startDate: { type: Date, required: true },
  endDate: { type: Date, required: true },
  usageLimit: { type: Number, default: 1 }, // per user
  totalLimit: { type: Number }, // total usage limit
  usedCount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
  applicableCategories: [String],
  applicableFoods: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
}, { timestamps: true });

module.exports = mongoose.model('Coupon', couponSchema);
```

```javascript
  openHours: { type: String, default: '08:00 - 22:00' },
  lat: Number,
  lng: Number,
  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },

}, { timestamps: true });

module.exports = mongoose.model('Branch', branchSchema);
```

```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');

const reviewSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  user: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true },
  food: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food', required: true },
  rating: { type: Number, required: true, min: 1, max: 5 },
  comment: { type: String, trim: true },
  isVerified: { type: Boolean, default: false },
}, { timestamps: true });

reviewSchema.index({ food: 1, createdAt: -1 });
reviewSchema.index({ user: 1 });

module.exports = mongoose.model('Review', reviewSchema);
```

```javascript
  title: { type: String, required: true },
  message: { type: String, required: true },

  isRead: { type: Boolean, default: false },

}, { timestamps: true });

notificationSchema.index({ user: 1, isRead: 1, createdAt: -1 });

module.exports = mongoose.model('Notification', notificationSchema);
```

## F. TẠO MIDDLEWARES

### src/middlewares/auth.middleware.js
```javascript
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');

const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, _, next) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  if (!token) throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Access token required');
  
  const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
  const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
  if (!user || !user.isActive) throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid or inactive user');
  
  req.user = user;
  next();
});

const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, _, next) => {
  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Insufficient permissions');
  }
  next();
};

const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, _, next) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  if (token) {
    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    } catch {}
  }
  next();
});

module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };
```

### src/controllers/auth.controller.js (MỚI)
```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');

const generateAccessToken = (userId) => jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '15m' });
const generateRefreshToken = (userId) => jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' });

exports.register = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { fullName, email, password, phone } = req.body;
  const existing = await User.findOne({ email });
  if (existing) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email already registered');
  
  const user = await User.create({ fullName, email, passwordHash: password, phone });
  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
  await user.save();
  
  res.cookie('accessToken', accessToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000 });
  res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 });
  
  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Registration successful'));
});

exports.login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { email, password } = req.body;
  const user = await User.findOne({ email });
  if (!user || !(await user.comparePassword(password))) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
  }
  if (!user.isActive) throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Account is disabled');
  
  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
  await user.save();
  
  res.cookie('accessToken', accessToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000 });
  res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 });
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Login successful'));
});

exports.logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  if (req.user) {
    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
  }
  res.clearCookie('accessToken');
  res.clearCookie('refreshToken');
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Logged out successfully'));
});

exports.getMe = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, req.user, 'User profile'));
});

exports.refreshToken = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const refreshToken = req.cookies.refreshToken || req.body.refreshToken;
  if (!refreshToken) throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Refresh token required');
  
  const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
  const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
  if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
  }
  
  const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
  res.cookie('accessToken', newAccessToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000 });
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken }, 'Token refreshed'));
});

exports.updateProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { fullName, phone, avatar, addresses } = req.body;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  if (fullName) user.fullName = fullName;
  if (phone) user.phone = phone;
  if (avatar !== undefined) user.avatar = avatar;
  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;
  await user.save();
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Profile updated'));
});

exports.changePassword = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { currentPassword, newPassword } = req.body;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  if (!(await user.comparePassword(currentPassword))) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password is incorrect');
  }
  user.passwordHash = newPassword;
  await user.save();
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Password changed successfully'));
});

exports.addToWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { foodId } = req.body;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  if (!user.wishlist.includes(foodId)) {
    user.wishlist.push(foodId);
    await user.save();
  }
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Added to wishlist'));
});

exports.removeFromWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { foodId } = req.params;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  user.wishlist = user.wishlist.filter(id => id.toString() !== foodId);
  await user.save();
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Removed from wishlist'));
});

exports.getWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).populate('wishlist');
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, user.wishlist, 'Wishlist retrieved'));
});
```

### src/controllers/admin.controller.js (MỚI)
```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');

exports.getStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const [totalFoods, totalOrders, totalUsers, pendingOrders] = await Promise.all([
    Food.countDocuments(),
    Booking.countDocuments(),
    User.countDocuments({ role: 'customer' }),
    Booking.countDocuments({ status: 'pending' }),
  ]);
  
  const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const todayOrders = await Booking.countDocuments({ createdAt: { $gte: today } });
  const todayRevenue = await Booking.aggregate([
    { $match: { status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] }, createdAt: { $gte: today } } },
    { $group: { _id: null, total: { $sum: '$total' } } }
  ]);
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, {
    totalFoods, totalOrders, totalUsers, pendingOrders,
    todayOrders,
    todayRevenue: todayRevenue[0]?.total || 0,
  }));
});

exports.getRevenueStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { period = '30d' } = req.query;
  let startDate = new Date();
  if (period === '7d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 7);
  else if (period === '30d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 30);
  else if (period === '90d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 90);
  else startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 365);
  
  const data = await Booking.aggregate([
    { $match: { createdAt: { $gte: startDate }, status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] } } },
    { $group: { _id: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$createdAt' } }, revenue: { $sum: '$total' }, orders: { $sum: 1 } } },
    { $sort: { _id: 1 } }
  ]);
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, data));
});

exports.getTopFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const topFoods = await Food.find().sort({ soldCount: -1 }).limit(10).select('name soldCount ratingAverage image price');
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, topFoods));
});

exports.getCategoryStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const stats = await Food.aggregate([
    { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    { $sort: { count: -1 } }
  ]);
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, stats));
});

exports.getUserStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const [total, newThisMonth] = await Promise.all([
    User.countDocuments({ role: 'customer' }),
    User.countDocuments({ role: 'customer', createdAt: { $gte: new Date(new Date().setDate(1)) } })
  ]);
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, { total, newThisMonth }));
});
```

### src/controllers/order.controller.js (MỚI)
```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');

const generateOrderCode = () => 'ORD' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase();

exports.createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { items, customerInfo, fulfillmentType, paymentMethod, couponCode, branchId, note } = req.body;
  
  // Calculate prices
  let subtotal = 0;
  const orderItems = [];
  for (const item of items) {
    const food = await Food.findById(item.foodId);
    if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food ${item.foodId} not found`);
    const price = item.price || food.price;
    subtotal += price * item.quantity;
    orderItems.push({
      foodId: food._id,
      foodName: food.name,
      quantity: item.quantity,
      price,
      image: food.image,
    });
    // Update sold count
    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(food._id, { $inc: { soldCount: item.quantity } });
  }
  
  // Validate and apply coupon
  let discount = 0;
  let coupon = null;
  if (couponCode) {
    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Invalid coupon code');
    if (coupon.startDate > new Date() || coupon.endDate < new Date()) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired or not yet active');
    }
    if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    }
    if (subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    }
    if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
      discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    } else {
      discount = coupon.value;
    }
    await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(coupon._id, { $inc: { usedCount: 1 } });
  }
  
  const deliveryFee = fulfillmentType === 'delivery' ? (subtotal - discount >= 100000 ? 0 : 15000) : 0;
  const total = subtotal - discount + deliveryFee;
  
  const order = await Booking.create({
    orderCode: generateOrderCode(),
    customer: req.user?._id,
    items: orderItems,
    subtotal,
    discount,
    deliveryFee,
    total,
    coupon: coupon?._id,
    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || 'cod',
    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || 'delivery',
    branch: branchId,
    customerInfo,
    note,
    status: 'pending',
    trackingLogs: [{ status: 'pending', note: 'Order placed', timestamp: new Date() }],
  });
  
  // Create notification for admin
  const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');
  await Notification.create({
    user: null, // admin notification
    title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
    message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} vừa được đặt`,
    type: 'order',
    link: `/admin/orders/${order._id}`,
  });
  
  return res.status(201).json(new ApiResponse(201, order, 'Order placed successfully'));
});

exports.getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;
  const query = req.user ? { customer: req.user._id } : { 'customerInfo.phone': req.query.phone };
  if (status) query.status = status;
  
  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
    .populate('coupon')
    .populate('branch')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    .skip((page - 1) * limit)
    .limit(limit);
  
  const total = await Booking.countDocuments(query);
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, { orders, pagination: { total, page: +page, limit: +limit, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } }));
});

exports.getOrderById = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id)
    .populate('coupon')
    .populate('branch')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .populate('items.foodId');
  
  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
  // Check ownership
  if (req.user && order.customer?.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
  }
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, order));
});

exports.updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, note, cancelReason } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
  
  order.status = status;
  order.trackingLogs.push({ status, note, timestamp: new Date() });
  if (cancelReason) order.cancelReason = cancelReason;
  await order.save();
  
  // Create notification for customer
  if (order.customer) {
    await Notification.create({
      user: order.customer,
      title: 'Cập nhật đơn hàng',
      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được cập nhật: ${status}`,
      type: 'order',
      link: `/orders/${order._id}`,
    });
  }
  
  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
    .populate('coupon')
    .populate('branch')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar');
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Order status updated'));
});

exports.assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { shipperId } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findByIdAndUpdate(
    req.params.id,
    { assignedShipper: shipperId, status: 'confirmed' },
    { new: true }
  ).populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar');
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Shipper assigned'));
});

exports.cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { reason } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
  if (['done', 'cancelled'].includes(order.status)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot cancel this order');
  }
  
  order.status = 'cancelled';
  order.cancelReason = reason || 'Customer cancelled';
  order.trackingLogs.push({ status: 'cancelled', note: reason || 'Customer cancelled', timestamp: new Date() });
  await order.save();
  
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order cancelled'));
});

exports.getAllOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, search, page = 1, limit = 15 } = req.query;
  const query = {};
  if (status) query.status = status;
  if (search) {
    query.$or = [
      { orderCode: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { 'customerInfo.name': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { 'customerInfo.phone': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
    ];
  }
  
  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .populate('branch', 'name address')
    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    .skip((page - 1) * limit)
    .limit(limit);
  
  const total = await Booking.countDocuments(query);
  return res.json(new ApiResponse(200, { orders, pagination: { total, page: +page, limit: +limit, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } }));
});
```

## H. TẠO SOCKET SERVICE

### src/services/socket.service.js
```javascript
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const User = require('../models/User.model');

function initSocket(io) {
  // Middleware for socket auth
  io.use(async (socket, next) => {
    try {
      const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
      if (token) {
        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
        socket.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
      }
      next();
    } catch {
      next(new Error('Authentication error'));
    }
  });

  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
    // Join user-specific room
    if (socket.user) {
      socket.join(`user:${socket.user._id}`);
    }
    
    // Admin joins admin room
    if (socket.user?.role === 'admin') {
      socket.join('admin');
    }
    
    // Shipper joins shipper room
    if (socket.user?.role === 'shipper') {
      socket.join('shipper');
    }
    
    socket.on('disconnect', () => {});
  });
}

module.exports = { initSocket };
```

## I. CẬP NHẬT ROUTES

### src/routes/auth.routes.js
```javascript
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const authController = require('../controllers/auth.controller');
const { verifyJWT } = require('../middlewares/auth.middleware');

router.post('/register', authController.register);
router.post('/login', authController.login);
router.post('/logout', verifyJWT, authController.logout);
router.get('/me', verifyJWT, authController.getMe);
router.post('/refresh', authController.refreshToken);
router.put('/profile', verifyJWT, authController.updateProfile);
router.put('/change-password', verifyJWT, authController.changePassword);
router.post('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.addToWishlist);
router.delete('/wishlist/:foodId', verifyJWT, authController.removeFromWishlist);
router.get('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.getWishlist);

module.exports = router;
```

## J. CẬP NHẬT APP.JS

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const cors = require('cors');
const helmet = require('helmet');
const path = require('path');

// Import routes
const authRoutes = require('./routes/auth.routes');
const foodRoutes = require('./routes/food.routes');
const orderRoutes = require('./routes/booking.routes');
const uploadRoutes = require('./routes/uploadRoutes');
const reviewRoutes = require('./routes/review.routes');
const couponRoutes = require('./routes/coupon.routes');
const branchRoutes = require('./routes/branch.routes');
const notificationRoutes = require('./routes/notification.routes');
const adminRoutes = require('./routes/admin.routes');
const errorHandler = require('./middleware/errorHandler');

const app = express();

// Security
app.use(helmet({ crossOriginResourcePolicy: { policy: 'cross-origin' } }));

// CORS
const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
app.use(cors({ origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true }));

// Body parsing
app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));

// Static files
app.use('/uploads', express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'uploads')));

// Health check
app.get('/api/health', (_, res) => res.json({ success: true, message: 'Server running', data: null }));

// Routes
app.use('/api/auth', authRoutes);
app.use('/api/foods', foodRoutes);
app.use('/api/orders', orderRoutes);
app.use('/api/upload', uploadRoutes);
app.use('/api/reviews', reviewRoutes);
app.use('/api/coupons', couponRoutes);
app.use('/api/branches', branchRoutes);
app.use('/api/notifications', notificationRoutes);
app.use('/api/admin', adminRoutes);

// 404
app.use((_, res) => res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Route not found', data: null }));

// Error handler
app.use(errorHandler);

module.exports = app;
```

## K. CẬP NHẬT SERVER.JS

```javascript
require('dotenv').config();
const http = require('http');
const { Server } = require('socket.io');
const app = require('./app');
const connectDB = require('./config/database');
const { initSocket } = require('./services/socket.service');

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;

const server = http.createServer(app);

// Socket.io
const io = new Server(server, {
  cors: {
    origin: (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(','),
    credentials: true,
  },
});

initSocket(io);

// Make io available to routes
app.set('io', io);

connectDB().then(() => {
  server.listen(PORT, () => {
    console.log(`🚀 Server running on port ${PORT}`);
  });
}).catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ DB connection failed:', err);
  process.exit(1);
});

// Graceful shutdown
process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
  server.close(() => process.exit(0));
});
```

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { foodApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Async thunks
     5→export const fetchFoods = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const response = await foodApi.getAll(params);
     8→    return response.data;
     9→  } catch (error) {
    10→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    11→  }
    12→});
    13→
    14→export const fetchFoodById = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchById', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    const response = await foodApi.getById(id);
    17→    return response.data;
    18→  } catch (error) {
    19→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    20→  }
    21→});
    22→
    23→export const createFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    24→  try {
    25→    const response = await foodApi.create(data);
    26→    return response.data;
    27→  } catch (error) {
    28→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    29→  }
    30→});
    31→
    32→export const updateFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/update', async ({ id, data }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    33→  try {
    34→    const response = await foodApi.update(id, data);
    35→    return response.data;
    36→  } catch (error) {
    37→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    38→  }
    39→});
    40→
    41→export const deleteFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/delete', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    42→  try {
    43→    const response = await foodApi.delete(id);
    44→    return { ...response.data, id };
    45→  } catch (error) {
    46→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    47→  }
    48→});
    49→
    50→const foodsSlice = createSlice({
    51→  name: 'foods',
    52→  initialState: {
    53→    items: [],
    54→    currentFood: null,
    55→    pagination: { currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1, totalItems: 0, limit: 8 },
    56→    loading: false,
    57→    error: null,
    58→    filters: { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' },
    59→  },
    60→  reducers: {
    61→    setFilters: (state, action) => {
    62→      state.filters = { ...state.filters, ...action.payload };
    63→    },
    64→    resetFilters: (state) => {
    65→      state.filters = { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' };
    66→    },
    67→    clearCurrentFood: (state) => {
    68→      state.currentFood = null;
    69→    },
    70→  },
    71→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    72→    // Fetch all
    73→    builder
    74→      .addCase(fetchFoods.pending, (state) => {
    75→        state.loading = true;
    76→        state.error = null;
    77→      })
    78→      .addCase(fetchFoods.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    79→        state.loading = false;
    80→        state.items = action.payload.data.foods;
    81→        state.pagination = action.payload.data.pagination;
    82→      })
    83→      .addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
    84→        state.loading = false;
    85→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    86→      });
    87→
    88→    // Fetch by ID
    89→    builder
    90→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.pending, (state) => {
    91→        state.loading = true;
    92→        state.error = null;
    93→      })
    94→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    95→        state.loading = false;
    96→        state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
    97→      })
    98→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    99→        state.loading = false;
   100→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
   101→      });
   102→
   103→    // Create
   104→    builder
   105→      .addCase(createFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   106→        state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
   107→      });
   108→
   109→    // Update
   110→    builder
   111→      .addCase(updateFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   112→        const idx = state.items.findIndex((f) => f._id === action.payload.data._id);
   113→        if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
   114→        if (state.currentFood?._id === action.payload.data._id) {
   115→          state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
   116→        }
   117→      });
   118→
   119→    // Delete
   120→    builder
   121→      .addCase(deleteFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   122→        state.items = state.items.filter((f) => f._id !== action.payload.id);
   123→      });
   124→  },
   125→});
   126→
   127→export const { setFilters, resetFilters, clearCurrentFood } = foodsSlice.actions;
   128→export default foodsSlice.reducer;
   129→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\cartSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→
     3→// Load cart from localStorage
     4→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const stored = localStorage.getItem('cart');
     7→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
     8→  } catch {
     9→    return [];
    10→  }
    11→};
    12→
    13→const saveCartToStorage = (items) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(items));
    16→  } catch {
    17→    // ignore
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→
    21→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    22→  name: 'cart',
    23→  initialState: {
    24→    items: loadCartFromStorage(),
    25→  },
    26→  reducers: {
    27→    addToCart: (state, action) => {
    28→      const existing = state.items.find((item) => item._id === action.payload._id);
    29→      if (existing) {
    30→        existing.quantity += 1;
    31→      } else {
    32→        state.items.push({ ...action.payload, quantity: 1 });
    33→      }
    34→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    35→    },
    36→    removeFromCart: (state, action) => {
    37→      state.items = state.items.filter((item) => item._id !== action.payload);
    38→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    39→    },
    40→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    41→      const { id, quantity } = action.payload;
    42→      const item = state.items.find((i) => i._id === id);
    43→      if (item) {
    44→        if (quantity <= 0) {
    45→          state.items = state.items.filter((i) => i._id !== id);
    46→        } else {
    47→          item.quantity = quantity;
    48→        }
    49→      }
    50→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    51→    },
    52→    clearCart: (state) => {
    53→      state.items = [];
    54→      saveCartToStorage([]);
    55→    },
    56→  },
    57→});
    58→
    59→// Selectors
    60→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items;
    61→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    62→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0);
    63→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
    64→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
    65→
    66→export const { addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart } = cartSlice.actions;
    67→export default cartSlice.reducer;
    68→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     4→export const fetchBookings = createAsyncThunk('bookings/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {

     8→  } catch (error) {

    14→  try {
    15→    const response = await bookingApi.create(data);
    16→    return response.data;
    17→  } catch (error) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });

    20→});
    21→
    22→export const updateBookingStatus = createAsyncThunk(
    23→  'bookings/updateStatus',
    24→  async ({ id, status }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    25→    try {
    26→      const response = await bookingApi.updateStatus(id, status);
    27→      return response.data;

    40→    statusFilter: 'Tất cả',
```
