    52→        state.error = null;

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';
     2→import { API_BASE_URL, UPLOAD_URL } from '../constants';
     3→
     4→const api = axios.create({
     5→  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     6→  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
     7→});
     8→
     9→// Food APIs
    10→export const foodApi = {
    11→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/foods', { params }),
    12→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/foods/${id}`),
    13→  create: (data) => api.post('/foods', data),
    14→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/foods/${id}`, data),
    15→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/foods/${id}`),
    16→};
    17→
    18→// Booking APIs
    19→export const bookingApi = {
    20→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/bookings', { params }),
    21→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/bookings/${id}`),
    22→  create: (data) => api.post('/bookings', data),
    23→  updateStatus: (id, status) => api.patch(`/bookings/${id}/status`, { status }),
    24→};
    25→
    26→// Upload API
    27→export const uploadApi = {
    28→  upload: async (file) => {
    29→    const formData = new FormData();
    30→    formData.append('image', file);
    31→    const response = await axios.post(`${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload`, formData, {
    32→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
    33→    });
    34→    return response;
    35→  },
    36→};
    37→
    38→export default api;
    39→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→require('dotenv').config();
     2→const app = require('./app');
     3→const connectDB = require('./config/database');
     4→
     5→const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
     6→
     7→connectDB();
     8→
     9→app.listen(PORT, () => {
    10→  console.log(`🍽️  Server đang chạy tại http://localhost:${PORT}`);

```text
     1→const express = require('express');
     2→const cors = require('cors');
     3→const path = require('path');
     4→const errorHandler = require('./middleware/errorHandler');
     5→
     6→const app = express();
     7→
     8→// Middleware
     9→app.use(cors({ origin: ['http://localhost:5173', 'http://localhost:5174'] }));
    10→app.use(express.json());
    11→app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));
    12→
    13→// Static files (uploaded images)
    14→app.use('/uploads', express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'uploads')));
    15→
    16→// Routes
    17→app.use('/api/foods', require('./routes/foodRoutes'));
    18→app.use('/api/bookings', require('./routes/bookingRoutes'));
    19→app.use('/api/upload', require('./routes/uploadRoutes'));
    20→
    21→// Health check
    22→app.get('/api/health', (req, res) => {
    23→  res.json({ success: true, message: 'API đang hoạt động', data: null });
    24→});
    25→
    26→// 404 handler
    27→app.use((req, res) => {
    28→  res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Route không tồn tại', data: null });
    29→});
    30→
    31→// Error handler
    32→app.use(errorHandler);
    33→
    34→module.exports = app;
    35→
```
</details></tool-use>

    12→  { timestamps: true }
    13→);

    15→foodSchema.index({ name: 'text', description: 'text' });

    17→module.exports = mongoose.model('Food', foodSchema);

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\user\HomePage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods, setFilters } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import FoodCard, { FoodCardSkeleton } from '../../features/foods/FoodCard';
     5→import SearchFilterBar from '../../features/foods/SearchFilterBar';
     6→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     7→import Pagination from '../../components/ui/Pagination';
     8→import { UtensilsCrossed, SearchX } from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    10→
    11→const HomePage = () => {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items, loading, pagination, filters } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    14→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid');
    15→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    16→
    17→  // Debounced search
    18→  const [searchInput, setSearchInput] = useState(filters.search);
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    22→      dispatch(setFilters({ search: searchInput }));
    23→      setPage(1);
    24→    }, 400);
    25→    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    26→  }, [searchInput, dispatch]);
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ ...filters, page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    30→  }, [filters, page, dispatch]);
    31→
    32→  const handleCategoryChange = (category) => {
    33→    dispatch(setFilters({ category }));
    34→    setPage(1);
    35→  };
    36→
    37→  const handleSortChange = (sort) => {
    38→    dispatch(setFilters({ sort }));
    39→    setPage(1);
    40→  };
    41→
    42→  return (
    43→    <div className="min-h-screen">
    44→      {/* Hero section */}
    45→      <section className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-900 via-stone-800 to-primary-900 text-white">
    46→        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-10">
    47→          <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{
    48→            backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, #f97316 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, #f97316 0%, transparent 40%)',
    49→          }} />
    50→        </div>
    51→        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 md:py-28">
    52→          <div className="max-w-2xl">
    53→            <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-amber-300 mb-6 animate-fade-in">
    54→              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
    55→              Đặt món trực tuyến ngay hôm nay
    56→            </div>
    57→            <h1 className="font-display text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight animate-slide-up">
    58→              Thưởng thức món ăn
    59→              <span className="block text-primary-400">đậm chất Việt</span>
    60→            </h1>
    61→            <p className="text-lg text-stone-300 mb-8 animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '100ms' }}>
    62→              Hàng trăm món ngon từ nhà hàng của chúng tôi. Đặt hàng dễ dàng, giao tận nơi.
    63→            </p>
    64→            <div className="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm text-stone-400 animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '200ms' }}>
    65→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    66→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-emerald-400 rounded-full" />
    67→                <span>Nguyên liệu tươi sạch</span>
    68→              </div>
    69→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    70→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-amber-400 rounded-full" />
    71→                <span>Đầu bếp chuyên nghiệp</span>
    72→              </div>
    73→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    74→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-primary-400 rounded-full" />
    75→                <span>Giao hàng nhanh</span>
    76→              </div>
    77→            </div>
    78→          </div>
    79→        </div>
    80→        {/* Decorative wave */}
    81→        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0">
    82→          <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 60" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    83→            <path d="M0 60L60 54C120 48 240 36 360 30C480 24 600 24 720 27C840 30 960 36 1080 39C1200 42 1320 42 1380 42L1440 42V60H0Z" fill="#fafaf9"/>
    84→          </svg>
    85→        </div>
    86→      </section>
    87→
    88→      {/* Menu section */}
    89→      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
    90→        {/* Section header */}
    91→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
    92→          <div>
    93→            <h2 className="font-display text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">
    94→              Thực đơn của chúng tôi
    95→            </h2>
    96→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">
    97→              {pagination.totalItems} món ăn có sẵn
    98→            </p>
    99→          </div>
   100→        </div>
   101→
   102→        {/* Search & Filter */}
   103→        <SearchFilterBar
   104→          search={searchInput}
   105→          category={filters.category}
   106→          sort={filters.sort}
   107→          viewMode={viewMode}
   108→          onSearchChange={setSearchInput}
   109→          onCategoryChange={handleCategoryChange}
   110→          onSortChange={handleSortChange}
   111→          onViewChange={setViewMode}
   112→        />
   113→
   114→        {/* Loading skeleton */}
   115→        {loading && (
   116→          <div className={`grid gap-6 ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4' : 'grid-cols-1'}`}>
   117→            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
   118→              <FoodCardSkeleton key={i} />
   119→            ))}
   120→          </div>
   121→        )}
   122→
   123→        {/* Food list */}
   124→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'grid' && (
   125→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
   126→            {items.map((food, idx) => (
   127→              <div key={food._id} style={{ animationDelay: `${idx * 50}ms` }}>
   128→                <FoodCard food={food} />
   129→              </div>
   130→            ))}
   131→          </div>
   132→        )}
   133→
   134→        {/* Table view */}
   135→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'table' && (
   136→          <div className="grid gap-4">
   137→            {items.map((food) => (
   138→              <div key={food._id} className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4">
   139→                <img
   140→                  src={food.image?.startsWith('http') ? food.image : `http://localhost:5000${food.image}`}
   141→                  alt={food.name}
   142→                  className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
   143→                  onError={(e) => { e.target.src = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=100&h=100&fit=crop'; }}
   144→                />
   145→                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   146→                  <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 truncate">{food.name}</h3>
   147→                  <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{food.category}</span>
   148→                </div>
   149→                <div className="text-right">
   150→                  <div className="font-bold text-primary-600">
   151→                    {new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(food.price)}
   152→                  </div>
   153→                  <span className={`badge ${food.isAvailable ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-danger'} text-[10px]`}>
   154→                    {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn' : 'Hết'}
   155→                  </span>
   156→                </div>
   157→              </div>
   158→            ))}
   159→          </div>
   160→        )}
   161→
   162→        {/* Empty state */}
   163→        {!loading && items.length === 0 && (
   164→          <EmptyState
   165→            icon={filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả' ? SearchX : UtensilsCrossed}
   166→            title={filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả' ? 'Không tìm thấy món phù hợp' : 'Chưa có món ăn nào'}
   167→            description={
   168→              filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả'
   169→                ? 'Thử thay đổi từ khóa tìm kiếm hoặc bỏ bộ lọc'
   170→                : 'Hãy quay lại sau để xem thực đơn mới'
   171→            }
   172→          />
   173→        )}
   174→
   175→        {/* Pagination */}
   176→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && (
   177→          <Pagination
   178→            currentPage={pagination.currentPage}
   179→            totalPages={pagination.totalPages}
   180→            onPageChange={setPage}
   181→          />
   182→        )}
   183→      </section>
   184→    </div>
   185→  );
   186→};
   187→
   188→export default HomePage;
   189→
```
</details></tool-use>

    23→    note: { type: String, default: '', trim: true },
    24→  },
    25→  { timestamps: true }
    26→);
    27→
    28→module.exports = mongoose.model('Booking', bookingSchema);
    29→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\foodController.js`

```text
     1→const Food = require('../models/Food');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả món ăn (có filter, sort, pagination, search)
     4→const getFoods = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { search, category, sort = '-createdAt', page = 1, limit = 8 } = req.query;
     7→
     8→    const query = {};
     9→
    10→    // Search theo tên
    11→    if (search) {
    12→      query.name = { $regex: search, $options: 'i' };
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    // Filter theo category
    16→    if (category && category !== 'Tất cả') {
    17→      query.category = category;
    18→    }
    19→
    20→    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
    21→    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
    22→    const skip = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
    23→
    24→    // Đếm tổng
    25→    const total = await Food.countDocuments(query);
    26→
    27→    // Lấy danh sách - sort: price_asc, price_desc, newest
    28→    let sortOption = {};
    29→    if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOption = { price: 1 };
    30→    else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOption = { price: -1 };
    31→    else if (sort === 'newest') sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    32→    else sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    33→
    34→    const foods = await Food.find(query).sort(sortOption).skip(skip).limit(limitNum);
    35→
    36→    res.status(200).json({
    37→      success: true,
    38→      message: 'Lấy danh sách món ăn thành công',
    39→      data: {
    40→        foods,
    41→        pagination: {
    42→          currentPage: pageNum,
    43→          totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limitNum),
    44→          totalItems: total,
    45→          limit: limitNum,
    46→        },
    47→      },
    48→    });
    49→  } catch (error) {
    50→    next(error);
    51→  }
    52→};
    53→
    54→// @desc    Lấy 1 món ăn
    55→const getFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    56→  try {
    57→    const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    58→    if (!food) {
    59→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
    60→      error.statusCode = 404;
    61→      return next(error);
    62→    }
    63→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin món ăn thành công', data: food });
    64→  } catch (error) {
    65→    next(error);
    66→  }
    67→};
    68→
    69→// @desc    Tạo món ăn mới
    70→const createFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    71→  try {
    72→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    73→
    74→    const food = await Food.create({
    75→      name,
    76→      category,
    77→      price: parseFloat(price),
    78→      image: image || '',
    79→      description: description || '',
    80→      isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
    81→    });
    82→
    83→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Tạo món ăn thành công', data: food });
    84→  } catch (error) {
    85→    next(error);
    86→  }
    87→};
    88→
    89→// @desc    Cập nhật món ăn
    90→const updateFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    91→  try {
    92→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    93→
    94→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(
    95→      req.params.id,
    96→      {
    97→        name,
    98→        category,
    99→        price: parseFloat(price),
   100→        image: image || '',
   101→        description: description || '',
   102→        isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
   103→      },
   104→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
   105→    );
   106→
   107→    if (!food) {
   108→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   109→      error.statusCode = 404;
   110→      return next(error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật món ăn thành công', data: food });
   114→  } catch (error) {
   115→    next(error);
   116→  }
   117→};
   118→
   119→// @desc    Xóa món ăn
   120→const deleteFood = async (req, res, next) => {
   121→  try {
   122→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→    if (!food) {
   124→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   125→      error.statusCode = 404;
   126→      return next(error);
   127→    }
   128→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Xóa món ăn thành công', data: null });
   129→  } catch (error) {
   130→    next(error);
   131→  }
   132→};
   133→
   134→module.exports = { getFoods, getFood, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood };
   135→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→const Booking = require('../models/Booking');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả booking (filter theo status)
     4→const getBookings = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { status } = req.query;
     7→    const query = status && status !== 'Tất cả' ? { status } : {};
     8→
     9→    const bookings = await Booking.find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    10→
    11→    res.status(200).json({
    12→      success: true,
    13→      message: 'Lấy danh sách booking thành công',
    14→      data: bookings,
    15→    });
    16→  } catch (error) {
    17→    next(error);
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→
    21→// @desc    Lấy 1 booking
    22→const getBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    const booking = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
    25→    if (!booking) {
    26→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    27→      error.statusCode = 404;
    28→      return next(error);
    29→    }
    30→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin booking thành công', data: booking });
    31→  } catch (error) {
    32→    next(error);
    33→  }
    34→};
    35→
    36→// @desc    Tạo booking mới
    37→const createBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  try {
    39→    const { customerName, phone, address, items, total, note } = req.body;
    40→
    41→    const booking = await Booking.create({
    42→      customerName,
    43→      phone,
    44→      address,
    45→      items,
    46→      total: parseFloat(total),
    47→      note: note || '',
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Đặt món thành công! Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ sớm.', data: booking });
    51→  } catch (error) {
    52→    next(error);
    53→  }
    54→};
    55→
    56→// @desc    Cập nhật trạng thái booking
    57→const updateBookingStatus = async (req, res, next) => {
    58→  try {
    59→    const { status } = req.body;
    60→
    61→    if (!['pending', 'confirmed', 'done', 'cancelled'].includes(status)) {
    62→      const error = new Error('Trạng thái không hợp lệ');
    63→      error.statusCode = 400;
    64→      return next(error);
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    const booking = await Booking.findByIdAndUpdate(
    68→      req.params.id,
    69→      { status },
    70→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
    71→    );
    72→
    73→    if (!booking) {
    74→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    75→      error.statusCode = 404;
    76→      return next(error);
    77→    }
    78→
    79→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công', data: booking });
    80→  } catch (error) {
    81→    next(error);
    82→  }
    83→};
    84→
    85→module.exports = { getBookings, getBooking, createBooking, updateBookingStatus };
    86→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\api\axiosClient.js`

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';
     2→import { API_BASE_URL, UPLOAD_URL } from '../constants';
     3→
     4→const api = axios.create({
     5→  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     6→  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
     7→});
     8→
     9→// Food APIs
    10→export const foodApi = {
    11→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/foods', { params }),
    12→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/foods/${id}`),
    13→  create: (data) => api.post('/foods', data),
    14→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/foods/${id}`, data),
    15→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/foods/${id}`),
    16→};
    17→
    18→// Booking APIs
    19→export const bookingApi = {
    20→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/bookings', { params }),
    21→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/bookings/${id}`),
    22→  create: (data) => api.post('/bookings', data),
    23→  updateStatus: (id, status) => api.patch(`/bookings/${id}/status`, { status }),
    24→};
    25→
    26→// Upload API
    27→export const uploadApi = {
    28→  upload: async (file) => {
    29→    const formData = new FormData();
    30→    formData.append('image', file);
    31→    const response = await axios.post(`${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload`, formData, {
    32→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
    33→    });
    34→    return response;
    35→  },
    36→};
    37→
    38→export default api;
    39→
```
</details></tool-use>

    28→        </div>
    29→
    30→        {/* Nav */}

    33→            <NavLink
    34→              key={item.to}
    35→              to={item.to}
    36→              end={item.end}
    37→              className={({ isActive }) =>
    38→                `flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    39→                  isActive
    40→                    ? 'bg-primary-50 text-primary-700'
    41→                    : 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-50 hover:text-stone-900'
    42→                }`
    43→              }
    44→            >
    45→              <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
    46→              {item.label}
    47→            </NavLink>
    48→          ))}
    49→        </nav>
    50→
    51→        {/* Bottom */}

    63→      {/* Main area */}

    71→};

     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods, setFilters } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import FoodCard, { FoodCardSkeleton } from '../../features/foods/FoodCard';
     5→import SearchFilterBar from '../../features/foods/SearchFilterBar';
     6→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     7→import Pagination from '../../components/ui/Pagination';
     8→import { UtensilsCrossed, SearchX } from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    10→
    11→const HomePage = () => {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items, loading, pagination, filters } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    14→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid');
    15→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    16→
    17→  // Debounced search
    18→  const [searchInput, setSearchInput] = useState(filters.search);
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    22→      dispatch(setFilters({ search: searchInput }));
    23→      setPage(1);
    24→    }, 400);
    25→    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    26→  }, [searchInput, dispatch]);
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ ...filters, page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    30→  }, [filters, page, dispatch]);
    31→
    32→  const handleCategoryChange = (category) => {
    33→    dispatch(setFilters({ category }));
    34→    setPage(1);
    35→  };
    36→
    37→  const handleSortChange = (sort) => {
    38→    dispatch(setFilters({ sort }));
    39→    setPage(1);
    40→  };
    41→
    42→  return (
    43→    <div className="min-h-screen">
    44→      {/* Hero section */}
    45→      <section className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-900 via-stone-800 to-primary-900 text-white">
    46→        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-10">
    47→          <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{
    48→            backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, #f97316 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, #f97316 0%, transparent 40%)',
    49→          }} />
    50→        </div>
    51→        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 md:py-28">
    52→          <div className="max-w-2xl">
    53→            <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-amber-300 mb-6 animate-fade-in">
    54→              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
    55→              Đặt món trực tuyến ngay hôm nay
    56→            </div>
    57→            <h1 className="font-display text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight animate-slide-up">
    58→              Thưởng thức món ăn
    59→              <span className="block text-primary-400">đậm chất Việt</span>
    60→            </h1>
    61→            <p className="text-lg text-stone-300 mb-8 animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '100ms' }}>
    62→              Hàng trăm món ngon từ nhà hàng của chúng tôi. Đặt hàng dễ dàng, giao tận nơi.
    63→            </p>
    64→            <div className="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm text-stone-400 animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '200ms' }}>
    65→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    66→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-emerald-400 rounded-full" />
    67→                <span>Nguyên liệu tươi sạch</span>
    68→              </div>
    69→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    70→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-amber-400 rounded-full" />
    71→                <span>Đầu bếp chuyên nghiệp</span>
    72→              </div>
    73→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    74→                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-primary-400 rounded-full" />
    75→                <span>Giao hàng nhanh</span>
    76→              </div>
    77→            </div>
    78→          </div>
    79→        </div>
    80→        {/* Decorative wave */}
    81→        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0">
    82→          <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 60" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    83→            <path d="M0 60L60 54C120 48 240 36 360 30C480 24 600 24 720 27C840 30 960 36 1080 39C1200 42 1320 42 1380 42L1440 42V60H0Z" fill="#fafaf9"/>
    84→          </svg>
    85→        </div>
    86→      </section>
    87→
    88→      {/* Menu section */}
    89→      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
    90→        {/* Section header */}
    91→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
    92→          <div>
    93→            <h2 className="font-display text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">
    94→              Thực đơn của chúng tôi
    95→            </h2>
    96→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">
    97→              {pagination.totalItems} món ăn có sẵn
    98→            </p>
    99→          </div>
   100→        </div>
   101→
   102→        {/* Search & Filter */}
   103→        <SearchFilterBar
   104→          search={searchInput}
   105→          category={filters.category}
   106→          sort={filters.sort}
   107→          viewMode={viewMode}
   108→          onSearchChange={setSearchInput}
   109→          onCategoryChange={handleCategoryChange}
   110→          onSortChange={handleSortChange}
   111→          onViewChange={setViewMode}
   112→        />
   113→
   114→        {/* Loading skeleton */}
   115→        {loading && (
   116→          <div className={`grid gap-6 ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4' : 'grid-cols-1'}`}>
   117→            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
   118→              <FoodCardSkeleton key={i} />
   119→            ))}
   120→          </div>
   121→        )}
   122→
   123→        {/* Food list */}
   124→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'grid' && (
   125→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
   126→            {items.map((food, idx) => (
   127→              <div key={food._id} style={{ animationDelay: `${idx * 50}ms` }}>
   128→                <FoodCard food={food} />
   129→              </div>
   130→            ))}
   131→          </div>
   132→        )}
   133→
   134→        {/* Table view */}
   135→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'table' && (
   136→          <div className="grid gap-4">
   137→            {items.map((food) => (
   138→              <div key={food._id} className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4">
   139→                <img
   140→                  src={food.image?.startsWith('http') ? food.image : `http://localhost:5000${food.image}`}
   141→                  alt={food.name}
   142→                  className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
   143→                  onError={(e) => { e.target.src = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=100&h=100&fit=crop'; }}
   144→                />
   145→                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   146→                  <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 truncate">{food.name}</h3>
   147→                  <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{food.category}</span>
   148→                </div>
   149→                <div className="text-right">
   150→                  <div className="font-bold text-primary-600">
   151→                    {new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(food.price)}
   152→                  </div>
   153→                  <span className={`badge ${food.isAvailable ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-danger'} text-[10px]`}>
   154→                    {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn' : 'Hết'}
   155→                  </span>
   156→                </div>
   157→              </div>
   158→            ))}
   159→          </div>
   160→        )}
   161→
   162→        {/* Empty state */}
   163→        {!loading && items.length === 0 && (
   164→          <EmptyState
   165→            icon={filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả' ? SearchX : UtensilsCrossed}
   166→            title={filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả' ? 'Không tìm thấy món phù hợp' : 'Chưa có món ăn nào'}
   167→            description={
   168→              filters.search || filters.category !== 'Tất cả'
   169→                ? 'Thử thay đổi từ khóa tìm kiếm hoặc bỏ bộ lọc'
   170→                : 'Hãy quay lại sau để xem thực đơn mới'
   171→            }
   172→          />
   173→        )}
   174→
   175→        {/* Pagination */}
   176→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && (
   177→          <Pagination
   178→            currentPage={pagination.currentPage}
   179→            totalPages={pagination.totalPages}
   180→            onPageChange={setPage}
   181→          />
   182→        )}
   183→      </section>
   184→    </div>
   185→  );
   186→};
   187→
   188→export default HomePage;
   189→
```

     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';

     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';

    10→
    11→const FoodDetailPage = () => {
    12→  const { id } = useParams();
    13→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    14→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    15→  const { currentFood: food, loading, error } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→
    17→  useEffect(() => {
    18→    dispatch(fetchFoodById(id));
    19→    return () => dispatch(clearCurrentFood());
    20→  }, [id, dispatch]);
    21→
    22→  const handleAddToCart = () => {
    23→    dispatch(addToCart(food));
    24→    toast.success(`Đã thêm "${food.name}" vào giỏ hàng!`, {
    25→      icon: <ShoppingBag className="w-4 h-4" />,
    26→    });
    27→  };
    28→
    29→  if (loading) {
    30→    return (
    31→      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
    32→        <LoadingSpinner size="lg" />
    33→      </div>
    34→    );
    35→  }
    36→
    37→  if (error || !food) {
    38→    return (
    39→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    40→        <div className="text-6xl">😕</div>
    41→        <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy món ăn</h2>
    42→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    43→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay về trang chủ
    44→        </Link>
    45→      </div>
    46→    );
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  const imageUrl = food.image
    50→    ? food.image.startsWith('http')
    51→      ? food.image
    52→      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}`
    53→    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    54→
    55→  return (
    56→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    57→      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    58→        {/* Back button */}
    59→        <Link
    60→          to="/"
    61→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
    62→        >
    63→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
    64→          Quay về thực đơn
    65→        </Link>
    66→
    67→        <div className="card overflow-hidden animate-scale-in">
    68→          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-0">
    69→            {/* Image */}
    70→            <div className="relative aspect-square md:aspect-auto">
    71→              <img
    72→                src={imageUrl}
    73→                alt={food.name}
    74→                className="w-full h-full object-cover"
    75→                onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    76→              />
    77→              {/* Availability overlay */}
    78→              <div className="absolute top-4 left-4">
    79→                {food.isAvailable ? (
    80→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/30">
    81→                    <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    82→                    Còn món
    83→                  </span>
    84→                ) : (
    85→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-red-500/30">
    86→                    <XCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    87→                    Hết món
    88→                  </span>
    89→                )}
    90→              </div>
    91→            </div>
    92→
    93→            {/* Info */}
    94→            <div className="p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-center">
    95→              {/* Category */}
    96→              <span className="badge-primary mb-4 w-fit">{food.category}</span>
    97→
    98→              {/* Name */}
    99→              <h1 className="font-display text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4">
   100→                {food.name}
   101→              </h1>
   102→
   103→              {/* Price */}
   104→              <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-primary-600 mb-6">
   105→                {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   106→              </div>
   107→
   108→              {/* Description */}
   109→              {food.description && (
   110→                <div className="mb-6">
   111→                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Mô tả</h3>

   116→              {/* Divider */}

   119→              {/* Actions */}

   127→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Đặt món ngay' : 'Món tạm hết'}

   129→                <Link

   137→          </div>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middleware\errorHandler.js`

```text
     1→// Global error handler middleware
     2→const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
     3→  let statusCode = err.statusCode || 500;
     4→  let message = err.message || 'Lỗi server';
     5→
     6→  // Mongoose bad ObjectId
     7→  if (err.name === 'CastError') {
     8→    statusCode = 400;
     9→    message = 'ID không hợp lệ';
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  // Mongoose duplicate key
    13→  if (err.code === 11000) {
    14→    statusCode = 400;
    15→    message = 'Dữ liệu trùng lặp';
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  // Mongoose validation error
    19→  if (err.name === 'ValidationError') {
    20→    statusCode = 400;
    21→    const messages = Object.values(err.errors).map((e) => e.message);
    22→    message = messages.join(', ');
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  res.status(statusCode).json({
    26→    success: false,
    27→    message,
    28→    data: null,
    29→  });
    30→};
    31→
    32→module.exports = errorHandler;
    33→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:25:50Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middleware\upload.js`

```text
     1→const multer = require('multer');
     2→const path = require('path');
     3→
     4→// Storage config
     5→const storage = multer.diskStorage({
     6→  destination: (req, file, cb) => {
     7→    cb(null, path.join(__dirname, '../uploads'));
     8→  },
     9→  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
    10→    const uniqueSuffix = Date.now() + '-' + Math.round(Math.random() * 1e9);
    11→    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname);
    12→    cb(null, `food-${uniqueSuffix}${ext}`);
    13→  },
    14→});
    15→
    16→// File filter - chỉ chấp nhận ảnh
    17→const fileFilter = (req, file, cb) => {
    18→  const allowedTypes = /jpeg|jpg|png|gif|webp|svg/;
    19→  const extname = allowedTypes.test(path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase());
    20→  const mimetype = allowedTypes.test(file.mimetype);
    21→
    22→  if (extname && mimetype) {
    23→    cb(null, true);
    24→  } else {
    25→    cb(new Error('Chỉ chấp nhận file ảnh (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp)'), false);
    26→  }
    27→};
    28→
    29→const upload = multer({
    30→  storage,
    31→  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 5MB
    32→  fileFilter,
    33→});
    34→
    35→module.exports = upload;
    36→
```
</details></tool-use>

    47→  {
    48→    name: 'Soda chanh',
    49→    category: 'Nước uống',
    50→    price: 30000,
    51→    image: '/uploads/6.jpg',
    52→    isAvailable: true,
    53→    description: 'Soda chanh mát lạnh, chua nhẹ dễ uống.',
    54→  },
    55→];
    56→
    57→const seedBookings = [
    58→  {
    59→    customerName: 'Nguyễn Văn Vinh',
    60→    phone: '0987654321',
    61→    address: 'Số 10, Đường Hoa Mai, TP.HCM',
    62→    items: [
    63→      { foodName: 'Cơm gà xối mỡ', quantity: 2, price: 45000 },
    64→      { foodName: 'Phở bò tái', quantity: 1, price: 50000 },
    65→    ],
    66→    total: 140000,
    67→    status: 'pending',
    68→    note: 'Ít mỡ hành',
    69→  },
    70→];
    71→
    72→const seedData = async () => {
    73→  try {
    74→    await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI);
    75→    console.log('🔄 Đang seed dữ liệu...');
    76→
    77→    // Clear existing data
    78→    await Food.deleteMany({});
    79→    await Booking.deleteMany({});
    80→    console.log('   ✓ Đã xóa dữ liệu cũ');
    81→
    82→    // Seed foods
    83→    await Food.insertMany(seedFoods);
    84→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedFoods.length} món ăn`);
    85→
    86→    // Seed bookings
    87→    await Booking.insertMany(seedBookings);
    88→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedBookings.length} booking`);
    89→
    90→    console.log('✅ Seed hoàn tất!');
    91→    process.exit(0);
    92→  } catch (error) {
    93→    console.error('❌ Lỗi seed:', error.message);
    94→    process.exit(1);
    95→  }
    96→};
    97→
    98→seedData();
    99→

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\foodsSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { foodApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Async thunks
     5→export const fetchFoods = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const response = await foodApi.getAll(params);
     8→    return response.data;
     9→  } catch (error) {
    10→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    11→  }
    12→});
    13→
    14→export const fetchFoodById = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchById', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    const response = await foodApi.getById(id);
    17→    return response.data;
    18→  } catch (error) {
    19→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    20→  }
    21→});
    22→
    23→export const createFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    24→  try {
    25→    const response = await foodApi.create(data);
    26→    return response.data;
    27→  } catch (error) {
    28→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    29→  }
    30→});
    31→
    32→export const updateFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/update', async ({ id, data }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    33→  try {
    34→    const response = await foodApi.update(id, data);
    35→    return response.data;
    36→  } catch (error) {
    37→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    38→  }
    39→});
    40→
    41→export const deleteFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/delete', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    42→  try {
    43→    const response = await foodApi.delete(id);
    44→    return { ...response.data, id };
    45→  } catch (error) {
    46→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    47→  }
    48→});
    49→
    50→const foodsSlice = createSlice({
    51→  name: 'foods',
    52→  initialState: {
    53→    items: [],
    54→    currentFood: null,
    55→    pagination: { currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1, totalItems: 0, limit: 8 },
    56→    loading: false,
    57→    error: null,
    58→    filters: { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' },
    59→  },
    60→  reducers: {
    61→    setFilters: (state, action) => {
    62→      state.filters = { ...state.filters, ...action.payload };
    63→    },
    64→    resetFilters: (state) => {
    65→      state.filters = { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' };
    66→    },
    67→    clearCurrentFood: (state) => {
    68→      state.currentFood = null;
    69→    },
    70→  },
    71→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    72→    // Fetch all
    73→    builder
    74→      .addCase(fetchFoods.pending, (state) => {
    75→        state.loading = true;
    76→        state.error = null;
    77→      })
    78→      .addCase(fetchFoods.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    79→        state.loading = false;
    80→        state.items = action.payload.data.foods;
    81→        state.pagination = action.payload.data.pagination;
    82→      })
    83→      .addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
    84→        state.loading = false;
    85→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    86→      });
    87→
    88→    // Fetch by ID
    89→    builder
    90→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.pending, (state) => {
    91→        state.loading = true;
    92→        state.error = null;
    93→      })
    94→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    95→        state.loading = false;
    96→        state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
    97→      })
    98→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    99→        state.loading = false;
   100→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
   101→      });
   102→
   103→    // Create
   104→    builder
   105→      .addCase(createFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   106→        state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
   107→      });
   108→
   109→    // Update
   110→    builder
   111→      .addCase(updateFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   112→        const idx = state.items.findIndex((f) => f._id === action.payload.data._id);
   113→        if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
   114→        if (state.currentFood?._id === action.payload.data._id) {
   115→          state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
   116→        }
   117→      });
   118→
   119→    // Delete
   120→    builder
   121→      .addCase(deleteFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   122→        state.items = state.items.filter((f) => f._id !== action.payload.id);
   123→      });
   124→  },
   125→});
   126→
   127→export const { setFilters, resetFilters, clearCurrentFood } = foodsSlice.actions;
   128→export default foodsSlice.reducer;
   129→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:25:55Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\cartSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→
     3→// Load cart from localStorage
     4→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const stored = localStorage.getItem('cart');
     7→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
     8→  } catch {
     9→    return [];
    10→  }
    11→};
    12→
    13→const saveCartToStorage = (items) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(items));
    16→  } catch {
    17→    // ignore
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→
    21→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    22→  name: 'cart',
    23→  initialState: {
    24→    items: loadCartFromStorage(),
    25→  },
    26→  reducers: {
    27→    addToCart: (state, action) => {
    28→      const existing = state.items.find((item) => item._id === action.payload._id);
    29→      if (existing) {
    30→        existing.quantity += 1;
    31→      } else {
    32→        state.items.push({ ...action.payload, quantity: 1 });
    33→      }
    34→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    35→    },
    36→    removeFromCart: (state, action) => {
    37→      state.items = state.items.filter((item) => item._id !== action.payload);
    38→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    39→    },
    40→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    41→      const { id, quantity } = action.payload;
    42→      const item = state.items.find((i) => i._id === id);
    43→      if (item) {
    44→        if (quantity <= 0) {
    45→          state.items = state.items.filter((i) => i._id !== id);
    46→        } else {
    47→          item.quantity = quantity;
    48→        }
    49→      }
    50→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    51→    },
    52→    clearCart: (state) => {
    53→      state.items = [];
    54→      saveCartToStorage([]);
    55→    },
    56→  },
    57→});
    58→
    59→// Selectors
    60→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items;
    61→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    62→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0);
    63→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
    64→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
    65→
    66→export const { addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart } = cartSlice.actions;
    67→export default cartSlice.reducer;
    68→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\user\CheckoutPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     2→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     3→import * as yup from 'yup';
     4→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     5→import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     6→import { useState } from 'react';
     7→import { selectCartItems, selectCartTotal, clearCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     8→import { createBooking } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     9→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
    10→import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, User, Phone, MapPin, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
    11→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    12→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
    13→
    14→const schema = yup.object({
    15→  customerName: yup
    16→    .string()
    17→    .required('Tên khách hàng không được để trống')
    18→    .min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    19→  phone: yup
    20→    .string()
    21→    .required('Số điện thoại không được để trống')
    22→    .matches(/^(0[0-9]{9})$/, 'Số điện thoại phải gồm 10 số và bắt đầu bằng 0'),
    23→  address: yup
    24→    .string()
    25→    .required('Địa chỉ không được để trống')
    26→    .min(5, 'Địa chỉ phải có ít nhất 5 ký tự'),
    27→  note: yup.string().default(''),
    28→});
    29→
    30→const CheckoutPage = () => {
    31→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    32→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    33→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
    34→  const cartTotal = useSelector(selectCartTotal);
    35→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    36→
    37→  const {
    38→    register,
    39→    handleSubmit,
    40→    formState: { errors },
    41→  } = useForm({
    42→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    43→    defaultValues: { customerName: '', phone: '', address: '', note: '' },
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    47→    return (
    48→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    49→        <EmptyState
    50→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    51→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    52→          description="Bạn chưa có món nào trong giỏ hàng."
    53→        />
    54→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    55→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    56→        </Link>
    57→      </div>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    62→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    63→    try {
    64→      const bookingData = {
    65→        customerName: data.customerName,
    66→        phone: data.phone,
    67→        address: data.address,
    68→        note: data.note || '',
    69→        items: cartItems.map((item) => ({
    70→          foodId: item._id,
    71→          foodName: item.name,
    72→          quantity: item.quantity,
    73→          price: item.price,
    74→          image: item.image || '',
    75→        })),
    76→        total: cartTotal,
    77→      };
    78→
    79→      await dispatch(createBooking(bookingData)).unwrap();
    80→
    81→      toast.success('Đặt món thành công!', {
    82→        description: 'Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ bạn sớm nhất.',
    83→        icon: <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />,
    84→      });
    85→
    86→      dispatch(clearCart());
    87→      navigate('/');
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Đặt món thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại!');
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  return (
    96→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    97→      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    98→        {/* Header */}
    99→        <Link
   100→          to="/cart"
   101→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
   102→        >
   103→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   104→          Quay về giỏ hàng
   105→        </Link>
   106→
   107→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
   108→          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
   109→            <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
   110→          </div>
   111→          <div>
   112→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Xác nhận đặt món</h1>
   113→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Vui lòng điền thông tin để hoàn tất đơn hàng</p>
   114→          </div>
   115→        </div>
   116→
   117→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   118→          {/* Form */}
   119→          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
   120→            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="card p-6 space-y-5">
   121→              {/* Customer name */}
   122→              <div>
   123→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   124→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   125→                  Tên khách hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   126→                </label>
   127→                <input
   128→                  {...register('customerName')}
   129→                  className="input-field"
   130→                  placeholder="VD: Nguyễn Văn A"
   131→                />
   132→                {errors.customerName && (
   133→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.customerName.message}</p>
   134→                )}
   135→              </div>
   136→
   137→              {/* Phone */}
   138→              <div>
   139→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   140→                  <Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   141→                  Số điện thoại <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   142→                </label>
   143→                <input
   144→                  {...register('phone')}
   145→                  type="tel"
   146→                  className="input-field"
   147→                  placeholder="VD: 0987654321"
   148→                />
   149→                {errors.phone && (
   150→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.phone.message}</p>
   151→                )}
   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              {/* Address */}
   155→              <div>
   156→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   157→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   158→                  Địa chỉ giao hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   159→                </label>
   160→                <input
   161→                  {...register('address')}
   162→                  className="input-field"
   163→                  placeholder="VD: Số 123, Đường ABC, Quận 1, TP.HCM"
   164→                />
   165→                {errors.address && (
   166→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.address.message}</p>
   167→                )}
   168→              </div>
   169→
   170→              {/* Note */}
   171→              <div>
   172→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   173→                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   174→                  Ghi chú (tùy chọn)
   175→                </label>
   176→                <textarea
   177→                  {...register('note')}
   178→                  rows={3}
   179→                  className="input-field resize-none"
   180→                  placeholder="VD: Giao giờ hành chính, ít đá..."
   181→                />
   182→              </div>
   183→
   184→              {/* Order summary preview */}
   185→              <div className="bg-stone-50 rounded-xl p-4">
   186→                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-600 mb-3">Món đã chọn ({cartItems.length})</h4>
   187→                <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
   188→                  {cartItems.map((item) => (
   189→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   190→                      <span className="text-stone-600">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   191→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-800">
   192→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   193→                      </span>
   194→                    </div>
   195→                  ))}
   196→                </div>
   197→              </div>
   198→
   199→              {/* Submit */}
   200→              <button
   201→                type="submit"
   202→                disabled={isSubmitting}
   203→                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center"
   204→              >
   205→                {isSubmitting ? (
   206→                  <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   207→                ) : (
   208→                  <>
   209→                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
   210→                    Xác nhận đặt món
   211→                  </>
   212→                )}
   213→              </button>
   214→            </form>
   215→          </div>
   216→
   217→          {/* Summary */}
   218→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   219→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   220→              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 mb-5">
   221→                Tóm tắt đơn hàng
   222→              </h3>
   223→
   224→              {/* Items preview */}
   225→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
   226→                {cartItems.map((item) => {
   227→                  const imageUrl = item.image
   228→                    ? item.image.startsWith('http')
   229→                      ? item.image
   230→                      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${item.image}`
   231→                    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
   232→
   233→                  return (
   234→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   235→                      <img
   236→                        src={imageUrl}
   237→                        alt={item.name}
   238→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   239→                        onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
   240→                      />
   241→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   242→                        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-800 truncate">{item.name}</div>
   243→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">× {item.quantity}</div>
   244→                      </div>
   245→                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700">
   246→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   247→                      </div>
   248→                    </div>
   249→                  );
   250→                })}
   251→              </div>
   252→
   253→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4">
   254→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   255→                  <span className="text-stone-600">Tổng cộng</span>
   256→                  <span className="text-xl font-bold text-primary-600">
   257→                    {formatCurrency(cartTotal)}
   258→                  </span>
   259→                </div>
   260→              </div>
   261→            </div>
   262→          </div>
   263→        </div>
   264→      </div>
   265→    </div>
   266→  );
   267→};
   268→
   269→export default CheckoutPage;
   270→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\bookingsSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { bookingApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→export const fetchBookings = createAsyncThunk('bookings/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const response = await bookingApi.getAll(params);
     7→    return response.data;
     8→  } catch (error) {
     9→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    10→  }
    11→});
    12→
    13→export const createBooking = createAsyncThunk('bookings/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    const response = await bookingApi.create(data);
    16→    return response.data;
    17→  } catch (error) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    19→  }
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const updateBookingStatus = createAsyncThunk(
    23→  'bookings/updateStatus',
    24→  async ({ id, status }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    25→    try {
    26→      const response = await bookingApi.updateStatus(id, status);
    27→      return response.data;
    28→    } catch (error) {
    29→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    30→    }
    31→  }
    32→);
    33→
    34→const bookingsSlice = createSlice({
    35→  name: 'bookings',
    36→  initialState: {
    37→    items: [],
    38→    loading: false,
    39→    error: null,
    40→    statusFilter: 'Tất cả',
    41→  },
    42→  reducers: {
    43→    setStatusFilter: (state, action) => {
    44→      state.statusFilter = action.payload;
    45→    },
    46→  },
    47→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    48→    // Fetch all
    49→    builder
    50→      .addCase(fetchBookings.pending, (state) => {
    51→        state.loading = true;
    52→        state.error = null;
    53→      })
    54→      .addCase(fetchBookings.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    55→        state.loading = false;
    56→        state.items = action.payload.data;
    57→      })
    58→      .addCase(fetchBookings.rejected, (state, action) => {
    59→        state.loading = false;
    60→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    61→      });
    62→
    63→    // Create
    64→    builder.addCase(createBooking.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    65→      state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
    66→    });
    67→
    68→    // Update status
    69→    builder.addCase(updateBookingStatus.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    70→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((b) => b._id === action.payload.data._id);
    71→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
    72→    });
    73→  },
    74→});
    75→
    76→export const { setStatusFilter } = bookingsSlice.actions;
    77→export default bookingsSlice.reducer;
    78→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { createBrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom';
     2→import MainLayout from '../layouts/MainLayout';
     3→import AdminLayout from '../layouts/AdminLayout';
     4→
     5→// User pages
     6→import HomePage from '../pages/user/HomePage';
     7→import FoodDetailPage from '../pages/user/FoodDetailPage';
     8→import CartPage from '../pages/user/CartPage';
     9→import CheckoutPage from '../pages/user/CheckoutPage';
    10→import NotFoundPage from '../pages/user/NotFoundPage';
    11→
    12→// Admin pages
    13→import AdminDashboardPage from '../pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage';
    14→import AdminFoodsPage from '../pages/admin/AdminFoodsPage';
    15→import AdminBookingsPage from '../pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage';
    16→
    17→const routes = [
    18→  // User routes
    19→  {
    20→    path: '/',
    21→    element: <MainLayout />,
    22→    children: [
    23→      { index: true, element: <HomePage /> },
    24→      { path: 'foods/:id', element: <FoodDetailPage /> },
    25→      { path: 'cart', element: <CartPage /> },
    26→      { path: 'checkout', element: <CheckoutPage /> },
    27→    ],
    28→  },
    29→
    30→  // Admin routes
    31→  {
    32→    path: '/admin',
    33→    element: <AdminLayout />,
    34→    children: [
    35→      { index: true, element: <AdminDashboardPage /> },
    36→      { path: 'foods', element: <AdminFoodsPage /> },
    37→      { path: 'bookings', element: <AdminBookingsPage /> },
    38→    ],
    39→  },
    40→
    41→  // 404
    42→  { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
    43→];
    44→
    45→const router = createBrowserRouter(routes);
    46→export default router;
    47→
```
</details></tool-use>

    58→  );

     1→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     2→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     3→import * as yup from 'yup';
     4→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     5→import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     6→import { useState } from 'react';
     7→import { selectCartItems, selectCartTotal, clearCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     8→import { createBooking } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     9→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
    10→import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, User, Phone, MapPin, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
    11→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    12→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
    13→
    14→const schema = yup.object({
    15→  customerName: yup
    16→    .string()
    17→    .required('Tên khách hàng không được để trống')
    18→    .min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    19→  phone: yup
    20→    .string()
    21→    .required('Số điện thoại không được để trống')
    22→    .matches(/^(0[0-9]{9})$/, 'Số điện thoại phải gồm 10 số và bắt đầu bằng 0'),
    23→  address: yup
    24→    .string()
    25→    .required('Địa chỉ không được để trống')
    26→    .min(5, 'Địa chỉ phải có ít nhất 5 ký tự'),
    27→  note: yup.string().default(''),
    28→});
    29→
    30→const CheckoutPage = () => {
    31→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    32→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    33→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
    34→  const cartTotal = useSelector(selectCartTotal);
    35→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    36→
    37→  const {
    38→    register,
    39→    handleSubmit,
    40→    formState: { errors },
    41→  } = useForm({
    42→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    43→    defaultValues: { customerName: '', phone: '', address: '', note: '' },
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    47→    return (
    48→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    49→        <EmptyState
    50→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    51→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    52→          description="Bạn chưa có món nào trong giỏ hàng."
    53→        />
    54→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    55→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    56→        </Link>
    57→      </div>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    62→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    63→    try {
    64→      const bookingData = {
    65→        customerName: data.customerName,
    66→        phone: data.phone,
    67→        address: data.address,
    68→        note: data.note || '',
    69→        items: cartItems.map((item) => ({
    70→          foodId: item._id,
    71→          foodName: item.name,
    72→          quantity: item.quantity,
    73→          price: item.price,
    74→          image: item.image || '',
    75→        })),
    76→        total: cartTotal,
    77→      };
    78→
    79→      await dispatch(createBooking(bookingData)).unwrap();
    80→
    81→      toast.success('Đặt món thành công!', {
    82→        description: 'Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ bạn sớm nhất.',
    83→        icon: <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />,
    84→      });
    85→
    86→      dispatch(clearCart());
    87→      navigate('/');
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Đặt món thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại!');
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  return (
    96→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    97→      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    98→        {/* Header */}
    99→        <Link
   100→          to="/cart"
   101→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
   102→        >
   103→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   104→          Quay về giỏ hàng
   105→        </Link>
   106→
   107→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
   108→          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
   109→            <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
   110→          </div>
   111→          <div>
   112→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Xác nhận đặt món</h1>
   113→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Vui lòng điền thông tin để hoàn tất đơn hàng</p>
   114→          </div>
   115→        </div>
   116→
   117→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   118→          {/* Form */}
   119→          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
   120→            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="card p-6 space-y-5">
   121→              {/* Customer name */}
   122→              <div>
   123→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   124→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   125→                  Tên khách hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   126→                </label>
   127→                <input
   128→                  {...register('customerName')}
   129→                  className="input-field"
   130→                  placeholder="VD: Nguyễn Văn A"
   131→                />
   132→                {errors.customerName && (
   133→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.customerName.message}</p>
   134→                )}
   135→              </div>
   136→
   137→              {/* Phone */}
   138→              <div>
   139→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   140→                  <Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   141→                  Số điện thoại <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   142→                </label>
   143→                <input
   144→                  {...register('phone')}
   145→                  type="tel"
   146→                  className="input-field"
   147→                  placeholder="VD: 0987654321"
   148→                />
   149→                {errors.phone && (
   150→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.phone.message}</p>
   151→                )}
   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              {/* Address */}
   155→              <div>
   156→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   157→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   158→                  Địa chỉ giao hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   159→                </label>
   160→                <input
   161→                  {...register('address')}
   162→                  className="input-field"
   163→                  placeholder="VD: Số 123, Đường ABC, Quận 1, TP.HCM"
   164→                />
   165→                {errors.address && (
   166→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.address.message}</p>
   167→                )}
   168→              </div>
   169→
   170→              {/* Note */}
   171→              <div>
   172→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   173→                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   174→                  Ghi chú (tùy chọn)
   175→                </label>
   176→                <textarea
   177→                  {...register('note')}
   178→                  rows={3}
   179→                  className="input-field resize-none"
   180→                  placeholder="VD: Giao giờ hành chính, ít đá..."
   181→                />
   182→              </div>
   183→
   184→              {/* Order summary preview */}
   185→              <div className="bg-stone-50 rounded-xl p-4">
   186→                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-600 mb-3">Món đã chọn ({cartItems.length})</h4>
   187→                <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
   188→                  {cartItems.map((item) => (
   189→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   190→                      <span className="text-stone-600">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   191→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-800">
   192→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   193→                      </span>
   194→                    </div>
   195→                  ))}
   196→                </div>
   197→              </div>
   198→
   199→              {/* Submit */}
   200→              <button
   201→                type="submit"
   202→                disabled={isSubmitting}
   203→                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center"
   204→              >
   205→                {isSubmitting ? (
   206→                  <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   207→                ) : (
   208→                  <>
   209→                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
   210→                    Xác nhận đặt món
   211→                  </>
   212→                )}
   213→              </button>
   214→            </form>
   215→          </div>
   216→
   217→          {/* Summary */}
   218→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   219→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   220→              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 mb-5">
   221→                Tóm tắt đơn hàng
   222→              </h3>
   223→
   224→              {/* Items preview */}
   225→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
   226→                {cartItems.map((item) => {
   227→                  const imageUrl = item.image
   228→                    ? item.image.startsWith('http')
   229→                      ? item.image
   230→                      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${item.image}`
   231→                    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
   232→
   233→                  return (
   234→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   235→                      <img
   236→                        src={imageUrl}
   237→                        alt={item.name}
   238→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   239→                        onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
   240→                      />
   241→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   242→                        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-800 truncate">{item.name}</div>
   243→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">× {item.quantity}</div>
   244→                      </div>
   245→                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700">
   246→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   247→                      </div>
   248→                    </div>
   249→                  );
   250→                })}
   251→              </div>
   252→
   253→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4">
   254→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   255→                  <span className="text-stone-600">Tổng cộng</span>
   256→                  <span className="text-xl font-bold text-primary-600">
   257→                    {formatCurrency(cartTotal)}
   258→                  </span>
   259→                </div>
   260→              </div>
   261→            </div>
   262→          </div>
   263→        </div>
   264→      </div>
   265→    </div>
   266→  );
   267→};
   268→
   269→export default CheckoutPage;
   270→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { Clock, CheckCircle, CheckCheck, XCircle } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const STATUS_CONFIG = {
     4→  pending: { label: 'Chờ xác nhận', className: 'badge-warning', icon: Clock },
     5→  confirmed: { label: 'Đã xác nhận', className: 'badge-info', icon: CheckCircle },
     6→  done: { label: 'Hoàn thành', className: 'badge-success', icon: CheckCheck },
     7→  cancelled: { label: 'Đã hủy', className: 'badge-danger', icon: XCircle },
     8→};
     9→
    10→const StatusBadge = ({ status, size = 'md' }) => {
    11→  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status] || STATUS_CONFIG.pending;
    12→  const Icon = config.icon;
    13→
    14→  return (
    15→    <span className={`${config.className} ${size === 'sm' ? 'text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5' : ''}`}>
    16→      <Icon className={`${size === 'sm' ? 'w-3 h-3' : 'w-3.5 h-3.5'} mr-1`} />
    17→      {config.label}
    18→    </span>
    19→  );
    20→};
    21→
    22→export const AvailabilityBadge = ({ isAvailable }) => (
    23→  isAvailable
    24→    ? <span className="badge-success">Còn món</span>

    26→);
