<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\components\ui\Pagination.jsx`

```text
     1→import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const Pagination = ({ currentPage, totalPages, onPageChange }) => {
     4→  if (totalPages <= 1) return null;
     5→
     6→  const pages = [];
     7→  for (let i = 1; i <= totalPages; i++) {
     8→    if (i === 1 || i === totalPages || (i >= currentPage - 1 && i <= currentPage + 1)) {
     9→      pages.push(i);
    10→    } else if (pages[pages.length - 1] !== '...') {
    11→      pages.push('...');
    12→    }
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 mt-8">
    17→      <button
    18→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
    19→        disabled={currentPage === 1}
    20→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    21→      >
    22→        <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
    23→      </button>
    24→
    25→      {pages.map((page, idx) =>
    26→        page === '...' ? (
    27→          <span key={`ellipsis-${idx}`} className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400">
    28→            ···
    29→          </span>
    30→        ) : (
    31→          <button
    32→            key={page}
    33→            onClick={() => onPageChange(page)}
    34→            className={`w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    35→              currentPage === page
    36→                ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md shadow-primary-500/30'
    37→                : 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100'
    38→            }`}
    39→          >
    40→            {page}
    41→          </button>
    42→        )
    43→      )}
    44→
    45→      <button
    46→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}
    47→        disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
    48→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    49→      >
    50→        <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
    51→      </button>
    52→    </div>
    53→  );
    54→};
    55→
    56→export default Pagination;
    57→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\features\foods\FoodFormModal.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     3→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     4→import * as yup from 'yup';
     5→import { X, Upload, Image as ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { CATEGORIES } from '../../constants';
     7→import { uploadApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
     8→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
     9→
    10→const schema = yup.object({
    11→  name: yup.string().required('Tên món ăn không được để trống').min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    12→  category: yup.string().required('Danh mục không được để trống'),
    13→  price: yup
    14→    .number()
    15→    .typeError('Giá phải là số')
    16→    .required('Giá không được để trống')
    17→    .min(1000, 'Giá phải lớn hơn 1.000đ'),
    18→  description: yup.string().default(''),
    19→  image: yup.string().default(''),
    20→  isAvailable: yup.boolean().default(true),
    21→});
    22→
    23→const FoodFormModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, onSubmit, initialData, isLoading }) => {
    24→  const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState('');
    25→  const [imageMode, setImageMode] = useState('url'); // 'url' | 'upload'
    26→  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
    27→
    28→  const {
    29→    register,
    30→    handleSubmit,
    31→    reset,
    32→    setValue,
    33→    watch,
    34→    formState: { errors },
    35→  } = useForm({
    36→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    37→    defaultValues: {
    38→      name: '',
    39→      category: '',
    40→      price: '',
    41→      description: '',
    42→      image: '',
    43→      isAvailable: true,
    44→    },
    45→  });
    46→
    47→  const imageValue = watch('image');
    48→
    49→  // Reset form when modal opens/closes or data changes
    50→  useEffect(() => {
    51→    if (isOpen) {
    52→      if (initialData) {
    53→        reset({
    54→          name: initialData.name || '',
    55→          category: initialData.category || '',
    56→          price: initialData.price || '',
    57→          description: initialData.description || '',
    58→          image: initialData.image || '',
    59→          isAvailable: initialData.isAvailable ?? true,
    60→        });
    61→        setImagePreview(initialData.image || '');
    62→        if (initialData.image) {
    63→          setImageMode('url');
    64→        }
    65→      } else {
    66→        reset({ name: '', category: '', price: '', description: '', image: '', isAvailable: true });
    67→        setImagePreview('');
    68→        setImageMode('url');
    69→      }
    70→    }
    71→  }, [isOpen, initialData, reset]);
    72→
    73→  const handleImageUrlChange = (url) => {
    74→    setValue('image', url);
    75→    setImagePreview(url);
    76→  };
    77→
    78→  const handleFileUpload = async (e) => {
    79→    const file = e.target.files[0];
    80→    if (!file) return;
    81→
    82→    setIsUploading(true);
    83→    try {
    84→      const response = await uploadApi.upload(file);
    85→      const url = response.data.data.url;
    86→      setValue('image', url);
    87→      setImagePreview(url);
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      console.error('Upload failed:', error);
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsUploading(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  if (!isOpen) return null;
    96→
    97→  return (
    98→    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    99→      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
   100→
   101→      <div className="relative bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-lg max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto animate-scale-in">
   102→        {/* Header */}
   103→        <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-stone-100 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between rounded-t-2xl">
   104→          <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900">
   105→            {initialData ? 'Sửa món ăn' : 'Thêm món ăn mới'}
   106→          </h2>
   107→          <button
   108→            onClick={onClose}
   109→            className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
   110→          >
   111→            <X className="w-5 h-5" />
   112→          </button>
   113→        </div>
   114→
   115→        {/* Form */}
   116→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-5">
   117→          {/* Name */}
   118→          <div>
   119→            <label className="input-label">Tên món ăn <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   120→            <input {...register('name')} className="input-field" placeholder="VD: Cơm gà xối mỡ" />
   121→            {errors.name && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.name.message}</p>}
   122→          </div>
   123→
   124→          {/* Category */}
   125→          <div>
   126→            <label className="input-label">Danh mục <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   127→            <select {...register('category')} className="input-field cursor-pointer">
   128→              <option value="">Chọn danh mục</option>
   129→              {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat) => (
   130→                <option key={cat} value={cat}>{cat}</option>
   131→              ))}
   132→            </select>
   133→            {errors.category && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.category.message}</p>}
   134→          </div>
   135→
   136→          {/* Price */}
   137→          <div>
   138→            <label className="input-label">Giá (VNĐ) <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
   139→            <input
   140→              {...register('price')}
   141→              type="number"
   142→              min="0"
   143→              step="1000"
   144→              className="input-field"
   145→              placeholder="VD: 45000"
   146→            />
   147→            {errors.price && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.price.message}</p>}
   148→          </div>
   149→
   150→          {/* Description */}
   151→          <div>
   152→            <label className="input-label">Mô tả</label>
   153→            <textarea
   154→              {...register('description')}
   155→              rows={3}
   156→              className="input-field resize-none"
   157→              placeholder="Mô tả ngắn về món ăn..."
   158→            />
   159→          </div>
   160→
   161→          {/* Image */}
   162→          <div>
   163→            <label className="input-label">Hình ảnh</label>
   164→            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-3">
   165→              <button
   166→                type="button"
   167→                onClick={() => setImageMode('url')}
   168→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   169→                  imageMode === 'url'
   170→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'
   171→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
   172→                }`}
   173→              >
   174→                Nhập URL
   175→              </button>
   176→              <button
   177→                type="button"
   178→                onClick={() => setImageMode('upload')}
   179→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   180→                  imageMode === 'upload'
   181→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'
   182→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
   183→                }`}
   184→              >
   185→                Upload file
   186→              </button>
   187→            </div>
   188→
   189→            {imageMode === 'url' ? (
   190→              <input
   191→                type="text"
   192→                value={imageValue || ''}
   193→                onChange={(e) => handleImageUrlChange(e.target.value)}
   194→                className="input-field"
   195→                placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   196→              />
   197→            ) : (
   198→              <div className="relative">
   199→                <input
   200→                  type="file"
   201→                  accept="image/*"
   202→                  onChange={handleFileUpload}
   203→                  className="hidden"
   204→                  id="image-upload"
   205→                />
   206→                <label
   207→                  htmlFor="image-upload"
   208→                  className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full py-3 border-2 border-dashed border-stone-200 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-primary-400 hover:bg-primary-50/30 transition-all duration-200"
   209→                >
   210→                  {isUploading ? (
   211→                    <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   212→                  ) : (
   213→                    <>
   214→                      <Upload className="w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
   215→                      <span className="text-sm text-stone-500">
   216→                        {imageValue ? 'Chọn ảnh khác...' : 'Chọn file ảnh'}
   217→                      </span>
   218→                    </>
   219→                  )}
   220→                </label>
   221→              </div>
   222→            )}
   223→
   224→            {/* Image preview */}
   225→            {imagePreview && (
   226→              <div className="mt-3 relative">
   227→                <img
   228→                  src={imagePreview}
   229→                  alt="Preview"
   230→                  className="w-full h-40 object-cover rounded-xl border border-stone-200"
   231→                  onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; }}
   232→                />
   233→                <button
   234→                  type="button"
   235→                  onClick={() => { setImagePreview(''); setValue('image', ''); }}
   236→                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors"
   237→                >
   238→                  <X className="w-4 h-4" />
   239→                </button>
   240→              </div>
   241→            )}
   242→          </div>
   243→
   244→          {/* Availability */}
   245→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   246→            <label className="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer">
   247→              <input type="checkbox" {...register('isAvailable')} className="sr-only peer" />
   248→              <div className="w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 peer-focus:outline-none peer-focus:ring-2 peer-focus:ring-primary-500/30 rounded-full peer peer-checked:after:translate-x-5 rtl:peer-checked:after:-translate-x-full peer-checked:after:border-white after:content-[''] after:absolute after:top-[2px] after:start-[2px] after:bg-white after:rounded-full after:h-5 after:w-5 after:transition-all peer-checked:bg-primary-500"></div>
   249→            </label>
   250→            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700">
   251→              Còn món (hiển thị cho khách)
   252→            </span>
   253→          </div>
   254→
   255→          {/* Actions */}
   256→          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-2">
   257→            <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="btn-secondary flex-1">
   258→              Hủy
   259→            </button>
   260→            <button type="submit" disabled={isLoading} className="btn-primary flex-1">
   261→              {isLoading ? <LoadingSpinner size="sm" /> : initialData ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Thêm món'}
   262→            </button>
   263→          </div>
   264→        </form>
   265→      </div>
   266→    </div>
   267→  );
   268→};
   269→
   270→export default FoodFormModal;
   271→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     4→const SearchFilterBar = ({
     5→  search,
     6→  category,
     7→  sort,
     8→  viewMode,
     9→  onSearchChange,
    10→  onCategoryChange,
    11→  onSortChange,
    12→  onViewChange,
    13→}) => {

    15→    <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-soft p-4 mb-6 animate-fade-in">
    16→      {/* Top row: search + view toggle */}

    18→        {/* Search */}

    21→          <input
    22→            type="text"
    23→            placeholder="Tìm kiếm món ăn..."
    24→            value={search}

    26→            className="input-field pl-10 pr-10"
    27→          />
    28→          {search && (
    29→            <button
    30→              onClick={() => onSearchChange('')}
    31→              className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-1 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 transition-colors"
    32→            >
    33→              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
    34→            </button>
    35→          )}
    36→        </div>
    37→
    38→        {/* View toggle */}
    39→        <div className="flex items-center bg-stone-100 rounded-xl p-1">
    40→          <button
    41→            onClick={() => onViewChange('grid')}
    42→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 ${
    43→              viewMode === 'grid'
    44→                ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-primary-600'
    45→                : 'text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600'
    46→            }`}
    47→            title="Grid view"
    48→          >
    49→            <Grid3X3 className="w-4.5 h-4.5" />
    50→          </button>
    51→          <button
    52→            onClick={() => onViewChange('table')}
    53→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 ${
    54→              viewMode === 'table'
    55→                ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-primary-600'
    56→                : 'text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600'
    57→            }`}
    58→            title="Table view"
    59→          >
    60→            <List className="w-4.5 h-4.5" />
    61→          </button>
    62→        </div>
    63→      </div>
    64→
    65→      {/* Bottom row: filters + sort */}
    66→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 items-stretch sm:items-center">
    67→        {/* Category filter */}
    68→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
    69→          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Danh mục:</span>
    70→          {CATEGORIES.map((cat) => (
    71→            <button
    72→              key={cat}
    73→              onClick={() => onCategoryChange(cat)}
    74→              className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    75→                category === cat
    76→                  ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-sm'

    78→              }`}
    79→            >
    80→              {cat}
    81→            </button>
    82→          ))}
    83→        </div>
    84→
    85→        {/* Sort */}
    86→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-auto">
    87→          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Sắp xếp:</span>
    88→          <select
    89→            value={sort}
    90→            onChange={(e) => onSortChange(e.target.value)}
    91→            className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-stone-100 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium text-stone-700 border-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30 cursor-pointer"

    96→              </option>

    98→          </select>
    99→        </div>
   100→      </div>
   101→    </div>
   102→  );
   103→};

   105→export default SearchFilterBar;
```

```text
     1→import { Edit2, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
     2→import { formatCurrency, UPLOAD_URL, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE } from '../../constants';
     3→import { AvailabilityBadge } from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     4→
     5→const FoodTable = ({ foods, onEdit, onDelete }) => {
     6→  return (
     7→    <div className="card overflow-hidden">
     8→      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
     9→        <table className="admin-table">
    10→          <thead>
    11→            <tr>
    12→              <th>Hình ảnh</th>
    13→              <th>Tên món</th>
    14→              <th>Danh mục</th>
    15→              <th>Giá</th>
    16→              <th>Trạng thái</th>
    17→              <th className="text-right">Thao tác</th>
    18→            </tr>
    19→          </thead>
    20→          <tbody>
    21→            {foods.map((food) => {
    22→              const imageUrl = food.image
    23→                ? food.image.startsWith('http')
    24→                  ? food.image
    25→                  : `${UPLOAD_URL}${food.image}`
    26→                : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    27→
    28→              return (
    29→                <tr key={food._id}>
    30→                  <td>
    31→                    <img
    32→                      src={imageUrl}
    33→                      alt={food.name}
    34→                      className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover"
    35→                      onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    36→                    />
    37→                  </td>
    38→                  <td>
    39→                    <div className="font-medium text-stone-900">{food.name}</div>
    40→                    <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-1 max-w-[200px]">
    41→                      {food.description || '-'}
    42→                    </div>
    43→                  </td>
    44→                  <td>
    45→                    <span className="badge-primary">{food.category}</span>
    46→                  </td>
    47→                  <td className="font-semibold text-stone-900">
    48→                    {formatCurrency(food.price)}
    49→                  </td>
    50→                  <td>
    51→                    <AvailabilityBadge isAvailable={food.isAvailable} />
    52→                  </td>
    53→                  <td>
    54→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
    55→                      <button
    56→                        onClick={() => onEdit(food)}
    57→                        className="p-2 text-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    58→                        title="Sửa"
    59→                      >
    60→                        <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    61→                      </button>
    62→                      <button
    63→                        onClick={() => onDelete(food)}
    64→                        className="p-2 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    65→                        title="Xóa"
    66→                      >
    67→                        <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    68→                      </button>
    69→                    </div>
    70→                  </td>
    71→                </tr>
    72→              );
    73→            })}
    74→          </tbody>
    75→        </table>
    76→      </div>
    77→    </div>
    78→  );
    79→};
    80→
    81→export default FoodTable;
    82→
```

```text
     3→const STATUS_TRANSITIONS = {
     4→  pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
     5→  confirmed: ['done', 'cancelled'],
     6→  done: [],
     7→  cancelled: [],
     8→};
     9→
    10→const ACTION_CONFIG = {
    11→  confirmed: {
    12→    label: 'Xác nhận',
    13→    icon: CheckCircle,
    14→    className: 'btn-primary',
    15→    nextStatus: 'confirmed',
    16→  },
    17→  done: {
    18→    label: 'Hoàn thành',
    19→    icon: CheckCheck,
    20→    className: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600',
    21→    nextStatus: 'done',
    22→  },
    23→  cancelled: {
    24→    label: 'Hủy',
    25→    icon: XCircle,
    26→    className: 'btn-danger',
    27→    nextStatus: 'cancelled',
    28→  },
    29→};
    30→
    31→const BookingActions = ({ booking, onUpdateStatus }) => {
    32→  const transitions = STATUS_TRANSITIONS[booking.status] || [];
    33→
    34→  if (transitions.length === 0) return null;
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    38→      {transitions.map((nextStatus) => {
    39→        const config = ACTION_CONFIG[nextStatus];
    40→        if (!config) return null;
    41→        const Icon = config.icon;
    42→
    43→        return (
    44→          <button
    45→            key={nextStatus}
    46→            onClick={() => onUpdateStatus(booking._id, nextStatus)}
    47→            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-[1.02] ${config.className}`}
    48→          >
    49→            <Icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    50→            {config.label}
    51→          </button>
    52→        );
    53→      })}
    54→    </div>
    55→  );
    56→};
    57→
    58→export default BookingActions;
    59→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\admin\AdminDashboardPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import { fetchBookings } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     5→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     6→import { UtensilsCrossed, ClipboardList, Clock, CheckCircle, TrendingUp, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';
     7→import { formatCurrency } from '../../constants';
     8→
     9→const StatCard = ({ icon: Icon, label, value, color, trend }) => (
    10→  <div className="card p-6">
    11→    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
    12→      <div>
    13→        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500">{label}</p>
    14→        <p className="text-3xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900 mt-1">{value}</p>
    15→        {trend && (
    16→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
    17→            <TrendingUp className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-500" />
    18→            <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 font-medium">{trend}</span>
    19→          </div>
    20→        )}
    21→      </div>
    22→      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${color}`}>
    23→        <Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
    24→      </div>
    25→    </div>
    26→  </div>
    27→);
    28→
    29→const AdminDashboardPage = () => {
    30→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    31→  const { items: foods } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    32→  const { items: bookings } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ limit: 100 }));
    36→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    37→  }, [dispatch]);
    38→
    39→  const pendingCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'pending').length;
    40→  const confirmedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed').length;
    41→  const completedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'done').length;
    42→  const availableFoods = foods.filter((f) => f.isAvailable).length;
    43→
    44→  return (
    45→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    46→      {/* Header */}
    47→      <div className="mb-8">
    48→        <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Tổng quan</h1>
    49→        <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Chào mừng bạn quay trở lại trang quản trị</p>
    50→      </div>
    51→
    52→      {/* Stats */}
    53→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8">
    54→        <StatCard
    55→          icon={UtensilsCrossed}
    56→          label="Tổng món ăn"
    57→          value={foods.length}
    58→          color="bg-primary-500"
    59→          trend={`${availableFoods} đang bán`}
    60→        />
    61→        <StatCard
    62→          icon={ClipboardList}
    63→          label="Tổng booking"
    64→          value={bookings.length}
    65→          color="bg-blue-500"
    66→        />
    67→        <StatCard
    68→          icon={Clock}
    69→          label="Chờ xác nhận"
    70→          value={pendingCount}
    71→          color="bg-amber-500"
    72→          trend={pendingCount > 0 ? 'Cần xử lý' : 'Không có'}
    73→        />
    74→        <StatCard
    75→          icon={CheckCircle}
    76→          label="Hoàn thành"
    77→          value={completedCount}
    78→          color="bg-emerald-500"
    79→        />
    80→      </div>
    81→
    82→      {/* Recent bookings */}
    83→      <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
    84→        {/* Recent food */}
    85→        <div className="card p-6">
    86→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
    87→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Món ăn gần đây</h2>
    88→            <Link to="/admin/foods" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
    89→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
    90→            </Link>
    91→          </div>
    92→          <div className="space-y-3">
    93→            {foods.slice(0, 5).map((food) => (
    94→              <div key={food._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
    95→                <div className="flex-1">
    96→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{food.name}</div>
    97→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{food.category}</div>
    98→                </div>
    99→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   100→                  {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   101→                </div>
   102→                <span className={`badge ${food.isAvailable ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-danger'} text-[10px]`}>
   103→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn' : 'Hết'}
   104→                </span>
   105→              </div>
   106→            ))}
   107→            {foods.length === 0 && (
   108→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có món ăn nào</p>
   109→            )}
   110→          </div>
   111→        </div>
   112→
   113→        {/* Recent bookings */}
   114→        <div className="card p-6">
   115→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   116→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Booking gần đây</h2>
   117→            <Link to="/admin/bookings" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
   118→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   119→            </Link>
   120→          </div>
   121→          <div className="space-y-3">
   122→            {bookings.slice(0, 5).map((booking) => (
   123→              <div key={booking._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   124→                <div className="flex-1">
   125→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{booking.customerName}</div>
   126→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{booking.phone}</div>
   127→                </div>
   128→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   129→                  {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   130→                </div>
   131→                <StatusBadgeInline status={booking.status} />
   132→              </div>
   133→            ))}
   134→            {bookings.length === 0 && (
   135→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có booking nào</p>
   136→            )}
   137→          </div>
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    </div>
   141→  );
   142→};
   143→
   144→const StatusBadgeInline = ({ status }) => {
   145→  const config = {
   146→    pending: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
   147→    confirmed: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
   148→    done: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
   149→    cancelled: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
   150→  };
   151→  return (
   152→    <span className={`badge ${config[status] || config.pending} text-[10px]`}>
   153→      {status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Xong' : 'Hủy'}
   154→    </span>
   155→  );
   156→};
   157→
   158→export default AdminDashboardPage;
   159→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\admin\AdminFoodsPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import FoodTable from '../../features/foods/FoodTable';
     5→import FoodFormModal from '../../features/foods/FoodFormModal';
     6→import ConfirmDialog from '../../components/ui/ConfirmDialog';
     7→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     8→import Pagination from '../../components/ui/Pagination';
     9→import { Plus, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
    10→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    11→import { PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    12→
    13→const AdminFoodsPage = () => {
    14→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    15→  const { items: foods, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
    17→  const [editingFood, setEditingFood] = useState(null);
    18→  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null);
    19→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    20→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    24→  }, [page, dispatch]);
    25→
    26→  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {
    27→    setPage(newPage);
    28→  };
    29→
    30→  const handleOpenForm = (food = null) => {
    31→    setEditingFood(food);
    32→    setShowForm(true);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleCloseForm = () => {
    36→    setShowForm(false);
    37→    setEditingFood(null);
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  const handleSubmit = async (data) => {
    41→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    42→    try {
    43→      if (editingFood) {
    44→        await dispatch(updateFood({ id: editingFood._id, data })).unwrap();
    45→        toast.success('Cập nhật món ăn thành công!');
    46→      } else {
    47→        await dispatch(createFood(data)).unwrap();
    48→        toast.success('Thêm món ăn mới thành công!');
    49→      }
    50→      handleCloseForm();
    51→      dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    52→    } catch (error) {
    53→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại!');
    54→    } finally {
    55→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    56→    }
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  const handleDelete = async () => {
    60→    if (!deleteTarget) return;
    61→    try {
    62→      await dispatch(deleteFood(deleteTarget._id)).unwrap();
    63→      toast.success(`Đã xóa món "${deleteTarget.name}"`);
    64→    } catch (error) {
    65→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Xóa thất bại!');
    66→    } finally {
    67→      setDeleteTarget(null);
    68→    }
    69→  };
    70→
    71→  return (
    72→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    73→      {/* Header */}
    74→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    75→        <div>
    76→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý món ăn</h1>
    77→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Thêm, sửa, xóa và theo dõi thực đơn</p>
    78→        </div>
    79→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    80→          <button
    81→            onClick={() => dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }))}
    82→            className="btn-secondary"
    83→            title="Reload"
    84→          >
    85→            <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    86→          </button>
    87→          <button onClick={() => handleOpenForm()} className="btn-primary">
    88→            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
    89→            Thêm món ăn
    90→          </button>
    91→        </div>
    92→      </div>
    93→
    94→      {/* Table */}
    95→      {foods.length > 0 ? (
    96→        <>
    97→          <FoodTable
    98→            foods={foods}
    99→            onEdit={handleOpenForm}
   100→            onDelete={(food) => setDeleteTarget(food)}
   101→          />
   102→          <Pagination
   103→            currentPage={pagination.currentPage}
   104→            totalPages={pagination.totalPages}
   105→            onPageChange={handlePageChange}
   106→          />
   107→        </>
   108→      ) : (
   109→        <div className="card">
   110→          <EmptyState
   111→            icon={EmptyStateIcon}
   112→            title="Chưa có món ăn nào"
   113→            description="Bắt đầu bằng cách thêm món ăn đầu tiên vào thực đơn"
   114→            actionLabel="Thêm món ăn"
   115→            action={() => handleOpenForm()}
   116→          />
   117→        </div>
   118→      )}
   119→
   120→      {/* Form Modal */}
   121→      <FoodFormModal
   122→        isOpen={showForm}
   123→        onClose={handleCloseForm}
   124→        onSubmit={handleSubmit}
   125→        initialData={editingFood}
   126→        isLoading={isSubmitting}
   127→      />
   128→
   129→      {/* Delete confirmation */}
   130→      <ConfirmDialog
   131→        isOpen={!!deleteTarget}
   132→        title="Xóa món ăn?"
   133→        message={`Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món "${deleteTarget?.name}"? Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.`}
   134→        confirmLabel="Xóa"
   135→        danger
   136→        onConfirm={handleDelete}
   137→        onCancel={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
   138→      />
   139→    </div>
   140→  );
   141→};
   142→
   143→const EmptyStateIcon = () => (
   144→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   145→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M12 6v6m0 0v6m0-6h6m-6 0H6" />
   146→  </svg>
   147→);
   148→
   149→export default AdminFoodsPage;
   150→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\admin\AdminBookingsPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchBookings, updateBookingStatus, setStatusFilter } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     4→import BookingActions from '../../features/bookings/BookingActions';
     5→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     6→import StatusBadge from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     7→import { RefreshCw, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
     8→import { formatCurrency, BOOKING_STATUSES, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     9→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    10→
    11→const AdminBookingsPage = () => {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items: bookings, loading, statusFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    14→
    15→  useEffect(() => {
    16→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    17→  }, [dispatch]);
    18→
    19→  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id, newStatus) => {
    20→    try {
    21→      await dispatch(updateBookingStatus({ id, status: newStatus })).unwrap();
    22→      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!');
    23→    } catch (error) {
    24→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Cập nhật thất bại!');
    25→    }
    26→  };
    27→
    28→  const filteredBookings =
    29→    statusFilter === 'Tất cả'
    30→      ? bookings
    31→      : bookings.filter((b) => b.status === statusFilter);
    32→
    33→  const formatDate = (dateStr) => {
    34→    return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('vi-VN', {
    35→      day: '2-digit',
    36→      month: '2-digit',
    37→      year: 'numeric',
    38→      hour: '2-digit',
    39→      minute: '2-digit',
    40→    });
    41→  };
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    45→      {/* Header */}
    46→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    47→        <div>
    48→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý booking</h1>
    49→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">
    50→            {filteredBookings.length} booking
    51→            {statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' && ` (${statusFilter})`}
    52→          </p>
    53→        </div>
    54→        <button
    55→          onClick={() => dispatch(fetchBookings({}))}
    56→          className="btn-secondary"
    57→          title="Reload"
    58→        >
    59→          <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    60→        </button>
    61→      </div>
    62→
    63→      {/* Status filter */}
    64→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6 flex-wrap">
    65→        <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mr-1" />
    66→        {BOOKING_STATUSES.map((status) => (
    67→          <button
    68→            key={status}
    69→            onClick={() => dispatch(setStatusFilter(status))}
    70→            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    71→              statusFilter === status
    72→                ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-sm'
    73→                : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
    74→            }`}
    75→          >
    76→            {status === 'Tất cả' ? 'Tất cả' : status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
    77→          </button>
    78→        ))}
    79→      </div>
    80→
    81→      {/* Table */}
    82→      {filteredBookings.length > 0 ? (
    83→        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
    84→          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
    85→            <table className="admin-table">
    86→              <thead>
    87→                <tr>
    88→                  <th>Thời gian</th>
    89→                  <th>Khách hàng</th>
    90→                  <th>Liên hệ</th>
    91→                  <th>Món đã đặt</th>
    92→                  <th>Tổng tiền</th>
    93→                  <th>Trạng thái</th>
    94→                  <th className="text-right">Thao tác</th>
    95→                </tr>
    96→              </thead>
    97→              <tbody>
    98→                {filteredBookings.map((booking) => (
    99→                  <tr key={booking._id}>
   100→                    {/* Time */}
   101→                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
   102→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-500 font-medium">{formatDate(booking.createdAt)}</div>
   103→                    </td>
   104→
   105→                    {/* Customer */}
   106→                    <td>
   107→                      <div className="font-medium text-stone-900">{booking.customerName}</div>
   108→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 max-w-[150px] truncate">{booking.address}</div>
   109→                    </td>
   110→
   111→                    {/* Contact */}
   112→                    <td>
   113→                      <div className="text-sm text-stone-700">{booking.phone}</div>
   114→                      {booking.note && (
   115→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 italic max-w-[120px] truncate">
   116→                          Ghi chú: {booking.note}
   117→                        </div>
   118→                      )}
   119→                    </td>
   120→
   121→                    {/* Items */}
   122→                    <td>
   123→                      <div className="space-y-1">
   124→                        {booking.items.slice(0, 3).map((item, idx) => (
   125→                          <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   126→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-600">{item.foodName}</span>
   127→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">×{item.quantity}</span>
   128→                          </div>
   129→                        ))}
   130→                        {booking.items.length > 3 && (
   131→                          <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">+{booking.items.length - 3} món khác</div>
   132→                        )}
   133→                      </div>
   134→                    </td>
   135→
   136→                    {/* Total */}
   137→                    <td>
   138→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 whitespace-nowrap">
   139→                        {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   140→                      </span>
   141→                    </td>
   142→
   143→                    {/* Status */}
   144→                    <td>
   145→                      <StatusBadge status={booking.status} size="sm" />
   146→                    </td>
   147→
   148→                    {/* Actions */}
   149→                    <td>
   150→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end">
   151→                        <BookingActions booking={booking} onUpdateStatus={handleUpdateStatus} />
   152→                      </div>
   153→                    </td>
   154→                  </tr>
   155→                ))}
   156→              </tbody>
   157→            </table>
   158→          </div>
   159→        </div>
   160→      ) : (
   161→        <div className="card">
   162→          <EmptyState
   163→            icon={EmptyBagIcon}
   164→            title={statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' ? 'Không có booking nào' : 'Chưa có booking nào'}
   165→            description={
   166→              statusFilter !== 'Tất cả'
   167→                ? 'Thử chọn bộ lọc khác để xem kết quả'
   168→                : 'Booking từ khách hàng sẽ xuất hiện tại đây'
   169→            }
   170→          />
   171→        </div>
   172→      )}
   173→    </div>
   174→  );
   175→};
   176→
   177→const EmptyBagIcon = () => (
   178→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   179→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2" />
   180→  </svg>
   181→);
   182→
   183→export default AdminBookingsPage;
   184→
```
</details></tool-use>

```javascript
const path = require('path');

const logger = winston.createLogger({
  level: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' ? 'info' : 'debug',
  format: winston.format.combine(
    winston.format.timestamp(),
    winston.format.errors({ stack: true }),

        })
      ),
    }),
  ],
});

module.exports = logger;
```

---

## TÓM TẮT SCAN CODEBASE

### Backend (Express + MongoDB)
| Thành phần | Trạng thái |
|-----------|-----------|
| Models | 2 (Food, Booking) - cần mở rộng |
| API Endpoints | 11 endpoints |
| Auth | **HOÀN TOÀN KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Validation | Mongoose schema only |
| File Upload | Multer, 5MB, không block SVG |
| Error Handling | Global handler có, không có async wrapper |
| Realtime | **HOÀN TOÀN KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Testing | **KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Rate limiting | **KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Security headers | **KHÔNG CÓ** |

### Frontend (React + Vite + Tailwind)
| Thành phần | Trạng thái |
|-----------|-----------|
| Tech stack | React 18 + Vite + Tailwind 3.4 |
| State | Redux Toolkit (3 slices) |
| Routing | React Router v6 (8 routes) |
| Forms | react-hook-form + yup |
| Auth UI | **KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Protected routes | **KHÔNG CÓ** |
| UI components | 13 components cơ bản |
| Dark mode | **KHÔNG CÓ** |
| Animations | Basic CSS animations |
| Skeleton loading | Chỉ có ở food card |

---

### CÁC ĐIỂM YẾU NGHIÊM TRỌNG

1. **Security**: Không có auth, admin route public, `.env` có thể bị commit
2. **Architecture**: Không có service layer, không có async wrapper, duplicate code
3. **Performance**: Không có React Query, không có caching, re-fetch liên tục
4. **UX**: Không có wishlist, không có order tracking page, không có profile page
5. **Backend**: Không có user management, coupon system, branch management, review system
6. **Realtime**: Không có Socket.io, order status update phải refresh

---

### KẾ HOẠCH THEO PHASE

```
Phase 1 (đang chạy): UI/UX Premium Foundation
├── Backend: Auth + New Models + Services
└── Frontend: Theme + Components + Layouts + Routes

Phase 2: User Features
├── Login/Register/Profile pages
├── Checkout nâng cao + Coupon + Delivery options
└── Order tracking timeline

Phase 3: Admin Dashboard v2
├── Stats + Charts (Recharts)
├── Promo management
└── Food/Order nâng cao

Phase 4: Shipper Module
├── Shipper dashboard
└── Assign/deliver workflow

Phase 5: Realtime + Polish
├── Socket.io notifications
├── Admin alerts
└── Full system integration
```

---

### DANH SÁCH FILE SẼ TẠO/SỬA MỖI PHASE

**Phase 1 Backend** (28+ files):
- `backend/src/models/` - 7 model files (Food, Booking, User, Coupon, Branch, Review, Notification)
- `backend/src/middlewares/` - auth.middleware.js, rateLimiter.middleware.js
- `backend/src/services/` - 7 service files
- `backend/src/controllers/` - 8 controller files
- `backend/src/routes/` - 8 route files
- `backend/src/sockets/` - socket.service.js, index.js
- `backend/src/utils/` - asyncHandler.js, ApiResponse.js, constants.js, logger.js
- `backend/src/app.js` (updated)
- `backend/src/server.js` (updated)

**Phase 1 Frontend** (40+ files):
- `frontend/tailwind.config.js` (updated)
- `frontend/src/index.css` (updated)
- `frontend/src/App.jsx` (updated)
- `frontend/src/store/index.js` (updated)
- `frontend/src/api/axiosClient.js` (updated)
- `frontend/src/constants/index.js` (updated)
- `frontend/src/lib/` - utils.js
- `frontend/src/hooks/` - useAuth.js, useSocket.js
- `frontend/src/components/ui/v2/` - 10+ component files
- `frontend/src/layouts/` - MainLayout, AdminLayout (redesigned)
- `frontend/src/pages/user/` - HomePage (redesigned), new pages
- `frontend/src/routes/index.jsx` (updated)

hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg transition-colors\"\n   110→          >\n   111→            <X className=\"w-5 h-5\" />\n   112→          </button>\n   113→        </div>\n   114→\n   115→        {/* Form */}\n   116→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className=\"p-6 space-y-5\">\n   117→          {/* Name */}\n   118→          <div>\n   119→            <label className=\"input-label\">Tên món ăn <span className=\"text-red-500\">*</span></label>\n   120→            <input {...register('name')} className=\"input-field\" placeholder=\"VD: Cơm gà xối mỡ\" />\n   121→            {errors.name && <p className=\"text-red-500 text-xs mt-1\">{errors.name.message}</p>}\n   122→          </div>\n   123→\n   124→          {/* Category */}\n   125→          <div>\n   126→            <label className=\"input-label\">Danh mục <span className=\"text-red-500\">*</span></label>\n   127→            <select {...register('category')} className=\"input-field cursor-pointer\">\n   128→              <option value=\"\">Chọn danh mục</option>\n   129→              {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat) => (\n   130→                <option key={cat} value={cat}>{cat}</option>\n   131→              ))}\n   132→            </select>\n   133→            {errors.category && <p className=\"text-red-500 text-xs mt-1\">{errors.category.message}</p>}\n   134→          </div>\n   135→\n   136→          {/* Price */}\n   137→          <div>\n   138→            <label className=\"input-label\">Giá (VNĐ) <span className=\"text-red-500\">*</span></label>\n   139→            <input\n   140→              {...register('price')}\n   141→              type=\"number\"\n   142→              min=\"0\"\n   143→              step=\"1000\"\n   144→              className=\"input-field\"\n   145→              placeholder=\"VD: 45000\"\n   146→            />\n   147→            {errors.price && <p className=\"text-red-500 text-xs mt-1\">{errors.price.message}</p>}\n   148→          </div>\n   149→\n   150→          {/* Description */}\n   151→          <div>\n   152→            <label className=\"input-label\">Mô tả</label>\n   153→            <textarea\n   154→              {...register('description')}\n   155→              rows={3}\n   156→              className=\"input-field resize-none\"\n   157→              placeholder=\"Mô tả ngắn về món ăn...\"\n   158→            />\n   159→          </div>\n   160→\n   161→          {/* Image */}\n   162→          <div>\n   163→            <label className=\"input-label\">Hình ảnh</label>\n   164→            <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n   165→              <button\n   166→                type=\"button\"\n   167→                onClick={() => setImageMode('url')}\n   168→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${\n   169→                  imageMode === 'url'\n   170→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'\n   171→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'\n   172→                }`}\n   173→              >\n   174→                Nhập URL\n   175→              </button>\n   176→              <button\n   177→                type=\"button\"\n   178→                onClick={() => setImageMode('upload')}\n   179→                className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${\n   180→                  imageMode === 'upload'\n   181→                    ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white'\n   182→                    : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'\n   183→                }`}\n   184→              >\n   185→                Upload file\n   186→              </button>\n   187→            </div>\n   188→\n   189→            {imageMode === 'url' ? (\n   190→              <input\n   191→                type=\"text\"\n   192→                value={imageValue || ''}\n   193→                onChange={(e) => handleImageUrlChange(e.target.value)}\n   194→                className=\"input-field\"\n   195→                placeholder=\"https://example.com/image.jpg\"\n   196→              />\n   197→            ) : (\n   198→              <div className=\"relative\">\n   199→                <input\n   200→                  type=\"file\"\n   201→                  accept=\"image/*\"\n   202→                  onChange={handleFileUpload}\n   203→                  className=\"hidden\"\n   204→                  id=\"image-upload\"\n   205→                />\n   206→                <label\n   207→                  htmlFor=\"image-upload\"\n   208→                  className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full py-3 border-2 border-dashed border-stone-200 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-primary-400 hover:bg-primary-50/30 transition-all duration-200\"\n   209→                >\n   210→                  {isUploading ? (\n   211→                    <LoadingSpinner size=\"sm\" />\n   212→                  ) : (\n   213→                    <>\n   214→                      <Upload className=\"w-5 h-5 text-stone-400\" />\n   215→                      <span className=\"text-sm text-stone-500\">\n   216→                        {imageValue ? 'Chọn ảnh khác...' : 'Chọn file ảnh'}\n   217→                      </span>\n   218→                    </>\n   219→                  )}\n   220→                </label>\n   221→              </div>\n   222→            )}\n   223→\n   224→            {/* Image preview */}\n   225→            {imagePreview && (\n   226→              <div className=\"mt-3 relative\">\n   227→                <img\n   228→                  src={imagePreview}\n   229→                  alt=\"Preview\"\n   230→                  className=\"w-full h-40 object-cover rounded-xl border border-stone-200\"\n   231→                  onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; }}\n   232→                />\n   233→                <button\n   234→                  type=\"button\"\n   235→                  onClick={() => { setImagePreview(''); setValue('image', ''); }}\n   236→                  className=\"absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors\"\n   237→                >\n   238→                  <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n   239→                </button>\n   240→              </div>\n   241→            )}\n   242→          </div>\n   243→\n   244→          {/* Availability */}\n   245→          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n   246→            <label className=\"relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer\">\n   247→              <input type=\"checkbox\" {...register('isAvailable')} className=\"sr-only peer\" />\n   248→              <div className=\"w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 peer-focus:outline-none peer-focus:ring-2 peer-focus:ring-primary-500/30 rounded-full peer peer-checked:after:translate-x-5 rtl:peer-checked:after:-translate-x-full peer-checked:after:border-white after:content-[''] after:absolute after:top-[2px] after:start-[2px] after:bg-white after:rounded-full after:h-5 after:w-5 after:transition-all peer-checked:bg-primary-500\"></div>\n   249→            </label>\n   250→            <span className=\"text-sm font-medium text-stone-700\">\n   251→              Còn món (hiển thị cho khách)\n   252→            </span>\n   253→          </div>\n   254→\n   255→          {/* Actions */}\n   256→          <div className=\"flex gap-3 pt-2\">\n   257→            <button type=\"button\" onClick={onClose} className=\"btn-secondary flex-1\">\n   258→              Hủy\n   259→            </button>\n   260→            <button type=\"submit\" disabled={isLoading} className=\"btn-primary flex-1\">\n   261→              {isLoading ? <LoadingSpinner size=\"sm\" /> : initialData ? ## Vấn đề: Permission Denied

Tôi đã gặp lỗi **Permission Denied** khi cả 2 agent cố gắi ghi file vào project. Điều này có nghĩa:

- ✅ **Read**: Tôi đọc được tất cả 16+ files trong project
- ❌ **Write/Edit/Bash**: Tôi bị từ chặn ghi file vào `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking`

**Nguyên nhân có thể**: Security policy hoặc antivirus đang block quyền ghi vào thư mục này.

---

## TÙY CHỌN ĐỂ TIẾP TỤC

### Option 1: Cấp quyền cho tôi (Khuyến nghị)
Hãy thử:
1. **Tạm disable antivirus** trong khi tôi làm việc
2. Hoặc **chạy Claude Opus với quyền Admin**
3. Hoặc kiểm tra **Windows Security Center** có đang block gì không

Sau đó gõ lại yêu cầu.

### Option 2: Tôi viết code ra file riêng
Tôi sẽ viết toàn bộ code ra một thư mục mà bạn có quyền, rồi bạn copy vào project.

### Option 3: Bạn chạy lệnh thủ công
Tôi sẽ cung cấp:
1. **Danh sách lệnh npm install**
2. **Toàn bộ code** mỗi file (bạn tự tạo file)
3. **Hướng dẫn từng bước**

---

## TRONG KHI CHỜ, TÔI ĐÃ ĐỌC HIỂU RỒI

Tôi đã hoàn toàn hiểu codebase của bạn (đọc 20+ files). Ngay khi có quyền ghi, tôi sẽ bắt đầu ngay Phase 1.

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
class ApiResponse {
  constructor(statusCode, data = null, message = 'Success') {
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.success = statusCode < 400;
    this.data = data;
    this.message = message;
  }

  send(res) {
    return res.status(this.statusCode).json({
      success: this.success,
      message: this.message,
      data: this.data,
    });
  }
}

module.exports = ApiResponse;

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');

const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  label: { type: String, default: 'Nhà' },
  fullName: { type: String, trim: true },
  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
}, { _id: true });

const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  fullName: { type: String, required: [true, 'Họ tên không được để trống'], trim: true },
  email: {
    type: String,
    required: [true, 'Email không được để trống'],
    unique: true,
    lowercase: true,
    trim: true,
    match: [/^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/, 'Email không hợp lệ'],
  },
  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
  passwordHash: { type: String, required: [true, 'Mật khẩu không được để trống'] },
  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
  role: { type: String, enum: { values: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], message: 'Role không hợp lệ' }, default: 'customer' },
  addresses: [addressSchema],
  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
  refreshToken: { type: String },
  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
}, { timestamps: true });

// Hash password before save
userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
  // Only hash if it's not already hashed (length !== 60 for bcrypt)
  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
  }
  next();
});

// Compare password
userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
};

// Remove sensitive fields when converting to JSON
userSchema.methods.toJSON = function () {
  const obj = this.toObject();
  delete obj.passwordHash;
  delete obj.refreshToken;
  delete obj.__v;
  return obj;
};

// Indexes
userSchema.index({ email: 1 });
userSchema.index({ role: 1 });

module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);

```


```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');

const variantSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  priceModifier: { type: Number, default: 0 },
}, { _id: true });

const toppingSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  price: { type: Number, default: 0 },
}, { _id: true });

const foodSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  name: { type: String, required: [true, 'Tên món ăn không được để trống'], trim: true },
  slug: { type: String, unique: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
  category: { type: String, required: [true, 'Danh mục không được để trống'], trim: true },
  price: { type: Number, required: [true, 'Giá không được để trống'], min: [0, 'Giá phải lớn hơn hoặc bằng 0'] },
  originalPrice: { type: Number, min: 0 },
  image: { type: String, default: '' },
  gallery: [{ type: String }],
  description: { type: String, default: '', trim: true },
  isAvailable: { type: Boolean, default: true },
  isFeatured: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  soldCount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  ratingAverage: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0, max: 5 },
  ratingCount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  discountPercent: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0, max: 100 },
  stock: { type: Number, default: 999 },
  variants: [variantSchema],
  toppings: [toppingSchema],
  tags: [{ type: String, trim: true }],
}, { timestamps: true });

// Auto-generate slug from name
foodSchema.pre('save', function (next) {
  if (this.isModified('name')) {
    this.slug = this.name
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
      .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
      .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
      .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
      .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
      .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
      .replace(/[đ]/g, 'd')
      .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
      .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
  }
  next();
});

// Indexes
foodSchema.index({ name: 'text', description: 'text' });
foodSchema.index({ category: 1 });
foodSchema.index({ price: 1 });
foodSchema.index({ isFeatured: 1 });
foodSchema.index({ isAvailable: 1 });
foodSchema.index({ slug: 1 });
foodSchema.index({ ratingAverage: -1 });
foodSchema.index({ soldCount: -1 });

module.exports = mongoose.model('Food', foodSchema);

```

```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');

const orderItemSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  foodId: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' },
  foodName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  quantity: { type: Number, required: true, min: 1 },
  price: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
  image: { type: String, default: '' },
  variant: { type: String, trim: true },
  toppings: [{ name: String, price: Number }],
}, { _id: false });

const trackingLogSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  status: { type: String, required: true },
  note: { type: String, default: '' },
  timestamp: { type: Date, default: Date.now },
  updatedBy: { type: String },
}, { _id: true });

const customerInfoSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  phone: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
}, { _id: false });

const bookingSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  orderCode: { type: String, unique: true },
  customer: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User' },
  items: [orderItemSchema],
  subtotal: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
  discount: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0 },
  deliveryFee: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0 },
  total: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
  coupon: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Coupon' },
  paymentMethod: { type: String, enum: ['cod', 'bank_transfer', 'momo', 'zalopay'], default: 'cod' },
  paymentStatus: { type: String, enum: ['pending', 'paid', 'failed', 'refunded'], default: 'pending' },
  fulfillmentType: { type: String, enum: ['delivery', 'pickup', 'reservation'], default: 'delivery' },
  branch: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Branch' },
  status: {
    type: String,
    enum: {
      values: ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'delivering', 'done', 'cancelled'],
      message: 'Trạng thái không hợp lệ',
    },
    default: 'pending',
  },
  assignedShipper: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User' },
  cancelReason: { type: String, default: '' },
  trackingLogs: [trackingLogSchema],
  estimatedDeliveryTime: { type: Date },
  customerInfo: customerInfoSchema,
  note: { type: String, default: '', trim: true },
}, { timestamps: true });

// Indexes
bookingSchema.index({ customer: 1 });
bookingSchema.index({ status: 1 });
bookingSchema.index({ createdAt: -1 });
bookingSchema.index({ orderCode: 1 });
bookingSchema.index({ 'customerInfo.phone': 1 });

// Generate order code before creating
bookingSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
  if (this.isNew && !this.orderCode) {
    const count = await mongoose.model('Booking').countDocuments();
    this.orderCode = 'ORD' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() + (count + 1).toString().padStart(4, '0');
  }
  next();
});

module.exports = mongoose.model('Booking', bookingSchema);

```


<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');

const reviewSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  user: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true },
  food: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food', required: true },
  rating: { type: Number, required: true, min: 1, max: 5 },
  comment: { type: String, trim: true, maxlength: 500 },
  isVerified: { type: Boolean, default: false },
}, { timestamps: true });

reviewSchema.index({ food: 1, createdAt: -1 });
reviewSchema.index({ user: 1 });

// Update food rating after review changes
reviewSchema.post('save', async function () {
  const Food = mongoose.model('Food');
  const stats = await mongoose.model('Review').aggregate([
    { $match: { food: this.food } },
    { $group: { _id: '$food', avgRating: { $avg: '$rating' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } },
  ]);
  if (stats.length > 0) {
    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(this.food, {
      ratingAverage: Math.round(stats[0].avgRating * 10) / 10,
      ratingCount: stats[0].count,
    });
  }
});

reviewSchema.post('findOneAndDelete', async function (doc) {
  if (doc) {
    const Food = mongoose.model('Food');
    const stats = await mongoose.model('Review').aggregate([
      { $match: { food: doc.food } },
      { $group: { _id: '$food', avgRating: { $avg: '$rating' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    ]);
    if (stats.length > 0) {
      await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(doc.food, {
        ratingAverage: Math.round(stats[0].avgRating * 10) / 10,
        ratingCount: stats[0].count,
      });
    } else {
      await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(doc.food, { ratingAverage: 0, ratingCount: 0 });
    }
  }
});

module.exports = mongoose.model('Review', reviewSchema);

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:31:33Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');

const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  if (!token) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Access token required. Please login.');
  }

  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    if (!user || !user.isActive) {
      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid or inactive user');
    }
    req.user = user;
    next();
  } catch (err) {
    if (err.name === 'JsonWebTokenError' || err.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Token is invalid or expired');
    }
    throw err;
  }
});

const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
  if (!req.user) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Authentication required');
  }
  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Insufficient permissions');
  }
  next();
};

const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  if (token) {
    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    } catch {
      // Token invalid, continue without user
    }
  }
  next();
});

module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };

```


_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:31:33Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const rateLimitStore = new Map();

const rateLimiter = (options = {}) => {
  const { windowMs = 15 * 60 * 1000, max = 100, message = 'Too many requests' } = options;

  return (req, res, next) => {
    const key = req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress;
    const now = Date.now();

    if (!rateLimitStore.has(key)) {
      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
      return next();
    }

    const record = rateLimitStore.get(key);

    if (now > record.resetTime) {
      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
      return next();
    }

    record.count++;

    if (record.count > max) {
      return res.status(429).json({
        success: false,
        message,
        data: null,
      });
    }

    next();
  };
};

// Cleanup old entries periodically
setInterval(() => {
  const now = Date.now();
  for (const [key, value] of rateLimitStore.entries()) {
    if (now > value.resetTime) {
      rateLimitStore.delete(key);
    }
  }
}, 60000);

module.exports = rateLimiter;

```

```text
File created successfully at: C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middlewares\rateLimiter.middleware.js
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:33:50Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');

const generateAccessToken = (userId) =>
  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '15m' });

const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>
  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' });

const setTokenCookies = (res, accessToken, refreshToken) => {
  res.cookie('accessToken', accessToken, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
  });
  res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
  });
};

// @route   POST /api/auth/register
exports.register = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { fullName, email, password, phone } = req.body;

  if (!fullName || !email || !password) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Full name, email and password are required');
  }

  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
  if (existing) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email already registered');
  }

  const user = await User.create({ fullName, email, passwordHash: password, phone });
  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);

  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
  await user.save();

  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);

  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Registration successful').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/auth/login
exports.login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { email, password } = req.body;

  if (!email || !password) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email and password are required');
  }

  const user = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
  if (!user) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
  }

  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(password);
  if (!isMatch) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
  }

  if (!user.isActive) {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Account is disabled');
  }

  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);

  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
  await user.save();

  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);

  return new ApiResponse(200, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Login successful').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/auth/logout
exports.logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  if (req.user) {
    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
  }
  res.clearCookie('accessToken');
  res.clearCookie('refreshToken');
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Logged out successfully').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/auth/me
exports.getMe = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  return new ApiResponse(200, req.user, 'User profile').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/auth/refresh
exports.refreshToken = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const refreshToken = req.cookies.refreshToken || req.body.refreshToken;
  if (!refreshToken) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Refresh token required');
  }

  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);

    if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
    }

    const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    res.cookie('accessToken', newAccessToken, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
    });

    return new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken }, 'Token refreshed').send(res);
  } catch (err) {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
  }
});

// @route   PUT /api/auth/profile
exports.updateProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { fullName, phone, avatar, addresses } = req.body;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);

  if (fullName) user.fullName = fullName;
  if (phone !== undefined) user.phone = phone;
  if (avatar !== undefined) user.avatar = avatar;
  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;

  await user.save();
  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Profile updated').send(res);
});

// @route   PUT /api/auth/change-password
exports.changePassword = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { currentPassword, newPassword } = req.body;

  if (!currentPassword || !newPassword) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password and new password are required');
  }

  if (newPassword.length < 6) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'New password must be at least 6 characters');
  }

  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(currentPassword);
  if (!isMatch) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password is incorrect');
  }

  user.passwordHash = newPassword;
  await user.save();

  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Password changed successfully').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/auth/wishlist
exports.addToWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { foodId } = req.body;
  if (!foodId) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID is required');

  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  if (!user.wishlist.includes(foodId)) {
    user.wishlist.push(foodId);
    await user.save();
  }
  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Added to wishlist').send(res);
});

// @route   DELETE /api/auth/wishlist/:foodId
exports.removeFromWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { foodId } = req.params;
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
  user.wishlist = user.wishlist.filter((id) => id.toString() !== foodId);
  await user.save();
  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Removed from wishlist').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/auth/wishlist
exports.getWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).populate({
    path: 'wishlist',
    select: 'name price originalPrice image category isAvailable ratingAverage soldCount discountPercent',
  });
  return new ApiResponse(200, user.wishlist, 'Wishlist retrieved').send(res);
});
```
