```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
const { PAGINATION_DEFAULTS } = require('../utils/constants');

// @route   GET /api/foods
exports.getFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const {
    search = '',
    category = '',
    minPrice,
    maxPrice,
    sort = 'newest',
    page = 1,
    limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit,
    featured,
    isAvailable,
  } = req.query;

  const query = {};

  // Search
  if (search) {
    query.$text = { $search: search };
  }

  // Category filter
  if (category && category !== 'all') {
    query.category = category;
  }

  // Price range
  if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
    query.price = {};
    if (minPrice) query.price.$gte = Number(minPrice);
    if (maxPrice) query.price.$lte = Number(maxPrice);
  }

  // Featured
  if (featured !== undefined) {
    query.isFeatured = featured === 'true';
  }

  // Availability
  if (isAvailable !== undefined) {
    query.isAvailable = isAvailable === 'true';
  }

  // Sort
  let sortOptions = { createdAt: -1 };
  if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOptions = { price: 1 };
  else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOptions = { price: -1 };
  else if (sort === 'rating') sortOptions = { ratingAverage: -1 };
  else if (sort === 'bestseller') sortOptions = { soldCount: -1 };

  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [foods, total] = await Promise.all([
    Food.find(query).sort(sortOptions).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    Food.countDocuments(query),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    foods,
    pagination: {
      total,
      page: Number(page),
      limit: Number(limit),
      pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
    },
  }, 'Foods retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/foods/featured
exports.getFeatured = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const foods = await Food.find({ isFeatured: true, isAvailable: true })
    .sort({ soldCount: -1, ratingAverage: -1 })
    .limit(8);
  return new ApiResponse(200, foods, 'Featured foods retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/foods/categories
exports.getCategories = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const categories = await Food.aggregate([
    { $match: { isAvailable: true } },
    { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    { $sort: { count: -1 } },
    { $project: { _id: 0, category: '$_id', count: 1 } },
  ]);
  return new ApiResponse(200, categories, 'Categories retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/foods/:id
exports.getFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/foods/slug/:slug
exports.getFoodBySlug = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.findOne({ slug: req.params.slug });
  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/foods (admin)
exports.createFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.create(req.body);
  return new ApiResponse(201, food, 'Food created').send(res);
});

// @route   PUT /api/foods/:id (admin)
exports.updateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food updated').send(res);
});

// @route   DELETE /api/foods/:id (admin)
exports.deleteFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Food deleted').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/foods/:id/toggle-availability (admin)
exports.toggleAvailability = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
  food.isAvailable = !food.isAvailable;
  await food.save();
  return new ApiResponse(200, food, `Food ${food.isAvailable ? 'available' : 'unavailable'}`).send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/foods/:id/duplicate (admin)
exports.duplicateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const original = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!original) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');

  const { name } = req.body;
  const newFood = await Food.create({
    ...original.toObject(),
    _id: undefined,
    name: name || `${original.name} (Copy)`,
    slug: undefined,
    soldCount: 0,
    ratingAverage: 0,
    ratingCount: 0,
    createdAt: undefined,
    updatedAt: undefined,
  });

  return new ApiResponse(201, newFood, 'Food duplicated').send(res);
});
```

```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');
const User = require('../models/User.model');
const { PAGINATION_DEFAULTS } = require('../utils/constants');

// @route   POST /api/orders
exports.createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { items, customerInfo, fulfillmentType, paymentMethod, couponCode, branchId, note } = req.body;

  if (!items || items.length === 0) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Order must have at least one item');
  }

  if (!customerInfo?.name || !customerInfo?.phone) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Customer name and phone are required');
  }

  // Calculate prices
  let subtotal = 0;
  const orderItems = [];

  for (const item of items) {
    const food = await Food.findById(item.foodId);
    if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food ${item.foodId} not found`);
    if (!food.isAvailable) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food "${food.name}" is not available`);

    const price = item.price || food.price;
    subtotal += price * item.quantity;

    orderItems.push({
      foodId: food._id,
      foodName: food.name,
      quantity: item.quantity,
      price,
      image: food.image || '',
      variant: item.variant,
      toppings: item.toppings,
    });

    // Update sold count
    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(food._id, { $inc: { soldCount: item.quantity } });
  }

  // Validate and apply coupon
  let discount = 0;
  let coupon = null;

  if (couponCode) {
    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Invalid coupon code');
    if (coupon.startDate > new Date() || coupon.endDate < new Date()) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired or not yet active');
    }
    if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    }
    if (subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
      throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    }
    if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
      discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    } else {
      discount = Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal);
    }
    await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(coupon._id, { $inc: { usedCount: 1 } });
  }

  const deliveryFee =
    fulfillmentType === 'delivery'
      ? subtotal - discount >= 100000
        ? 0
        : 15000
      : 0;

  const total = Math.max(0, subtotal - discount + deliveryFee);

  const order = await Booking.create({
    customer: req.user?._id,
    items: orderItems,
    subtotal,
    discount,
    deliveryFee,
    total,
    coupon: coupon?._id,
    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || 'cod',
    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || 'delivery',
    branch: branchId,
    customerInfo,
    note,
    trackingLogs: [{ status: 'pending', note: 'Order placed', timestamp: new Date() }],
  });

  // Notify admins via Socket.io
  const io = req.app.get('io');
  if (io) {
    io.to('admin').emit('newOrder', { order });
  }

  // Create notification for admins
  await Notification.create({
    user: null,
    title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
    message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} vừa được đặt - ${total.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ`,
    type: 'order',
    link: `/admin/orders/${order._id}`,
  });

  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
    .populate('coupon', 'code type value')
    .populate('branch', 'name address phone');

  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Order placed successfully').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/orders/my
exports.getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;

  const query = {};
  if (req.user) {
    query.customer = req.user._id;
  } else {
    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Authentication required');
  }
  if (status) query.status = status;

  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([
    Booking.find(query)
      .populate('coupon', 'code')
      .populate('branch', 'name address')
      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
      .skip(skip)
      .limit(Number(limit)),
    Booking.countDocuments(query),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    orders,
    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/orders/:id
exports.getOrderById = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id)
    .populate('coupon', 'code type value')
    .populate('branch', 'name address phone openHours')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');

  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');

  // Check ownership
  if (req.user && order.customer?._id?.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== 'admin') {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
  }

  return new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/status (admin/shipper)
exports.updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, note, cancelReason } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);

  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');

  const validTransitions = {
    pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
    confirmed: ['preparing', 'cancelled'],
    preparing: ['delivering', 'cancelled'],
    delivering: ['done', 'cancelled'],
    done: [],
    cancelled: [],
  };

  if (!validTransitions[order.status]?.includes(status)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Cannot change status from "${order.status}" to "${status}"`);
  }

  order.status = status;
  order.trackingLogs.push({
    status,
    note: note || `Status changed to ${status}`,
    timestamp: new Date(),
    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'System',
  });

  if (cancelReason) order.cancelReason = cancelReason;

  await order.save();

  // Notify customer
  if (order.customer) {
    await Notification.create({
      user: order.customer,
      title: 'Cập nhật đơn hàng',
      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được cập nhật: ${status}`,
      type: 'order',
      link: `/orders/${order._id}`,
    });

    // Socket.io to customer
    const io = req.app.get('io');
    if (io) {
      io.to(`user:${order.customer}`).emit('orderUpdate', { orderId: order._id, status, orderCode: order.orderCode });
    }
  }

  // Notify assigned shipper
  if (order.assignedShipper && status === 'confirmed') {
    const shipper = await User.findById(order.assignedShipper);
    if (shipper) {
      await Notification.create({
        user: order.assignedShipper,
        title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
        message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được xác nhận. Sẵn sàng giao!`,
        type: 'order',
        link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
      });
    }
  }

  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
    .populate('coupon', 'code')
    .populate('branch', 'name address')
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');

  return new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Order status updated').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/assign-shipper (admin)
exports.assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { shipperId } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);

  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
  if (!['pending', 'confirmed'].includes(order.status)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot assign shipper to this order');
  }

  order.assignedShipper = shipperId;
  await order.save();

  if (shipperId) {
    await Notification.create({
      user: shipperId,
      title: 'Có đơn hàng mới',
      message: `Bạn được giao đơn hàng ${order.orderCode}`,
      type: 'order',
      link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
    });

    const io = req.app.get('io');
    if (io) {
      io.to(`user:${shipperId}`).emit('newDelivery', { orderId: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
      io.to('shipper').emit('orderAssigned', { orderId: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
    }
  }

  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');

  return new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Shipper assigned').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel
exports.cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { reason } = req.body;
  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);

  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
  if (['done', 'cancelled'].includes(order.status)) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot cancel this order');
  }

  order.status = 'cancelled';
  order.cancelReason = reason || 'Cancelled by customer';
  order.trackingLogs.push({
    status: 'cancelled',
    note: reason || 'Cancelled by customer',
    timestamp: new Date(),
    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'Customer',
  });
  await order.save();

  if (order.customer) {
    await Notification.create({
      user: order.customer,
      title: 'Đơn hàng đã hủy',
      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được hủy`,
      type: 'order',
    });

    const io = req.app.get('io');
    if (io) {
      io.to(`user:${order.customer}`).emit('orderUpdate', { orderId: order._id, status: 'cancelled', orderCode: order.orderCode });
    }
  }

  return new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order cancelled').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/orders (admin)
exports.getAllOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status, search, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;

  const query = {};
  if (status && status !== 'all') query.status = status;
  if (search) {
    query.$or = [
      { orderCode: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { 'customerInfo.name': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { 'customerInfo.phone': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
    ];
  }

  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([
    Booking.find(query)
      .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone avatar')
      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
      .populate('branch', 'name address')
      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
      .skip(skip)
      .limit(Number(limit)),
    Booking.countDocuments(query),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    orders,
    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/orders/shipper/pending (shipper)
exports.getShipperOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { status } = req.query;
  const query = {};

  if (req.user.role === 'shipper') {
    query.assignedShipper = req.user._id;
  }
  if (status) query.status = status;

  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
    .populate('customer', 'fullName phone')
    .populate('branch', 'name address')
    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    .limit(50);

  return new ApiResponse(200, orders, 'Shipper orders retrieved').send(res);
});
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Review = require('../models/Review.model');
const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');

// @route   POST /api/reviews
exports.createReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { foodId, rating, comment } = req.body;

  if (!foodId || !rating) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID and rating are required');
  }

  if (rating < 1 || rating > 5) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Rating must be between 1 and 5');
  }

  // Check if user has purchased this food
  const hasPurchased = await Booking.findOne({
    customer: req.user._id,
    'items.foodId': foodId,
    status: 'done',
  });

  const isVerified = !!hasPurchased;

  // Check if user already reviewed this food
  const existing = await Review.findOne({ user: req.user._id, food: foodId });
  if (existing) {
    existing.rating = rating;
    existing.comment = comment || '';
    existing.isVerified = isVerified || existing.isVerified;
    await existing.save();
    return new ApiResponse(200, existing.populate('user', 'fullName avatar'), 'Review updated').send(res);
  }

  const review = await Review.create({
    user: req.user._id,
    food: foodId,
    rating,
    comment: comment || '',
    isVerified,
  });

  const populated = await Review.findById(review._id).populate('user', 'fullName avatar');

  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Review created').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/reviews/food/:foodId
exports.getFoodReviews = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;
  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [reviews, total] = await Promise.all([
    Review.find({ food: req.params.foodId })
      .populate('user', 'fullName avatar')
      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
      .skip(skip)
      .limit(Number(limit)),
    Review.countDocuments({ food: req.params.foodId }),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    reviews,
    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
  }, 'Reviews retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   DELETE /api/reviews/:id
exports.deleteReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const review = await Review.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!review) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Review not found');

  if (req.user.role !== 'admin' && review.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
  }

  await Review.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Review deleted').send(res);
});

```

```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');

// @route   POST /api/coupons/validate
exports.validateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { code, subtotal } = req.body;

  if (!code) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code is required');

  const coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: code.toUpperCase() });

  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
  if (!coupon.isActive) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is inactive');
  if (coupon.startDate > new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is not yet active');
  if (coupon.endDate < new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired');
  if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
  }
  if (subtotal !== undefined && subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
  }

  let discount = 0;
  if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
    discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
  } else {
    discount = Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal || 0);
  }

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    coupon: { code: coupon.code, type: coupon.type, value: coupon.value },
    discount: Math.round(discount),
    message: 'Coupon is valid',
  }, 'Coupon validated').send(res);
});

// Admin CRUD

// @route   GET /api/admin/coupons
exports.getAllCoupons = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const coupons = await Coupon.find().sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  return new ApiResponse(200, coupons, 'Coupons retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   POST /api/admin/coupons
exports.createCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const existing = await Coupon.findOne({ code: req.body.code.toUpperCase() });
  if (existing) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code already exists');

  const coupon = await Coupon.create(req.body);
  return new ApiResponse(201, coupon, 'Coupon created').send(res);
});

// @route   PUT /api/admin/coupons/:id
exports.updateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, 'Coupon updated').send(res);
});

// @route   DELETE /api/admin/coupons/:id
exports.deleteCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Coupon deleted').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/admin/coupons/:id/toggle
exports.toggleCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const coupon = await Coupon.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
  coupon.isActive = !coupon.isActive;
  await coupon.save();
  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, `Coupon ${coupon.isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'}`).send(res);
});

```


```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');

// @route   GET /api/notifications
exports.getNotifications = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { page = 1, limit = 20, unreadOnly } = req.query;
  const query = { user: req.user._id };
  if (unreadOnly === 'true') query.isRead = false;

  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [notifications, total, unreadCount] = await Promise.all([
    Notification.find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 }).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    Notification.countDocuments(query),
    Notification.countDocuments({ user: req.user._id, isRead: false }),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    notifications,
    unreadCount,
    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
  }, 'Notifications retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read
exports.markAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const notification = await Notification.findOneAndUpdate(
    { _id: req.params.id, user: req.user._id },
    { isRead: true },
    { new: true },
  );
  if (!notification) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Notification not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, notification, 'Marked as read').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/notifications/read-all
exports.markAllAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  await Notification.updateMany({ user: req.user._id, isRead: false }, { isRead: true });
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'All notifications marked as read').send(res);
});

// @route   DELETE /api/notifications/:id
exports.deleteNotification = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const notification = await Notification.findOneAndDelete({ _id: req.params.id, user: req.user._id });
  if (!notification) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Notification not found');
  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Notification deleted').send(res);
});

```

```javascript
const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
const User = require('../models/User.model');
const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
const Branch = require('../models/Branch.model');

// @route   GET /api/admin/stats/overview
exports.getOverview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  const tomorrow = new Date(today);
  tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1);
  const startOfMonth = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1);

  const [
    totalFoods,
    totalOrders,
    totalUsers,
    totalRevenue,
    pendingOrders,
    todayOrders,
    todayRevenue,
    newUsersThisMonth,
  ] = await Promise.all([
    Food.countDocuments(),
    Booking.countDocuments(),
    User.countDocuments({ role: 'customer' }),
    Booking.aggregate([
      { $match: { status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] } } },
      { $group: { _id: null, total: { $sum: '$total' } } },
    ]),
    Booking.countDocuments({ status: 'pending' }),
    Booking.countDocuments({ createdAt: { $gte: today, $lt: tomorrow } }),
    Booking.aggregate([
      {
        $match: {
          status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] },
          createdAt: { $gte: today, $lt: tomorrow },
        },
      },
      { $group: { _id: null, total: { $sum: '$total' } } },
    ]),
    User.countDocuments({ role: 'customer', createdAt: { $gte: startOfMonth } }),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    totalFoods,
    totalOrders,
    totalUsers,
    totalRevenue: totalRevenue[0]?.total || 0,
    pendingOrders,
    todayOrders,
    todayRevenue: todayRevenue[0]?.total || 0,
    newUsersThisMonth,
  }, 'Overview stats retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/stats/revenue
exports.getRevenueStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { period = '30d' } = req.query;
  const now = new Date();
  let startDate = new Date(now);

  if (period === '7d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 7);
  else if (period === '30d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 30);
  else if (period === '90d') startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 90);
  else startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 365);

  const data = await Booking.aggregate([
    {
      $match: {
        createdAt: { $gte: startDate },
        status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] },
      },
    },
    {
      $group: {
        _id: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$createdAt' } },
        revenue: { $sum: '$total' },
        orders: { $sum: 1 },
      },
    },
    { $sort: { _id: 1 } },
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, data, 'Revenue stats retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/stats/top-foods
exports.getTopFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { limit = 10 } = req.query;
  const topFoods = await Food.find()
    .sort({ soldCount: -1 })
    .limit(Number(limit))
    .select('name soldCount ratingAverage image price category');
  return new ApiResponse(200, topFoods, 'Top foods retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/stats/categories
exports.getCategoryStats = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const stats = await Booking.aggregate([
    { $match: { status: { $in: ['done', 'delivering', 'preparing', 'confirmed'] } } },
    { $unwind: '$items' },
    {
      $group: {
        _id: '$items.foodName',
        totalSold: { $sum: '$items.quantity' },
        revenue: { $sum: { $multiply: ['$items.price', '$items.quantity'] } },
      },
    },
    { $sort: { totalSold: -1 } },
    { $limit: 20 },
  ]);
  return new ApiResponse(200, stats, 'Category stats retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/users
exports.getUsers = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const { role, search, page = 1, limit = 20 } = req.query;
  const query = {};
  if (role) query.role = role;
  if (search) {
    query.$or = [
      { fullName: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { email: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
      { phone: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
    ];
  }

  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);

  const [users, total] = await Promise.all([
    User.find(query).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken').sort({ createdAt: -1 }).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    User.countDocuments(query),
  ]);

  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    users,
    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
  }, 'Users retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/shippers
exports.getShippers = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const shippers = await User.find({ role: 'shipper', isActive: true })
    .select('fullName phone avatar createdAt')
    .sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  return new ApiResponse(200, shippers, 'Shippers retrieved').send(res);
});

// @route   PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/toggle-status
exports.toggleUserStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
  const user = await User.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!user) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'User not found');
  user.isActive = !user.isActive;
  await user.save();
  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), `User ${user.isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'}`).send(res);
});

// @route   GET /api/admin/coupons - handled in coupon.controller.js
// @route   GET /api/admin/branches - handled in branch.controller.js

```


```javascript
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const authController = require('../controllers/auth.controller');
const { verifyJWT } = require('../middlewares/auth.middleware');

// Public
router.post('/register', authController.register);
router.post('/login', authController.login);
router.post('/refresh', authController.refreshToken);

// Protected
router.post('/logout', verifyJWT, authController.logout);
router.get('/me', verifyJWT, authController.getMe);
router.put('/profile', verifyJWT, authController.updateProfile);
router.put('/change-password', verifyJWT, authController.changePassword);
router.post('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.addToWishlist);
router.delete('/wishlist/:foodId', verifyJWT, authController.removeFromWishlist);
router.get('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.getWishlist);

module.exports = router;

```

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const foodController = require('../controllers/food.controller');
const { verifyJWT, verifyRole } = require('../middlewares/auth.middleware');

// Public
router.get('/', foodController.getFoods);
router.get('/featured', foodController.getFeatured);
router.get('/categories', foodController.getCategories);
router.get('/slug/:slug', foodController.getFoodBySlug);
router.get('/:id', foodController.getFood);

// Admin only
router.post('/', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), foodController.createFood);
router.put('/:id', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), foodController.updateFood);
router.delete('/:id', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), foodController.deleteFood);
router.patch('/:id/toggle-availability', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), foodController.toggleAvailability);
router.post('/:id/duplicate', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), foodController.duplicateFood);

module.exports = router;
```

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const orderController = require('../controllers/order.controller');
const { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth } = require('../middlewares/auth.middleware');

// Customer - create order
router.post('/', optionalAuth, orderController.createOrder);

// Customer - my orders
router.get('/my', verifyJWT, orderController.getMyOrders);

// Public - get order by id (with auth check)
router.get('/:id', optionalAuth, orderController.getOrderById);

// Customer - cancel order
router.patch('/:id/cancel', verifyJWT, orderController.cancelOrder);

// Admin - all orders + status update
router.get('/', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin', 'shipper'), orderController.getAllOrders);
router.patch('/:id/status', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin', 'shipper'), orderController.updateOrderStatus);
router.patch('/:id/assign-shipper', verifyJWT, verifyRole('admin'), orderController.assignShipper);

// Shipper - get pending orders
router.get('/shipper/pending', verifyJWT, verifyRole('shipper'), orderController.getShipperOrders);

module.exports = router;

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const User = require('../models/User.model');

function initSocket(io) {
  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
    // Authenticate socket connection
    const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
    if (token) {
      try {
        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
        User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken').then((user) => {
          if (user) {
            socket.user = user;
            socket.join(`user:${user._id}`);
            if (user.role === 'admin') socket.join('admin');
            if (user.role === 'shipper') socket.join('shipper');
            socket.emit('connected', { userId: user._id, role: user.role });
          }
        }).catch(() => {});
      } catch {}
    }

    // Join room for unauthenticated
    socket.on('join', (data) => {
      if (data.type === 'guest') {
        socket.join(`guest:${data.phone}`);
      }
    });

    socket.on('disconnect', () => {});
  });

  return io;
}

module.exports = { initSocket };

```

```text
File created successfully at: C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\services\socket.service.js
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const cors = require('cors');
const helmet = require('helmet');
const path = require('path');
const rateLimiter = require('./middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware');
const errorHandler = require('./middleware/errorHandler');

// Import routes
const authRoutes = require('./routes/auth.routes');
const foodRoutes = require('./routes/food.routes');
const orderRoutes = require('./routes/order.routes');
const uploadRoutes = require('./routes/uploadRoutes');
const reviewRoutes = require('./routes/review.routes');
const couponRoutes = require('./routes/coupon.routes');
const branchRoutes = require('./routes/branch.routes');
const notificationRoutes = require('./routes/notification.routes');
const adminRoutes = require('./routes/admin.routes');

const app = express();

// Security
app.use(helmet({ crossOriginResourcePolicy: { policy: 'cross-origin' } }));

// CORS
const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
app.use(cors({ origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true }));

// Rate limiting
app.use(rateLimiter({ windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, max: 200 }));

// Body parsing
app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));

// Static files
app.use('/uploads', express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'uploads')));

// Health check
app.get('/api/health', (req, res) => {
  res.json({ success: true, message: 'Server running', data: null });
});

// Routes
app.use('/api/auth', authRoutes);
app.use('/api/foods', foodRoutes);
app.use('/api/orders', orderRoutes);
app.use('/api/upload', uploadRoutes);
app.use('/api/reviews', reviewRoutes);
app.use('/api/coupons', couponRoutes);
app.use('/api/branches', branchRoutes);
app.use('/api/notifications', notificationRoutes);
app.use('/api/admin', adminRoutes);

// 404 handler
app.use((req, res) => {
  res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Route not found', data: null });
});

// Error handler
app.use(errorHandler);

module.exports = app;

```

```text
The file C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\app.js has been updated successfully.
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
require('dotenv').config();
const http = require('http');
const { Server } = require('socket.io');
const app = require('./app');
const connectDB = require('./config/database');
const { initSocket } = require('./services/socket.service');

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;

const server = http.createServer(app);

// Socket.io setup
const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
const io = new Server(server, {
  cors: { origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true },
});

initSocket(io);

// Make io available to routes
app.set('io', io);

connectDB().then(() => {
  server.listen(PORT, () => {
    console.log(`🚀 Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
    console.log(`📦 MongoDB: ${process.env.MONGODB_URI}`);
  });
}).catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ DB connection failed:', err);
  process.exit(1);
});

// Graceful shutdown
process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
  console.log('SIGTERM received, shutting down gracefully');
  server.close(() => {
    process.exit(0);
  });
});

process.on('SIGINT', () => {
  console.log('SIGINT received, shutting down gracefully');
  server.close(() => {
    process.exit(0);
  });
});

```

```text
The file C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\server.js has been updated successfully.
```
</details></tool-use>

```javascript
const seedCoupons = [
  { code: 'WELCOME50', type: 'fixed', value: 50000, minOrder: 100000, startDate: new Date('2025-01-01'), endDate: new Date('2026-12-31'), totalLimit: 1000, isActive: true, description: 'Giảm 50K cho đơn từ 100K' },
  { code: 'GIAM10', type: 'percent', value: 10, minOrder: 50000, maxDiscount: 30000, startDate: new Date('2025-01-01'), endDate: new Date('2026-12-31'), totalLimit: 500, isActive: true, description: 'Giảm 10% tối đa 30K cho đơn từ 50K' },
  { code: 'FREESHIP', type: 'fixed', value: 15000, minOrder: 80000, startDate: new Date('2025-01-01'), endDate: new Date('2026-12-31'), totalLimit: 200, isActive: true, description: 'Miễn phí giao hàng cho đơn từ 80K', freeShippingThreshold: 150000 },
  { code: 'SUMMER20', type: 'percent', value: 20, minOrder: 100000, maxDiscount: 50000, startDate: new Date('2025-06-01'), endDate: new Date('2026-09-30'), totalLimit: 300, isActive: true, description: 'Giảm 20% tối đa 50K mùa hè' },
  { code: 'NEWUSER', type: 'fixed', value: 30000, minOrder: 0, startDate: new Date('2025-01-01'), endDate: new Date('2026-12-31'), totalLimit: 9999, isActive: true, description: '30K cho người dùng mới' },
];

const seedBranches = [
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Quận 1', address: '123 Nguyễn Huệ, Quận 1, TP.HCM', phone: '02812345678', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', lat: 10.7765, lng: 106.7009, isActive: true },
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Quận 3', address: '45 Lê Văn Sỹ, Quận 3, TP.HCM', phone: '02823456789', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', lat: 10.7829, lng: 106.6874, isActive: true },
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Bình Thạnh', address: '78 Điện Biên Phủ, Bình Thạnh, TP.HCM', phone: '02834567890', openHours: '09:00 - 21:00', lat: 10.8007, lng: 106.7120, isActive: true },
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Gò Vấp', address: '200 Quang Trung, Gò Vấp, TP.HCM', phone: '02845678901', openHours: '09:00 - 21:00', lat: 10.8386, lng: 106.6664, isActive: true },
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Thủ Đức', address: '50 Võ Văn Ngân, Thủ Đức, TP.HCM', phone: '02856789012', openHours: '08:00 - 21:00', lat: 10.8178, lng: 106.7554, isActive: true },
  { name: 'Nhà Hàng Việt - Tân Bình', address: '120 Trường Chinh, Tân Bình, TP.HCM', phone: '02867890123', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', lat: 10.8015, lng: 106.6536, isActive: true },
];

const seedData = async () => {
  try {
    await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI);
    console.log('🔄 Đang seed dữ liệu...');

    // Clear all collections
    await Promise.all([
      User.deleteMany({}),
      Food.deleteMany({}),
      Booking.deleteMany({}),
      Coupon.deleteMany({}),
      Branch.deleteMany({}),
      Review.deleteMany({}),
    ]);
    console.log('   ✓ Đã xóa dữ liệu cũ');

    // Seed users
    await User.insertMany(seedUsers);
    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedUsers.length} users (admin, shipper, customers)`);

    // Seed foods
    const foods = await Food.insertMany(seedFoods);
    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${foods.length} món ăn`);

    // Seed coupons
    await Coupon.insertMany(seedCoupons);
    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedCoupons.length} coupons`);

    // Seed branches
    await Branch.insertMany(seedBranches);
    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedBranches.length} chi nhánh`);

    // Seed some reviews
    const adminUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'admin' });
    const customerUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'customer' });
    const reviews = [];
    if (foods.length > 0 && customerUser) {
      for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(foods.length, 10); i++) {
        reviews.push({
          user: customerUser._id,
          food: foods[i]._id,
          rating: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 4,
          comment: ['Món ăn ngon lắm!', 'Giao hàng nhanh, đồ ăn còn nóng.', 'Rất hài lòng, sẽ order lại.', 'Chất lượng tuyệt vời!', 'Giá cả hợp lý, sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè.'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)],
          isVerified: true,
        });
      }
      await Review.insertMany(reviews);
      console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${reviews.length} reviews`);
    }

    console.log('\n✅ Seed hoàn tất!');
    console.log('\n📋 Tài khoản test:');
    console.log('   Admin:   admin@nhavien.com / admin123');
    console.log('   Shipper: shipper@nhavien.com / shipper123');
    console.log('   User:    user1@nhavien.com / user1234');

    process.exit(0);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ Lỗi seed:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
};

seedData();
```

```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

@layer base {
  * {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
  }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    background-color: #fafaf9;
    color: #1c1917;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  body.dark {
    background-color: #0c0a09;
    color: #fafaf9;
  }

  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
}

/* Custom scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 6px;
  height: 6px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #f1f1f1;
}
.dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #1c1917;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #d4d4d4;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: #a3a3a3;
}
.dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #57534e;
}
.dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: #78716c;
}

/* Selection color */
::selection {
  background: #fed7aa;
  color: #7c2d12;
}
.dark ::selection {
  background: #7c2d12;
  color: #ffedd5;
}

/* Focus visible */
:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid #f97316;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}
.dark :focus-visible {
  outline-color: #fb923c;
}

/* Loading skeleton shimmer */
.skeleton-shimmer {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 25%, #e0e0e0 50%, #f0f0f0 75%);
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
}
.dark .skeleton-shimmer {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #292524 25%, #1c1917 50%, #292524 75%);
  background-size: 200% 100%;
}

/* Input styling */
.input-field {
  @apply w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white text-stone-800 placeholder-stone-400 transition-all duration-200;
  @apply focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30 focus:border-primary-500;
}
.dark .input-field {
  @apply border-stone-700 bg-stone-900 text-stone-100 placeholder-stone-500;
  @apply focus:ring-primary-500/30 focus:border-primary-500;
}

.input-label {
  @apply block text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 mb-1.5;
}
.dark .input-label {
  @apply text-stone-300;
}

/* Card base */
.card {
  @apply bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-card transition-all duration-300;
}
.dark .card {
  @apply bg-stone-900 shadow-none border border-stone-800;
}
.card:hover {
  @apply shadow-card-hover;
}

/* Button base */
.btn {
  @apply inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer;
  @apply disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed;
}
.btn-primary {
  @apply btn bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.btn-secondary {
  @apply btn bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-200 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.dark .btn-secondary {
  @apply bg-stone-800 text-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-700;
}
.btn-outline {
  @apply btn border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:border-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-50 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.dark .btn-outline {
  @apply border-stone-700 text-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-800;
}
.btn-danger {
  @apply btn bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.btn-success {
  @apply btn bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.btn-ghost {
  @apply btn text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 active:scale-[0.98];
}
.dark .btn-ghost {
  @apply text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-800;
}

/* Badge */
.badge {
  @apply inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium;
}
.badge-success {
  @apply badge bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700;
}
.dark .badge-success {
  @apply bg-emerald-900/50 text-emerald-400;
}
.badge-warning {
  @apply badge bg-amber-100 text-amber-700;
}
.dark .badge-warning {
  @apply bg-amber-900/50 text-amber-400;
}
.badge-danger {
  @apply badge bg-red-100 text-red-700;
}
.dark .badge-danger {
  @apply bg-red-900/50 text-red-400;
}
.badge-info {
  @apply badge bg-blue-100 text-blue-700;
}
.dark .badge-info {
  @apply bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-400;
}
.badge-gray {
  @apply badge bg-stone-100 text-stone-600;
}
.dark .badge-gray {
  @apply bg-stone-800 text-stone-400;
}
.badge-primary {
  @apply badge bg-primary-100 text-primary-700;
}
.dark .badge-primary {
  @apply bg-primary-900/50 text-primary-400;
}
.badge-secondary {
  @apply badge bg-secondary-100 text-secondary-700;
}
.dark .badge-secondary {
  @apply bg-secondary-900/50 text-secondary-400;
}

/* Table */
.admin-table {
  @apply w-full text-sm;
}
.admin-table thead {
  @apply bg-stone-50;
}
.dark .admin-table thead {
  @apply bg-stone-800/50;
}
.admin-table thead th {
  @apply px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider;
}
.dark .admin-table thead th {
  @apply text-stone-400;
}
.admin-table tbody tr {
  @apply border-b border-stone-100 transition-colors duration-150;
}
.dark .admin-table tbody tr {
  @apply border-stone-800;
}
.admin-table tbody tr:hover {
  @apply bg-stone-50;
}
.dark .admin-table tbody tr:hover {
  @apply bg-stone-800/50;
}
.admin-table tbody td {
  @apply px-4 py-3.5 text-stone-700;
}
.dark .admin-table tbody td {
  @apply text-stone-300;
}

/* Empty state */
.empty-state {
  @apply flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 px-6 text-center;
}

/* Page transition */
.page-enter {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(8px);
}
.page-enter-active {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  transition: opacity 300ms, transform 300ms;
}

/* Glass effect */
.glass {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
}
.dark .glass {
  background: rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.8);
}

/* Gradient text */
.gradient-text {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316, #f59e0b);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}

```

```javascript
import { clsx } from 'clsx';
import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';

export function cn(...inputs) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
}

export function formatPrice(price) {
  if (price == null) return '0đ';
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(price);
}

export function formatDate(date) {
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(new Date(date));
}

export function formatDateTime(date) {
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }).format(new Date(date));
}

export function formatRelativeTime(date) {
  const now = new Date();
  const then = new Date(date);
  const diff = now - then;
  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000);
  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);

  if (minutes < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes} phút trước`;
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours} giờ trước`;
  if (days < 7) return `${days} ngày trước`;
  return formatDate(date);
}

export function slugify(text) {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
    .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
    .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    .replace(/đ/g, 'd')
    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
}

export function getImageUrl(path) {
  if (!path) return null;
  if (path.startsWith('http')) return path;
  return `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'}${path}`;
}

export function generateStarRating(rating) {
  const stars = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    if (rating >= i) {
      stars.push('full');
    } else if (rating >= i - 0.5) {
      stars.push('half');
    } else {
      stars.push('empty');
    }
  }
  return stars;
}

export function truncate(str, length = 100) {
  if (!str) return '';
  return str.length > length ? str.substring(0, length) + '...' : str;
}

export function debounce(func, wait) {
  let timeout;
  return function executedFunction(...args) {
    const later = () => {
      clearTimeout(timeout);
      func(...args);
    };
    clearTimeout(timeout);
    timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
  };
}

export function getStatusColor(status) {
  const colors = {
    pending: 'badge-warning',
    confirmed: 'badge-info',
    preparing: 'badge-primary',
    delivering: 'badge-secondary',
    done: 'badge-success',
    cancelled: 'badge-danger',
  };
  return colors[status] || 'badge-gray';
}

export function getStatusLabel(status) {
  const labels = {
    pending: 'Chờ xác nhận',
    confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận',
    preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị',
    delivering: 'Đang giao',
    done: 'Hoàn thành',
    cancelled: 'Đã hủy',
  };
  return labels[status] || status;
}

```

```javascript
import { configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
import foodsReducer from '../slices/foodsSlice';
import cartReducer from '../slices/cartSlice';
import ordersReducer from '../slices/ordersSlice';
import authReducer from '../slices/authSlice';
import notificationsReducer from '../slices/notificationsSlice';

const store = configureStore({
  reducer: {
    foods: foodsReducer,
    cart: cartReducer,
    orders: ordersReducer,
    auth: authReducer,
    notifications: notificationsReducer,
  },
});

export default store;
```

```javascript
import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
import { authApi } from '../api/axiosClient';

// Load user from localStorage
const loadUserFromStorage = () => {
  try {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    const user = localStorage.getItem('user');
    return { token: token || null, user: user ? JSON.parse(user) : null };
  } catch {
    return { token: null, user: null };
  }
};

export const login = createAsyncThunk('auth/login', async (credentials, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.login(credentials);
    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Login failed' });
  }
});

export const register = createAsyncThunk('auth/register', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.register(data);
    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Registration failed' });
  }
});

export const getMe = createAsyncThunk('auth/getMe', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.getMe();
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const updateProfile = createAsyncThunk('auth/updateProfile', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.updateProfile(data);
    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Update failed' });
  }
});

export const addToWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/addWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.addToWishlist(foodId);
    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const removeFromWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/removeWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await authApi.removeFromWishlist(foodId);
    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    return { foodId, user: res.data.data };
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

const authSlice = createSlice({
  name: 'auth',
  initialState: {
    user: loadUserFromStorage().user,
    token: loadUserFromStorage().token,
    loading: false,
    error: null,
    isAuthenticated: !!loadUserFromStorage().token,
  },
  reducers: {
    logout: (state) => {
      state.user = null;
      state.token = null;
      state.isAuthenticated = false;
      state.error = null;
      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
      localStorage.removeItem('user');
    },
    clearError: (state) => {
      state.error = null;
    },
    setUser: (state, action) => {
      state.user = action.payload;
      state.isAuthenticated = true;
      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    // Login
    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
      .addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.user = action.payload.user;
        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
        state.isAuthenticated = true;
      })
      .addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Login failed';
      });

    // Register
    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
      .addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.user = action.payload.user;
        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
        state.isAuthenticated = true;
      })
      .addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Registration failed';
      });

    // GetMe
    builder.addCase(getMe.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      state.user = action.payload;
      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
    });

    // Update Profile
    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      state.user = action.payload;
    });

    // Remove from wishlist
    builder.addCase(removeFromWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      state.user = action.payload.user;
    });
  },
});

export const { logout, clearError, setUser } = authSlice.actions;
export default authSlice.reducer;

```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
import { notificationApi } from '../api/axiosClient';

export const fetchNotifications = createAsyncThunk('notifications/fetch', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await notificationApi.getAll();
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const markAsRead = createAsyncThunk('notifications/markRead', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    await notificationApi.markAsRead(id);
    return id;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const markAllAsRead = createAsyncThunk('notifications/markAllRead', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    await notificationApi.markAllAsRead();
    return true;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

const notificationsSlice = createSlice({
  name: 'notifications',
  initialState: {
    items: [],
    unreadCount: 0,
    loading: false,
  },
  reducers: {
    addNotification: (state, action) => {
      state.items.unshift(action.payload);
      if (!action.payload.isRead) state.unreadCount++;
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    builder.addCase(fetchNotifications.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
      .addCase(fetchNotifications.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.items = action.payload.notifications;
        state.unreadCount = action.payload.unreadCount;
      });

    builder.addCase(markAsRead.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      const notif = state.items.find((n) => n._id === action.payload);
      if (notif && !notif.isRead) {
        notif.isRead = true;
        state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);
      }
    });

    builder.addCase(markAllAsRead.fulfilled, (state) => {
      state.items.forEach((n) => (n.isRead = true));
      state.unreadCount = 0;
    });
  },
});

export const { addNotification } = notificationsSlice.actions;
export default notificationsSlice.reducer;

```

```javascript
import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
import { orderApi } from '../api/axiosClient';

export const fetchMyOrders = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchMy', async (params = {}, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await orderApi.getMyOrders(params);
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const fetchOrderById = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchOne', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await orderApi.getById(id);
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

export const createOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await orderApi.create(data);
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Đặt hàng thất bại' });
  }
});

export const cancelOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/cancel', async ({ id, reason }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
  try {
    const res = await orderApi.cancel(id, reason);
    return res.data.data;
  } catch (err) {
    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
  }
});

const ordersSlice = createSlice({
  name: 'orders',
  initialState: {
    items: [],
    currentOrder: null,
    pagination: { total: 0, page: 1, limit: 10, pages: 0 },
    loading: false,
    error: null,
  },
  reducers: {
    updateOrderLocal: (state, action) => {
      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
      }
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.items = action.payload.orders;
        state.pagination = action.payload.pagination;
      })
      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message;
      });

    builder.addCase(fetchOrderById.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
      .addCase(fetchOrderById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
      })
      .addCase(fetchOrderById.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message;
      });

    builder.addCase(createOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    });

    builder.addCase(cancelOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    });
  },
});

export const { updateOrderLocal } = ordersSlice.actions;
export default ordersSlice.reducer;

```

```javascript
import axios from 'axios';

const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';
const UPLOAD_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_UPLOAD_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';

const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  withCredentials: true,
});

// Request interceptor - attach token
api.interceptors.request.use(
  (config) => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    if (token) {
      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    }
    return config;
  },
  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
);

// Response interceptor - handle errors
api.interceptors.response.use(
  (response) => response,
  async (error) => {
    const originalRequest = error.config;

    // If 401 and not already retrying, try refresh
    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
      originalRequest._retry = true;
      try {
        const res = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/auth/refresh`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
        const newToken = res.data.data.accessToken;
        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', newToken);
        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${newToken}`;
        return api(originalRequest);
      } catch {
        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
        localStorage.removeItem('user');
        window.location.href = '/login';
        return Promise.reject(error);
      }
    }
    return Promise.reject(error);
  }
);

// Auth API
export const authApi = {
  login: (data) => api.post('/auth/login', data),
  register: (data) => api.post('/auth/register', data),
  logout: () => api.post('/auth/logout'),
  getMe: () => api.get('/auth/me'),
  refresh: () => api.post('/auth/refresh'),
  updateProfile: (data) => api.put('/auth/profile', data),
  changePassword: (data) => api.put('/auth/change-password', data),
  addToWishlist: (foodId) => api.post('/auth/wishlist', { foodId }),
  removeFromWishlist: (foodId) => api.delete(`/auth/wishlist/${foodId}`),
  getWishlist: () => api.get('/auth/wishlist'),
};

// Food API
export const foodApi = {
  getAll: (params) => api.get('/foods', { params }),
  getById: (id) => api.get(`/foods/${id}`),
  getFeatured: () => api.get('/foods/featured'),
  getCategories: () => api.get('/foods/categories'),
  getBySlug: (slug) => api.get(`/foods/slug/${slug}`),
  create: (data) => api.post('/foods', data),
  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/foods/${id}`, data),
  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/foods/${id}`),
  toggleAvailability: (id) => api.patch(`/foods/${id}/toggle-availability`),
  duplicate: (id, data) => api.post(`/foods/${id}/duplicate`, data),
};

// Order API
export const orderApi = {
  create: (data) => api.post('/orders', data),
  getMyOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/my', { params }),
  getById: (id) => api.get(`/orders/${id}`),
  cancel: (id, reason) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/cancel`, { reason }),
  getAll: (params) => api.get('/orders', { params }),
  updateStatus: (id, data) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/status`, data),
  assignShipper: (id, shipperId) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/assign-shipper`, { shipperId }),
  getShipperOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/shipper/pending', { params }),
};

// Review API
export const reviewApi = {
  create: (data) => api.post('/reviews', data),
  getFoodReviews: (foodId, params) => api.get(`/reviews/food/${foodId}`, { params }),
  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/reviews/${id}`),
};

// Coupon API
export const couponApi = {
  validate: (code, subtotal) => api.post('/coupons/validate', { code, subtotal }),
  // Admin
  getAll: () => api.get('/admin/coupons'),
  create: (data) => api.post('/admin/coupons', data),
  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/admin/coupons/${id}`, data),
  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/admin/coupons/${id}`),
  toggle: (id) => api.patch(`/admin/coupons/${id}/toggle`),
};

// Branch API
export const branchApi = {
  getAll: () => api.get('/branches'),
  getById: (id) => api.get(`/branches/${id}`),
  // Admin
  getAllAdmin: () => api.get('/branches/admin/list'),
  create: (data) => api.post('/branches', data),
  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/branches/${id}`, data),
  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/branches/${id}`),
};

// Notification API
export const notificationApi = {
  getAll: (params) => api.get('/notifications', { params }),
  markAsRead: (id) => api.patch(`/notifications/${id}/read`),
  markAllAsRead: () => api.patch('/notifications/read-all'),
  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/notifications/${id}`),
};

// Admin API
export const adminApi = {
  getStats: () => api.get('/admin/stats/overview'),
  getRevenue: (period) => api.get('/admin/stats/revenue', { params: { period } }),
  getTopFoods: (limit) => api.get('/admin/stats/top-foods', { params: { limit } }),
  getCategoryStats: () => api.get('/admin/stats/categories'),
  getUsers: (params) => api.get('/admin/users', { params }),
  toggleUserStatus: (id) => api.patch(`/admin/users/${id}/toggle-status`),
  getShippers: () => api.get('/admin/shippers'),
};

// Upload API
export const uploadApi = {
  upload: async (file) => {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('image', file);
    const res = await axios.post(`${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload`, formData, {
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
      withCredentials: true,
    });
    return res;
  },
};

export default api;

```

```javascript
import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';

const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
  try {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem('cart');
    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
};

const saveCartToStorage = (items) => {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(items));
  } catch {}
};

const cartSlice = createSlice({
  name: 'cart',
  initialState: {
    items: loadCartFromStorage(),
    coupon: null,
    couponDiscount: 0,
    fulfillmentType: 'delivery',
    selectedBranch: null,
  },
  reducers: {
    addToCart: (state, action) => {
      const { food, quantity = 1, variant, toppings } = action.payload;
      const key = variant || toppings?.length ? `${food._id}-${variant || ''}-${(toppings || []).map((t) => t.name).join(',')}` : food._id;

      const existing = state.items.find((item) => item.key === key);
      if (existing) {
        existing.quantity += quantity;
      } else {
        state.items.push({
          key,
          _id: food._id,
          name: food.name,
          price: food.price,
          originalPrice: food.originalPrice,
          image: food.image,
          category: food.category,
          variant,
          toppings: toppings || [],
          quantity,
        });
      }
      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    },
    removeFromCart: (state, action) => {
      state.items = state.items.filter((item) => item.key !== action.payload);
      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    },
    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
      const { key, quantity } = action.payload;
      const item = state.items.find((i) => i.key === key);
      if (item) {
        if (quantity <= 0) {
          state.items = state.items.filter((i) => i.key !== key);
        } else {
          item.quantity = quantity;
        }
      }
      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    },
    clearCart: (state) => {
      state.items = [];
      state.coupon = null;
      state.couponDiscount = 0;
      saveCartToStorage([]);
    },
    setCoupon: (state, action) => {
      state.coupon = action.payload.coupon;
      state.couponDiscount = action.payload.discount;
    },
    removeCoupon: (state) => {
      state.coupon = null;
      state.couponDiscount = 0;
    },
    setFulfillmentType: (state, action) => {
      state.fulfillmentType = action.payload;
    },
    setSelectedBranch: (state, action) => {
      state.selectedBranch = action.payload;
    },
  },
});

export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items;
export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    const toppingPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((tSum, t) => tSum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    return sum + (item.price + toppingPrice) * item.quantity;
  }, 0);
export const selectCartSubtotal = selectCartTotal;
export const selectCartDiscount = (state) => state.cart.couponDiscount;
export const selectCartDeliveryFee = (state) => {
  if (state.cart.fulfillmentType !== 'delivery') return 0;
  const subtotal = selectCartSubtotal(state);
  return subtotal >= 100000 ? 0 : 15000;
};
export const selectCartGrandTotal = (state) =>
  selectCartSubtotal(state) - selectCartDiscount(state) + selectCartDeliveryFee(state);
export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
export const selectCoupon = (state) => state.cart.coupon;
export const selectFulfillmentType = (state) => state.cart.fulfillmentType;
export const selectSelectedBranch = (state) => state.cart.selectedBranch;

export const {
  addToCart,
  removeFromCart,
  updateQuantity,
  clearCart,
  setCoupon,
  removeCoupon,
  setFulfillmentType,
  setSelectedBranch,
} = cartSlice.actions;

export default cartSlice.reducer;

```

```javascript
// API URLs
export const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';
export const UPLOAD_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_UPLOAD_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';

// Categories
export const CATEGORIES = [
  'Tất cả',
  'Món chính',
  'Nước uống',
  'Tráng miệng',
  'Khai vị',
  'Món gà',
  'Món bò',
  'Món heo',
  'Món hải sản',
  'Món bún',
];

// Sort options
export const SORT_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'newest', label: 'Mới nhất' },
  { value: 'price_asc', label: 'Giá: Thấp → Cao' },
  { value: 'price_desc', label: 'Giá: Cao → Thấp' },
  { value: 'rating', label: 'Đánh giá cao' },
  { value: 'bestseller', label: 'Bán chạy' },
];

// Order statuses
export const ORDER_STATUSES = ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'delivering', 'done', 'cancelled'];

export const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  pending: { label: 'Chờ xác nhận', className: 'badge-warning', color: '#f59e0b' },
  confirmed: { label: 'Đã xác nhận', className: 'badge-info', color: '#3b82f6' },
  preparing: { label: 'Đang chuẩn bị', className: 'badge-primary', color: '#f97316' },
  delivering: { label: 'Đang giao', className: 'badge-secondary', color: '#059669' },
  done: { label: 'Hoàn thành', className: 'badge-success', color: '#10b981' },
  cancelled: { label: 'Đã hủy', className: 'badge-danger', color: '#ef4444' },
};

// Fulfillment types
export const FULFILLMENT_TYPES = [
  { value: 'delivery', label: 'Giao tận nơi', icon: 'Truck' },
  { value: 'pickup', label: 'Tự lấy', icon: 'Store' },
  { value: 'reservation', label: 'Đặt bàn', icon: 'Calendar' },
];

// Payment methods
export const PAYMENT_METHODS = [
  { value: 'cod', label: 'Thanh toán khi nhận hàng (COD)', icon: 'Banknote' },
  { value: 'bank_transfer', label: 'Chuyển khoản ngân hàng', icon: 'Landmark' },
  { value: 'momo', label: 'Ví MoMo', icon: 'Smartphone' },
  { value: 'zalopay', label: 'Ví ZaloPay', icon: 'Smartphone' },
];

// User roles
export const USER_ROLES = {
  customer: { label: 'Khách hàng', color: '#3b82f6' },
  admin: { label: 'Quản trị', color: '#f97316' },
  shipper: { label: 'Shipper', color: '#059669' },
};

// Pagination
export const PAGE_SIZE = 12;
export const ADMIN_PAGE_SIZE = 15;

// Placeholder image
export const PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop';

// Price formatter
export const formatCurrency = (amount) => {
  if (amount == null) return '0đ';
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(amount);
};

// Routes
export const ROUTES = {
  HOME: '/',
  FOOD_DETAIL: '/foods/:id',
  CART: '/cart',
  CHECKOUT: '/checkout',
  LOGIN: '/login',
  REGISTER: '/register',
  PROFILE: '/profile',
  ORDERS: '/orders',
  ORDER_DETAIL: '/orders/:id',
  WISHLIST: '/wishlist',

  ADMIN: '/admin',
  ADMIN_FOODS: '/admin/foods',
  ADMIN_ORDERS: '/admin/orders',

  ADMIN_BRANCHES: '/admin/branches',

  SHIPPER: '/shipper',
  SHIPPER_ORDERS: '/shipper/orders',
  SHIPPER_HISTORY: '/shipper/history',
};
```

```jsx
import { forwardRef } from 'react';
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

const variants = {
  primary: 'bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md',
  secondary: 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700',
  outline: 'border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 hover:border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
  ghost: 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:text-stone-400 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
  danger: 'bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 shadow-sm',
  success: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-sm',
};

const sizes = {
  sm: 'px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg gap-1.5',
  md: 'px-5 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-xl gap-2',
  lg: 'px-6 py-3 text-base rounded-xl gap-2',
  icon: 'p-2 rounded-xl',
};

const Button = forwardRef(({
  children,
  variant = 'primary',
  size = 'md',
  className,
  disabled,
  loading,
  leftIcon,
  rightIcon,
  ...props
}, ref) => {
  return (
    <button
      ref={ref}
      disabled={disabled || loading}
      className={cn(
        'inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-all duration-200',
        'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed',
        'active:scale-[0.98]',
        variants[variant],
        sizes[size],
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      {loading ? (
        <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
          <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
          <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
        </svg>
      ) : leftIcon}
      {children}
      {!loading && rightIcon}
    </button>
  );
});

Button.displayName = 'Button';
export default Button;

```

```jsx
import { forwardRef } from 'react';
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

const Input = forwardRef(({
  label,
  error,
  helper,
  className,
  leftIcon,
  rightIcon,
  containerClassName,
  ...props
}, ref) => {
  return (
    <div className={cn('w-full', containerClassName)}>
      {label && (
        <label className="input-label">
          {label}
        </label>
      )}
      <div className="relative">
        {leftIcon && (
          <div className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400">
            {leftIcon}
          </div>
        )}
        <input
          ref={ref}
          className={cn(
            'input-field',
            leftIcon && 'pl-10',
            rightIcon && 'pr-10',
            error && 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-500/30',
            className
          )}
          {...props}
        />
        {rightIcon && (
          <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400">
            {rightIcon}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      {error && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{error}</p>}
      {helper && !error && <p className="text-stone-400 text-xs mt-1">{helper}</p>}
    </div>
  );
});

Input.displayName = 'Input';
export default Input;

```

```jsx
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

const variants = {
  success: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/50 dark:text-emerald-400',
  warning: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/50 dark:text-amber-400',
  danger: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/50 dark:text-red-400',
  info: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/50 dark:text-blue-400',
  gray: 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-400',
  primary: 'bg-primary-100 text-primary-700 dark:bg-primary-900/50 dark:text-primary-400',
  secondary: 'bg-secondary-100 text-secondary-700 dark:bg-secondary-900/50 dark:text-secondary-400',
};

export default function Badge({ children, variant = 'gray', className, dot = false }) {
  return (
    <span className={cn('inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium', variants[variant], className)}>
      {dot && (
        <span className={cn('w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full', {
          'bg-emerald-500': variant === 'success',
          'bg-amber-500': variant === 'warning',
          'bg-red-500': variant === 'danger',
          'bg-blue-500': variant === 'info',
          'bg-stone-400': variant === 'gray',
          'bg-primary-500': variant === 'primary',
          'bg-secondary-500': variant === 'secondary',
        })} />
      )}
      {children}
    </span>
  );
}
```

```jsx
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

export function Skeleton({ className, ...props }) {
  return <div className={cn('skeleton-shimmer rounded-lg', className)} {...props} />;
}

export function SkeletonCard() {
  return (
    <div className="card overflow-hidden">
      <Skeleton className="aspect-[4/3] rounded-none" />
      <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
        <Skeleton className="h-5 w-3/4" />
        <Skeleton className="h-4 w-full" />
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
          <Skeleton className="h-6 w-1/3" />
          <Skeleton className="h-8 w-20" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function SkeletonTableRow({ cols = 5 }) {
  return (
    <tr>
      {Array.from({ length: cols }).map((_, i) => (
        <td key={i} className="px-4 py-3">
          <Skeleton className="h-4 w-full" />
        </td>
      ))}
    </tr>
  );
}

export function SkeletonStats() {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
      {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="card p-5">
          <Skeleton className="h-4 w-24 mb-3" />
          <Skeleton className="h-8 w-16" />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```
