```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { ArrowLeft, Package, Clock, CheckCircle2, Truck, ChefHat, Phone, MapPin, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchOrderById } from '../../slices/ordersSlice';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';

const statusSteps = [
  { status: 'pending', label: 'Đặt hàng', icon: Package },
  { status: 'confirmed', label: 'Xác nhận', icon: CheckCircle2 },
  { status: 'preparing', label: 'Chuẩn bị', icon: ChefHat },
  { status: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao', icon: Truck },
  { status: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành', icon: CheckCircle2 },
];

export default function OrderTrackingPage() {
  const { id } = useParams();
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { currentOrder: order, loading } = useSelector((state) => state.orders);

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchOrderById(id));
  }, [dispatch, id]);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
        <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
          <div className="h-8 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-1/3" />
          <div className="h-32 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
          <div className="h-48 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!order) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4 text-center">
        <Package className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-300" />
        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy đơn hàng</h2>
        <Link to="/orders" className="btn-primary mt-4">Xem đơn hàng</Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const currentStepIndex = statusSteps.findIndex((s) => s.status === order.status);
  const isCancelled = order.status === 'cancelled';

  return (
    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        {/* Back */}
        <Link to="/orders" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-700 mb-6">
          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay lại đơn hàng
        </Link>

        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
                Đơn hàng #{order.orderCode}
              </h1>
              <Badge variant={order.status === 'cancelled' ? 'danger' : order.status === 'done' ? 'success' : 'primary'} dot>
                {order.status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' :
                 order.status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' :
                 order.status === 'preparing' ? 'Đang chuẩn bị' :
                 order.status === 'delivering' ? 'Đang giao' :
                 order.status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
              </Badge>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Đặt lúc {formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Timeline */}
        {!isCancelled && (
          <div className="card p-6 mb-6">
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">Trạng thái đơn hàng</h3>
            <div className="relative">
              {/* Progress line */}
              <div className="absolute top-6 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700">
                <motion.div
                  className="h-full bg-primary-500"
                  initial={{ width: '0%' }}
                  animate={{ width: `${(currentStepIndex / (statusSteps.length - 1)) * 100}%` }}
                  transition={{ duration: 1, ease: 'easeOut' }}
                />
              </div>

              {/* Steps */}
              <div className="relative flex justify-between">
                {statusSteps.map((step, idx) => {
                  const Icon = step.icon;
                  const isActive = idx <= currentStepIndex;
                  const isCurrent = idx === currentStepIndex;

                  return (
                    <div key={step.status} className="flex flex-col items-center">
                      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-10 transition-all ${
                        isActive
                          ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary-500/30'
                          : 'bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 text-stone-400'
                      } ${isCurrent ? 'ring-4 ring-primary-500/20 scale-110' : ''}`}>
                        <Icon className="w-5 h-5" />
                      </div>
                      <span className={`text-xs mt-2 font-medium ${isActive ? 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400' : 'text-stone-400'}`}>
                        {step.label}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Estimated time */}
            {order.estimatedDeliveryTime && (
              <div className="mt-6 p-3 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
                <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600" />
                <span className="text-sm text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
                  Dự kiến giao: {formatDateTime(order.estimatedDeliveryTime)}
                </span>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Tracking logs */}
            {order.trackingLogs?.length > 0 && (
              <div className="mt-6 space-y-3">
                {order.trackingLogs.slice().reverse().map((log, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3 text-sm">
                    <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-stone-300 dark:bg-stone-600 mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{log.status}</span>
                      {log.note && <span className="text-stone-500 ml-2">— {log.note}</span>}
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(log.timestamp)}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Cancelled */}
        {isCancelled && (
          <div className="card p-6 mb-6 border-red-200 dark:border-red-800 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/10">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 mb-2">Đơn hàng đã bị hủy</h3>
            {order.cancelReason && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">Lý do: {order.cancelReason}</p>}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          {/* Items */}
          <div className="card p-5">
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">Món đã đặt</h3>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {order.items?.map((item, idx) => (
                <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3">
                  <img
                    src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=64&h=64&fit=crop'}
                    alt={item.foodName}
                    className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover"
                  />
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 text-sm">{item.foodName}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">x{item.quantity}</p>
                  </div>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 text-sm">
                    {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Totals */}
            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 space-y-2">
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
                <span>Tạm tính</span>
                <span>{formatCurrency(order.subtotal)}</span>
              </div>
              {order.discount > 0 && (
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400">
                  <span>Giảm giá</span>
                  <span>-{formatCurrency(order.discount)}</span>
                </div>
              )}
              {order.deliveryFee > 0 && (
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
                  <span>Phí giao hàng</span>
                  <span>{formatCurrency(order.deliveryFee)}</span>
                </div>
              )}
              <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 pt-2 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
                <span>Tổng cộng</span>
                <span className="text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Customer & Delivery info */}
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {/* Delivery info */}
            <div className="card p-5">
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thông tin giao hàng</h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.customerInfo?.phone}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
                  <p className="text-sm text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.address}</p>
                </div>
                {order.branch && (
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-secondary-500 mt-0.5" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.branch.name}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.branch.address}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Shipper info */}
            {order.assignedShipper && (
              <div className="card p-5">
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Người giao hàng</h3>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-100 dark:bg-secondary-900/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Truck className="w-5 h-5 text-secondary-600 dark:text-secondary-400" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{order.assignedShipper.fullName}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.assignedShipper.phone}</p>
                  </div>
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" leftIcon={<Phone className="w-4 h-4" />}>
                    Gọi
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Payment */}
            <div className="card p-5">
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thanh toán</h3>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-stone-500">
                  {order.paymentMethod === 'cod' ? 'COD (Tiền mặt)' :
                   order.paymentMethod === 'bank_transfer' ? 'Chuyển khoản' :
                   order.paymentMethod === 'momo' ? 'MoMo' :
                   order.paymentMethod === 'zalopay' ? 'ZaloPay' : order.paymentMethod}
                </span>
                <Badge variant={order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'success' : 'warning'}>
                  {order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'Đã thanh toán' : 'Chưa thanh toán'}
                </Badge>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Reorder */}
        {order.status === 'done' && (
          <div className="mt-6 text-center">
            <Button variant="outline">Đặt lại đơn này</Button>
          </div>
        )}
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```jsx
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Heart, ShoppingCart, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { authApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import { removeFromWishlist } from '../../slices/authSlice';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';

export default function WishlistPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { user } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const wishlist = user?.wishlist || [];

  const handleRemove = async (foodId) => {
    try {
      await dispatch(removeFromWishlist(foodId)).unwrap();
      toast.success('Đã xóa khỏi danh sách yêu thích');
    } catch {
      toast.error('Không thể xóa');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
          <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-red-400 to-pink-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
            <Heart className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
              Danh sách yêu thích
            </h1>
            <p className="text-stone-500">{wishlist.length} món đã lưu</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {wishlist.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="card p-12 text-center">
            <Heart className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">Chưa có món yêu thích</h3>
            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm mb-4">Nhấn vào trái tim để lưu món ăn yêu thích</p>
            <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">Khám phá thực đơn</Link>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-5">
            {wishlist.map((food, idx) => (
              <motion.div
                key={food._id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
                className="card overflow-hidden group"
              >
                <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
                  <img
                    src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop'}
                    alt={food.name}
                    className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleRemove(food._id)}
                    className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 bg-white/90 dark:bg-stone-800/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors shadow-sm"
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                  {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
                    <div className="absolute top-3 left-3">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg">
                        -{food.discountPercent}%
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="p-4">
                  <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 line-clamp-1 mb-1">
                    {food.name}
                  </h3>
                  <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 mb-3">{food.category}</p>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                        <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through mr-2">
                          {formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}
                        </span>
                      )}
                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
                        {formatCurrency(food.price)}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <Link
                      to={`/foods/${food._id}`}
                      className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium hover:bg-primary-100 dark:hover:bg-primary-900/30 transition-colors"
                    >
                      <ShoppingCart className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      Đặt món
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Link, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import {
  Search, SlidersHorizontal, Grid3X3, List, Star, Heart, ShoppingCart,
  ChevronRight, Flame, Sparkles, Clock, ArrowRight, ChefHat, Truck, ShieldCheck, Coffee
} from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchFoods, setFilters } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
import { addToCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
import { foodApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import { SkeletonCard } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { formatCurrency, cn } from '../../lib/utils';
import { CATEGORIES, SORT_OPTIONS, PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';

export default function HomePage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const { items, loading, pagination, filters } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
  const { items: cartItems } = useSelector((state) => state.cart);
  const [searchInput, setSearchInput] = useState(filters.search || searchParams.get('search') || '');
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [featuredFoods, setFeaturedFoods] = useState([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [wishlist, setWishlist] = useState([]);

  // Load featured foods and categories
  useEffect(() => {
    foodApi.getFeatured().then((res) => setFeaturedFoods(res.data.data || [])).catch(() => {});
    foodApi.getCategories().then((res) => setCategories(res.data.data || [])).catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  // Debounced search
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      dispatch(setFilters({ search: searchInput }));
      setPage(1);
    }, 400);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [searchInput, dispatch]);

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchFoods({ ...filters, page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
  }, [filters, page, dispatch]);

  const handleCategoryChange = (cat) => {
    dispatch(setFilters({ category: cat === 'Tất cả' ? '' : cat }));
    setPage(1);
  };

  const handleSortChange = (sort) => {
    dispatch(setFilters({ sort }));
    setPage(1);
  };

  const handleAddToCart = (food, e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    dispatch(addToCart({ food }));
  };

  const toggleWishlist = (foodId, e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    setWishlist((prev) => prev.includes(foodId) ? prev.filter((id) => id !== foodId) : [...prev, foodId]);
  };

  const categoryIcons = {
    'Món chính': <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />,
    'Nước uống': <Coffee className="w-6 h-6" />,
    'Tráng miệng': <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />,
    'Khai vị': <Flame className="w-6 h-6" />,
    'Món gà': <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />,
  };

  const promoCoupons = [
    { code: 'WELCOME50', desc: 'Giảm 50K cho đơn từ 100K', color: 'from-primary-500 to-orange-400' },
    { code: 'GIAM10', desc: 'Giảm 10% tối đa 30K', color: 'from-secondary-500 to-emerald-400' },
    { code: 'FREESHIP', desc: 'Miễn phí giao hàng', color: 'from-amber-500 to-yellow-400' },
  ];

  return (
    <div>
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <section className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-900 via-primary-900 to-stone-900 text-white">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-30">
          <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{
            backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, #f97316 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, #f59e0b 0%, transparent 40%)',
          }} />
        </div>
        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 md:py-28">
          <div className="max-w-2xl">
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-amber-300 mb-6"
            >
              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
              Ưu đãi hôm nay - Giảm đến 20%
            </motion.div>
            <motion.h1
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
              className="font-display text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight"
            >
              Thưởng thức món ăn
              <span className="block gradient-text">đậm chất Việt</span>
            </motion.h1>
            <motion.p
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
              className="text-lg text-stone-300 mb-8"
            >
              Hàng trăm món ngon từ nhà hàng của chúng tôi. Đặt hàng dễ dàng, giao tận nơi.
            </motion.p>

            {/* Search bar */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: 0.3 }}
              className="relative max-w-lg"
            >
              <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
              <input
                type="text"
                value={searchInput}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchInput(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Tìm món ăn bạn yêu thích..."
                className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/20 rounded-2xl text-white placeholder-stone-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 focus:border-primary-500/50 transition-all"
              />
            </motion.div>

            {/* Quick stats */}
            <motion.div
              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
              transition={{ delay: 0.5 }}
              className="flex items-center gap-8 mt-8 text-sm text-stone-400"
            >
              {[
                { icon: <Truck className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Giao nhanh 30 phút' },
                { icon: <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Thực phẩm an toàn' },
                { icon: <Star className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Đánh giá 4.9★' },
              ].map((item, idx) => (
                <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  {item.icon}
                  <span>{item.text}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 60" fill="none"><path d="M0 60L60 54C120 48 240 36 360 30C480 24 600 24 720 27C840 30 960 36 1080 39C1200 42 1320 42 1380 42L1440 42V60H0Z" fill="#fafaf9"/></svg>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Promo Banner */}
      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 -mt-6 relative z-10">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {promoCoupons.map((promo, idx) => (
            <motion.div
              key={idx}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: idx * 0.1 }}
              className={cn(
                'p-4 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-r text-white shadow-lg cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow',
                promo.color
              )}
            >
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs opacity-80 mb-1">Mã giảm giá</p>
                  <p className="font-bold font-mono text-lg">{promo.code}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs opacity-80 mt-1">{promo.desc}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />
                </div>
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Categories */}
      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
        <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">Danh mục</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
          {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat, idx) => (
            <motion.button
              key={cat}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
              onClick={() => handleCategoryChange(cat)}
              className={cn(
                'flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-5 rounded-2xl border-2 transition-all duration-200',
                filters.category === cat
                  ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400'
                  : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 hover:border-primary-300 dark:hover:border-primary-600 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400'
              )}
            >
              <div className={cn(
                'w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center',
                filters.category === cat ? 'bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30' : 'bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800'
              )}>
                {categoryIcons[cat] || <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />}
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center">{cat}</span>
            </motion.button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Featured Foods */}
      {featuredFoods.length > 0 && !filters.search && filters.category === '' && (
        <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pb-12">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-amber-400 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <Flame className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
                Món bán chạy
              </h2>
            </div>
            <Link to="/?sort=bestseller" className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium">
              Xem tất cả <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Link>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 scrollbar-hide -mx-4 px-4">
            {featuredFoods.map((food, idx) => (
              <motion.div
                key={food._id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.08 }}
                className="flex-shrink-0 w-56"
              >
                <Link to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card overflow-hidden group block">
                  <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
                    <img
                      src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=300&h=200&fit=crop'}
                      alt={food.name}
                      className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => toggleWishlist(food._id, e)}
                      className={cn(
                        'absolute top-2 right-2 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all',
                        wishlist.includes(food._id) ? 'bg-red-500 text-white' : 'bg-white/80 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-500'
                      )}
                    >
                      <Heart className={cn('w-4 h-4', wishlist.includes(food._id) && 'fill-current')} />
                    </button>
                    {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
                      <div className="absolute top-2 left-2">
                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg">-{food.discountPercent}%</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-3">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 text-sm truncate">{food.name}</h3>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-500">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">• {food.soldCount || 0} đã bán</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
                      <div>
                        {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                          <span className="text-[10px] text-stone-400 line-through">{formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}</span>
                        )}
                        <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 text-sm ml-1">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
                      </div>
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
                        className="w-7 h-7 bg-primary-500 hover:bg-primary-600 text-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-colors"
                      >
                        <ShoppingCart className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </Link>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </section>
      )}

      {/* All Foods */}
      <section id="menu" className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pb-16">
        {/* Header + Filter Bar */}
        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-6">
          <div>
            <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Thực đơn</h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{pagination.totalItems || items.length} món có sẵn</p>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {/* Sort */}
            <select
              value={filters.sort}
              onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}
              className="px-3 py-2 bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 rounded-xl text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30"
            >
              {SORT_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
              ))}
            </select>

            {/* View mode */}
            <div className="flex bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
              <button
                onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
                className={cn('p-2 transition-colors', viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400')}
              >
                <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
                className={cn('p-2 transition-colors', viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400')}
              >
                <List className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Category pills */}
        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
          <button
            onClick={() => handleCategoryChange('Tất cả')}
            className={cn(
              'px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all',
              !filters.category ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
            )}
          >
            Tất cả
          </button>
          {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat) => (
            <button
              key={cat}
              onClick={() => handleCategoryChange(cat)}
              className={cn(
                'px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all',
                filters.category === cat
                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
              )}
            >
              {cat}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Loading */}
        {loading && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonCard key={i} />)}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Grid view */}
        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'grid' && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            {items.map((food, idx) => (
              <motion.div
                key={food._id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.03 }}
              >
                <Link to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card overflow-hidden group block h-full">
                  <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
                    <img
                      src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop'}
                      alt={food.name}
                      className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
                      loading="lazy"
                    />
                    {/* Wishlist */}
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => toggleWishlist(food._id, e)}
                      className={cn(
                        'absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all backdrop-blur-sm',
                        wishlist.includes(food._id) ? 'bg-red-500 text-white shadow-lg' : 'bg-white/80 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-white'
                      )}
                    >
                      <Heart className={cn('w-4 h-4', wishlist.includes(food._id) && 'fill-current')} />
                    </button>

                    {/* Badges */}
                    <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex gap-2">
                      {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm">
                          -{food.discountPercent}%
                        </span>
                      )}
                      {food.isFeatured && (
                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-amber-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Flame className="w-3 h-3" /> Hot
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Quick add overlay */}
                    <div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent p-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
                        className="w-full py-2 bg-white/95 hover:bg-white text-stone-900 font-medium text-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 backdrop-blur-sm transition-colors"
                      >
                        <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
                        Thêm vào giỏ
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="p-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                      <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{food.category}</span>
                      {!food.isAvailable && <span className="badge-danger text-[10px]">Hết hàng</span>}
                    </div>
                    <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-1 line-clamp-1">
                      {food.name}
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-stone-500 text-sm mb-3 line-clamp-2 leading-relaxed">
                      {food.description || 'Món ăn ngon miệng'}
                    </p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">({food.ratingCount || 0})</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 ml-1">• {food.soldCount || 0} đã bán</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <div>
                        {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                          <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through mr-1">
                            {formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}
                          </span>
                        )}
                        <span className="font-bold text-lg text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
                          {formatCurrency(food.price)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </Link>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* List view */}
        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'list' && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {items.map((food) => (
              <Link key={food._id} to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4 group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
                <img
                  src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=80&h=80&fit=crop'}
                  alt={food.name}
                  className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
                />
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate">{food.name}</h3>
                  <span className="badge-primary text-[10px] mt-1">{food.category}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 flex-shrink-0">
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="font-bold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
                    className="w-9 h-9 bg-primary-500 hover:bg-primary-600 text-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-colors"
                  >
                    <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Empty state */}
        {!loading && items.length === 0 && (
          <div className="card p-16 text-center">
            <ChefHat className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">
              {filters.search || filters.category ? 'Không tìm thấy món phù hợp' : 'Chưa có món ăn nào'}
            </h3>
            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm">
              {filters.search || filters.category ? 'Thử thay đổi bộ lọc' : ' Quay lại sau để xem thực đơn mới'}
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Pagination */}
        {!loading && items.length > 0 && pagination.totalPages > 1 && (
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mt-8">
            {Array.from({ length: pagination.totalPages }).map((_, i) => (
              <button
                key={i}
                onClick={() => setPage(i + 1)}
                className={cn(
                  'w-10 h-10 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all',
                  pagination.currentPage === i + 1
                    ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
                    : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
                )}
              >
                {i + 1}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import {
  ShoppingBag, DollarSign, UtensilsCrossed, Users,
  TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Clock, ChevronRight, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight
} from 'lucide-react';
import { adminApi, orderApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import { SkeletonStats } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';

export default function AdminDashboardPage() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);
  const [revenueData, setRevenueData] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadData();
  }, []);

  const loadData = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const [statsRes, revenueRes, ordersRes] = await Promise.all([
        adminApi.getStats(),
        adminApi.getRevenue('30d'),
        orderApi.getAll({ limit: 5 }),
      ]);
      setStats(statsRes.data.data);
      setRevenueData(revenueRes.data.data || []);
      setRecentOrders(ordersRes.data.data?.orders || []);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Dashboard load error:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const [recentOrders, setRecentOrders] = useState([]);

  const statCards = [
    {
      label: 'Tổng đơn hàng',
      value: stats?.totalOrders || 0,
      icon: ShoppingBag,
      color: 'primary',
      change: '+12%',
      up: true,
    },
    {
      label: 'Doanh thu',
      value: formatCurrency(stats?.totalRevenue || 0),
      icon: DollarSign,
      color: 'secondary',
      change: '+8%',
      up: true,
    },
    {
      label: 'Số món',
      value: stats?.totalFoods || 0,
      icon: UtensilsCrossed,
      color: 'accent',
      change: '+5',
      up: true,
    },
    {
      label: 'Người dùng',
      value: stats?.totalUsers || 0,
      icon: Users,
      color: 'info',
      change: '+23',
      up: true,
    },
  ];

  const colorMap = {
    primary: 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400',
    secondary: 'bg-secondary-50 dark:bg-secondary-900/20 text-secondary-600 dark:text-secondary-400',
    accent: 'bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400',
    info: 'bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400',
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">
          Tổng quan Dashboard
        </h1>

        {/* Stats Cards */}
        {loading ? (
          <SkeletonStats />
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
            {statCards.map((card, idx) => (
              <motion.div
                key={card.label}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.1 }}
                className="card p-5"
              >
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center ${colorMap[card.color]}`}>
                    <card.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
                  </div>
                  <div className={`flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${card.up ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-500'}`}>
                    {card.up ? <ArrowUpRight className="w-3 h-3" /> : <ArrowDownRight className="w-3 h-3" />}
                    {card.change}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-1">{card.value}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-stone-500">{card.label}</div>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Today Stats */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
          {[
            { label: 'Đơn hàng hôm nay', value: stats?.todayOrders || 0 },
            { label: 'Doanh thu hôm nay', value: formatCurrency(stats?.todayRevenue || 0) },
            { label: 'Đơn chờ xử lý', value: stats?.pendingOrders || 0 },
          ].map((item, idx) => (
            <div key={idx} className="card p-5 flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{item.value}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{item.label}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Recent Orders */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
            <h2 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Đơn hàng gần đây</h2>
            <Link to="/admin/orders" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
              Xem tất cả <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Link>
          </div>

          {loading ? (
            <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
              {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="animate-pulse flex items-center gap-4">
                  <div className="h-4 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-24" />
                  <div className="h-4 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded flex-1" />
                  <div className="h-4 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-20" />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <table className="admin-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Mã đơn</th>
                  <th>Khách hàng</th>
                  <th>Tổng tiền</th>
                  <th>Trạng thái</th>
                  <th>Thời gian</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {recentOrders.map((order) => (
                  <tr key={order._id}>
                    <td className="font-mono text-xs">{order.orderCode}</td>
                    <td>{order.customerInfo?.name || order.customer?.fullName || 'Khách'}</td>
                    <td className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</td>
                    <td>
                      <Badge
                        variant={
                          order.status === 'done' ? 'success' :
                          order.status === 'pending' ? 'warning' :
                          order.status === 'cancelled' ? 'danger' :
                          'primary'
                        }
                      >
                        {order.status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xử lý' :
                         order.status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' :
                         order.status === 'preparing' ? 'Đang chuẩn bị' :
                         order.status === 'delivering' ? 'Đang giao' :
                         order.status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
                      </Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
                {recentOrders.length === 0 && (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={5} className="text-center py-8 text-stone-400">Chưa có đơn hàng nào</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          )}
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { ClipboardList, Search, ChevronRight, Truck, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { orderApi, adminApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime, getStatusLabel } from '../../lib/utils';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function AdminOrdersPage() {
  const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ total: 0, page: 1, pages: 1 });
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('');
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [selectedOrder, setSelectedOrder] = useState(null);
  const [shippers, setShippers] = useState([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadOrders();
    loadShippers();
  }, [statusFilter, search]);

  const loadOrders = async (page = 1) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await orderApi.getAll({
        status: statusFilter || undefined,
        search: search || undefined,
        page,
        limit: 15,
      });
      setOrders(res.data.data?.orders || []);
      setPagination(res.data.data?.pagination || { total: 0, page: 1, pages: 1 });
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Không thể tải đơn hàng');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const loadShippers = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await adminApi.getShippers();
      setShippers(res.data.data || []);
    } catch {}
  };

  const handleStatusChange = async (orderId, status) => {
    try {
      const res = await orderApi.updateStatus(orderId, { status });
      setOrders((prev) => prev.map((o) => o._id === orderId ? res.data.data : o));
      if (selectedOrder?._id === orderId) setSelectedOrder(res.data.data);
      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái thành công');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Cập nhật thất bại');
    }
  };

  const handleAssignShipper = async (orderId, shipperId) => {
    try {
      const res = await orderApi.assignShipper(orderId, shipperId);
      setOrders((prev) => prev.map((o) => o._id === orderId ? res.data.data : o));
      if (selectedOrder?._id === orderId) setSelectedOrder(res.data.data);
      toast.success('Giao đơn cho shipper thành công');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Giao đơn thất bại');
    }
  };

  const statuses = [
    { value: '', label: 'Tất cả' },
    { value: 'pending', label: 'Chờ xác nhận' },
    { value: 'confirmed', label: 'Đã xác nhận' },
    { value: 'preparing', label: 'Đang chuẩn bị' },
    { value: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao' },
    { value: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành' },
    { value: 'cancelled', label: 'Đã hủy' },
  ];

  const statusVariant = (s) => ({
    pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary',
    delivering: 'secondary', done: 'success', cancelled: 'danger',
  }[s] || 'gray');

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">
          Quản lý đơn hàng
        </h1>

        {/* Filters */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] max-w-md">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Tìm theo mã đơn, tên, SĐT..."
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
              className="input-field pl-10"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {statuses.map((s) => (
              <button
                key={s.value}
                onClick={() => setStatusFilter(s.value)}
                className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                  statusFilter === s.value
                    ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
                    : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
                }`}
              >
                {s.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Mã đơn</th>
                <th>Khách hàng</th>
                <th>Địa chỉ</th>
                <th>Tổng tiền</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Shipper</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={7} />)
              ) : orders.length === 0 ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Không có đơn hàng nào</td>
                </tr>
              ) : (
                orders.map((order) => (
                  <tr key={order._id}>
                    <td className="font-mono text-xs">{order.orderCode}</td>
                    <td>
                      <div>{order.customerInfo?.name || order.customer?.fullName || 'Khách'}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.customerInfo?.phone || order.customer?.phone || ''}</div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="max-w-[200px] truncate text-sm">
                      {order.customerInfo?.address || '-'}
                    </td>
                    <td className="font-semibold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</td>
                    <td>
                      <Badge variant={statusVariant(order.status)} dot>{getStatusLabel(order.status)}</Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="text-sm">
                      {order.assignedShipper ? (
                        <span className="text-secondary-600">{order.assignedShipper.fullName}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-stone-400 text-xs">Chưa giao</span>
                      )}
                    </td>
                    <td>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => setSelectedOrder(order)}
                        className="p-2 text-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                      >
                        <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Order Detail Modal */}
      <Modal isOpen={!!selectedOrder} onClose={() => setSelectedOrder(null)} title={`Đơn hàng ${selectedOrder?.orderCode}`} size="lg">
        {selectedOrder && (
          <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
            {/* Status */}
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 mb-3">Cập nhật trạng thái</h3>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'delivering', 'done'].map((s) => (
                  <Button
                    key={s}
                    size="sm"
                    variant={selectedOrder.status === s ? 'primary' : 'outline'}
                    onClick={() => handleStatusChange(selectedOrder._id, s)}
                    disabled={selectedOrder.status === s}
                  >
                    {getStatusLabel(s)}
                  </Button>
                ))}
                <Button
                  size="sm"
                  variant="danger"
                  onClick={() => handleStatusChange(selectedOrder._id, 'cancelled')}
                  disabled={['done', 'cancelled'].includes(selectedOrder.status)}
                >
                  Hủy đơn
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Assign Shipper */}
            {!selectedOrder.assignedShipper && ['pending', 'confirmed'].includes(selectedOrder.status) && (
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 mb-3">Giao cho shipper</h3>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {shippers.map((sp) => (
                    <Button
                      key={sp._id}
                      size="sm"
                      variant="outline"
                      onClick={() => handleAssignShipper(selectedOrder._id, sp._id)}
                      leftIcon={<Truck className="w-4 h-4" />}
                    >
                      {sp.fullName}
                    </Button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Items */}
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 mb-3">Món đã đặt</h3>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {selectedOrder.items?.map((item, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm">
                    <img
                      src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=48&h=48&fit=crop'}
                      alt={item.foodName}
                      className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
                    />
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <span className="font-medium">{item.foodName}</span>
                      <span className="text-stone-400 ml-2">x{item.quantity}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t space-y-2 text-sm">
                <div className="flex justify-between"><span>Tạm tính</span><span>{formatCurrency(selectedOrder.subtotal)}</span></div>
                {selectedOrder.discount > 0 && <div className="flex justify-between text-emerald-600"><span>Giảm</span><span>-{formatCurrency(selectedOrder.discount)}</span></div>}
                {selectedOrder.deliveryFee > 0 && <div className="flex justify-between"><span>Phí giao</span><span>{formatCurrency(selectedOrder.deliveryFee)}</span></div>}
                <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-lg border-t pt-2"><span>Tổng</span><span className="text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(selectedOrder.total)}</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Customer info */}
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 mb-3">Thông tin khách hàng</h3>
              <div className="text-sm space-y-1">
                <p><span className="text-stone-400">Tên:</span> {selectedOrder.customerInfo?.name}</p>
                <p><span className="text-stone-400">SĐT:</span> {selectedOrder.customerInfo?.phone}</p>
                <p><span className="text-stone-400">Địa chỉ:</span> {selectedOrder.customerInfo?.address}</p>
                <p><span className="text-stone-400">Đặt lúc:</span> {formatDateTime(selectedOrder.createdAt)}</p>
                {selectedOrder.note && <p><span className="text-stone-400">Ghi chú:</span> {selectedOrder.note}</p>}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { UtensilsCrossed, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, Copy, Search } from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchFoods, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
import { foodApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
import * as yup from 'yup';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
import { CATEGORIES } from '../../constants';

const schema = yup.object({
  name: yup.string().required('Tên món ăn không được để trống').min(2, 'Tối thiểu 2 ký tự'),
  category: yup.string().required('Danh mục không được để trống'),
  price: yup.number().required('Giá không được để trống').min(0, 'Giá không âm'),
  description: yup.string().default(''),
  image: yup.string().default(''),
  isAvailable: yup.boolean().default(true),
  isFeatured: yup.boolean().default(false),
  stock: yup.number().default(999),
  originalPrice: yup.number(),
  discountPercent: yup.number().min(0).max(100).default(0),
});

export default function AdminFoodsPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { items: foods, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editFood, setEditFood] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [deleteId, setDeleteId] = useState(null);

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset, formState: { errors } } = useForm({
    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    defaultValues: { name: '', category: '', price: '', description: '', image: '', isAvailable: true, isFeatured: false, stock: 999, originalPrice: '', discountPercent: 0 },
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchFoods({ search, limit: 100 }));
  }, [dispatch, search]);

  const openCreate = () => { setEditFood(null); reset(); setIsModalOpen(true); };
  const openEdit = (food) => {
    setEditFood(food);
    reset({
      name: food.name, category: food.category, price: food.price,
      description: food.description || '', image: food.image || '',
      isAvailable: food.isAvailable, isFeatured: food.isFeatured || false,
      stock: food.stock || 999, originalPrice: food.originalPrice || '', discountPercent: food.discountPercent || 0,
    });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      if (editFood) {
        await dispatch(updateFood({ id: editFood._id, data })).unwrap();
        toast.success('Cập nhật món ăn thành công');
      } else {
        await dispatch(createFood(data)).unwrap();
        toast.success('Thêm món ăn thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      dispatch(fetchFoods({ search, limit: 100 }));
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại');
    } finally {
      setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    try {
      await dispatch(deleteFood(id)).unwrap();
      toast.success('Xóa món ăn thành công');
      setDeleteId(null);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Xóa thất bại');
    }
  };

  const handleDuplicate = async (food) => {
    try {
      await foodApi.duplicate(food._id, { name: `${food.name} (Copy)` });
      toast.success('Đã sao chép món ăn');
      dispatch(fetchFoods({ search, limit: 100 }));
    } catch {
      toast.error('Sao chép thất bại');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý món ăn</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{pagination.totalItems} món</p>
          </div>
          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>
            Thêm món mới
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Search */}
        <div className="relative mb-6 max-w-md">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Tìm kiếm món ăn..."
            value={search}
            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            className="input-field pl-10"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Món ăn</th>
                <th>Danh mục</th>
                <th>Giá</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Nổi bật</th>
                <th>Đã bán</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={7} />)
              ) : foods.map((food) => (
                <tr key={food._id}>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <img
                        src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=48&h=48&fit=crop'}
                        alt={food.name}
                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
                      />
                      <div>
                        <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{food.name}</p>
                        {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
                          <span className="text-xs text-red-500 font-medium">-{food.discountPercent}%</span>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td><Badge variant="gray">{food.category}</Badge></td>
                  <td>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
                    {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through ml-1">{formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}</span>
                    )}
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={food.isAvailable ? 'success' : 'danger'}>
                      {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn hàng' : 'Hết hàng'}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    {food.isFeatured && <span className="text-amber-500">⭐</span>}
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-stone-500">{food.soldCount || 0}</td>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <button onClick={() => openEdit(food)} className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-50 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                        <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleDuplicate(food)} className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-accent-600 hover:bg-accent-50 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                        <Copy className="w-4 h-4" />
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={() => setDeleteId(food._id)} className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                        <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
              {!loading && foods.length === 0 && (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Không có món ăn nào</td></tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Create/Edit Modal */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editFood ? 'Sửa món ăn' : 'Thêm món mới'} size="lg">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Tên món ăn *" placeholder="VD: Cơm gà xối mỡ" error={errors.name?.message} {...register('name')} />
            <div>
              <label className="input-label">Danh mục *</label>
              <select className="input-field" {...register('category')}>
                <option value="">Chọn danh mục</option>
                {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((c) => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}
              </select>
              {errors.category && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.category.message}</p>}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giá * (VNĐ)" type="number" placeholder="45000" error={errors.price?.message} {...register('price')} />
            <Input label="Giá gốc" type="number" placeholder="55000" {...register('originalPrice')} />
            <Input label="Giảm giá %" type="number" placeholder="0" {...register('discountPercent')} />
          </div>

          <Input label="Mô tả" placeholder="Mô tả về món ăn..." {...register('description')} />
          <Input label="URL Hình ảnh" placeholder="https://..." {...register('image')} />

          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <Input label="Tồn kho" type="number" {...register('stock')} />
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-6">
              <label className="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer">
                <input type="checkbox" className="sr-only peer" {...register('isAvailable')} />
                <div className="w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 rounded-full peer peer-checked:bg-primary-500 transition-colors" />
                <div className="absolute left-1 top-1 w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full transition peer-checked:translate-x-5" />
              </label>
              <span className="text-sm text-stone-600">Còn hàng</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-6">
              <label className="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer">
                <input type="checkbox" className="sr-only peer" {...register('isFeatured')} />
                <div className="w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 rounded-full peer peer-checked:bg-amber-500 transition-colors" />
                <div className="absolute left-1 top-1 w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full transition peer-checked:translate-x-5" />
              </label>
              <span className="text-sm text-stone-600">Nổi bật</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editFood ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Thêm món'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>

      {/* Delete Confirm */}
      <Modal isOpen={!!deleteId} onClose={() => setDeleteId(null)} title="Xác nhận xóa" size="sm">
        <div className="p-6">
          <p className="text-stone-600 mb-4">Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món ăn này? Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.</p>
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeleteId(null)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button variant="danger" onClick={() => handleDelete(deleteId)} className="flex-1">Xóa</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}
```
