```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Users, Search, ShieldCheck, Truck, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { adminApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import { formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function AdminUsersPage() {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [roleFilter, setRoleFilter] = useState('');
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ total: 0, page: 1, pages: 1 });

  useEffect(() => { loadUsers(); }, [search, roleFilter]);

  const loadUsers = async (page = 1) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await adminApi.getUsers({
        search: search || undefined,
        role: roleFilter || undefined,
        page, limit: 20,
      });
      setUsers(res.data.data?.users || []);
      setPagination(res.data.data?.pagination || {});
    } catch {} finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const handleToggleStatus = async (userId) => {
    try {
      const res = await adminApi.toggleUserStatus(userId);
      setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => u._id === userId ? res.data.data : u));
      toast.success(res.data.message);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Thao tác thất bại');
    }
  };

  const roleVariant = (role) => ({ admin: 'danger', shipper: 'secondary', customer: 'info' }[role] || 'gray');
  const roleIcon = (role) => ({ admin: <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4" />, shipper: <Truck className="w-4 h-4" /> }[role] || <User className="w-4 h-4" />);

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý người dùng</h1>
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-md">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
            <input type="text" placeholder="Tìm tên, email, SĐT..." value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)} className="input-field pl-10" />
          </div>
          {['all', 'customer', 'shipper', 'admin'].map((r) => (
            <button key={r} onClick={() => setRoleFilter(r === 'all' ? '' : r)}
              className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${!roleFilter && r === 'all' ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white' : roleFilter === r ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white' : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600'}`}>
              {r === 'all' ? 'Tất cả' : r === 'customer' ? 'Khách hàng' : r === 'shipper' ? 'Shipper' : 'Admin'}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Người dùng</th>
                <th>Email</th>
                <th>SĐT</th>
                <th>Vai trò</th>
                <th>Ngày tạo</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-8">Đang tải...</td></tr>
              ) : users.map((user) => (
                <tr key={user._id}>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-sm">
                        {user.fullName?.[0] || 'U'}
                      </div>
                      <span className="font-medium">{user.fullName}</span>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{user.email}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{user.phone || '-'}</td>
                  <td><Badge variant={roleVariant(user.role)}>{roleIcon(user.role)} {user.role === 'admin' ? 'Admin' : user.role === 'shipper' ? 'Shipper' : 'Khách hàng'}</Badge></td>
                  <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(user.createdAt)}</td>
                  <td><Badge variant={user.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>{user.isActive ? 'Hoạt động' : 'Đã khóa'}</Badge></td>
                  <td>
                    <Button size="sm" variant={user.isActive ? 'danger' : 'success'} onClick={() => handleToggleStatus(user._id)}>
                      {user.isActive ? 'Khóa' : 'Mở khóa'}
                    </Button>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
              {!loading && users.length === 0 && (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Không có người dùng nào</td></tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Tag, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, ToggleLeft } from 'lucide-react';
import { couponApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';

export default function AdminPromosPage() {
  const [coupons, setCoupons] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editCoupon, setEditCoupon] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

  useEffect(() => { loadCoupons(); }, []);

  const loadCoupons = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await couponApi.getAll();
      setCoupons(res.data.data || []);
    } catch {} finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const openCreate = () => { setEditCoupon(null); reset({ code: '', type: 'fixed', value: '', minOrder: 0, maxDiscount: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', usageLimit: '', totalLimit: '', description: '', isActive: true }); setIsModalOpen(true); };
  const openEdit = (c) => {
    setEditCoupon(c);
    reset({ code: c.code, type: c.type, value: c.value, minOrder: c.minOrder, maxDiscount: c.maxDiscount || '', startDate: c.startDate?.split('T')[0], endDate: c.endDate?.split('T')[0], usageLimit: c.usageLimit, totalLimit: c.totalLimit || '', description: c.description || '', isActive: c.isActive });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      if (editCoupon) {
        await couponApi.update(editCoupon._id, data);
        toast.success('Cập nhật coupon thành công');
      } else {
        await couponApi.create(data);
        toast.success('Tạo coupon thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      loadCoupons();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại');
    } finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  const handleToggle = async (id) => {
    try {
      await couponApi.toggle(id);
      loadCoupons();
      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái');
    } catch { toast.error('Thất bại'); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    try {
      await couponApi.delete(id);
      setCoupons((prev) => prev.filter((c) => c._id !== id));
      toast.success('Xóa coupon thành công');
    } catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Mã giảm giá</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{coupons.length} coupon</p>
          </div>
          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Tạo coupon</Button>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {loading ? (
            Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => <div key={i} className="card p-5 animate-pulse"><div className="h-4 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-24 mb-3" /><div className="h-3 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-full" /></div>)
          ) : coupons.map((c) => (
            <motion.div key={c._id} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="card p-5">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-lg font-mono">{c.code}</span>
                  <Badge variant={c.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>{c.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}</Badge>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-1">
                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(c)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(c._id)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm space-y-1 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">
                <p>{c.description || (c.type === 'percent' ? `Giảm ${c.value}%` : `Giảm ${c.value.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ`)}</p>
                <p>Đơn tối thiểu: {c.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ</p>
                <p>Đã dùng: {c.usedCount}{c.totalLimit ? `/${c.totalLimit}` : ''}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">Hết hạn: {formatDateTime(c.endDate)}</p>
              </div>
              <button onClick={() => handleToggle(c._id)} className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-primary-600">
                <ToggleLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> {c.isActive ? 'Tắt' : 'Bật'}
              </button>
            </motion.div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editCoupon ? 'Sửa coupon' : 'Tạo coupon mới'} size="md">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Mã coupon" placeholder="WELCOME50" {...register('code')} />
            <div>
              <label className="input-label">Loại</label>
              <select className="input-field" {...register('type')}>
                <option value="fixed">Giảm tiền</option>
                <option value="percent">Giảm %</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giá trị giảm" type="number" {...register('value')} />
            <Input label="Đơn tối thiểu (VNĐ)" type="number" {...register('minOrder')} />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giảm tối đa (VNĐ)" type="number" placeholder="Cho loại %" {...register('maxDiscount')} />
            <Input label="Giới hạn sử dụng" type="number" placeholder="Không giới hạn" {...register('totalLimit')} />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Ngày bắt đầu" type="date" {...register('startDate')} />
            <Input label="Ngày kết thúc" type="date" {...register('endDate')} />
          </div>
          <Input label="Mô tả" placeholder="Chi tiết coupon..." {...register('description')} />
          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editCoupon ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Tạo'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { MapPin, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, Clock, Phone } from 'lucide-react';
import { branchApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function AdminBranchesPage() {
  const [branches, setBranches] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editBranch, setEditBranch] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

  useEffect(() => { loadBranches(); }, []);

  const loadBranches = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await branchApi.getAllAdmin();
      setBranches(res.data.data || []);
    } catch {} finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const openCreate = () => { setEditBranch(null); reset({ name: '', address: '', phone: '', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: true }); setIsModalOpen(true); };
  const openEdit = (b) => { setEditBranch(b); reset({ name: b.name, address: b.address, phone: b.phone || '', openHours: b.openHours || '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: b.isActive }); setIsModalOpen(true); };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      if (editBranch) {
        await branchApi.update(editBranch._id, data);
        toast.success('Cập nhật chi nhánh thành công');
      } else {
        await branchApi.create(data);
        toast.success('Tạo chi nhánh thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      loadBranches();
    } catch (err) { toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại'); }
    finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    try { await branchApi.delete(id); setBranches((p) => p.filter((b) => b._id !== id)); toast.success('Xóa thành công'); }
    catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý chi nhánh</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{branches.length} chi nhánh</p>
          </div>
          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Thêm chi nhánh</Button>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {loading ? Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => <div key={i} className="card p-5 animate-pulse h-32 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700" />) :
           branches.map((b) => (
            <motion.div key={b._id} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="card p-5">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                    <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{b.name}</h3>
                    <Badge variant={b.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'}>{b.isActive ? 'Hoạt động' : 'Tạm đóng'}</Badge>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-1">
                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(b)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(b._id)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm space-y-2 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">
                <p className="flex items-start gap-2"><MapPin className="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />{b.address}</p>
                {b.phone && <p className="flex items-center gap-2"><Phone className="w-4 h-4" />{b.phone}</p>}
                <p className="flex items-center gap-2"><Clock className="w-4 h-4" />{b.openHours}</p>
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editBranch ? 'Sửa chi nhánh' : 'Thêm chi nhánh'} size="md">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <Input label="Tên chi nhánh" placeholder="VD: Nhà Hàng Việt - Quận 1" {...register('name')} />
          <Input label="Địa chỉ" placeholder="VD: 123 Nguyễn Huệ, Quận 1, TP.HCM" {...register('address')} />
          <Input label="Số điện thoại" placeholder="02812345678" {...register('phone')} />
          <Input label="Giờ mở cửa" placeholder="08:00 - 22:00" {...register('openHours')} />
          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editBranch ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Tạo'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

```

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested a comprehensive upgrade of their existing food delivery/restaurant booking project (`bt-quanlibooking`) from a basic MVP to a professional, production-grade food delivery platform. The requirements include:
   - **Phase 1**: Premium UI/UX with dark mode, new Tailwind theme (Deep Orange + Emerald), modern layouts, premium components, cart sidebar, Framer Motion animations
   - **Phase 2**: Authentication (JWT), user profile, wishlist, checkout with coupon/delivery/payment options, order tracking timeline
   - **Phase 3**: Admin dashboard with Recharts analytics, promo management, food management with variants/toppings
   - **Phase 4**: Shipper dashboard module
   - **Phase 5**: JWT auth, role-based access, Socket.io realtime notifications
   
   Rules: Don't delete reusable code, upgrade gradually per module, document each file changed, write complete code, summarize after each phase.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Backend**: Node.js + Express + MongoDB/Mongoose, JWT (access + refresh tokens), bcryptjs, Socket.io v4, helmet, express-async-handler, rate limiting, role-based middleware (customer/admin/shipper)
   - **Frontend**: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS 3.4 with dark mode (class), Framer Motion, Redux Toolkit, react-hook-form + yup, react-hot-toast, Recharts, lucide-react
   - **Architecture**: Monorepo with backend/ and frontend/ folders, service layer separation in backend, premium component library
   - **Auth Flow**: JWT access token (15min) + refresh token (7days) stored in httpOnly cookies, auto-refresh via axios interceptor
   - **Models**: User (with bcrypt pre-save hash), Food (with slug, variants, toppings, ratings), Booking/Order (with trackingLogs, fulfillment types, payment methods), Coupon, Branch, Review (with auto rating calculation), Notification
   - **Socket.io**: Room-based (user:ID, admin, shipper), emit on new order, order status update, shipper assignment
   - **Redux**: Separate slices for auth, foods, cart, orders, notifications

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **BACKEND FILES (all created/modified):**
   - `backend/package.json` - Updated with new deps: bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, express-async-handler, helmet, socket.io, winston, zod. Old: cors, dotenv, express, mongoose, multer, nodemon
   - `backend/.env` - New env vars: JWT_SECRET, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, JWT_EXPIRES_IN, JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, UPLOAD_DIR, MAX_FILE_SIZE
   - `backend/src/utils/asyncHandler.js` - Simple wrapper: `const asyncHandler = (fn) => (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);`
   - `backend/src/utils/ApiResponse.js` - Class with statusCode, success, data, message, send() method
   - `backend/src/utils/constants.js` - ORDER_STATUSES, USER_ROLES, PAYMENT_METHODS, FULFILLMENT_TYPES, PAGINATION_DEFAULTS, CATEGORIES
   - `backend/src/models/User.model.js` - Schema with bcrypt pre-save hash, comparePassword method, toJSON removes sensitive fields, indexes on email and role
   - `backend/src/models/Food.model.js` - Auto slug generation from name (Vietnamese-friendly), indexes on category/price/isFeatured/isAvailable/slug/ratingAverage/soldCount
   - `backend/src/models/Booking.model.js` - Auto orderCode generation pre-save, trackingLogs array, customerInfo embedded, indexes on customer/status/orderCode
   - `backend/src/models/Coupon.model.js` - Supports percent/fixed types, minOrder, maxDiscount, freeShippingThreshold, applicableCategories/Foods
   - `backend/src/models/Branch.model.js` - Simple with name, address, phone, openHours, lat/lng
   - `backend/src/models/Review.model.js` - Auto updates Food.ratingAverage/ratingCount via Mongoose post-save/delete hooks
   - `backend/src/models/Notification.model.js` - For user notifications with isRead, type (order/promo/system/review), link
   - `backend/src/middlewares/auth.middleware.js` - verifyJWT (checks token, attaches user), verifyRole(...roles) middleware, optionalAuth
   - `backend/src/middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware.js` - In-memory Map-based rate limiter with cleanup
   - `backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.js` - register, login, logout, getMe, refreshToken, updateProfile, changePassword, addToWishlist, removeFromWishlist, getWishlist. Uses httpOnly cookies for tokens.
   - `backend/src/controllers/food.controller.js` - getFoods (with search/category/price/sort/pagination), getFeatured, getCategories, getFood, getFoodBySlug, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood, toggleAvailability, duplicateFood
   - `backend/src/controllers/order.controller.js` - createOrder (calculates subtotal/discount/deliveryFee, applies coupon, updates soldCount, emits Socket.io), getMyOrders, getOrderById, updateOrderStatus (with validTransitions map, creates notification + socket emit), assignShipper (notifies shipper via socket), cancelOrder, getAllOrders (admin with search), getShipperOrders
   - `backend/src/controllers/review.controller.js` - createReview (checks if user purchased food, marks isVerified), getFoodReviews, deleteReview
   - `backend/src/controllers/coupon.controller.js` - validateCoupon (public), CRUD for admin, toggleCoupon
   - `backend/src/controllers/branch.controller.js` - getBranches/getBranch (public), CRUD for admin
   - `backend/src/controllers/notification.controller.js` - getNotifications (with unreadCount), markAsRead, markAllAsRead, deleteNotification
   - `backend/src/controllers/admin.controller.js` - getOverview (counts, today stats, month stats), getRevenueStats (by period), getTopFoods, getCategoryStats (by sold/revenue), getUsers (with search/role filter), getShippers, toggleUserStatus
   - `backend/src/routes/auth.routes.js` - POST /register, /login, /refresh (public), GET /me, PUT /profile, PUT /change-password, POST/DELETE /wishlist (protected)
   - `backend/src/routes/food.routes.js` - Public: GET /, /featured, /categories, /slug/:slug, /:id. Admin: POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH /toggle-availability, POST /duplicate
   - `backend/src/routes/order.routes.js` - POST / (optionalAuth), GET /my (JWT), GET /:id (optionalAuth), PATCH /:id/cancel (JWT), GET / (admin+shipper), PATCH /:id/status (admin+shipper), PATCH /:id/assign-shipper (admin), GET /shipper/pending (shipper)
   - `backend/src/routes/review.routes.js` - GET /food/:foodId (public), POST / (JWT), DELETE /:id (JWT)
   - `backend/src/routes/coupon.routes.js` - POST /validate (public), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH /toggle (admin)
   - `backend/src/routes/branch.routes.js` - GET /, /:id (public), /admin/list + CRUD (admin)
   - `backend/src/routes/notification.routes.js` - All protected with JWT
   - `backend/src/routes/admin.routes.js` - GET /stats/overview, /stats/revenue, /stats/top-foods, /stats/categories, /users, PATCH /users/:id/toggle-status, GET /shippers
   - `backend/src/services/socket.service.js` - initSocket(io) with JWT auth, joins rooms (user:ID, admin, shipper), emits 'connected', 'newOrder', 'orderUpdate', 'newDelivery', 'orderAssigned'
   - `backend/src/app.js` - Added helmet, rate limiter, new routes (auth, orders, reviews, coupons, branches, notifications, admin), updated CORS from hardcoded to env-driven ALLOWED_ORIGINS
   - `backend/src/server.js` - Added http.createServer, Socket.io setup with CORS, graceful SIGTERM/SIGINT shutdown
   - `backend/src/utils/seed.js` - Seeds: 5 users (1 admin, 1 shipper, 3 customers), 26 foods across 5 categories with full metadata, 5 coupons, 6 branches, sample reviews

   **FRONTEND FILES (all created/modified):**
   - `frontend/tailwind.config.js` - Added darkMode: 'class', colors: secondary (Emerald #059669), accent (Amber #F59E0B), extended shadows/card-hover-lg/glow/soft-lg, extended animations (slide-left/right/scale-out/pulse-soft/bounce-soft/float), extended borderRadius (3xl/4xl)
   - `frontend/src/index.css` - Added dark mode styles for all components (.dark class), glass effect, gradient-text utility, improved scrollbar dark mode
   - `frontend/src/lib/utils.js` - cn() using clsx+twMerge, formatPrice/formatDate/formatDateTime/formatRelativeTime, slugify, getImageUrl, generateStarRating, truncate, debounce, getStatusColor, getStatusLabel
   - `frontend/src/store/index.js` - Added authReducer and notificationsReducer slices
   - `frontend/src/api/axiosClient.js` - Updated with request interceptor (attaches Bearer token), response interceptor (auto-refresh on 401), all API objects: authApi, foodApi, orderApi, reviewApi, couponApi, branchApi, notificationApi, adminApi, uploadApi
   - `frontend/src/constants/index.js` - Added ORDER_STATUSES with full 6-status config, FULFILLMENT_TYPES, PAYMENT_METHODS, USER_ROLES, ADMIN_PAGE_SIZE, ROUTES object
   - `frontend/src/slices/authSlice.js` - New slice: login/register/getMe/updateProfile/removeFromWishlist thunks, persist token+user to localStorage, logout action clears localStorage
   - `frontend/src/slices/notificationsSlice.js` - fetchNotifications/markAsRead/markAllAsRead, addNotification reducer for socket updates
   - `frontend/src/slices/ordersSlice.js` - fetchMyOrders/fetchOrderById/createOrder/cancelOrder thunks, updateOrderLocal reducer
   - `frontend/src/slices/cartSlice.js` - Updated with item.key (for variant/topping uniqueness), toppings array, setCoupon/removeCoupon/setFulfillmentType/setSelectedBranch reducers, computed selectors (subtotal, discount, deliveryFee=15k if subtotal<100k, grandTotal)
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/Button.jsx` - forwardRef, variants: primary/secondary/outline/ghost/danger/success, sizes: sm/md/lg/icon, loading spinner, leftIcon/rightIcon
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/Input.jsx` - forwardRef, label, error, helper text, leftIcon/rightIcon slots
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/Badge.jsx` - variants: success/warning/danger/info/gray/primary/secondary, dot indicator option
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/Skeleton.jsx` - Skeleton, SkeletonCard, SkeletonTableRow, SkeletonStats
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/Modal.jsx` - Portal-based, AnimatePresence, Framer Motion scale-in, escape to close, body overflow lock
   - `frontend/src/components/ui/CartSidebar.jsx` - Framer Motion slide-in from right, animated item count, quantity controls, subtotal, checkout/View cart links
   - `frontend/src/layouts/MainLayout.jsx` - Fully redesigned: glass header with search expand, dark mode toggle, wishlist/notifications icons (auth-gated), cart badge with AnimatePresence, user dropdown (profile/orders/wishlist/admin/logout), mobile hamburger menu, search overlay, 4-column footer with newsletter
   - `frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.jsx` - Fully redesigned: collapsible sidebar with Framer Motion width animation, 7 nav items (Dashboard/Foods/Orders/Users/Promos/Branches/Reports), dark mode toggle, user info top bar with notification bell
   - `frontend/src/routes/index.jsx` - Added ProtectedRoute (checks token + role), GuestRoute (redirects if logged in), new routes: /login, /register (guest), /profile, /orders, /orders/:id, /wishlist (protected), /admin/* (admin role only)
   - `frontend/src/App.jsx` - Updated with Provider store, react-hot-toast (not sonner), dark class on html element
   - `frontend/src/pages/user/LoginPage.jsx` - Split screen: left branded panel with stats, right form. Email/password, show/hide password, Google/Facebook mock buttons, demo credentials, remember checkbox
   - `frontend/src/pages/user/RegisterPage.jsx` - Similar split layout, fullName/email/phone/password/confirmPassword with strength indicator, feature list
   - `frontend/src/pages/user/ProfilePage.jsx` - Tabs: Profile (avatar/name/email/phone), Change Password (current/new/confirm), Addresses (list with add/edit/delete)
   - `frontend/src/pages/user/OrderHistoryPage.jsx` - Status filter pills, order cards with orderCode/statusBadge/items/total/fulfillmentType, link to detail
   - `frontend/src/pages/user/OrderTrackingPage.jsx` - Timeline visualization with progress bar, 5 steps (pending→confirmed→preparing→delivering→done), trackingLogs history, shipper info, payment info

```text
    19→          </div>
    20→        )}
    21→      </div>
    22→      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${color}`}>

    24→      </div>
    25→    </div>
    26→  </div>
    27→);
    28→
    29→const AdminDashboardPage = () => {
    30→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    31→  const { items: foods } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    32→  const { items: bookings } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ limit: 100 }));
    36→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    37→  }, [dispatch]);
    38→
    39→  const pendingCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'pending').length;
    40→  const confirmedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed').length;
    41→  const completedCount = bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'done').length;
    42→  const availableFoods = foods.filter((f) => f.isAvailable).length;
    43→
    44→  return (
    45→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    46→      {/* Header */}
    47→      <div className="mb-8">
    48→        <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Tổng quan</h1>
    49→        <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Chào mừng bạn quay trở lại trang quản trị</p>
    50→      </div>
    51→
    52→      {/* Stats */}
    53→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8">
    54→        <StatCard
    55→          icon={UtensilsCrossed}
    56→          label="Tổng món ăn"
    57→          value={foods.length}
    58→          color="bg-primary-500"
    59→          trend={`${availableFoods} đang bán`}
    60→        />
    61→        <StatCard
    62→          icon={ClipboardList}
    63→          label="Tổng booking"
    64→          value={bookings.length}
    65→          color="bg-blue-500"
    66→        />
    67→        <StatCard
    68→          icon={Clock}
    69→          label="Chờ xác nhận"
    70→          value={pendingCount}
    71→          color="bg-amber-500"
    72→          trend={pendingCount > 0 ? 'Cần xử lý' : 'Không có'}
    73→        />
    74→        <StatCard
    75→          icon={CheckCircle}
    76→          label="Hoàn thành"
    77→          value={completedCount}
    78→          color="bg-emerald-500"
    79→        />
    80→      </div>
    81→
    82→      {/* Recent bookings */}
    83→      <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
    84→        {/* Recent food */}
    85→        <div className="card p-6">
    86→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
    87→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Món ăn gần đây</h2>
    88→            <Link to="/admin/foods" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
    89→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
    90→            </Link>
    91→          </div>
    92→          <div className="space-y-3">
    93→            {foods.slice(0, 5).map((food) => (
    94→              <div key={food._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
    95→                <div className="flex-1">
    96→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{food.name}</div>
    97→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{food.category}</div>
    98→                </div>
    99→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   100→                  {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   101→                </div>
   102→                <span className={`badge ${food.isAvailable ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-danger'} text-[10px]`}>
   103→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Còn' : 'Hết'}
   104→                </span>
   105→              </div>
   106→            ))}
   107→            {foods.length === 0 && (
   108→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có món ăn nào</p>
   109→            )}
   110→          </div>
   111→        </div>
   112→
   113→        {/* Recent bookings */}
   114→        <div className="card p-6">
   115→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   116→            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Booking gần đây</h2>
   117→            <Link to="/admin/bookings" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
   118→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   119→            </Link>
   120→          </div>
   121→          <div className="space-y-3">
   122→            {bookings.slice(0, 5).map((booking) => (
   123→              <div key={booking._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   124→                <div className="flex-1">
   125→                  <div className="font-medium text-sm text-stone-800">{booking.customerName}</div>
   126→                  <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{booking.phone}</div>
   127→                </div>
   128→                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-600">
   129→                  {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   130→                </div>
   131→                <StatusBadgeInline status={booking.status} />
   132→              </div>
   133→            ))}
   134→            {bookings.length === 0 && (
   135→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-4">Chưa có booking nào</p>
   136→            )}
   137→          </div>
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    </div>
   141→  );
   142→};
   143→
   144→const StatusBadgeInline = ({ status }) => {
   145→  const config = {
   146→    pending: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
   147→    confirmed: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
   148→    done: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
   149→    cancelled: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
   150→  };
   151→  return (
   152→    <span className={`badge ${config[status] || config.pending} text-[10px]`}>
   153→      {status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Xong' : 'Hủy'}
   154→    </span>
   155→  );
   156→};
   157→
   158→export default AdminDashboardPage;
   159→
```

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchFoods, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     4→import FoodTable from '../../features/foods/FoodTable';
     5→import FoodFormModal from '../../features/foods/FoodFormModal';
     6→import ConfirmDialog from '../../components/ui/ConfirmDialog';
     7→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     8→import Pagination from '../../components/ui/Pagination';
     9→import { Plus, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
    10→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    11→import { PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    12→
    13→const AdminFoodsPage = () => {
    14→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    15→  const { items: foods, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
    17→  const [editingFood, setEditingFood] = useState(null);
    18→  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null);
    19→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    20→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    24→  }, [page, dispatch]);
    25→
    26→  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {
    27→    setPage(newPage);
    28→  };
    29→
    30→  const handleOpenForm = (food = null) => {
    31→    setEditingFood(food);
    32→    setShowForm(true);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleCloseForm = () => {
    36→    setShowForm(false);
    37→    setEditingFood(null);
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  const handleSubmit = async (data) => {
    41→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    42→    try {
    43→      if (editingFood) {
    44→        await dispatch(updateFood({ id: editingFood._id, data })).unwrap();
    45→        toast.success('Cập nhật món ăn thành công!');
    46→      } else {
    47→        await dispatch(createFood(data)).unwrap();
    48→        toast.success('Thêm món ăn mới thành công!');
    49→      }
    50→      handleCloseForm();
    51→      dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    52→    } catch (error) {
    53→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại!');
    54→    } finally {
    55→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    56→    }
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  const handleDelete = async () => {
    60→    if (!deleteTarget) return;
    61→    try {
    62→      await dispatch(deleteFood(deleteTarget._id)).unwrap();
    63→      toast.success(`Đã xóa món "${deleteTarget.name}"`);
    64→    } catch (error) {
    65→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Xóa thất bại!');
    66→    } finally {
    67→      setDeleteTarget(null);
    68→    }
    69→  };
    70→
    71→  return (
    72→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    73→      {/* Header */}
    74→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    75→        <div>
    76→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý món ăn</h1>
    77→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Thêm, sửa, xóa và theo dõi thực đơn</p>
    78→        </div>
    79→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    80→          <button
    81→            onClick={() => dispatch(fetchFoods({ page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }))}
    82→            className="btn-secondary"
    83→            title="Reload"
    84→          >
    85→            <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    86→          </button>
    87→          <button onClick={() => handleOpenForm()} className="btn-primary">
    88→            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
    89→            Thêm món ăn
    90→          </button>
    91→        </div>
    92→      </div>
    93→
    94→      {/* Table */}
    95→      {foods.length > 0 ? (
    96→        <>
    97→          <FoodTable
    98→            foods={foods}
    99→            onEdit={handleOpenForm}
   100→            onDelete={(food) => setDeleteTarget(food)}
   101→          />
   102→          <Pagination
   103→            currentPage={pagination.currentPage}
   104→            totalPages={pagination.totalPages}
   105→            onPageChange={handlePageChange}
   106→          />
   107→        </>
   108→      ) : (
   109→        <div className="card">
   110→          <EmptyState
   111→            icon={EmptyStateIcon}
   112→            title="Chưa có món ăn nào"
   113→            description="Bắt đầu bằng cách thêm món ăn đầu tiên vào thực đơn"
   114→            actionLabel="Thêm món ăn"
   115→            action={() => handleOpenForm()}
   116→          />
   117→        </div>
   118→      )}
   119→
   120→      {/* Form Modal */}
   121→      <FoodFormModal
   122→        isOpen={showForm}
   123→        onClose={handleCloseForm}
   124→        onSubmit={handleSubmit}
   125→        initialData={editingFood}
   126→        isLoading={isSubmitting}
   127→      />
   128→
   129→      {/* Delete confirmation */}
   130→      <ConfirmDialog
   131→        isOpen={!!deleteTarget}
   132→        title="Xóa món ăn?"
   133→        message={`Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món "${deleteTarget?.name}"? Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.`}
   134→        confirmLabel="Xóa"
   135→        danger
   136→        onConfirm={handleDelete}
   137→        onCancel={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
   138→      />
   139→    </div>
   140→  );
   141→};
   142→
   143→const EmptyStateIcon = () => (
   144→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   145→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M12 6v6m0 0v6m0-6h6m-6 0H6" />
   146→  </svg>
   147→);
   148→
   149→export default AdminFoodsPage;
   150→
```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { UtensilsCrossed, ClipboardList, TrendingUp, Users, ArrowRight, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { adminApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';

const StatCard = ({ icon: Icon, label, value, sub, color, trend }) => (
  <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="card p-6">
    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
      <div>
        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400">{label}</p>
        <p className="text-3xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mt-1">{value}</p>
        {sub && <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-1">{sub}</p>}
        {trend && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
            <TrendingUp className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-500" />
            <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 font-medium">{trend}</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${color}`}>
        <Icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </motion.div>
);

export default function AdminDashboardPage() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);
  const [recentOrders, setRecentOrders] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadData();
  }, []);

  const loadData = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const [overviewRes, ordersRes] = await Promise.all([
        adminApi.getOverview(),
        adminApi.getRecentOrders ? adminApi.getRecentOrders() : Promise.resolve({ data: { data: [] } }),
      ]);
      setStats(overviewRes.data.data);
      setRecentOrders(ordersRes.data.data?.orders || []);
    } catch {
      // fallback: load via orderApi
      try {
        const res = await adminApi.getStatsOverview();
        setStats(res.data.data);
      } catch {}
    } finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64">
        <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary-500" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  const s = stats || {};
  const todayOrders = s.todayStats || {};
  const monthOrders = s.monthStats || {};

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="mb-8">
          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tổng quan</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">Chào mừng bạn quay trở lại trang quản trị</p>
        </div>

        {/* Stats */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8">
          <StatCard icon={ClipboardList} label="Tổng đơn hàng" value={s.totalOrders || 0} sub={`Tháng này: ${monthOrders.totalOrders || 0}`} color="bg-primary-500" />
          <StatCard icon={TrendingUp} label="Doanh thu" value={formatCurrency(s.totalRevenue || 0)} sub={`Tháng này: ${formatCurrency(monthOrders.totalRevenue || 0)}`} color="bg-emerald-500" />
          <StatCard icon={UtensilsCrossed} label="Món ăn" value={s.totalFoods || 0} sub={`Đang bán: ${s.availableFoods || 0}`} color="bg-amber-500" />
          <StatCard icon={Users} label="Người dùng" value={s.totalUsers || 0} sub={`Khách hàng: ${s.totalCustomers || 0}`} color="bg-blue-500" />
        </div>

        {/* Today stats */}
        {todayOrders && (todayOrders.totalOrders > 0 || todayOrders.totalRevenue > 0) && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
            <div className="card p-4 text-center">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-primary-600">{todayOrders.totalOrders || 0}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 mt-1">Đơn hôm nay</p>
            </div>
            <div className="card p-4 text-center">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-600">{formatCurrency(todayOrders.totalRevenue || 0)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 mt-1">Doanh thu hôm nay</p>
            </div>
            <div className="card p-4 text-center">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-600">{todayOrders.pendingOrders || 0}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 mt-1">Chờ xử lý</p>
            </div>
            <div className="card p-4 text-center">
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{todayOrders.completedOrders || 0}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 mt-1">Hoàn thành hôm nay</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Recent orders */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-6 pb-4">
            <h2 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Đơn hàng gần đây</h2>
            <Link to="/admin/orders" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Link>
          </div>
          {recentOrders.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="admin-table">
                <thead>
                  <tr>
                    <th>Mã đơn</th>
                    <th>Khách hàng</th>
                    <th>Tổng tiền</th>
                    <th>Trạng thái</th>
                    <th>Ngày đặt</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {recentOrders.map((order) => (
                    <tr key={order._id}>
                      <td className="font-mono text-xs">{order.orderCode}</td>
                      <td>{order.customerInfo?.name || order.customer?.fullName || 'Khách'}</td>
                      <td className="font-semibold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</td>
                      <td>
                        <span className={`badge badge-sm ${getStatusClass(order.status)}`}>
                          {getStatusLabel(order.status)}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-12">Chưa có đơn hàng nào</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

const getStatusClass = (status) => ({
  pending: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
  confirmed: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
  preparing: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700',
  delivering: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700',
  done: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
  cancelled: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
}[status] || 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600');

const getStatusLabel = (status) => ({
  pending: 'Chờ xác nhận',
  confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận',
  preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị',
  delivering: 'Đang giao',
  done: 'Hoàn thành',
  cancelled: 'Đã hủy',
}[status] || status);

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Plus, RefreshCw, Edit2, Trash2, Copy, ToggleLeft, Search, Star } from 'lucide-react';
import { foodApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

const CATEGORIES = ['Món chính', 'Món phụ', 'Nước uống', 'Tráng miệng', 'Đồ ăn nhanh', 'Salad', 'Bánh', 'Cà phê', 'Sinh tố', 'Khác'];

export default function AdminFoodsPage() {
  const [foods, setFoods] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editFood, setEditFood] = useState(null);
  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('');
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ total: 0, page: 1, pages: 1 });

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

  useEffect(() => { loadFoods(); }, [search, categoryFilter]);

  const loadFoods = async (page = 1) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await foodApi.getAll({
        search: search || undefined,
        category: categoryFilter || undefined,
        page,
        limit: 20,
      });
      setFoods(res.data.data?.foods || res.data.data || []);
      const p = res.data.data?.pagination;
      if (p) setPagination(p);
    } catch { toast.error('Không thể tải danh sách món ăn'); }
    finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const openCreate = () => {
    setEditFood(null);
    reset({ name: '', category: CATEGORIES[0], price: '', originalPrice: '', discountPercent: 0, description: '', image: '', isAvailable: true, isFeatured: false, stock: 100, variants: [], toppings: [] });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const openEdit = (f) => {
    setEditFood(f);
    reset({
      name: f.name, category: f.category, price: f.price, originalPrice: f.originalPrice || '',
      discountPercent: f.discountPercent || 0, description: f.description || '', image: f.image || '',
      isAvailable: f.isAvailable, isFeatured: f.isFeatured, stock: f.stock || 100,
    });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const payload = {
        ...data,
        price: Number(data.price),
        originalPrice: data.originalPrice ? Number(data.originalPrice) : undefined,
        discountPercent: Number(data.discountPercent) || 0,
        stock: Number(data.stock) || 100,
      };
      if (editFood) {
        await foodApi.update(editFood._id, payload);
        toast.success('Cập nhật món ăn thành công');
      } else {
        await foodApi.create(payload);
        toast.success('Thêm món ăn thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      loadFoods();
    } catch (err) { toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại'); }
    finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  const handleToggle = async (food) => {
    try {
      const res = await foodApi.toggleAvailability(food._id);
      setFoods((prev) => prev.map((f) => f._id === food._id ? res.data.data : f));
      toast.success(res.data.data.isAvailable ? 'Đã bật bán' : 'Đã tạm dừng');
    } catch { toast.error('Thất bại'); }
  };

  const handleDuplicate = async (food) => {
    try {
      const res = await foodApi.duplicate(food._id);
      toast.success('Đã tạo bản sao');
      loadFoods();
    } catch { toast.error('Sao chép thất bại'); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!deleteTarget) return;
    try {
      await foodApi.delete(deleteTarget._id);
      setFoods((prev) => prev.filter((f) => f._id !== deleteTarget._id));
      toast.success('Xóa món ăn thành công');
    } catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
    setDeleteTarget(null);
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý món ăn</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{foods.length} món</p>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => loadFoods()} leftIcon={<RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />} />
            <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Thêm món</Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Filters */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] max-w-sm">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Tìm tên món..."
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
              className="input-field pl-10"
            />
          </div>
          <select
            className="input-field max-w-[200px]"
            value={categoryFilter}
            onChange={(e) => setCategoryFilter(e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="">Tất cả loại</option>
            {CATEGORIES.map((c) => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Món ăn</th>
                <th>Loại</th>
                <th>Giá</th>
                <th>Đã bán</th>
                <th>Đánh giá</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={7} />)
              ) : foods.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Không có món ăn nào</td></tr>
              ) : foods.map((food) => (
                <tr key={food._id}>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <img
                        src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=48&h=48&fit=crop'}
                        alt={food.name}
                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
                      />
                      <div>
                        <div className="font-medium text-sm">{food.name}</div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{food.slug}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td><Badge variant="gray">{food.category}</Badge></td>
                  <td>
                    <div className="text-sm">
                      <span className="font-semibold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
                      {food.originalPrice && food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                        <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through ml-1">{formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm text-stone-500">{food.soldCount || 0}</td>
                  <td>
                    {food.ratingAverage > 0 && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm">
                        <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-amber-400" />
                        <span className="font-medium">{Number(food.ratingAverage).toFixed(1)}</span>
                        <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">({food.ratingCount || 0})</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={food.isAvailable ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>
                      {food.isAvailable ? 'Đang bán' : 'Tạm dừng'}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                      <button onClick={() => openEdit(food)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleDuplicate(food)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-blue-600 rounded-lg"><Copy className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleToggle(food)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-emerald-600 rounded-lg"><ToggleLeft className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => setDeleteTarget(food)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {pagination.pages > 1 && (
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mt-6">
            {Array.from({ length: pagination.pages }).map((_, i) => (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => loadFoods(i + 1)} className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg text-sm ${pagination.page === i + 1 ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white' : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600'}`}>
                {i + 1}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </motion.div>

      {/* Food Form Modal */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editFood ? 'Sửa món ăn' : 'Thêm món ăn mới'} size="lg">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Tên món ăn" placeholder="VD: Gà rang gừng" {...register('name')} />
            <div>
              <label className="input-label">Loại</label>
              <select className="input-field" {...register('category')}>
                {CATEGORIES.map((c) => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giá bán (VNĐ)" type="number" {...register('price')} />
            <Input label="Giá gốc (VNĐ)" type="number" placeholder="Để trống nếu không giảm" {...register('originalPrice')} />
            <Input label="% Giảm giá" type="number" placeholder="0" {...register('discountPercent')} />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Link ảnh" placeholder="https://..." {...register('image')} />
            <Input label="Tồn kho" type="number" {...register('stock')} />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="input-label">Mô tả</label>
            <textarea className="input-field min-h-[80px]" placeholder="Mô tả món ăn..." {...register('description')} />
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-6">
            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
              <input type="checkbox" className="accent-primary-500 w-4 h-4" {...register('isAvailable')} defaultChecked />
              <span className="text-sm">Đang bán</span>
            </label>
            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
              <input type="checkbox" className="accent-primary-500 w-4 h-4" {...register('isFeatured')} />
              <span className="text-sm">Nổi bật</span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editFood ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Thêm'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>

      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
      <Modal isOpen={!!deleteTarget} onClose={() => setDeleteTarget(null)} title="Xóa món ăn?" size="sm">
        <div className="p-6">
          <p className="text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-6">Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món <strong>"{deleteTarget?.name}"</strong>? Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.</p>
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeleteTarget(null)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button variant="danger" onClick={handleDelete} className="flex-1">Xóa</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Users, Search, ShieldCheck, Truck, User, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { adminApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function AdminUsersPage() {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [roleFilter, setRoleFilter] = useState('');
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ total: 0, page: 1, pages: 1 });

  useEffect(() => { loadUsers(); }, [search, roleFilter]);

  const loadUsers = async (page = 1) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await adminApi.getUsers({
        search: search || undefined,
        role: roleFilter || undefined,
        page, limit: 20,
      });
      setUsers(res.data.data?.users || []);
      const p = res.data.data?.pagination;
      if (p) setPagination(p);
    } catch { toast.error('Không thể tải danh sách người dùng'); }
    finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const handleToggleStatus = async (userId) => {
    try {
      const res = await adminApi.toggleUserStatus(userId);
      setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => u._id === userId ? res.data.data : u));
      toast.success(res.data.message);
    } catch {
      toast.error('Thao tác thất bại');
    }
  };

  const roleVariant = (role) => ({ admin: 'danger', shipper: 'secondary', customer: 'info' }[role] || 'gray');
  const roleIcon = (role) => {
    const icons = { admin: <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4" />, shipper: <Truck className="w-4 h-4" /> };
    return icons[role] || <User className="w-4 h-4" />;
  };
  const roleLabel = (role) => ({ admin: 'Admin', shipper: 'Shipper', customer: 'Khách hàng' }[role] || role);

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý người dùng</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{pagination.total || users.length} người dùng</p>
        </div>

        {/* Filters */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-md">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Tìm tên, email, SĐT..."
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
              className="input-field pl-10"
            />
          </div>
          {['all', 'customer', 'shipper', 'admin'].map((r) => (
            <button
              key={r}
              onClick={() => setRoleFilter(r === 'all' ? '' : r)}
              className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                (!roleFilter && r === 'all') || roleFilter === r
                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
              }`}
            >
              {r === 'all' ? 'Tất cả' : r === 'customer' ? 'Khách hàng' : r === 'shipper' ? 'Shipper' : 'Admin'}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Người dùng</th>
                <th>Email</th>
                <th>SĐT</th>
                <th>Vai trò</th>
                <th>Ngày tạo</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={7} />)
              ) : users.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Không có người dùng nào</td></tr>
              ) : users.map((user) => (
                <tr key={user._id}>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-sm">
                        {user.fullName?.[0] || 'U'}
                      </div>
                      <span className="font-medium text-sm">{user.fullName}</span>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{user.email}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{user.phone || '-'}</td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={roleVariant(user.role)}>
                      {roleIcon(user.role)} {roleLabel(user.role)}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(user.createdAt)}</td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={user.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>
                      {user.isActive ? 'Hoạt động' : 'Đã khóa'}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <Button
                      size="sm"
                      variant={user.isActive ? 'danger' : 'success'}
                      onClick={() => handleToggleStatus(user._id)}
                    >
                      {user.isActive ? 'Khóa' : 'Mở khóa'}
                    </Button>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {pagination.pages > 1 && (
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mt-6">
            {Array.from({ length: pagination.pages }).map((_, i) => (
              <button
                key={i}
                onClick={() => loadUsers(i + 1)}
                className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg text-sm ${pagination.page === i + 1 ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white' : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600'}`}
              >
                {i + 1}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Tag, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, ToggleLeft, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { couponApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';

export default function AdminPromosPage() {
  const [coupons, setCoupons] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editCoupon, setEditCoupon] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

  useEffect(() => { loadCoupons(); }, []);

  const loadCoupons = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await couponApi.getAll();
      setCoupons(res.data.data || []);
    } catch { toast.error('Không thể tải danh sách coupon'); }
    finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const openCreate = () => {
    setEditCoupon(null);
    reset({ code: '', type: 'fixed', value: '', minOrder: 0, maxDiscount: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', usageLimit: '', totalLimit: '', description: '', isActive: true });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const openEdit = (c) => {
    setEditCoupon(c);
    reset({
      code: c.code, type: c.type, value: c.value,
      minOrder: c.minOrder, maxDiscount: c.maxDiscount || '',
      startDate: c.startDate ? c.startDate.split('T')[0] : '',
      endDate: c.endDate ? c.endDate.split('T')[0] : '',
      usageLimit: c.usageLimit || '', totalLimit: c.totalLimit || '',
      description: c.description || '', isActive: c.isActive,
    });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      if (editCoupon) {
        await couponApi.update(editCoupon._id, data);
        toast.success('Cập nhật coupon thành công');
      } else {
        await couponApi.create(data);
        toast.success('Tạo coupon thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      loadCoupons();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại');
    } finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  const handleToggle = async (id) => {
    try {
      await couponApi.toggle(id);
      setCoupons((prev) => prev.map((c) => c._id === id ? { ...c, isActive: !c.isActive } : c));
      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái');
    } catch { toast.error('Thất bại'); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    try {
      await couponApi.delete(id);
      setCoupons((prev) => prev.filter((c) => c._id !== id));
      toast.success('Xóa coupon thành công');
    } catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Mã giảm giá</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{coupons.length} coupon</p>
          </div>
          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Tạo coupon</Button>
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Mã</th>
                <th>Mô tả</th>
                <th>Loại / Giá trị</th>
                <th>Đơn tối thiểu</th>
                <th>Đã dùng</th>
                <th>Hết hạn</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={8} />)
              ) : coupons.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Chưa có coupon nào</td></tr>
              ) : coupons.map((c) => (
                <tr key={c._id}>
                  <td>
                    <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-lg font-mono">
                      {c.code}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm max-w-[200px] truncate">{c.description || '-'}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">
                    {c.type === 'percent' ? `Giảm ${c.value}%` : `Giảm ${c.value?.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ`}
                    {c.maxDiscount ? ` (max ${c.maxDiscount?.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ)` : ''}
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{c.minOrder > 0 ? `${c.minOrder?.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ` : '-'}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{c.usedCount}{c.totalLimit ? `/${c.totalLimit}` : ''}</td>
                  <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(c.endDate)}</td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={c.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>
                      {c.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                      <button onClick={() => openEdit(c)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleToggle(c._id)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-emerald-600 rounded-lg"><ToggleLeft className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleDelete(c._id)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Coupon Form Modal */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editCoupon ? 'Sửa coupon' : 'Tạo coupon mới'} size="md">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Mã coupon" placeholder="WELCOME50" {...register('code')} />
            <div>
              <label className="input-label">Loại</label>
              <select className="input-field" {...register('type')}>
                <option value="fixed">Giảm tiền</option>
                <option value="percent">Giảm %</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giá trị giảm" type="number" {...register('value')} />
            <Input label="Đơn tối thiểu (VNĐ)" type="number" {...register('minOrder')} />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Giảm tối đa (VNĐ)" type="number" placeholder="Cho loại %" {...register('maxDiscount')} />
            <Input label="Giới hạn sử dụng" type="number" placeholder="Không giới hạn" {...register('totalLimit')} />
          </div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <Input label="Ngày bắt đầu" type="date" {...register('startDate')} />
            <Input label="Ngày kết thúc" type="date" {...register('endDate')} />
          </div>
          <Input label="Mô tả" placeholder="Chi tiết coupon..." {...register('description')} />
          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editCoupon ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Tạo'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

```
