```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { MapPin, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, Clock, Phone, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { branchApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
import Modal from '../../components/ui/Modal';
import Input from '../../components/ui/Input';
import { SkeletonTableRow } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function AdminBranchesPage() {
  const [branches, setBranches] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editBranch, setEditBranch] = useState(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

  useEffect(() => { loadBranches(); }, []);

  const loadBranches = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await branchApi.getAllAdmin();
      setBranches(res.data.data || []);
    } catch { toast.error('Không thể tải danh sách chi nhánh'); }
    finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const openCreate = () => {
    setEditBranch(null);
    reset({ name: '', address: '', phone: '', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: true });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const openEdit = (b) => {
    setEditBranch(b);
    reset({ name: b.name, address: b.address, phone: b.phone || '', openHours: b.openHours || '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: b.isActive });
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      if (editBranch) {
        await branchApi.update(editBranch._id, data);
        toast.success('Cập nhật chi nhánh thành công');
      } else {
        await branchApi.create(data);
        toast.success('Tạo chi nhánh thành công');
      }
      setIsModalOpen(false);
      loadBranches();
    } catch (err) { toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại'); }
    finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    try {
      await branchApi.delete(id);
      setBranches((prev) => prev.filter((b) => b._id !== id));
      toast.success('Xóa thành công');
    } catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Quản lý chi nhánh</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{branches.length} chi nhánh</p>
          </div>
          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Thêm chi nhánh</Button>
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          <table className="admin-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Tên chi nhánh</th>
                <th>Địa chỉ</th>
                <th>SĐT</th>
                <th>Giờ mở cửa</th>
                <th>Trạng thái</th>
                <th>Thao tác</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={6} />)
              ) : branches.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={6} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Chưa có chi nhánh nào</td></tr>
              ) : branches.map((b) => (
                <tr key={b._id}>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                        <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
                      </div>
                      <span className="font-medium">{b.name}</span>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-sm max-w-[250px] truncate">{b.address}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{b.phone || '-'}</td>
                  <td className="text-sm">{b.openHours || '-'}</td>
                  <td>
                    <Badge variant={b.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>
                      {b.isActive ? 'Hoạt động' : 'Tạm đóng'}
                    </Badge>
                  </td>
                  <td>
                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                      <button onClick={() => openEdit(b)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 rounded-lg"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleDelete(b._id)} className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-600 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Branch Form Modal */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} title={editBranch ? 'Sửa chi nhánh' : 'Thêm chi nhánh'} size="md">
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="p-6 space-y-4">
          <Input label="Tên chi nhánh" placeholder="VD: Nhà Hàng Việt - Quận 1" {...register('name')} />
          <Input label="Địa chỉ" placeholder="VD: 123 Nguyễn Huệ, Quận 1, TP.HCM" {...register('address')} />
          <Input label="Số điện thoại" placeholder="02812345678" {...register('phone')} />
          <Input label="Giờ mở cửa" placeholder="08:00 - 22:00" {...register('openHours')} />
          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1">Hủy</Button>
            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="flex-1">{editBranch ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Tạo'}</Button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { fetchFoodById, clearCurrentFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
     5→import { addToCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     6→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     7→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
     8→import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react';

    10→
    11→const FoodDetailPage = () => {

    13→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    14→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    15→  const { currentFood: food, loading, error } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    16→
    17→  useEffect(() => {
    18→    dispatch(fetchFoodById(id));
    19→    return () => dispatch(clearCurrentFood());
    20→  }, [id, dispatch]);
    21→

    73→                alt={food.name}
    74→                className="w-full h-full object-cover"
    75→                onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    76→              />
    77→              {/* Availability overlay */}
    78→              <div className="absolute top-4 left-4">
    79→                {food.isAvailable ? (
    80→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/30">
    81→                    <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    82→                    Còn món
    83→                  </span>
    84→                ) : (
    85→                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-lg shadow-red-500/30">
    86→                    <XCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    87→                    Hết món
    88→                  </span>
    89→                )}
    90→              </div>
    91→            </div>
    92→
    93→            {/* Info */}
    94→            <div className="p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-center">
    95→              {/* Category */}
    96→              <span className="badge-primary mb-4 w-fit">{food.category}</span>
    97→
    98→              {/* Name */}
    99→              <h1 className="font-display text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4">
   100→                {food.name}
   101→              </h1>
   102→
   103→              {/* Price */}
   104→              <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-primary-600 mb-6">
   105→                {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   106→              </div>
   107→
   108→              {/* Description */}
   109→              {food.description && (
   110→                <div className="mb-6">
   111→                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Mô tả</h3>
   112→                  <p className="text-stone-600 leading-relaxed">{food.description}</p>
   113→                </div>
   114→              )}
   115→
   116→              {/* Divider */}
   117→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 my-6" />
   118→
   119→              {/* Actions */}
   120→              <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
   121→                <button
   122→                  onClick={handleAddToCart}
   123→                  disabled={!food.isAvailable}
   124→                  className="btn-primary flex-1 py-3 text-base"
   125→                >
   126→                  <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5" />
   127→                  {food.isAvailable ? 'Đặt món ngay' : 'Món tạm hết'}
   128→                </button>
   129→                <Link
   130→                  to="/cart"
   131→                  className="btn-outline flex-1 py-3 text-base justify-center"
   132→                >
   133→                  Xem giỏ hàng
   134→                </Link>
   135→              </div>
   136→            </div>
   137→          </div>
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    </div>
   141→  );
   142→};
   143→
   144→export default FoodDetailPage;
   145→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    10→const CartPage = () => {

    12→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);

    16→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    17→    return (
    18→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
    19→        <EmptyState
    20→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    21→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    22→          description="Hãy chọn món ăn yêu thích và thêm vào giỏ hàng nhé!"
    23→          actionLabel="Khám phá thực đơn"
    24→          action={() => window.location.href = '/'}
    25→        />
    26→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary mt-6">
    27→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    28→        </Link>
    29→      </div>
    30→    );
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    35→      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    36→        {/* Header */}
    37→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
    38→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    39→            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
    40→              <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
    41→            </div>
    42→            <div>
    43→              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Giỏ hàng</h1>
    44→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{cartItems.length} món trong giỏ</p>
    45→            </div>
    46→          </div>
    47→          <button
    48→            onClick={() => setShowClearDialog(true)}
    49→            className="btn-ghost text-sm text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50"
    50→          >
    51→            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    52→            Xóa tất cả
    53→          </button>
    54→        </div>
    55→
    56→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
    57→          {/* Cart items */}
    58→          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-4">
    59→            {cartItems.map((item, idx) => {
    60→              const imageUrl = item.image
    61→                ? item.image.startsWith('http')
    62→                  ? item.image
    63→                  : `${UPLOAD_URL}${item.image}`
    64→                : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
    65→
    66→              return (
    67→                <div
    68→                  key={item._id}
    69→                  className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4 animate-slide-up"
    70→                  style={{ animationDelay: `${idx * 50}ms` }}
    71→                >
    72→                  {/* Image */}
    73→                  <img
    74→                    src={imageUrl}
    75→                    alt={item.name}
    76→                    className="w-20 h-20 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
    77→                    onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
    78→                  />
    79→
    80→                  {/* Info */}
    81→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
    82→                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 truncate">{item.name}</h3>
    83→                    <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{item.category}</span>

    86→                    </div>
    87→                  </div>
    88→
    89→                  {/* Subtotal */}
    90→                  <div className="text-right flex-shrink-0">
    91→                    <div className="font-bold text-primary-600">
    92→                      {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
    93→                    </div>
    94→                  </div>
    95→
    96→                  {/* Quantity controls */}
    97→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-stone-100 rounded-xl p-1">
    98→                    <button
    99→                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ id: item._id, quantity: item.quantity - 1 }))}
   100→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200"
   101→                    >
   102→                      <Minus className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-600" />
   103→                    </button>
   104→                    <span className="w-8 text-center font-semibold text-sm text-stone-900">{item.quantity}</span>
   105→                    <button
   106→                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ id: item._id, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }))}
   107→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200"
   108→                    >
   109→                      <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-600" />
   110→                    </button>
   111→                  </div>
   112→
   113→                  {/* Remove */}
   114→                  <button
   115→                    onClick={() => dispatch(removeFromCart(item._id))}
   116→                    className="p-2 text-stone-300 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
   117→                  >
   118→                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   119→                  </button>
   120→                </div>
   121→              );
   122→            })}
   123→          </div>
   124→
   125→          {/* Summary */}
   126→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   127→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   128→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-5">
   129→                <Receipt className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600" />
   130→                <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900">Tổng cộng</h3>
   131→              </div>
   132→
   133→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5">
   134→                {cartItems.map((item) => (
   135→                  <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   136→                    <span className="text-stone-500 truncate flex-1">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   137→                    <span className="text-stone-700 font-medium ml-2">
   138→                      {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   139→                    </span>
   140→                  </div>
   141→                ))}
   142→              </div>
   143→
   144→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4 mb-5">
   145→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   146→                  <span className="font-medium text-stone-700">Tạm tính</span>
   147→                  <span className="font-bold text-lg text-primary-600">
   148→                    {formatCurrency(cartTotal)}
   149→                  </span>
   150→                </div>

   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              <Link to="/checkout" className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center">
   155→                Xác nhận đặt món
   156→              </Link>
   157→              <Link to="/" className="btn-ghost w-full mt-2 justify-center text-sm">
   158→                <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Tiếp tục chọn món
   159→              </Link>
   160→            </div>
   161→          </div>
   162→        </div>
   163→      </div>
   164→
   165→      <ConfirmDialog

   167→        title="Xóa giỏ hàng?"
   168→        message="Tất cả các món trong giỏ hàng sẽ bị xóa. Bạn có chắc chắn không?"
   169→        confirmLabel="Xóa tất cả"
   170→        danger
   171→        onConfirm={() => {

   174→        }}

   181→export default CartPage;
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\user\CheckoutPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
     2→import { yupResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/yup';
     3→import * as yup from 'yup';
     4→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     5→import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     6→import { useState } from 'react';
     7→import { selectCartItems, selectCartTotal, clearCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
     8→import { createBooking } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     9→import { formatCurrency, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
    10→import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, User, Phone, MapPin, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
    11→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    12→import LoadingSpinner from '../../components/ui/LoadingSpinner';
    13→
    14→const schema = yup.object({
    15→  customerName: yup
    16→    .string()
    17→    .required('Tên khách hàng không được để trống')
    18→    .min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),
    19→  phone: yup
    20→    .string()
    21→    .required('Số điện thoại không được để trống')
    22→    .matches(/^(0[0-9]{9})$/, 'Số điện thoại phải gồm 10 số và bắt đầu bằng 0'),
    23→  address: yup
    24→    .string()
    25→    .required('Địa chỉ không được để trống')
    26→    .min(5, 'Địa chỉ phải có ít nhất 5 ký tự'),
    27→  note: yup.string().default(''),
    28→});
    29→
    30→const CheckoutPage = () => {
    31→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    32→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    33→  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
    34→  const cartTotal = useSelector(selectCartTotal);
    35→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    36→
    37→  const {
    38→    register,
    39→    handleSubmit,
    40→    formState: { errors },
    41→  } = useForm({
    42→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),
    43→    defaultValues: { customerName: '', phone: '', address: '', note: '' },
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    47→    return (
    48→      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
    49→        <EmptyState
    50→          icon={ShoppingBag}
    51→          title="Giỏ hàng trống"
    52→          description="Bạn chưa có món nào trong giỏ hàng."
    53→        />
    54→        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
    55→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
    56→        </Link>
    57→      </div>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    62→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    63→    try {
    64→      const bookingData = {
    65→        customerName: data.customerName,
    66→        phone: data.phone,
    67→        address: data.address,
    68→        note: data.note || '',
    69→        items: cartItems.map((item) => ({
    70→          foodId: item._id,
    71→          foodName: item.name,
    72→          quantity: item.quantity,
    73→          price: item.price,
    74→          image: item.image || '',
    75→        })),
    76→        total: cartTotal,
    77→      };
    78→
    79→      await dispatch(createBooking(bookingData)).unwrap();
    80→
    81→      toast.success('Đặt món thành công!', {
    82→        description: 'Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ bạn sớm nhất.',
    83→        icon: <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />,
    84→      });
    85→
    86→      dispatch(clearCart());
    87→      navigate('/');
    88→    } catch (error) {
    89→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Đặt món thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại!');
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setIsSubmitting(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  return (
    96→    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
    97→      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    98→        {/* Header */}
    99→        <Link
   100→          to="/cart"
   101→          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
   102→        >
   103→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   104→          Quay về giỏ hàng
   105→        </Link>
   106→
   107→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
   108→          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
   109→            <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600" />
   110→          </div>
   111→          <div>
   112→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900">Xác nhận đặt món</h1>
   113→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Vui lòng điền thông tin để hoàn tất đơn hàng</p>
   114→          </div>
   115→        </div>
   116→
   117→        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   118→          {/* Form */}
   119→          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
   120→            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="card p-6 space-y-5">
   121→              {/* Customer name */}
   122→              <div>
   123→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   124→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   125→                  Tên khách hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   126→                </label>
   127→                <input
   128→                  {...register('customerName')}
   129→                  className="input-field"
   130→                  placeholder="VD: Nguyễn Văn A"
   131→                />
   132→                {errors.customerName && (
   133→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.customerName.message}</p>
   134→                )}
   135→              </div>
   136→
   137→              {/* Phone */}
   138→              <div>
   139→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   140→                  <Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   141→                  Số điện thoại <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   142→                </label>
   143→                <input
   144→                  {...register('phone')}
   145→                  type="tel"
   146→                  className="input-field"
   147→                  placeholder="VD: 0987654321"
   148→                />
   149→                {errors.phone && (
   150→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.phone.message}</p>
   151→                )}
   152→              </div>
   153→
   154→              {/* Address */}
   155→              <div>
   156→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   157→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   158→                  Địa chỉ giao hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
   159→                </label>
   160→                <input
   161→                  {...register('address')}
   162→                  className="input-field"
   163→                  placeholder="VD: Số 123, Đường ABC, Quận 1, TP.HCM"
   164→                />
   165→                {errors.address && (
   166→                  <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.address.message}</p>
   167→                )}
   168→              </div>
   169→
   170→              {/* Note */}
   171→              <div>
   172→                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5">
   173→                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" />
   174→                  Ghi chú (tùy chọn)
   175→                </label>
   176→                <textarea
   177→                  {...register('note')}
   178→                  rows={3}
   179→                  className="input-field resize-none"
   180→                  placeholder="VD: Giao giờ hành chính, ít đá..."
   181→                />
   182→              </div>
   183→
   184→              {/* Order summary preview */}
   185→              <div className="bg-stone-50 rounded-xl p-4">
   186→                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-600 mb-3">Món đã chọn ({cartItems.length})</h4>
   187→                <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
   188→                  {cartItems.map((item) => (
   189→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   190→                      <span className="text-stone-600">{item.name} × {item.quantity}</span>
   191→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-800">
   192→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   193→                      </span>
   194→                    </div>
   195→                  ))}
   196→                </div>
   197→              </div>
   198→
   199→              {/* Submit */}
   200→              <button
   201→                type="submit"
   202→                disabled={isSubmitting}
   203→                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center"
   204→              >
   205→                {isSubmitting ? (
   206→                  <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
   207→                ) : (
   208→                  <>
   209→                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
   210→                    Xác nhận đặt món
   211→                  </>
   212→                )}
   213→              </button>
   214→            </form>
   215→          </div>
   216→
   217→          {/* Summary */}
   218→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   219→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24">
   220→              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 mb-5">
   221→                Tóm tắt đơn hàng
   222→              </h3>
   223→
   224→              {/* Items preview */}
   225→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-5 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
   226→                {cartItems.map((item) => {
   227→                  const imageUrl = item.image
   228→                    ? item.image.startsWith('http')
   229→                      ? item.image
   230→                      : `${UPLOAD_URL}${item.image}`
   231→                    : PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
   232→
   233→                  return (
   234→                    <div key={item._id} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   235→                      <img
   236→                        src={imageUrl}
   237→                        alt={item.name}
   238→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   239→                        onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
   240→                      />
   241→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   242→                        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-800 truncate">{item.name}</div>
   243→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">× {item.quantity}</div>
   244→                      </div>
   245→                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700">
   246→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   247→                      </div>
   248→                    </div>
   249→                  );
   250→                })}
   251→              </div>
   252→
   253→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4">
   254→                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   255→                  <span className="text-stone-600">Tổng cộng</span>
   256→                  <span className="text-xl font-bold text-primary-600">
   257→                    {formatCurrency(cartTotal)}
   258→                  </span>
   259→                </div>
   260→              </div>
   261→            </div>
   262→          </div>
   263→        </div>
   264→      </div>
   265→    </div>
   266→  );
   267→};
   268→
   269→export default CheckoutPage;
   270→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     3→import { fetchBookings, updateBookingStatus, setStatusFilter } from '../../slices/bookingsSlice';
     4→import BookingActions from '../../features/bookings/BookingActions';
     5→import EmptyState from '../../components/ui/EmptyState';
     6→import StatusBadge from '../../components/ui/StatusBadge';
     7→import { RefreshCw, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
     8→import { formatCurrency, BOOKING_STATUSES, PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, UPLOAD_URL } from '../../constants';
     9→import { toast } from 'sonner';
    10→
    11→const AdminBookingsPage = () => {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items: bookings, loading, statusFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.bookings);
    14→
    15→  useEffect(() => {
    16→    dispatch(fetchBookings({}));
    17→  }, [dispatch]);
    18→
    19→  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id, newStatus) => {
    20→    try {
    21→      await dispatch(updateBookingStatus({ id, status: newStatus })).unwrap();
    22→      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!');
    23→    } catch (error) {
    24→      toast.error(error?.message || 'Cập nhật thất bại!');
    25→    }
    26→  };
    27→
    28→  const filteredBookings =
    29→    statusFilter === 'Tất cả'
    30→      ? bookings
    31→      : bookings.filter((b) => b.status === statusFilter);
    32→
    33→  const formatDate = (dateStr) => {
    34→    return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('vi-VN', {
    35→      day: '2-digit',
    36→      month: '2-digit',
    37→      year: 'numeric',
    38→      hour: '2-digit',
    39→      minute: '2-digit',
    40→    });
    41→  };
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <div className="animate-fade-in">
    45→      {/* Header */}
    46→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    47→        <div>
    48→          <h1 className="font-display text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900">Quản lý booking</h1>
    49→          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">
    50→            {filteredBookings.length} booking
    51→            {statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' && ` (${statusFilter})`}
    52→          </p>
    53→        </div>
    54→        <button
    55→          onClick={() => dispatch(fetchBookings({}))}
    56→          className="btn-secondary"
    57→          title="Reload"
    58→        >
    59→          <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
    60→        </button>
    61→      </div>
    62→
    63→      {/* Status filter */}
    64→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6 flex-wrap">
    65→        <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mr-1" />
    66→        {BOOKING_STATUSES.map((status) => (
    67→          <button
    68→            key={status}
    69→            onClick={() => dispatch(setStatusFilter(status))}
    70→            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    71→              statusFilter === status
    72→                ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-sm'
    73→                : 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200'
    74→            }`}
    75→          >
    76→            {status === 'Tất cả' ? 'Tất cả' : status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' : status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' : status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
    77→          </button>
    78→        ))}
    79→      </div>
    80→
    81→      {/* Table */}
    82→      {filteredBookings.length > 0 ? (
    83→        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
    84→          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
    85→            <table className="admin-table">
    86→              <thead>
    87→                <tr>
    88→                  <th>Thời gian</th>
    89→                  <th>Khách hàng</th>
    90→                  <th>Liên hệ</th>
    91→                  <th>Món đã đặt</th>
    92→                  <th>Tổng tiền</th>
    93→                  <th>Trạng thái</th>
    94→                  <th className="text-right">Thao tác</th>
    95→                </tr>
    96→              </thead>
    97→              <tbody>
    98→                {filteredBookings.map((booking) => (
    99→                  <tr key={booking._id}>
   100→                    {/* Time */}
   101→                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
   102→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-500 font-medium">{formatDate(booking.createdAt)}</div>
   103→                    </td>
   104→
   105→                    {/* Customer */}
   106→                    <td>
   107→                      <div className="font-medium text-stone-900">{booking.customerName}</div>
   108→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 max-w-[150px] truncate">{booking.address}</div>
   109→                    </td>
   110→
   111→                    {/* Contact */}
   112→                    <td>
   113→                      <div className="text-sm text-stone-700">{booking.phone}</div>
   114→                      {booking.note && (
   115→                        <div className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-0.5 italic max-w-[120px] truncate">
   116→                          Ghi chú: {booking.note}
   117→                        </div>
   118→                      )}
   119→                    </td>
   120→
   121→                    {/* Items */}
   122→                    <td>
   123→                      <div className="space-y-1">
   124→                        {booking.items.slice(0, 3).map((item, idx) => (
   125→                          <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   126→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-600">{item.foodName}</span>
   127→                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">×{item.quantity}</span>
   128→                          </div>
   129→                        ))}
   130→                        {booking.items.length > 3 && (
   131→                          <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">+{booking.items.length - 3} món khác</div>
   132→                        )}
   133→                      </div>
   134→                    </td>
   135→
   136→                    {/* Total */}
   137→                    <td>
   138→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 whitespace-nowrap">
   139→                        {formatCurrency(booking.total)}
   140→                      </span>
   141→                    </td>
   142→
   143→                    {/* Status */}
   144→                    <td>
   145→                      <StatusBadge status={booking.status} size="sm" />
   146→                    </td>
   147→
   148→                    {/* Actions */}
   149→                    <td>
   150→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end">
   151→                        <BookingActions booking={booking} onUpdateStatus={handleUpdateStatus} />
   152→                      </div>
   153→                    </td>
   154→                  </tr>
   155→                ))}
   156→              </tbody>
   157→            </table>
   158→          </div>
   159→        </div>
   160→      ) : (
   161→        <div className="card">
   162→          <EmptyState
   163→            icon={EmptyBagIcon}
   164→            title={statusFilter !== 'Tất cả' ? 'Không có booking nào' : 'Chưa có booking nào'}
   165→            description={
   166→              statusFilter !== 'Tất cả'
   167→                ? 'Thử chọn bộ lọc khác để xem kết quả'
   168→                : 'Booking từ khách hàng sẽ xuất hiện tại đây'
   169→            }
   170→          />
   171→        </div>
   172→      )}
   173→    </div>
   174→  );
   175→};
   176→
   177→const EmptyBagIcon = () => (
   178→  <svg className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
   179→    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2" />
   180→  </svg>
   181→);
   182→
   183→export default AdminBookingsPage;
   184→
```

```text
     1→import { createBrowserRouter, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     2→import MainLayout from '../layouts/MainLayout';
     3→import AdminLayout from '../layouts/AdminLayout';
     4→import HomePage from '../pages/user/HomePage';
     5→import FoodDetailPage from '../pages/user/FoodDetailPage';
     6→import CartPage from '../pages/user/CartPage';
     7→import CheckoutPage from '../pages/user/CheckoutPage';
     8→import LoginPage from '../pages/user/LoginPage';
     9→import RegisterPage from '../pages/user/RegisterPage';
    10→import ProfilePage from '../pages/user/ProfilePage';
    11→import OrderHistoryPage from '../pages/user/OrderHistoryPage';
    12→import OrderTrackingPage from '../pages/user/OrderTrackingPage';
    13→import WishlistPage from '../pages/user/WishlistPage';
    14→import AdminDashboardPage from '../pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage';
    15→import AdminFoodsPage from '../pages/admin/AdminFoodsPage';
    16→import AdminOrdersPage from '../pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage';
    17→import AdminUsersPage from '../pages/admin/AdminUsersPage';
    18→import AdminPromosPage from '../pages/admin/AdminPromosPage';
    19→import AdminBranchesPage from '../pages/admin/AdminBranchesPage';
    20→import NotFoundPage from '../pages/user/NotFoundPage';
    21→
    22→// Protected Route component
    23→function ProtectedRoute({ children, allowedRoles }) {
    24→  const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
    25→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    26→
    27→  if (!token) {
    28→    return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  if (allowedRoles && user && !allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) {
    32→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  return children;
    36→}
    37→
    38→// Guest Route (redirect if logged in)
    39→function GuestRoute({ children }) {
    40→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    41→  if (token) {
    42→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    43→  }
    44→  return children;
    45→}
    46→
    47→const routes = [
    48→  // === PUBLIC ROUTES ===
    49→  {
    50→    path: '/',
    51→    element: <MainLayout />,
    52→    children: [
    53→      { index: true, element: <HomePage /> },
    54→      { path: 'foods/:id', element: <FoodDetailPage /> },
    55→      { path: 'cart', element: <CartPage /> },
    56→      { path: 'checkout', element: <CheckoutPage /> },
    57→
    58→      // Auth - Guest only
    59→      { path: 'login', element: <GuestRoute><LoginPage /></GuestRoute> },
    60→      { path: 'register', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterPage /></GuestRoute> },
    61→
    62→      // Auth - Protected
    63→      { path: 'profile', element: <ProtectedRoute><ProfilePage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    64→      { path: 'orders', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderHistoryPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    65→      { path: 'orders/:id', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderTrackingPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    66→      { path: 'wishlist', element: <ProtectedRoute><WishlistPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    67→
    68→      // 404
    69→      { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
    70→    ],
    71→  },
    72→
    73→  // === ADMIN ROUTES ===
    74→  {
    75→    path: '/admin',
    76→    element: (
    77→      <ProtectedRoute allowedRoles={['admin']}>
    78→        <AdminLayout />
    79→      </ProtectedRoute>
    80→    ),
    81→    children: [
    82→      { index: true, element: <AdminDashboardPage /> },
    83→      { path: 'foods', element: <AdminFoodsPage /> },
    84→      { path: 'orders', element: <AdminOrdersPage /> },
    85→      { path: 'users', element: <AdminUsersPage /> },
    86→      { path: 'promos', element: <AdminPromosPage /> },
    87→      { path: 'branches', element: <AdminBranchesPage /> },
    88→    ],
    89→  },
    90→
    91→  // 404
    92→  { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
    93→];
    94→
    95→const router = createBrowserRouter(routes);
    96→export default router;
    97→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\cartSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→
     3→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     4→  try {
     5→    const stored = localStorage.getItem('cart');
     6→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
     7→  } catch {
     8→    return [];
     9→  }
    10→};
    11→
    12→const saveCartToStorage = (items) => {
    13→  try {
    14→    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(items));
    15→  } catch {}
    16→};
    17→
    18→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    19→  name: 'cart',
    20→  initialState: {
    21→    items: loadCartFromStorage(),
    22→    coupon: null,
    23→    couponDiscount: 0,
    24→    fulfillmentType: 'delivery',
    25→    selectedBranch: null,
    26→  },
    27→  reducers: {
    28→    addToCart: (state, action) => {
    29→      const { food, quantity = 1, variant, toppings } = action.payload;
    30→      const key = variant || toppings?.length ? `${food._id}-${variant || ''}-${(toppings || []).map((t) => t.name).join(',')}` : food._id;
    31→
    32→      const existing = state.items.find((item) => item.key === key);
    33→      if (existing) {
    34→        existing.quantity += quantity;
    35→      } else {
    36→        state.items.push({
    37→          key,
    38→          _id: food._id,
    39→          name: food.name,
    40→          price: food.price,
    41→          originalPrice: food.originalPrice,
    42→          image: food.image,
    43→          category: food.category,
    44→          variant,
    45→          toppings: toppings || [],
    46→          quantity,
    47→        });
    48→      }
    49→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    50→    },
    51→    removeFromCart: (state, action) => {
    52→      state.items = state.items.filter((item) => item.key !== action.payload);
    53→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    54→    },
    55→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    56→      const { key, quantity } = action.payload;
    57→      const item = state.items.find((i) => i.key === key);
    58→      if (item) {
    59→        if (quantity <= 0) {
    60→          state.items = state.items.filter((i) => i.key !== key);
    61→        } else {
    62→          item.quantity = quantity;
    63→        }
    64→      }
    65→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    66→    },
    67→    clearCart: (state) => {
    68→      state.items = [];
    69→      state.coupon = null;
    70→      state.couponDiscount = 0;
    71→      saveCartToStorage([]);
    72→    },
    73→    setCoupon: (state, action) => {
    74→      state.coupon = action.payload.coupon;
    75→      state.couponDiscount = action.payload.discount;
    76→    },
    77→    removeCoupon: (state) => {
    78→      state.coupon = null;
    79→      state.couponDiscount = 0;
    80→    },
    81→    setFulfillmentType: (state, action) => {
    82→      state.fulfillmentType = action.payload;
    83→    },
    84→    setSelectedBranch: (state, action) => {
    85→      state.selectedBranch = action.payload;
    86→    },
    87→  },
    88→});
    89→
    90→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items;
    91→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    92→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    93→    const toppingPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((tSum, t) => tSum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    94→    return sum + (item.price + toppingPrice) * item.quantity;
    95→  }, 0);
    96→export const selectCartSubtotal = selectCartTotal;
    97→export const selectCartDiscount = (state) => state.cart.couponDiscount;
    98→export const selectCartDeliveryFee = (state) => {
    99→  if (state.cart.fulfillmentType !== 'delivery') return 0;
   100→  const subtotal = selectCartSubtotal(state);
   101→  return subtotal >= 100000 ? 0 : 15000;
   102→};
   103→export const selectCartGrandTotal = (state) =>
   104→  selectCartSubtotal(state) - selectCartDiscount(state) + selectCartDeliveryFee(state);
   105→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
   106→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
   107→export const selectCoupon = (state) => state.cart.coupon;
   108→export const selectFulfillmentType = (state) => state.cart.fulfillmentType;
   109→export const selectSelectedBranch = (state) => state.cart.selectedBranch;
   110→
   111→export const {
   112→  addToCart,
   113→  removeFromCart,
   114→  updateQuantity,
   115→  clearCart,
   116→  setCoupon,
   117→  removeCoupon,
   118→  setFulfillmentType,
   119→  setSelectedBranch,
   120→} = cartSlice.actions;
   121→
   122→export default cartSlice.reducer;
   123→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\foodsSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { foodApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Async thunks
     5→export const fetchFoods = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const response = await foodApi.getAll(params);
     8→    return response.data;
     9→  } catch (error) {
    10→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    11→  }
    12→});
    13→
    14→export const fetchFoodById = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchById', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    const response = await foodApi.getById(id);
    17→    return response.data;
    18→  } catch (error) {
    19→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    20→  }
    21→});
    22→
    23→export const createFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    24→  try {
    25→    const response = await foodApi.create(data);
    26→    return response.data;
    27→  } catch (error) {
    28→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    29→  }
    30→});
    31→
    32→export const updateFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/update', async ({ id, data }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    33→  try {
    34→    const response = await foodApi.update(id, data);
    35→    return response.data;
    36→  } catch (error) {
    37→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    38→  }
    39→});
    40→
    41→export const deleteFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/delete', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    42→  try {
    43→    const response = await foodApi.delete(id);
    44→    return { ...response.data, id };
    45→  } catch (error) {
    46→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    47→  }
    48→});
    49→
    50→const foodsSlice = createSlice({
    51→  name: 'foods',
    52→  initialState: {
    53→    items: [],
    54→    currentFood: null,
    55→    pagination: { currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1, totalItems: 0, limit: 8 },
    56→    loading: false,
    57→    error: null,
    58→    filters: { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' },
    59→  },
    60→  reducers: {
    61→    setFilters: (state, action) => {
    62→      state.filters = { ...state.filters, ...action.payload };
    63→    },
    64→    resetFilters: (state) => {
    65→      state.filters = { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' };
    66→    },
    67→    clearCurrentFood: (state) => {
    68→      state.currentFood = null;
    69→    },
    70→  },
    71→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    72→    // Fetch all
    73→    builder
    74→      .addCase(fetchFoods.pending, (state) => {
    75→        state.loading = true;
    76→        state.error = null;
    77→      })
    78→      .addCase(fetchFoods.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    79→        state.loading = false;
    80→        state.items = action.payload.data.foods;
    81→        state.pagination = action.payload.data.pagination;
    82→      })
    83→      .addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
    84→        state.loading = false;
    85→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    86→      });
    87→
    88→    // Fetch by ID
    89→    builder
    90→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.pending, (state) => {
    91→        state.loading = true;
    92→        state.error = null;
    93→      })
    94→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    95→        state.loading = false;
    96→        state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
    97→      })
    98→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    99→        state.loading = false;
   100→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
   101→      });
   102→
   103→    // Create
   104→    builder
   105→      .addCase(createFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   106→        state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
   107→      });
   108→
   109→    // Update
   110→    builder
   111→      .addCase(updateFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   112→        const idx = state.items.findIndex((f) => f._id === action.payload.data._id);
   113→        if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
   114→        if (state.currentFood?._id === action.payload.data._id) {
   115→          state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
   116→        }
   117→      });
   118→
   119→    // Delete
   120→    builder
   121→      .addCase(deleteFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   122→        state.items = state.items.filter((f) => f._id !== action.payload.id);
   123→      });
   124→  },
   125→});
   126→
   127→export const { setFilters, resetFilters, clearCurrentFood } = foodsSlice.actions;
   128→export default foodsSlice.reducer;
   129→
```
</details></tool-use>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { fetchFoodById, clearCurrentFood } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
import { addToCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, XCircle, Star, Minus, Plus, Heart } from 'lucide-react';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

const PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=600&h=600&fit=crop';

export default function FoodDetailPage() {
  const { id } = useParams();
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { currentFood: food, loading, error } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1);
  const [selectedToppings, setSelectedToppings] = useState([]);
  const wishlist = useSelector((state) => state.auth?.user?.wishlist || []);

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchFoodById(id));
    return () => dispatch(clearCurrentFood());
  }, [id, dispatch]);

  const handleAddToCart = () => {
    if (!food.isAvailable) return;
    dispatch(addToCart({ food, quantity, toppings: selectedToppings }));
    toast.success(
      <div>
        <p className="font-semibold">Đã thêm vào giỏ hàng</p>
        <p className="text-sm opacity-80">{quantity}x {food.name}</p>
      </div>,
      { icon: <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5" /> }
    );
    setQuantity(1);
    setSelectedToppings([]);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-primary-200 border-t-primary-600 rounded-full animate-spin" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error || !food) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
        <div className="text-6xl">😕</div>
        <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy món ăn</h2>
        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">
          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay về trang chủ
        </Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const imageUrl = food.image || PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE;
  const discount = food.originalPrice && food.originalPrice > food.price
    ? Math.round((1 - food.price / food.originalPrice) * 100)
    : 0;
  const isWishlisted = wishlist.includes(food._id);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <Link
          to="/"
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-400 dark:hover:text-stone-200 mb-6 transition-colors"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
          Quay về thực đơn
        </Link>

        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8"
        >
          {/* Image */}
          <div className="relative">
            <div className="aspect-square rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl">
              <img
                src={imageUrl}
                alt={food.name}
                className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
              />
            </div>
            {/* Badges */}
            <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 flex gap-2">
              {food.isAvailable ? (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold shadow-lg">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Còn món
                </span>
              ) : (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold shadow-lg">
                  <XCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Tạm hết
                </span>
              )}
              {discount > 0 && (
                <span className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold shadow-lg">
                  -{discount}%
                </span>
              )}
              {food.isFeatured && (
                <span className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-amber-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold shadow-lg">
                  ⭐ Nổi bật
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Info */}
          <div className="flex flex-col">
            <span className="badge-primary mb-3 w-fit">{food.category}</span>

            <h1 className="font-display text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">
              {food.name}
            </h1>

            {/* Rating */}
            {food.ratingAverage > 0 && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center">
                  {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
                    <Star
                      key={i}
                      className={`w-4 h-4 ${i < Math.round(food.ratingAverage) ? 'text-amber-400 fill-amber-400' : 'text-stone-300'}`}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
                <span className="font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{Number(food.ratingAverage).toFixed(1)}</span>
                <span className="text-stone-400 text-sm">({food.ratingCount || 0} đánh giá)</span>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Price */}
            <div className="flex items-end gap-3 mb-6">
              <span className="text-4xl font-display font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
                {formatCurrency(food.price)}
              </span>
              {food.originalPrice && food.originalPrice > food.price && (
                <span className="text-xl text-stone-400 line-through mb-1">
                  {formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Description */}
            {food.description && (
              <div className="mb-6">
                <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Mô tả</h3>
                <p className="text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed">{food.description}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Toppings */}
            {food.toppings && food.toppings.length > 0 && (
              <div className="mb-6">
                <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-3">Topping</h3>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {food.toppings.map((topping) => (
                    <button
                      key={topping._id || topping.name}
                      onClick={() => {
                        setSelectedToppings((prev) =>
                          prev.find((t) => t._id === topping._id)
                            ? prev.filter((t) => t._id !== topping._id)
                            : [...prev, topping]
                        );
                      }}
                      className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                        selectedToppings.find((t) => t._id === topping._id)
                          ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-md'
                          : 'bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700'
                      }`}
                    >
                      {topping.name}
                      {topping.price > 0 && (
                        <span className="ml-1 text-xs opacity-75">+{formatCurrency(topping.price)}</span>
                      )}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Stats */}
            <div className="flex gap-6 mb-6 text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400">
              {food.soldCount > 0 && (
                <span>Đã bán {food.soldCount}</span>
              )}
              {food.stock && (
                <span>Còn lại: {food.stock}</span>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Divider */}
            <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 my-4" />

            {/* Quantity + Actions */}
            {food.isAvailable ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-xl p-1.5">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setQuantity((q) => Math.max(1, q - 1))}
                    className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Minus className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                  <span className="w-10 text-center font-bold text-lg">{quantity}</span>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setQuantity((q) => q + 1)}
                    className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>

                <button
                  onClick={handleAddToCart}
                  className="btn-primary flex-1 py-3 text-base"
                >
                  <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Thêm vào giỏ
                </button>

                <Link to="/cart" className="btn-outline px-6 py-3 text-base">
                  Giỏ hàng
                </Link>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800 rounded-xl p-4 text-center">
                <XCircle className="w-8 h-8 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
                <p className="font-medium text-red-700 dark:text-red-400">Món này hiện tạm hết. Vui lòng quay lại sau.</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```jsx
import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { selectCartItems, selectCartSubtotal, selectCartDiscount, selectCartDeliveryFee, selectCartGrandTotal, selectCartCount, selectCoupon, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, removeCoupon } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, ShoppingBag, ArrowLeft, Tag, X, Truck, Store, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { useState } from 'react';

const PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=120&h=120&fit=crop';

export default function CartPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
  const subtotal = useSelector(selectCartSubtotal);
  const discount = useSelector(selectCartDiscount);
  const deliveryFee = useSelector(selectCartDeliveryFee);
  const grandTotal = useSelector(selectCartGrandTotal);
  const coupon = useSelector(selectCoupon);

  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6">
        <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
          <ShoppingBag className="w-12 h-12 text-stone-300" />
        </div>
        <div className="text-center">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-display font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-2">Giỏ hàng trống</h2>
          <p className="text-stone-500">Hãy chọn món ăn yêu thích và thêm vào giỏ hàng nhé!</p>
        </div>
        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary px-8 py-3">
          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn
        </Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Giỏ hàng</h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{cartItems.length} món</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              dispatch(clearCart());
              toast.success('Đã xóa giỏ hàng');
            }}
            className="text-sm text-red-500 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/20 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors"
          >
            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-1" /> Xóa tất cả
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {/* Cart items */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-4">
            <AnimatePresence>
              {cartItems.map((item, idx) => (
                <motion.div
                  key={item.key}
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -100 }}
                  transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
                  className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4"
                >
                  <img
                    src={item.image || PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE}
                    alt={item.name}
                    className="w-20 h-20 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
                    onError={(e) => { e.target.src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE; }}
                  />
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate">{item.name}</h3>
                    <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{item.category}</span>
                    {item.toppings && item.toppings.length > 0 && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-1">
                        + {item.toppings.map((t) => t.name).join(', ')}
                      </p>
                    )}
                    <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 font-semibold">
                        {formatCurrency(item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0))}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-stone-400 text-sm">× {item.quantity}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right flex-shrink-0">
                    <div className="font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
                      {formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-xl p-1 flex-shrink-0">
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        if (item.quantity === 1) {
                          dispatch(removeFromCart(item.key));
                        } else {
                          dispatch(updateQuantity({ key: item.key, quantity: item.quantity - 1 }));
                        }
                      }}
                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
                    >
                      <Minus className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                    <span className="w-8 text-center font-bold text-sm">{item.quantity}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ key: item.key, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }))}
                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
                    >
                      <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      dispatch(removeFromCart(item.key));
                      toast.success(`Đã xóa "${item.name}"`);
                    }}
                    className="p-2 text-stone-300 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/20 rounded-lg transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </motion.div>
              ))}
            </AnimatePresence>
          </div>

          {/* Summary */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24 space-y-4">
              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tóm tắt đơn hàng</h3>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                {cartItems.map((item) => (
                  <div key={item.key} className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-stone-500 truncate flex-1">
                      {item.name} × {item.quantity}
                      {item.toppings?.length > 0 && <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 ml-1">(+{item.toppings.length} topping)</span>}
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 font-medium ml-2">
                      {formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-4 space-y-3">
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                  <span className="text-stone-500">Tạm tính</span>
                  <span className="font-medium">{formatCurrency(subtotal)}</span>
                </div>

                {discount > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600">
                    <span>Giảm giá</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold">-{formatCurrency(discount)}</span>
                  </div>
                )}

                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                  <span className="text-stone-500">Phí giao hàng</span>
                  <span className={deliveryFee === 0 ? 'text-emerald-600 font-semibold' : ''}>
                    {deliveryFee === 0 ? 'Miễn phí' : formatCurrency(deliveryFee)}
                  </span>
                </div>

                {subtotal < 100000 && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">Mua thêm {formatCurrency(100000 - subtotal)} để được miễn phí giao hàng</p>
                )}

                <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-3">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tổng cộng</span>
                    <span className="text-2xl font-display font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
                      {formatCurrency(grandTotal)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <Link
                to="/checkout"
                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center mt-2"
              >
                Đặt món ngay <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
              </Link>
              <Link to="/" className="btn-ghost w-full justify-center text-sm">
                <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Tiếp tục chọn món
              </Link>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
