Now the upgraded CheckoutPage with coupon validation, fulfillment type, and payment selection:


_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 04:59:57Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import {
  selectCartItems, selectCartSubtotal, selectCartDiscount, selectCartDeliveryFee,
  selectCartGrandTotal, selectCoupon, selectFulfillmentType, selectSelectedBranch,
  setCoupon, removeCoupon, setFulfillmentType, setSelectedBranch, clearCart
} from '../../slices/cartSlice';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
import { couponApi, branchApi, orderApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import { ArrowLeft, ShoppingBag, CheckCircle, User, Phone, MapPin, FileText, Tag, Truck, Store, CreditCard, Wallet, Banknote, Loader2, X } from 'lucide-react';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function CheckoutPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const cartItems = useSelector(selectCartItems);
  const subtotal = useSelector(selectCartSubtotal);
  const discount = useSelector(selectCartDiscount);
  const deliveryFee = useSelector(selectCartDeliveryFee);
  const grandTotal = useSelector(selectCartGrandTotal);
  const coupon = useSelector(selectCoupon);
  const fulfillmentType = useSelector(selectFulfillmentType);
  const selectedBranch = useSelector(selectSelectedBranch);

  const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', phone: '', address: '', note: '' });
  const [couponCode, setCouponCode] = useState('');
  const [couponLoading, setCouponLoading] = useState(false);
  const [couponError, setCouponError] = useState('');
  const [branches, setBranches] = useState([]);
  const [branchesLoading, setBranchesLoading] = useState(false);
  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState('cod');
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
  if (user) {
    if (!form.name) setForm((f) => ({ ...f, name: user.fullName || '', phone: user.phone || '', address: user.address || '' }));
  }

  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
        <ShoppingBag className="w-16 h-16 text-stone-300" />
        <h2 className="text-xl font-display font-bold text-stone-700">Giỏ hàng trống</h2>
        <Link to="/" className="btn-primary"><ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khám phá thực đơn</Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const handleApplyCoupon = async () => {
    if (!couponCode.trim()) return;
    setCouponLoading(true);
    setCouponError('');
    try {
      const res = await couponApi.validate(couponCode);
      const data = res.data.data;
      if (data.valid) {
        dispatch(setCoupon({ coupon: data.coupon, discount: data.discount }));
        toast.success(`Áp dụng coupon "${data.coupon.code}" thành công!`);
      } else {
        setCouponError(data.message || 'Coupon không hợp lệ');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setCouponError(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Coupon không hợp lệ');
    } finally { setCouponLoading(false); }
  };

  const handleRemoveCoupon = () => {
    dispatch(removeCoupon());
    setCouponCode('');
    setCouponError('');
    toast.success('Đã gỡ coupon');
  };

  const loadBranches = async () => {
    setBranchesLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await branchApi.getAll();
      setBranches(res.data.data || []);
    } catch {} finally { setBranchesLoading(false); }
  };

  const handleFulfillmentChange = (type) => {
    dispatch(setFulfillmentType(type));
    if (type === 'pickup' && branches.length === 0) {
      loadBranches();
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!form.name.trim()) { toast.error('Vui lòng nhập tên'); return; }
    if (!form.phone.trim()) { toast.error('Vui lòng nhập SĐT'); return; }
    if (fulfillmentType === 'delivery' && !form.address.trim()) { toast.error('Vui lòng nhập địa chỉ giao hàng'); return; }
    if (fulfillmentType === 'pickup' && !selectedBranch) { toast.error('Vui lòng chọn chi nhánh lấy hàng'); return; }

    setIsSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const orderData = {
        fulfillmentType,
        customerInfo: {
          name: form.name,
          phone: form.phone,
          address: fulfillmentType === 'delivery' ? form.address : selectedBranch?.address,
        },
        items: cartItems.map((item) => ({
          foodId: item._id,
          foodName: item.name,
          quantity: item.quantity,
          price: item.price,
          image: item.image || '',
          toppings: item.toppings || [],
          note: item.note,
        })),
        note: form.note,
        paymentMethod,
        couponCode: coupon?.code,
      };

      if (fulfillmentType === 'pickup' && selectedBranch) {
        orderData.branchId = selectedBranch._id;
      }

      const res = await orderApi.create(orderData);
      dispatch(clearCart());
      toast.success('Đặt món thành công! Cảm ơn bạn đã đặt hàng.');
      navigate(`/orders/${res.data.data._id}`);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Đặt món thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại!');
    } finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen py-8">
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <Link to="/cart" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 mb-6 transition-colors">
          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay về giỏ hàng
        </Link>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
            <ShoppingBag className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Thanh toán</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Xác nhận thông tin và hoàn tất đơn hàng</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {/* Left: Form */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
            {/* Customer Info */}
            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="card p-6 space-y-4">
              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Thông tin giao hàng</h3>

              <div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5"><User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" /> Họ tên <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                  <input value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))} className="input-field" placeholder="Nguyễn Văn A" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5"><Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" /> SĐT <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                  <input value={form.phone} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, phone: e.target.value }))} className="input-field" placeholder="0987654321" />
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Fulfillment type */}
              <div>
                <label className="input-label">Hình thức nhận hàng</label>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleFulfillmentChange('delivery')}
                    className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all ${fulfillmentType === 'delivery' ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20' : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 hover:border-stone-300'}`}
                  >
                    <Truck className={`w-5 h-5 ${fulfillmentType === 'delivery' ? 'text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400'}`} />
                    <div className="text-left">
                      <div className="font-medium text-sm">Giao hàng</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">Nhận tại địa chỉ</div>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleFulfillmentChange('pickup')}
                    className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all ${fulfillmentType === 'pickup' ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20' : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 hover:border-stone-300'}`}
                  >
                    <Store className={`w-5 h-5 ${fulfillmentType === 'pickup' ? 'text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400'}`} />
                    <div className="text-left">
                      <div className="font-medium text-sm">Tự lấy</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">Tại chi nhánh</div>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Address or Branch selection */}
              {fulfillmentType === 'delivery' ? (
                <div>
                  <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5"><MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" /> Địa chỉ giao hàng <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                  <textarea
                    value={form.address}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, address: e.target.value }))}
                    rows={2}
                    className="input-field resize-none"
                    placeholder="Số 123, Đường ABC, Quận 1, TP.HCM"
                  />
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div>
                  <label className="input-label">Chọn chi nhánh lấy hàng</label>
                  {branchesLoading ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-stone-400"><Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> Đang tải...</div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                      {branches.map((b) => (
                        <button
                          key={b._id}
                          onClick={() => dispatch(setSelectedBranch(b))}
                          className={`w-full text-left p-3 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all ${selectedBranch?._id === b._id ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20' : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700'}`}
                        >
                          <div className="font-medium text-sm">{b.name}</div>
                          <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{b.address} • {b.openHours}</div>
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Note */}
              <div>
                <label className="input-label flex items-center gap-1.5"><FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400" /> Ghi chú</label>
                <textarea
                  value={form.note}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}
                  rows={2}
                  className="input-field resize-none"
                  placeholder="VD: Giao giờ hành chính, ít đá..."
                />
              </div>
            </motion.div>

            {/* Coupon */}
            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.1 }} className="card p-6">
              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">Mã giảm giá</h3>
              {coupon ? (
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/20 border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800 rounded-xl p-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Tag className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                    <span className="font-mono font-bold text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400">{coupon.code}</span>
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-600">- Giảm {formatCurrency(discount)}</span>
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={handleRemoveCoupon} className="text-emerald-600 hover:text-red-500"><X className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex gap-2">
                    <input
                      value={couponCode}
                      onChange={(e) => { setCouponCode(e.target.value); setCouponError(''); }}
                      className="input-field flex-1"
                      placeholder="Nhập mã coupon"
                      onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleApplyCoupon()}
                    />
                    <button onClick={handleApplyCoupon} disabled={couponLoading} className="btn-primary px-6">
                      {couponLoading ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : 'Áp dụng'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  {couponError && <p className="text-red-500 text-sm">{couponError}</p>}
                </div>
              )}
            </motion.div>

            {/* Payment */}
            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.2 }} className="card p-6">
              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">Phương thức thanh toán</h3>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {[
                  { id: 'cod', label: 'Tiền mặt (COD)', icon: Banknote, desc: 'Trả tiền khi nhận hàng' },
                  { id: 'banking', label: 'Chuyển khoản', icon: Banknote, desc: 'Chuyển khoản ngân hàng' },
                  { id: 'momo', label: 'MoMo', icon: Wallet, desc: 'Thanh toán qua ví MoMo' },
                  { id: 'vnpay', label: 'VNPay', icon: CreditCard, desc: 'Thanh toán qua VNPay' },
                ].map((pm) => (
                  <button
                    key={pm.id}
                    onClick={() => setPaymentMethod(pm.id)}
                    className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all ${paymentMethod === pm.id ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20' : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700'}`}
                  >
                    <pm.icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${paymentMethod === pm.id ? 'text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400'}`} />
                    <div className="text-left">
                      <div className="font-medium text-sm">{pm.label}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{pm.desc}</div>
                    </div>
                    {paymentMethod === pm.id && <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600 ml-auto" />}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          </div>

          {/* Right: Summary */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24 space-y-4">
              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Đơn hàng của bạn</h3>

              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                {cartItems.map((item) => (
                  <div key={item.key} className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm">
                    <img src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=40&h=40&fit=crop'} alt={item.name} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg object-cover" />
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="font-medium truncate">{item.name}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">× {item.quantity}{item.toppings?.length > 0 && ` (+${item.toppings.length} topping)`}</div>
                    </div>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-sm">{formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-4 space-y-2">
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm"><span className="text-stone-500">Tạm tính</span><span>{formatCurrency(subtotal)}</span></div>
                {discount > 0 && <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600"><span>Giảm giá</span><span>-{formatCurrency(discount)}</span></div>}
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                  <span className="text-stone-500">Phí giao hàng</span>
                  <span className={deliveryFee === 0 ? 'text-emerald-600 font-semibold' : ''}>{deliveryFee === 0 ? 'Miễn phí' : formatCurrency(deliveryFee)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-4">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tổng</span>
                  <span className="text-2xl font-display font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">{formatCurrency(grandTotal)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <button
                onClick={handleSubmit}
                disabled={isSubmitting}
                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center mt-2"
              >
                {isSubmitting ? (
                  <><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> Đang xử lý...</>
                ) : (
                  <><CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" /> Xác nhận đặt món</>
                )}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
     1→@tailwind base;

     5→@layer base {
     6→  * {
     7→    margin: 0;
     8→    padding: 0;
     9→    box-sizing: border-box;
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  html {
    13→    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    14→  }

    16→  body {
    17→    font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
    18→    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    19→    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    20→    background-color: #fafaf9;
    21→    color: #1c1917;

    31→    font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;

    33→  }
    34→}
    35→
    36→/* Custom scrollbar */
    37→::-webkit-scrollbar {
    38→  width: 6px;
    39→  height: 6px;
    40→}
    41→::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    42→  background: #f1f1f1;
    43→}
    44→.dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    45→  background: #1c1917;
    46→}

    48→  background: #d4d4d4;
    49→  border-radius: 3px;
    50→}

    52→  background: #a3a3a3;

    55→  background: #57534e;
    56→}
    57→.dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    58→  background: #78716c;
    59→}
    60→
    61→/* Selection color */
    62→::selection {
    63→  background: #fed7aa;
    64→  color: #7c2d12;
    65→}
    66→.dark ::selection {
    67→  background: #7c2d12;
    68→  color: #ffedd5;
    69→}
    70→
    71→/* Focus visible */
    72→:focus-visible {
    73→  outline: 2px solid #f97316;
    74→  outline-offset: 2px;
    75→}
    76→.dark :focus-visible {
    77→  outline-color: #fb923c;
    78→}
    79→
    80→/* Loading skeleton shimmer */
    81→.skeleton-shimmer {
    82→  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 25%, #e0e0e0 50%, #f0f0f0 75%);
    83→  background-size: 200% 100%;
    84→  animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
    85→}
    86→.dark .skeleton-shimmer {
    87→  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #292524 25%, #1c1917 50%, #292524 75%);
    88→  background-size: 200% 100%;
    89→}
    90→
    91→/* Input styling */
    92→.input-field {
    93→  @apply w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white text-stone-800 placeholder-stone-400 transition-all duration-200;
    94→  @apply focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30 focus:border-primary-500;
    95→}
    96→.dark .input-field {
    97→  @apply border-stone-700 bg-stone-900 text-stone-100 placeholder-stone-500;
    98→  @apply focus:ring-primary-500/30 focus:border-primary-500;
    99→}
   100→
   101→.input-label {
   102→  @apply block text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 mb-1.5;
   103→}
   104→.dark .input-label {
   105→  @apply text-stone-300;
   106→}
   107→
   108→/* Card base */
   109→.card {
   110→  @apply bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-card transition-all duration-300;
   111→}
   112→.dark .card {
   113→  @apply bg-stone-900 shadow-none border border-stone-800;
   114→}
   115→.card:hover {
   116→  @apply shadow-card-hover;
   117→}
   118→
   119→/* Button base */
   120→.btn {
   121→  @apply inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer;
   122→  @apply disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed;
   123→}
   124→.btn-primary {
   125→  @apply btn bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 active:scale-[0.98];
   126→}
   127→.btn-secondary {
   128→  @apply btn bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-200 active:scale-[0.98];
   129→}
   130→.dark .btn-secondary {
   131→  @apply bg-stone-800 text-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-700;
   132→}
   133→.btn-outline {
   134→  @apply btn border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:border-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-50 active:scale-[0.98];
   135→}
   136→.dark .btn-outline {
   137→  @apply border-stone-700 text-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-800;
   138→}
   139→.btn-danger {
   140→  @apply btn bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 active:scale-[0.98];
   141→}
   142→.btn-success {
   143→  @apply btn bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 active:scale-[0.98];
   144→}
   145→.btn-ghost {
   146→  @apply btn text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 active:scale-[0.98];
   147→}
   148→.dark .btn-ghost {
   149→  @apply text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-800;
   150→}
   151→
   152→/* Badge */
   153→.badge {
   154→  @apply inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium;
   155→}
   156→.badge-success {
   157→  @apply badge bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700;
   158→}
   159→.dark .badge-success {
   160→  @apply bg-emerald-900/50 text-emerald-400;
   161→}
   162→.badge-warning {
   163→  @apply badge bg-amber-100 text-amber-700;
   164→}
   165→.dark .badge-warning {
   166→  @apply bg-amber-900/50 text-amber-400;
   167→}
   168→.badge-danger {
   169→  @apply badge bg-red-100 text-red-700;
   170→}
   171→.dark .badge-danger {
   172→  @apply bg-red-900/50 text-red-400;
   173→}
   174→.badge-info {
   175→  @apply badge bg-blue-100 text-blue-700;
   176→}
   177→.dark .badge-info {
   178→  @apply bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-400;
   179→}
   180→.badge-gray {
   181→  @apply badge bg-stone-100 text-stone-600;
   182→}
   183→.dark .badge-gray {
   184→  @apply bg-stone-800 text-stone-400;
   185→}
   186→.badge-primary {
   187→  @apply badge bg-primary-100 text-primary-700;
   188→}
   189→.dark .badge-primary {
   190→  @apply bg-primary-900/50 text-primary-400;
   191→}
   192→.badge-secondary {
   193→  @apply badge bg-secondary-100 text-secondary-700;
   194→}
   195→.dark .badge-secondary {
   196→  @apply bg-secondary-900/50 text-secondary-400;
   197→}
   198→
   199→/* Table */
   200→.admin-table {
   201→  @apply w-full text-sm;
   202→}
   203→.admin-table thead {
   204→  @apply bg-stone-50;
   205→}
   206→.dark .admin-table thead {
   207→  @apply bg-stone-800/50;
   208→}
   209→.admin-table thead th {
   210→  @apply px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider;
   211→}
   212→.dark .admin-table thead th {
   213→  @apply text-stone-400;
   214→}
   215→.admin-table tbody tr {
   216→  @apply border-b border-stone-100 transition-colors duration-150;
   217→}
   218→.dark .admin-table tbody tr {
   219→  @apply border-stone-800;
   220→}
   221→.admin-table tbody tr:hover {
   222→  @apply bg-stone-50;
   223→}
   224→.dark .admin-table tbody tr:hover {
   225→  @apply bg-stone-800/50;
   226→}
   227→.admin-table tbody td {
   228→  @apply px-4 py-3.5 text-stone-700;
   229→}
   230→.dark .admin-table tbody td {
   231→  @apply text-stone-300;
   232→}
   233→
   234→/* Empty state */
   235→.empty-state {
   236→  @apply flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 px-6 text-center;
   237→}
   238→
   239→/* Page transition */
   240→.page-enter {
   241→  opacity: 0;
   242→  transform: translateY(8px);
   243→}
   244→.page-enter-active {
   245→  opacity: 1;
   246→  transform: translateY(0);
   247→  transition: opacity 300ms, transform 300ms;
   248→}
   249→
   250→/* Glass effect */
   251→.glass {
   252→  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
   253→  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
   254→  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
   255→}
   256→.dark .glass {
   257→  background: rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.8);
   258→}
   259→
   260→/* Gradient text */
   261→.gradient-text {
   262→  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316, #f59e0b);
   263→  -webkit-background-clip: text;
   264→  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
   265→  background-clip: text;
   266→}
   267→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import { Package, ChevronRight, Clock, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { fetchMyOrders } from '../../slices/ordersSlice';
     7→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
     8→import { SkeletonStats } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
     9→import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime, getStatusLabel } from '../../lib/utils';
    10→
    11→export default function OrderHistoryPage() {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items: orders, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.orders);
    14→  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    dispatch(fetchMyOrders({ status: statusFilter !== 'all' ? statusFilter : undefined }));
    18→  }, [dispatch, statusFilter]);
    19→
    20→  const statusFilters = [
    21→    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    22→    { value: 'pending', label: 'Chờ xác nhận' },
    23→    { value: 'confirmed', label: 'Đã xác nhận' },
    24→    { value: 'preparing', label: 'Đang chuẩn bị' },
    25→    { value: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao' },
    26→    { value: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành' },
    27→    { value: 'cancelled', label: 'Đã hủy' },
    28→  ];
    29→
    30→  const getBadgeVariant = (status) => {
    31→    const map = {
    32→      pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary',
    33→      delivering: 'secondary', done: 'success', cancelled: 'danger',
    34→    };
    35→    return map[status] || 'gray';
    36→  };
    37→
    38→  return (
    39→    <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    40→      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
    41→        {/* Header */}
    42→        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
    43→          <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
    44→            <Package className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
    45→          </div>
    46→          <div>
    47→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
    48→              Lịch sử đơn hàng
    49→            </h1>
    50→            <p className="text-stone-500">Theo dõi tất cả đơn hàng của bạn</p>
    51→          </div>
    52→        </div>
    53→
    54→        {/* Status Filter */}
    55→        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
    56→          {statusFilters.map((filter) => (
    57→            <button
    58→              key={filter.value}
    59→              onClick={() => setStatusFilter(filter.value)}
    60→              className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all ${
    61→                statusFilter === filter.value
    62→                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
    63→                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-700 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700'
    64→              }`}
    65→            >
    66→              {filter.label}
    67→            </button>
    68→          ))}
    69→        </div>
    70→
    71→        {/* Loading */}
    72→        {loading && <SkeletonStats />}
    73→
    74→        {/* Orders */}
    75→        {!loading && orders.length === 0 && (
    76→          <div className="card p-12 text-center">
    77→            <Package className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
    78→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">Chưa có đơn hàng nào</h3>
    79→            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm mb-4">Hãy đặt món để trải nghiệm dịch vụ của chúng tôi</p>
    80→            <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">Khám phá thực đơn</Link>
    81→          </div>
    82→        )}
    83→
    84→        {!loading && orders.length > 0 && (
    85→          <div className="space-y-4">
    86→            {orders.map((order, idx) => (
    87→              <motion.div
    88→                key={order._id}
    89→                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
    90→                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    91→                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
    92→                className="card p-5 hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
    93→              >
    94→                {/* Order Header */}
    95→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
    96→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    97→                    <div className="text-xs font-mono bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">
    98→                      {order.orderCode}
    99→                    </div>
   100→                    <Badge variant={getBadgeVariant(order.status)} dot>
   101→                      {getStatusLabel(order.status)}
   102→                    </Badge>
   103→                  </div>
   104→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500">
   105→                    <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />
   106→                    {formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}
   107→                  </div>
   108→                </div>
   109→
   110→                {/* Items */}
   111→                <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
   112→                  {order.items?.slice(0, 3).map((item, i) => (
   113→                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   114→                      <img
   115→                        src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=48&h=48&fit=crop'}
   116→                        alt={item.foodName}
   117→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   118→                      />
   119→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   120→                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate">{item.foodName}</p>
   121→                        <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">x{item.quantity}</p>
   122→                      </div>
   123→                      <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">
   124→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   125→                      </span>
   126→                    </div>
   127→                  ))}
   128→                  {order.items?.length > 3 && (
   129→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 pl-13">+{order.items.length - 3} món khác</p>
   130→                  )}
   131→                </div>
   132→
   133→                {/* Footer */}
   134→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
   135→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-500">
   136→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'delivery' && (
   137→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   138→                        <MapPin className="w-4 h-4" /> Giao hàng
   139→                      </span>
   140→                    )}
   141→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'pickup' && (
   142→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">📍 Tự lấy</span>
   143→                    )}
   144→                  </div>
   145→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   146→                    <div className="text-right">
   147→                      {order.discount > 0 && (
   148→                        <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 mr-2">
   149→                          -{formatCurrency(order.discount)}
   150→                        </span>
   151→                      )}
   152→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
   153→                        {formatCurrency(order.total)}
   154→                      </span>
   155→                    </div>
   156→                    <Link
   157→                      to={`/orders/${order._id}`}
   158→                      className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium"
   159→                    >
   160→                      Chi tiết <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   161→                    </Link>
   162→                  </div>
   163→                </div>
   164→              </motion.div>
   165→            ))}
   166→          </div>
   167→        )}
   168→      </motion.div>
   169→    </div>
   170→  );
   171→}
   172→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\user\OrderTrackingPage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import { ArrowLeft, Package, Clock, CheckCircle2, Truck, ChefHat, Phone, MapPin, User } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { fetchOrderById } from '../../slices/ordersSlice';
     7→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
     8→import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
     9→import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
    10→
    11→const statusSteps = [
    12→  { status: 'pending', label: 'Đặt hàng', icon: Package },
    13→  { status: 'confirmed', label: 'Xác nhận', icon: CheckCircle2 },
    14→  { status: 'preparing', label: 'Chuẩn bị', icon: ChefHat },
    15→  { status: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao', icon: Truck },
    16→  { status: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành', icon: CheckCircle2 },
    17→];
    18→
    19→export default function OrderTrackingPage() {
    20→  const { id } = useParams();
    21→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    22→  const { currentOrder: order, loading } = useSelector((state) => state.orders);
    23→
    24→  useEffect(() => {
    25→    dispatch(fetchOrderById(id));
    26→  }, [dispatch, id]);
    27→
    28→  if (loading) {
    29→    return (
    30→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    31→        <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
    32→          <div className="h-8 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-1/3" />
    33→          <div className="h-32 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
    34→          <div className="h-48 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
    35→        </div>
    36→      </div>
    37→    );
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  if (!order) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4 text-center">
    43→        <Package className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-300" />
    44→        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy đơn hàng</h2>
    45→        <Link to="/orders" className="btn-primary mt-4">Xem đơn hàng</Link>
    46→      </div>
    47→    );
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  const currentStepIndex = statusSteps.findIndex((s) => s.status === order.status);
    51→  const isCancelled = order.status === 'cancelled';
    52→
    53→  return (
    54→    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    55→      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
    56→        {/* Back */}
    57→        <Link to="/orders" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-700 mb-6">
    58→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay lại đơn hàng
    59→        </Link>
    60→
    61→        {/* Header */}
    62→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    63→          <div>
    64→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
    65→              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
    66→                Đơn hàng #{order.orderCode}
    67→              </h1>
    68→              <Badge variant={order.status === 'cancelled' ? 'danger' : order.status === 'done' ? 'success' : 'primary'} dot>
    69→                {order.status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' :
    70→                 order.status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' :
    71→                 order.status === 'preparing' ? 'Đang chuẩn bị' :
    72→                 order.status === 'delivering' ? 'Đang giao' :
    73→                 order.status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
    74→              </Badge>
    75→            </div>
    76→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Đặt lúc {formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</p>
    77→          </div>
    78→        </div>
    79→
    80→        {/* Timeline */}
    81→        {!isCancelled && (
    82→          <div className="card p-6 mb-6">
    83→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">Trạng thái đơn hàng</h3>
    84→            <div className="relative">
    85→              {/* Progress line */}
    86→              <div className="absolute top-6 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700">
    87→                <motion.div
    88→                  className="h-full bg-primary-500"
    89→                  initial={{ width: '0%' }}
    90→                  animate={{ width: `${(currentStepIndex / (statusSteps.length - 1)) * 100}%` }}
    91→                  transition={{ duration: 1, ease: 'easeOut' }}
    92→                />
    93→              </div>
    94→
    95→              {/* Steps */}
    96→              <div className="relative flex justify-between">
    97→                {statusSteps.map((step, idx) => {
    98→                  const Icon = step.icon;
    99→                  const isActive = idx <= currentStepIndex;
   100→                  const isCurrent = idx === currentStepIndex;
   101→
   102→                  return (
   103→                    <div key={step.status} className="flex flex-col items-center">
   104→                      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-10 transition-all ${
   105→                        isActive
   106→                          ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary-500/30'
   107→                          : 'bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 text-stone-400'
   108→                      } ${isCurrent ? 'ring-4 ring-primary-500/20 scale-110' : ''}`}>
   109→                        <Icon className="w-5 h-5" />
   110→                      </div>
   111→                      <span className={`text-xs mt-2 font-medium ${isActive ? 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400' : 'text-stone-400'}`}>
   112→                        {step.label}
   113→                      </span>
   114→                    </div>
   115→                  );
   116→                })}
   117→              </div>
   118→            </div>
   119→
   120→            {/* Estimated time */}
   121→            {order.estimatedDeliveryTime && (
   122→              <div className="mt-6 p-3 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
   123→                <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600" />
   124→                <span className="text-sm text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
   125→                  Dự kiến giao: {formatDateTime(order.estimatedDeliveryTime)}
   126→                </span>
   127→              </div>
   128→            )}
   129→
   130→            {/* Tracking logs */}
   131→            {order.trackingLogs?.length > 0 && (
   132→              <div className="mt-6 space-y-3">
   133→                {order.trackingLogs.slice().reverse().map((log, idx) => (
   134→                  <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3 text-sm">
   135→                    <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-stone-300 dark:bg-stone-600 mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0" />
   136→                    <div>
   137→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{log.status}</span>
   138→                      {log.note && <span className="text-stone-500 ml-2">— {log.note}</span>}
   139→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(log.timestamp)}</div>
   140→                    </div>
   141→                  </div>
   142→                ))}
   143→              </div>
   144→            )}
   145→          </div>
   146→        )}
   147→
   148→        {/* Cancelled */}
   149→        {isCancelled && (
   150→          <div className="card p-6 mb-6 border-red-200 dark:border-red-800 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/10">
   151→            <h3 className="font-bold text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 mb-2">Đơn hàng đã bị hủy</h3>
   152→            {order.cancelReason && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">Lý do: {order.cancelReason}</p>}
   153→          </div>
   154→        )}
   155→
   156→        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
   157→          {/* Items */}
   158→          <div className="card p-5">
   159→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">Món đã đặt</h3>
   160→            <div className="space-y-3">
   161→              {order.items?.map((item, idx) => (
   162→                <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3">
   163→                  <img
   164→                    src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=64&h=64&fit=crop'}
   165→                    alt={item.foodName}
   166→                    className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover"
   167→                  />
   168→                  <div className="flex-1">
   169→                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 text-sm">{item.foodName}</p>
   170→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">x{item.quantity}</p>
   171→                  </div>
   172→                  <span className="font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 text-sm">
   173→                    {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   174→                  </span>
   175→                </div>
   176→              ))}
   177→            </div>
   178→
   179→            {/* Totals */}
   180→            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 space-y-2">
   181→              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
   182→                <span>Tạm tính</span>
   183→                <span>{formatCurrency(order.subtotal)}</span>
   184→              </div>
   185→              {order.discount > 0 && (
   186→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400">
   187→                  <span>Giảm giá</span>
   188→                  <span>-{formatCurrency(order.discount)}</span>
   189→                </div>
   190→              )}
   191→              {order.deliveryFee > 0 && (
   192→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
   193→                  <span>Phí giao hàng</span>
   194→                  <span>{formatCurrency(order.deliveryFee)}</span>
   195→                </div>
   196→              )}
   197→              <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 pt-2 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
   198→                <span>Tổng cộng</span>
   199→                <span className="text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</span>
   200→              </div>
   201→            </div>
   202→          </div>
   203→
   204→          {/* Customer & Delivery info */}
   205→          <div className="space-y-4">
   206→            {/* Delivery info */}
   207→            <div className="card p-5">
   208→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thông tin giao hàng</h3>
   209→              <div className="space-y-3">
   210→                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   211→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
   212→                  <div>
   213→                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.name}</p>
   214→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.customerInfo?.phone}</p>
   215→                  </div>
   216→                </div>
   217→                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   218→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
   219→                  <p className="text-sm text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.address}</p>
   220→                </div>
   221→                {order.branch && (
   222→                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   223→                    <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-secondary-500 mt-0.5" />
   224→                    <div>
   225→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.branch.name}</p>
   226→                      <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.branch.address}</p>
   227→                    </div>
   228→                  </div>
   229→                )}
   230→              </div>
   231→            </div>
   232→
   233→            {/* Shipper info */}
   234→            {order.assignedShipper && (
   235→              <div className="card p-5">
   236→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Người giao hàng</h3>
   237→                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   238→                  <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-100 dark:bg-secondary-900/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   239→                    <Truck className="w-5 h-5 text-secondary-600 dark:text-secondary-400" />
   240→                  </div>
   241→                  <div className="flex-1">
   242→                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{order.assignedShipper.fullName}</p>
   243→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.assignedShipper.phone}</p>
   244→                  </div>
   245→                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" leftIcon={<Phone className="w-4 h-4" />}>
   246→                    Gọi
   247→                  </Button>
   248→                </div>
   249→              </div>
   250→            )}
   251→
   252→            {/* Payment */}
   253→            <div className="card p-5">
   254→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thanh toán</h3>
   255→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   256→                <span className="text-sm text-stone-500">
   257→                  {order.paymentMethod === 'cod' ? 'COD (Tiền mặt)' :
   258→                   order.paymentMethod === 'bank_transfer' ? 'Chuyển khoản' :
   259→                   order.paymentMethod === 'momo' ? 'MoMo' :
   260→                   order.paymentMethod === 'zalopay' ? 'ZaloPay' : order.paymentMethod}
   261→                </span>
   262→                <Badge variant={order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'success' : 'warning'}>
   263→                  {order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'Đã thanh toán' : 'Chưa thanh toán'}
   264→                </Badge>
   265→              </div>
   266→            </div>
   267→          </div>
   268→        </div>
   269→
   270→        {/* Reorder */}
   271→        {order.status === 'done' && (
   272→          <div className="mt-6 text-center">
   273→            <Button variant="outline">Đặt lại đơn này</Button>
   274→          </div>
   275→        )}
   276→      </motion.div>
   277→    </div>
   278→  );
   279→}
   280→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import { Heart, ShoppingCart, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';

     8→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
     9→import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
    10→import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
    11→import { formatCurrency } from '../../lib/utils';
    12→
    13→export default function WishlistPage() {
    14→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    15→  const { user } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
    16→  const wishlist = user?.wishlist || [];
    17→
    18→  const handleRemove = async (foodId) => {
    19→    try {
    20→      await dispatch(removeFromWishlist(foodId)).unwrap();
    21→      toast.success('Đã xóa khỏi danh sách yêu thích');
    22→    } catch {
    23→      toast.error('Không thể xóa');
    24→    }
    25→  };
    26→
    27→  return (
    28→    <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    29→      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
    30→        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
    31→          <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-red-400 to-pink-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
    32→            <Heart className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
    33→          </div>
    34→          <div>
    35→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
    36→              Danh sách yêu thích
    37→            </h1>
    38→            <p className="text-stone-500">{wishlist.length} món đã lưu</p>
    39→          </div>
    40→        </div>
    41→
    42→        {wishlist.length === 0 ? (
    43→          <div className="card p-12 text-center">
    44→            <Heart className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
    45→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">Chưa có món yêu thích</h3>
    46→            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm mb-4">Nhấn vào trái tim để lưu món ăn yêu thích</p>
    47→            <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">Khám phá thực đơn</Link>
    48→          </div>
    49→        ) : (
    50→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-5">
    51→            {wishlist.map((food, idx) => (
    52→              <motion.div
    53→                key={food._id}
    54→                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
    55→                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    56→                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
    57→                className="card overflow-hidden group"
    58→              >
    59→                <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
    60→                  <img
    61→                    src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop'}
    62→                    alt={food.name}
    63→                    className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
    64→                  />
    65→                  <button
    66→                    onClick={() => handleRemove(food._id)}
    67→                    className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 bg-white/90 dark:bg-stone-800/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors shadow-sm"
    68→                  >
    69→                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    70→                  </button>
    71→                  {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
    72→                    <div className="absolute top-3 left-3">
    73→                      <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg">
    74→                        -{food.discountPercent}%
    75→                      </span>
    76→                    </div>
    77→                  )}
    78→                </div>
    79→                <div className="p-4">
    80→                  <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 line-clamp-1 mb-1">
    81→                    {food.name}
    82→                  </h3>
    83→                  <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 mb-3">{food.category}</p>
    84→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    85→                    <div>
    86→                      {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
    87→                        <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through mr-2">
    88→                          {formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}
    89→                        </span>
    90→                      )}
    91→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
    92→                        {formatCurrency(food.price)}
    93→                      </span>
    94→                    </div>
    95→                    <Link
    96→                      to={`/foods/${food._id}`}
    97→                      className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium hover:bg-primary-100 dark:hover:bg-primary-900/30 transition-colors"
    98→                    >
    99→                      <ShoppingCart className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   100→                      Đặt món
   101→                    </Link>
   102→                  </div>
   103→                </div>
   104→              </motion.div>
   105→            ))}
   106→          </div>
   107→        )}
   108→      </motion.div>
   109→    </div>
   110→  );
   111→}
   112→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\pages\user\HomePage.jsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState, useMemo } from 'react';
     2→import { Link, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import {
     6→  Search, SlidersHorizontal, Grid3X3, List, Star, Heart, ShoppingCart,
     7→  ChevronRight, Flame, Sparkles, Clock, ArrowRight, ChefHat, Truck, ShieldCheck, Coffee
     8→} from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { fetchFoods, setFilters } from '../../slices/foodsSlice';
    10→import { addToCart } from '../../slices/cartSlice';
    11→import { foodApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
    12→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
    13→import { SkeletonCard } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
    14→import { formatCurrency, cn } from '../../lib/utils';
    15→import { CATEGORIES, SORT_OPTIONS, PAGE_SIZE } from '../../constants';
    16→
    17→export default function HomePage() {
    18→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    19→  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
    20→  const { items, loading, pagination, filters } = useSelector((state) => state.foods);
    21→  const { items: cartItems } = useSelector((state) => state.cart);
    22→  const [searchInput, setSearchInput] = useState(filters.search || searchParams.get('search') || '');
    23→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('grid');
    24→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    25→  const [featuredFoods, setFeaturedFoods] = useState([]);
    26→  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
    27→  const [wishlist, setWishlist] = useState([]);
    28→
    29→  // Load featured foods and categories
    30→  useEffect(() => {
    31→    foodApi.getFeatured().then((res) => setFeaturedFoods(res.data.data || [])).catch(() => {});
    32→    foodApi.getCategories().then((res) => setCategories(res.data.data || [])).catch(() => {});
    33→  }, []);
    34→
    35→  // Debounced search
    36→  useEffect(() => {
    37→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    38→      dispatch(setFilters({ search: searchInput }));
    39→      setPage(1);
    40→    }, 400);
    41→    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    42→  }, [searchInput, dispatch]);
    43→
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ ...filters, page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    46→  }, [filters, page, dispatch]);
    47→
    48→  const handleCategoryChange = (cat) => {
    49→    dispatch(setFilters({ category: cat === 'Tất cả' ? '' : cat }));
    50→    setPage(1);
    51→  };
    52→
    53→  const handleSortChange = (sort) => {
    54→    dispatch(setFilters({ sort }));
    55→    setPage(1);
    56→  };
    57→
    58→  const handleAddToCart = (food, e) => {
    59→    e.preventDefault();
    60→    e.stopPropagation();
    61→    dispatch(addToCart({ food }));
    62→  };
    63→
    64→  const toggleWishlist = (foodId, e) => {
    65→    e.preventDefault();
    66→    e.stopPropagation();
    67→    setWishlist((prev) => prev.includes(foodId) ? prev.filter((id) => id !== foodId) : [...prev, foodId]);
    68→  };
```

```text
     1→import { clsx } from 'clsx';
     2→import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';
     3→
     4→export function cn(...inputs) {
     5→  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function formatPrice(price) {
     9→  if (price == null) return '0đ';
    10→  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(price);
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function formatDate(date) {
    14→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(new Date(date));
    15→}
    16→
    17→export function formatDateTime(date) {
    18→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }).format(new Date(date));
    19→}
    20→
    21→export function formatRelativeTime(date) {
    22→  const now = new Date();
    23→  const then = new Date(date);
    24→  const diff = now - then;
    25→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
    26→  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000);
    27→  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
    28→
    29→  if (minutes < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
    30→  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes} phút trước`;
    31→  if (hours < 24) return `${hours} giờ trước`;
    32→  if (days < 7) return `${days} ngày trước`;
    33→  return formatDate(date);
    34→}
    35→
    36→export function slugify(text) {
    37→  return text
    38→    .toLowerCase()
    39→    .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    40→    .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
    41→    .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
    42→    .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    43→    .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    44→    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    45→    .replace(/đ/g, 'd')
    46→    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    47→    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    48→    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function getImageUrl(path) {
    52→  if (!path) return null;
    53→  if (path.startsWith('http')) return path;
    54→  return `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'}${path}`;
    55→}
    56→
    57→export function generateStarRating(rating) {
    58→  const stars = [];
    59→  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    60→    if (rating >= i) {
    61→      stars.push('full');
    62→    } else if (rating >= i - 0.5) {
    63→      stars.push('half');
    64→    } else {
    65→      stars.push('empty');
    66→    }
    67→  }
    68→  return stars;
    69→}
    70→
    71→export function truncate(str, length = 100) {
    72→  if (!str) return '';
    73→  return str.length > length ? str.substring(0, length) + '...' : str;
    74→}
    75→
    76→export function debounce(func, wait) {
    77→  let timeout;
    78→  return function executedFunction(...args) {
    79→    const later = () => {
    80→      clearTimeout(timeout);
    81→      func(...args);
    82→    };
    83→    clearTimeout(timeout);
    84→    timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
    85→  };
    86→}
    87→
    88→export function getStatusColor(status) {
    89→  const colors = {
    90→    pending: 'badge-warning',
    91→    confirmed: 'badge-info',
    92→    preparing: 'badge-primary',
    93→    delivering: 'badge-secondary',
    94→    done: 'badge-success',
    95→    cancelled: 'badge-danger',
    96→  };
    97→  return colors[status] || 'badge-gray';
    98→}
    99→
   100→export function getStatusLabel(status) {
   101→  const labels = {
   102→    pending: 'Chờ xác nhận',
   103→    confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận',
   104→    preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị',
   105→    delivering: 'Đang giao',
   106→    done: 'Hoàn thành',
   107→    cancelled: 'Đã hủy',
   108→  };
   109→  return labels[status] || status;
   110→}
   111→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:01:14Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\ordersSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { orderApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→export const fetchMyOrders = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchMy', async (params = {}, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const res = await orderApi.getMyOrders(params);
     7→    return res.data.data;
     8→  } catch (err) {
     9→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    10→  }
    11→});
    12→
    13→export const fetchOrderById = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchOne', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    const res = await orderApi.getById(id);
    16→    return res.data.data;
    17→  } catch (err) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    19→  }
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const createOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    const res = await orderApi.create(data);
    25→    return res.data.data;
    26→  } catch (err) {
    27→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Đặt hàng thất bại' });
    28→  }
    29→});
    30→
    31→export const cancelOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/cancel', async ({ id, reason }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    32→  try {
    33→    const res = await orderApi.cancel(id, reason);
    34→    return res.data.data;
    35→  } catch (err) {
    36→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    37→  }
    38→});
    39→
    40→const ordersSlice = createSlice({
    41→  name: 'orders',
    42→  initialState: {
    43→    items: [],
    44→    currentOrder: null,
    45→    pagination: { total: 0, page: 1, limit: 10, pages: 0 },
    46→    loading: false,
    47→    error: null,
    48→  },
    49→  reducers: {
    50→    updateOrderLocal: (state, action) => {
    51→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
    52→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    53→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
    54→        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    55→      }
    56→    },
    57→  },
    58→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    59→    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
    60→      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    61→        state.loading = false;
    62→        state.items = action.payload.orders;
    63→        state.pagination = action.payload.pagination;
    64→      })
    65→      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.rejected, (state, action) => {
    66→        state.loading = false;
    67→        state.error = action.payload?.message;
    68→      });
    69→
    70→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderById.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
    71→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    72→        state.loading = false;
    73→        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    74→      })
    75→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    76→        state.loading = false;
    77→        state.error = action.payload?.message;
    78→      });
    79→
    80→    builder.addCase(createOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    81→      state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    82→    });
    83→
    84→    builder.addCase(cancelOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    85→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
    86→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    87→    });
    88→  },
    89→});
    90→
    91→export const { updateOrderLocal } = ordersSlice.actions;
    92→export default ordersSlice.reducer;
    93→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:01:23Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\api\axiosClient.js`

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';
     2→
     3→const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';
     4→const UPLOAD_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_UPLOAD_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';
     5→
     6→const api = axios.create({
     7→  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     8→  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
     9→  withCredentials: true,
    10→});
    11→
    12→// Request interceptor - attach token
    13→api.interceptors.request.use(
    14→  (config) => {
    15→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    16→    if (token) {
    17→      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    18→    }
    19→    return config;
    20→  },
    21→  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
    22→);
    23→
    24→// Response interceptor - handle errors
    25→api.interceptors.response.use(
    26→  (response) => response,
    27→  async (error) => {
    28→    const originalRequest = error.config;
    29→
    30→    // If 401 and not already retrying, try refresh
    31→    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
    32→      originalRequest._retry = true;
    33→      try {
    34→        const res = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/auth/refresh`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
    35→        const newToken = res.data.data.accessToken;
    36→        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', newToken);
    37→        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${newToken}`;
    38→        return api(originalRequest);
    39→      } catch {
    40→        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
    41→        localStorage.removeItem('user');
    42→        window.location.href = '/login';
    43→        return Promise.reject(error);
    44→      }
    45→    }
    46→    return Promise.reject(error);
    47→  }
    48→);
    49→
    50→// Auth API
    51→export const authApi = {
    52→  login: (data) => api.post('/auth/login', data),
    53→  register: (data) => api.post('/auth/register', data),
    54→  logout: () => api.post('/auth/logout'),
    55→  getMe: () => api.get('/auth/me'),
    56→  refresh: () => api.post('/auth/refresh'),
    57→  updateProfile: (data) => api.put('/auth/profile', data),
    58→  changePassword: (data) => api.put('/auth/change-password', data),
    59→  addToWishlist: (foodId) => api.post('/auth/wishlist', { foodId }),
    60→  removeFromWishlist: (foodId) => api.delete(`/auth/wishlist/${foodId}`),
    61→  getWishlist: () => api.get('/auth/wishlist'),
    62→};
    63→
    64→// Food API
    65→export const foodApi = {
    66→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/foods', { params }),
    67→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/foods/${id}`),
    68→  getFeatured: () => api.get('/foods/featured'),
    69→  getCategories: () => api.get('/foods/categories'),
    70→  getBySlug: (slug) => api.get(`/foods/slug/${slug}`),
    71→  create: (data) => api.post('/foods', data),
    72→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/foods/${id}`, data),
    73→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/foods/${id}`),
    74→  toggleAvailability: (id) => api.patch(`/foods/${id}/toggle-availability`),
    75→  duplicate: (id, data) => api.post(`/foods/${id}/duplicate`, data),
    76→};
    77→
    78→// Order API
    79→export const orderApi = {
    80→  create: (data) => api.post('/orders', data),
    81→  getMyOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/my', { params }),
    82→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/orders/${id}`),
    83→  cancel: (id, reason) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/cancel`, { reason }),
    84→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/orders', { params }),
    85→  updateStatus: (id, data) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/status`, data),
    86→  assignShipper: (id, shipperId) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/assign-shipper`, { shipperId }),
    87→  getShipperOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/shipper/pending', { params }),
    88→};
    89→
    90→// Review API
    91→export const reviewApi = {
    92→  create: (data) => api.post('/reviews', data),
    93→  getFoodReviews: (foodId, params) => api.get(`/reviews/food/${foodId}`, { params }),
    94→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/reviews/${id}`),
    95→};
    96→
    97→// Coupon API
    98→export const couponApi = {
    99→  validate: (code, subtotal) => api.post('/coupons/validate', { code, subtotal }),
   100→  // Admin
   101→  getAll: () => api.get('/admin/coupons'),
   102→  create: (data) => api.post('/admin/coupons', data),
   103→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/admin/coupons/${id}`, data),
   104→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/admin/coupons/${id}`),
   105→  toggle: (id) => api.patch(`/admin/coupons/${id}/toggle`),
   106→};
   107→
   108→// Branch API
   109→export const branchApi = {
   110→  getAll: () => api.get('/branches'),
   111→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/branches/${id}`),
   112→  // Admin
   113→  getAllAdmin: () => api.get('/branches/admin/list'),
   114→  create: (data) => api.post('/branches', data),
   115→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/branches/${id}`, data),
   116→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/branches/${id}`),
   117→};
   118→
   119→// Notification API
   120→export const notificationApi = {
   121→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/notifications', { params }),
   122→  markAsRead: (id) => api.patch(`/notifications/${id}/read`),
   123→  markAllAsRead: () => api.patch('/notifications/read-all'),
   124→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/notifications/${id}`),
   125→};
   126→
   127→// Admin API
   128→export const adminApi = {
   129→  getStats: () => api.get('/admin/stats/overview'),
   130→  getRevenue: (period) => api.get('/admin/stats/revenue', { params: { period } }),
   131→  getTopFoods: (limit) => api.get('/admin/stats/top-foods', { params: { limit } }),
   132→  getCategoryStats: () => api.get('/admin/stats/categories'),
   133→  getUsers: (params) => api.get('/admin/users', { params }),
   134→  toggleUserStatus: (id) => api.patch(`/admin/users/${id}/toggle-status`),
   135→  getShippers: () => api.get('/admin/shippers'),
   136→};
   137→
   138→// Upload API
   139→export const uploadApi = {
   140→  upload: async (file) => {
   141→    const formData = new FormData();
   142→    formData.append('image', file);
   143→    const res = await axios.post(`${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload`, formData, {
   144→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
   145→      withCredentials: true,
   146→    });
   147→    return res;
   148→  },
   149→};
   150→
   151→export default api;
   152→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    17→  password: yup.string().required('Mật khẩu không được để trống')

    20→    .matches(/[0-9]/, 'Cần ít nhất 1 số'),
    21→  confirmPassword: yup.string()
    22→    .required('Xác nhận mật khẩu không được để trống')
    23→    .oneOf([yup.ref('password')], 'Mật khẩu không khớp'),
    24→});
    25→

    33→    resolver: yupResolver(schema),

    35→  });
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\authSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { authApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Load user from localStorage
     5→const loadUserFromStorage = () => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
     8→    const user = localStorage.getItem('user');
     9→    return { token: token || null, user: user ? JSON.parse(user) : null };
    10→  } catch {
    11→    return { token: null, user: null };
    12→  }
    13→};
    14→
    15→export const login = createAsyncThunk('auth/login', async (credentials, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    16→  try {
    17→    const res = await authApi.login(credentials);
    18→    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    19→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    20→    return res.data.data;
    21→  } catch (err) {
    22→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Login failed' });
    23→  }
    24→});
    25→
    26→export const register = createAsyncThunk('auth/register', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    27→  try {
    28→    const res = await authApi.register(data);
    29→    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    30→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    31→    return res.data.data;
    32→  } catch (err) {
    33→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Registration failed' });
    34→  }
    35→});
    36→
    37→export const getMe = createAsyncThunk('auth/getMe', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    38→  try {
    39→    const res = await authApi.getMe();
    40→    return res.data.data;
    41→  } catch (err) {
    42→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    43→  }
    44→});
    45→
    46→export const updateProfile = createAsyncThunk('auth/updateProfile', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    47→  try {
    48→    const res = await authApi.updateProfile(data);
    49→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    50→    return res.data.data;
    51→  } catch (err) {
    52→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Update failed' });
    53→  }
    54→});
    55→
    56→export const addToWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/addWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    57→  try {
    58→    const res = await authApi.addToWishlist(foodId);
    59→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    60→    return res.data.data;
    61→  } catch (err) {
    62→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    63→  }
    64→});
    65→
    66→export const removeFromWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/removeWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    67→  try {
    68→    const res = await authApi.removeFromWishlist(foodId);
    69→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    70→    return { foodId, user: res.data.data };
    71→  } catch (err) {
    72→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    73→  }
    74→});
    75→
    76→const authSlice = createSlice({
    77→  name: 'auth',
    78→  initialState: {
    79→    user: loadUserFromStorage().user,
    80→    token: loadUserFromStorage().token,
    81→    loading: false,
    82→    error: null,
    83→    isAuthenticated: !!loadUserFromStorage().token,
    84→  },
    85→  reducers: {
    86→    logout: (state) => {
    87→      state.user = null;
    88→      state.token = null;
    89→      state.isAuthenticated = false;
    90→      state.error = null;
    91→      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
    92→      localStorage.removeItem('user');
    93→    },
    94→    clearError: (state) => {
    95→      state.error = null;
    96→    },
    97→    setUser: (state, action) => {
    98→      state.user = action.payload;
    99→      state.isAuthenticated = true;
   100→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   101→    },
   102→  },
   103→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   104→    // Login
   105→    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   106→      .addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   107→        state.loading = false;
   108→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   109→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   110→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   111→      })
   112→      .addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
   113→        state.loading = false;
   114→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Login failed';
   115→      });
   116→
   117→    // Register
   118→    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   119→      .addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   120→        state.loading = false;
   121→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   122→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   123→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   124→      })
   125→      .addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
   126→        state.loading = false;
   127→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Registration failed';
   128→      });
   129→
   130→    // GetMe
   131→    builder.addCase(getMe.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   132→      state.user = action.payload;
   133→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   134→    });
   135→
   136→    // Update Profile
   137→    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   138→      state.user = action.payload;
   139→    });
   140→
   141→    // Remove from wishlist
   142→    builder.addCase(removeFromWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   143→      state.user = action.payload.user;
   144→    });
   145→  },
   146→});
   147→
   148→export const { logout, clearError, setUser } = authSlice.actions;
   149→export default authSlice.reducer;
   150→
```
</details></tool-use>
