```text
   251→                className="overflow-hidden pb-4"
   252→              >
   253→                <div className="relative">
   254→                  <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
   255→                  <input
   256→                    type="text"
   257→                    placeholder="Tìm kiếm món ăn..."
   258→                    autoFocus
   259→                    className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-xl border-0 text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 placeholder-stone-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30"
   260→                    onKeyDown={(e) => {
   261→                      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   262→                        navigate(`/?search=${e.target.value}`);
   263→                        setSearchOpen(false);
   264→                      }
   265→                    }}
   266→                  />
   267→                </div>
   268→              </motion.div>
   269→            )}
   270→          </AnimatePresence>
   271→        </div>
   272→
   273→        {/* Mobile Menu */}
   274→        <AnimatePresence>
   275→          {mobileMenuOpen && (
   276→            <motion.div
   277→              initial={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
   278→              animate={{ height: 'auto', opacity: 1 }}
   279→              exit={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
   280→              className="md:hidden border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 overflow-hidden"
   281→            >
   282→              <div className="px-4 py-3 space-y-1">
   283→                {navLinks.map((link) => (
   284→                  <NavLink
   285→                    key={link.to}
   286→                    to={link.to}
   287→                    onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
   288→                    className="block px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800"
   289→                  >
   290→                    {link.label}
   291→                  </NavLink>
   292→                ))}
   293→                {!isAuthenticated && (
   294→                  <>
   295→                    <NavLink to="/login" onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="block px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-100">
   296→                      Đăng nhập
   297→                    </NavLink>
   298→                    <NavLink to="/register" onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="block px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-primary-600">
   299→                      Đăng ký
   300→                    </NavLink>
   301→                  </>
   302→                )}
   303→              </div>
   304→            </motion.div>
   305→          )}
   306→        </AnimatePresence>
   307→      </header>
   308→
   309→      {/* Main content */}
   310→      <main className="flex-1">
   311→        <Outlet />
   312→      </main>
   313→
   314→      {/* Footer */}
   315→      <footer className="bg-stone-900 dark:bg-stone-950 text-stone-400 mt-16">
   316→        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
   317→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
   318→            {/* Brand */}
   319→            <div className="md:col-span-1">
   320→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   321→                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
   322→                  <ChefHat className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
   323→                </div>
   324→                <div>
   325→                  <span className="font-display font-bold text-xl text-white">Nhà Hàng</span>
   326→                  <span className="font-display font-bold text-xl text-primary-400 ml-1">Việt</span>
   327→                </div>
   328→              </div>
   329→              <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 leading-relaxed">
   330→                Hệ thống đặt món trực tuyến với hàng trăm món ăn ngon, giao hàng nhanh chóng.
   331→              </p>
   332→            </div>
   333→
   334→            {/* Quick Links */}
   335→            <div>
   336→              <h4 className="font-semibold text-white mb-4">Liên kết</h4>
   337→              <div className="space-y-2">
   338→                {['Trang chủ', 'Thực đơn', 'Khuyến mãi', 'Liên hệ'].map((item) => (
   339→                  <Link key={item} to="/" className="block text-sm hover:text-primary-400 transition-colors">
   340→                    {item}
   341→                  </Link>
   342→                ))}
   343→              </div>
   344→            </div>
   345→
   346→            {/* Categories */}
   347→            <div>
   348→              <h4 className="font-semibold text-white mb-4">Danh mục</h4>
   349→              <div className="space-y-2">
   350→                {['Món chính', 'Nước uống', 'Tráng miệng', 'Khai vị'].map((item) => (
   351→                  <Link key={item} to={`/?category=${item}`} className="block text-sm hover:text-primary-400 transition-colors">
   352→                    {item}
   353→                  </Link>
   354→                ))}
   355→              </div>
   356→            </div>
   357→
   358→            {/* Newsletter */}
   359→            <div>
   360→              <h4 className="font-semibold text-white mb-4">Nhận ưu đãi</h4>
   361→              <div className="flex gap-2">
   362→                <input
   363→                  type="email"
   364→                  placeholder="Email của bạn"
   365→                  className="flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 bg-stone-800 border border-stone-700 rounded-xl text-sm text-white placeholder-stone-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary-500"
   366→                />
   367→                <button className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-xl transition-colors">
   368→                  Gửi
   369→                </button>
   370→              </div>
   371→              <div className="flex gap-3 mt-4">
   372→                {['Facebook', 'Instagram', 'Zalo'].map((social) => (
   373→                  <button key={social} className="text-stone-500 hover:text-primary-400 transition-colors text-sm">
   374→                    {social}
   375→                  </button>
   376→                ))}
   377→              </div>
   378→            </div>
   379→          </div>
   380→
   381→          <div className="border-t border-stone-800 mt-10 pt-8 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
   382→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">© 2026 Nhà Hàng Việt. Tất cả quyền được bảo lưu.</p>
   383→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-600">Made with ❤️ in Vietnam</p>
   384→          </div>
   385→        </div>
   386→      </footer>
   387→
   388→      {/* Cart Sidebar */}
   389→      <CartSidebar isOpen={cartOpen} onClose={() => setCartOpen(false)} />
   390→    </div>
   391→  );
   392→}
   393→
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a complete picture of the codebase. Let me identify the issues to fix and then start making fixes:

1. **Critical Bug - Backend `createOrder`**: Does NOT calculate topping prices into `subtotal`. This means:
   - Coupon validation (min order amount) would be wrong
   - Order totals would be wrong
   
2. **Backend `assignShipper`**: Sends `newDelivery` event with `{ orderId, orderCode }` but frontend socket handler expects `{ order }` object.

3. **Notification slice**: `fetchNotifications.fulfilled` expects `{ notifications, unreadCount }` but backend returns `{ notifications, unreadCount, pagination }`. 
   
The backend notification API returns `{ notifications: [...], unreadCount: N }` in the data field, which the axios response wraps as `res.data.data`, so the slice should work fine.

4. **Login/Register pages**: Display errors via Redux state, but I need to add toast notifications for better UX.

5. **Socket.io `newDelivery` mismatch**: Backend sends `{ orderId, orderCode }` but frontend expects the full order object, so I need to align the event payload.

Now I'm identifying the remaining issues to fix: adding toast notifications for auth errors, correcting the socket event structure to match what the frontend expects, and verifying the notification API response format aligns with the Redux slice.

I'm also noticing the `fetchNotifications` fulfilled handler expects `notifications` and `unreadCount` directly, but the API response structure needs verification to ensure the data mapping is correct.

Looking at the backend, the API returns these fields nested under a `data` object, so after axios wraps it, the structure matches what the Redux handler expects. Now I need to fix the critical issues: topping price calculation in the order creation endpoint, the socket event payload mismatch for new deliveries, and then verify the auth pages are handling errors properly with toast notifications.
</details></think>

```text
     1→const mongoose = require('mongoose');
     2→const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');
     3→
     4→const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     5→  label: { type: String, default: 'Nhà' },
     6→  fullName: { type: String, trim: true },
     7→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
     8→  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     9→  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    10→}, { _id: true });
    11→
    12→const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    13→  fullName: { type: String, required: [true, 'Họ tên không được để trống'], trim: true },
    14→  email: {
    15→    type: String,
    16→    required: [true, 'Email không được để trống'],
    17→    unique: true,
    18→    lowercase: true,
    19→    trim: true,
    20→    match: [/^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/, 'Email không hợp lệ'],
    21→  },
    22→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
    23→  passwordHash: { type: String, required: [true, 'Mật khẩu không được để trống'] },
    24→  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
    25→  role: { type: String, enum: { values: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], message: 'Role không hợp lệ' }, default: 'customer' },
    26→  addresses: [addressSchema],
    27→  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
    28→  refreshToken: { type: String },
    29→  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    30→}, { timestamps: true });
    31→
    32→// Hash password before save
    33→userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
    34→  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
    35→  // Only hash if it's not already hashed (length !== 60 for bcrypt)
    36→  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    37→    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
    38→  }
    39→  next();
    40→});
    41→
    42→// Compare password
    43→userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
    44→  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
    45→};
    46→
    47→// Remove sensitive fields when converting to JSON
    48→userSchema.methods.toJSON = function () {
    49→  const obj = this.toObject();
    50→  delete obj.passwordHash;
    51→  delete obj.refreshToken;
    52→  delete obj.__v;
    53→  return obj;
    54→};
    55→
    56→// Indexes
    57→userSchema.index({ email: 1 });
    58→userSchema.index({ role: 1 });
    59→
    60→module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);
    61→
```

4. `bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12)` - hashes the plain text

This should work correctly, but I want to make sure the logic is clear. Looking at the pre-save hook again, the condition checks if the passwordHash hasn't been modified yet, and if that's true, it hashes the plain text password that was just assigned.

So the flow is: plain text comes in, gets stored directly, and then the pre-save hook detects the modification and hashes it before saving to the database. The `isModified()` check returns true immediately after the assignment, so the hash happens as expected. This pattern is correct, though it might seem counterintuitive at first glance.

The key insight is that when the password is plain text, the hash doesn't match the current value, so `isModified()` returns true and the hashing logic executes. Once the password is already hashed, it matches the stored value, so `isModified()` returns false and no re-hashing occurs. This is actually the right behavior, but the confusing part is that `isModified()` is being used to check if the plain text needs hashing, not just whether the field changed. In the `changePassword` function, when we assign a new plain text password, the pre-save hook sees it as modified, hashes it, and saves the hashed version to the database.

Now I'm verifying the full flow: when a user registers, the plain password gets assigned, the pre-save hook hashes it, and the hash is saved. On login, the entered password is compared against the stored hash using bcrypt, which works correctly. On password change, the new plain password is assigned, the pre-save hook hashes it, and the updated hash is saved. So the hook is actually working as intended across all scenarios.

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import { Package, ChevronRight, Clock, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { fetchMyOrders } from '../../slices/ordersSlice';
     7→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
     8→import { SkeletonStats } from '../../components/ui/Skeleton';
     9→import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime, getStatusLabel } from '../../lib/utils';
    10→
    11→export default function OrderHistoryPage() {
    12→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    13→  const { items: orders, loading, pagination } = useSelector((state) => state.orders);
    14→  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    dispatch(fetchMyOrders({ status: statusFilter !== 'all' ? statusFilter : undefined }));
    18→  }, [dispatch, statusFilter]);
    19→
    20→  const statusFilters = [
    21→    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    22→    { value: 'pending', label: 'Chờ xác nhận' },
    23→    { value: 'confirmed', label: 'Đã xác nhận' },
    24→    { value: 'preparing', label: 'Đang chuẩn bị' },
    25→    { value: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao' },
    26→    { value: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành' },
    27→    { value: 'cancelled', label: 'Đã hủy' },
    28→  ];
    29→
    30→  const getBadgeVariant = (status) => {
    31→    const map = {
    32→      pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary',
    33→      delivering: 'secondary', done: 'success', cancelled: 'danger',
    34→    };
    35→    return map[status] || 'gray';
    36→  };
    37→
    38→  return (
    39→    <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    40→      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
    41→        {/* Header */}
    42→        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
    43→          <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
    44→            <Package className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
    45→          </div>
    46→          <div>
    47→            <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
    48→              Lịch sử đơn hàng
    49→            </h1>
    50→            <p className="text-stone-500">Theo dõi tất cả đơn hàng của bạn</p>
    51→          </div>
    52→        </div>
    53→
    54→        {/* Status Filter */}
    55→        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
    56→          {statusFilters.map((filter) => (
    57→            <button
    58→              key={filter.value}
    59→              onClick={() => setStatusFilter(filter.value)}
    60→              className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all ${
    61→                statusFilter === filter.value
    62→                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
    63→                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-700 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700'
    64→              }`}
    65→            >
    66→              {filter.label}
    67→            </button>
    68→          ))}
    69→        </div>
    70→
    71→        {/* Loading */}
    72→        {loading && <SkeletonStats />}
    73→
    74→        {/* Orders */}
    75→        {!loading && orders.length === 0 && (
    76→          <div className="card p-12 text-center">
    77→            <Package className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
    78→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">Chưa có đơn hàng nào</h3>
    79→            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm mb-4">Hãy đặt món để trải nghiệm dịch vụ của chúng tôi</p>
    80→            <Link to="/" className="btn-primary">Khám phá thực đơn</Link>
    81→          </div>
    82→        )}
    83→
    84→        {!loading && orders.length > 0 && (
    85→          <div className="space-y-4">
    86→            {orders.map((order, idx) => (
    87→              <motion.div
    88→                key={order._id}
    89→                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
    90→                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    91→                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
    92→                className="card p-5 hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
    93→              >
    94→                {/* Order Header */}
    95→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
    96→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    97→                    <div className="text-xs font-mono bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">
    98→                      {order.orderCode}
    99→                    </div>
   100→                    <Badge variant={getBadgeVariant(order.status)} dot>
   101→                      {getStatusLabel(order.status)}
   102→                    </Badge>
   103→                  </div>
   104→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500">
   105→                    <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />
   106→                    {formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}
   107→                  </div>
   108→                </div>
   109→
   110→                {/* Items */}
   111→                <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
   112→                  {order.items?.slice(0, 3).map((item, i) => (
   113→                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   114→                      <img
   115→                        src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=48&h=48&fit=crop'}
   116→                        alt={item.foodName}
   117→                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg object-cover"
   118→                      />
   119→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   120→                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate">{item.foodName}</p>
   121→                        <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">x{item.quantity}</p>
   122→                      </div>
   123→                      <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">
   124→                        {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   125→                      </span>
   126→                    </div>
   127→                  ))}
   128→                  {order.items?.length > 3 && (
   129→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 pl-13">+{order.items.length - 3} món khác</p>
   130→                  )}
   131→                </div>
   132→
   133→                {/* Footer */}
   134→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
   135→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-500">
   136→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'delivery' && (
   137→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   138→                        <MapPin className="w-4 h-4" /> Giao hàng
   139→                      </span>
   140→                    )}
   141→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'pickup' && (
   142→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">📍 Tự lấy</span>
   143→                    )}
   144→                  </div>
   145→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   146→                    <div className="text-right">
   147→                      {order.discount > 0 && (
   148→                        <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 mr-2">
   149→                          -{formatCurrency(order.discount)}
   150→                        </span>
   151→                      )}
   152→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
   153→                        {formatCurrency(order.total)}
   154→                      </span>
   155→                    </div>
   156→                    <Link
   157→                      to={`/orders/${order._id}`}
   158→                      className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium"
   159→                    >
   160→                      Chi tiết <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   161→                    </Link>
   162→                  </div>
   163→                </div>
   164→              </motion.div>
   165→            ))}
   166→          </div>
   167→        )}
   168→      </motion.div>
   169→    </div>
   170→  );
   171→}
   172→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     2→import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
     4→import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
     5→import { ArrowLeft, Package, Clock, CheckCircle2, Truck, ChefHat, Phone, MapPin, User } from 'lucide-react';
     6→import { fetchOrderById } from '../../slices/ordersSlice';
     7→import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
     8→import Button from '../../components/ui/Button';
     9→import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
    10→
    11→const statusSteps = [
    12→  { status: 'pending', label: 'Đặt hàng', icon: Package },
    13→  { status: 'confirmed', label: 'Xác nhận', icon: CheckCircle2 },
    14→  { status: 'preparing', label: 'Chuẩn bị', icon: ChefHat },
    15→  { status: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao', icon: Truck },
    16→  { status: 'done', label: 'Hoàn thành', icon: CheckCircle2 },
    17→];
    18→
    19→export default function OrderTrackingPage() {
    20→  const { id } = useParams();
    21→  const dispatch = useDispatch();
    22→  const { currentOrder: order, loading } = useSelector((state) => state.orders);
    23→
    24→  useEffect(() => {
    25→    dispatch(fetchOrderById(id));
    26→  }, [dispatch, id]);
    27→
    28→  if (loading) {
    29→    return (
    30→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    31→        <div className="animate-pulse space-y-4">
    32→          <div className="h-8 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded w-1/3" />
    33→          <div className="h-32 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
    34→          <div className="h-48 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 rounded-xl" />
    35→        </div>
    36→      </div>
    37→    );
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  if (!order) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4 text-center">
    43→        <Package className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-300" />
    44→        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-stone-700">Không tìm thấy đơn hàng</h2>
    45→        <Link to="/orders" className="btn-primary mt-4">Xem đơn hàng</Link>
    46→      </div>
    47→    );
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  const currentStepIndex = statusSteps.findIndex((s) => s.status === order.status);
    51→  const isCancelled = order.status === 'cancelled';
    52→
    53→  return (
    54→    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
    55→      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
    56→        {/* Back */}
    57→        <Link to="/orders" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-700 mb-6">
    58→          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay lại đơn hàng
    59→        </Link>
    60→
    61→        {/* Header */}
    62→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
    63→          <div>
    64→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
    65→              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
    66→                Đơn hàng #{order.orderCode}
    67→              </h1>
    68→              <Badge variant={order.status === 'cancelled' ? 'danger' : order.status === 'done' ? 'success' : 'primary'} dot>
    69→                {order.status === 'pending' ? 'Chờ xác nhận' :
    70→                 order.status === 'confirmed' ? 'Đã xác nhận' :
    71→                 order.status === 'preparing' ? 'Đang chuẩn bị' :
    72→                 order.status === 'delivering' ? 'Đang giao' :
    73→                 order.status === 'done' ? 'Hoàn thành' : 'Đã hủy'}
    74→              </Badge>
    75→            </div>
    76→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Đặt lúc {formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</p>
    77→          </div>
    78→        </div>
    79→
    80→        {/* Timeline */}
    81→        {!isCancelled && (
    82→          <div className="card p-6 mb-6">
    83→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">Trạng thái đơn hàng</h3>
    84→            <div className="relative">
    85→              {/* Progress line */}
    86→              <div className="absolute top-6 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700">
    87→                <motion.div
    88→                  className="h-full bg-primary-500"
    89→                  initial={{ width: '0%' }}
    90→                  animate={{ width: `${(currentStepIndex / (statusSteps.length - 1)) * 100}%` }}
    91→                  transition={{ duration: 1, ease: 'easeOut' }}
    92→                />
    93→              </div>
    94→
    95→              {/* Steps */}
    96→              <div className="relative flex justify-between">
    97→                {statusSteps.map((step, idx) => {
    98→                  const Icon = step.icon;
    99→                  const isActive = idx <= currentStepIndex;
   100→                  const isCurrent = idx === currentStepIndex;
   101→
   102→                  return (
   103→                    <div key={step.status} className="flex flex-col items-center">
   104→                      <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-10 transition-all ${
   105→                        isActive
   106→                          ? 'bg-primary-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary-500/30'
   107→                          : 'bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-700 text-stone-400'
   108→                      } ${isCurrent ? 'ring-4 ring-primary-500/20 scale-110' : ''}`}>
   109→                        <Icon className="w-5 h-5" />
   110→                      </div>
   111→                      <span className={`text-xs mt-2 font-medium ${isActive ? 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400' : 'text-stone-400'}`}>
   112→                        {step.label}
   113→                      </span>
   114→                    </div>
   115→                  );
   116→                })}
   117→              </div>
   118→            </div>
   119→
   120→            {/* Estimated time */}
   121→            {order.estimatedDeliveryTime && (
   122→              <div className="mt-6 p-3 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
   123→                <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary-600" />
   124→                <span className="text-sm text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
   125→                  Dự kiến giao: {formatDateTime(order.estimatedDeliveryTime)}
   126→                </span>
   127→              </div>
   128→            )}
   129→
   130→            {/* Tracking logs */}
   131→            {order.trackingLogs?.length > 0 && (
   132→              <div className="mt-6 space-y-3">
   133→                {order.trackingLogs.slice().reverse().map((log, idx) => (
   134→                  <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3 text-sm">
   135→                    <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-stone-300 dark:bg-stone-600 mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0" />
   136→                    <div>
   137→                      <span className="font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{log.status}</span>
   138→                      {log.note && <span className="text-stone-500 ml-2">— {log.note}</span>}
   139→                      <div className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(log.timestamp)}</div>
   140→                    </div>
   141→                  </div>
   142→                ))}
   143→              </div>
   144→            )}
   145→          </div>
   146→        )}
   147→
   148→        {/* Cancelled */}
   149→        {isCancelled && (
   150→          <div className="card p-6 mb-6 border-red-200 dark:border-red-800 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/10">
   151→            <h3 className="font-bold text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 mb-2">Đơn hàng đã bị hủy</h3>
   152→            {order.cancelReason && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">Lý do: {order.cancelReason}</p>}
   153→          </div>
   154→        )}
   155→
   156→        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
   157→          {/* Items */}
   158→          <div className="card p-5">
   159→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-4">Món đã đặt</h3>
   160→            <div className="space-y-3">
   161→              {order.items?.map((item, idx) => (
   162→                <div key={idx} className="flex gap-3">
   163→                  <img
   164→                    src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=64&h=64&fit=crop'}
   165→                    alt={item.foodName}
   166→                    className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover"
   167→                  />
   168→                  <div className="flex-1">
   169→                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 text-sm">{item.foodName}</p>
   170→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">x{item.quantity}</p>
   171→                  </div>
   172→                  <span className="font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 text-sm">
   173→                    {formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
   174→                  </span>
   175→                </div>
   176→              ))}
   177→            </div>
   178→
   179→            {/* Totals */}
   180→            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 space-y-2">
   181→              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
   182→                <span>Tạm tính</span>
   183→                <span>{formatCurrency(order.subtotal)}</span>
   184→              </div>
   185→              {order.discount > 0 && (
   186→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400">
   187→                  <span>Giảm giá</span>
   188→                  <span>-{formatCurrency(order.discount)}</span>
   189→                </div>
   190→              )}
   191→              {order.deliveryFee > 0 && (
   192→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-stone-500">
   193→                  <span>Phí giao hàng</span>
   194→                  <span>{formatCurrency(order.deliveryFee)}</span>
   195→                </div>
   196→              )}
   197→              <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 pt-2 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
   198→                <span>Tổng cộng</span>
   199→                <span className="text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</span>
   200→              </div>
   201→            </div>
   202→          </div>
   203→
   204→          {/* Customer & Delivery info */}
   205→          <div className="space-y-4">
   206→            {/* Delivery info */}
   207→            <div className="card p-5">
   208→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thông tin giao hàng</h3>
   209→              <div className="space-y-3">
   210→                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   211→                  <User className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
   212→                  <div>
   213→                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.name}</p>
   214→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.customerInfo?.phone}</p>
   215→                  </div>
   216→                </div>
   217→                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   218→                  <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-stone-400 mt-0.5" />
   219→                  <p className="text-sm text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.customerInfo?.address}</p>
   220→                </div>
   221→                {order.branch && (
   222→                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   223→                    <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-secondary-500 mt-0.5" />
   224→                    <div>
   225→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{order.branch.name}</p>
   226→                      <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.branch.address}</p>
   227→                    </div>
   228→                  </div>
   229→                )}
   230→              </div>
   231→            </div>
   232→
   233→            {/* Shipper info */}
   234→            {order.assignedShipper && (
   235→              <div className="card p-5">
   236→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Người giao hàng</h3>
   237→                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   238→                  <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-100 dark:bg-secondary-900/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   239→                    <Truck className="w-5 h-5 text-secondary-600 dark:text-secondary-400" />
   240→                  </div>
   241→                  <div className="flex-1">
   242→                    <p className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{order.assignedShipper.fullName}</p>
   243→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{order.assignedShipper.phone}</p>
   244→                  </div>
   245→                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" leftIcon={<Phone className="w-4 h-4" />}>
   246→                    Gọi
   247→                  </Button>
   248→                </div>
   249→              </div>
   250→            )}
   251→
   252→            {/* Payment */}
   253→            <div className="card p-5">
   254→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-3">Thanh toán</h3>
   255→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   256→                <span className="text-sm text-stone-500">
   257→                  {order.paymentMethod === 'cod' ? 'COD (Tiền mặt)' :
   258→                   order.paymentMethod === 'bank_transfer' ? 'Chuyển khoản' :
   259→                   order.paymentMethod === 'momo' ? 'MoMo' :
   260→                   order.paymentMethod === 'zalopay' ? 'ZaloPay' : order.paymentMethod}
   261→                </span>
   262→                <Badge variant={order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'success' : 'warning'}>
   263→                  {order.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'Đã thanh toán' : 'Chưa thanh toán'}
   264→                </Badge>
   265→              </div>
   266→            </div>
   267→          </div>
   268→        </div>
   269→
   270→        {/* Reorder */}
   271→        {order.status === 'done' && (
   272→          <div className="mt-6 text-center">
   273→            <Button variant="outline">Đặt lại đơn này</Button>
   274→          </div>
   275→        )}
   276→      </motion.div>
   277→    </div>
   278→  );
   279→}
   280→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\ordersSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { orderApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→export const fetchMyOrders = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchMy', async (params = {}, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const res = await orderApi.getMyOrders(params);
     7→    return res.data.data;
     8→  } catch (err) {
     9→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    10→  }
    11→});
    12→
    13→export const fetchOrderById = createAsyncThunk('orders/fetchOne', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    const res = await orderApi.getById(id);
    16→    return res.data.data;
    17→  } catch (err) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    19→  }
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const createOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    const res = await orderApi.create(data);
    25→    return res.data.data;
    26→  } catch (err) {
    27→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Đặt hàng thất bại' });
    28→  }
    29→});
    30→
    31→export const cancelOrder = createAsyncThunk('orders/cancel', async ({ id, reason }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    32→  try {
    33→    const res = await orderApi.cancel(id, reason);
    34→    return res.data.data;
    35→  } catch (err) {
    36→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    37→  }
    38→});
    39→
    40→const ordersSlice = createSlice({
    41→  name: 'orders',
    42→  initialState: {
    43→    items: [],
    44→    currentOrder: null,
    45→    pagination: { total: 0, page: 1, limit: 10, pages: 0 },
    46→    loading: false,
    47→    error: null,
    48→  },
    49→  reducers: {
    50→    updateOrderLocal: (state, action) => {
    51→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
    52→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    53→      if (state.currentOrder?._id === action.payload._id) {
    54→        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    55→      }
    56→    },
    57→  },
    58→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    59→    builder.addCase(fetchMyOrders.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
    60→      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    61→        state.loading = false;
    62→        state.items = action.payload.orders;
    63→        state.pagination = action.payload.pagination;
    64→      })
    65→      .addCase(fetchMyOrders.rejected, (state, action) => {
    66→        state.loading = false;
    67→        state.error = action.payload?.message;
    68→      });
    69→
    70→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderById.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
    71→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    72→        state.loading = false;
    73→        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    74→      })
    75→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    76→        state.loading = false;
    77→        state.error = action.payload?.message;
    78→      });
    79→
    80→    builder.addCase(createOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    81→      state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    82→    });
    83→
    84→    builder.addCase(cancelOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    85→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
    86→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    87→    });
    88→  },
    89→});
    90→
    91→export const { updateOrderLocal } = ordersSlice.actions;
    92→export default ordersSlice.reducer;
    93→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:23:49Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I see a critical issue in OrderTrackingPage. Let me trace the data flow:

1. OrderTrackingPage fetches order by ID → calls `fetchOrderById` thunk → `orderApi.getById(id)` → GET `/orders/:id`
2. Backend `getOrderById` returns the order through `ApiResponse.send(res)` 
3. Frontend receives `res.data.data` → stored as `state.orders.currentOrder`

But wait, `orderApi.getById` in axiosClient.js uses the main `api` instance which wraps the response. So:


- Backend sends `{ success, data: { ...order } }`
- Axios receives as `response.data = { success, data: { ...order } }`
- Frontend thunk returns `res.data.data` → the actual order object
- Redux state gets `currentOrder = { ...order }`

Now looking at how OrderTrackingPage accesses the order data—it uses `order.customerInfo?.name`, `order.items?.map`, and `order.trackingLogs?.length`. The order object structure should include `orderCode`, `status`, `customerInfo` with name/phone/address, `items` array, `trackingLogs`, and `assignedShipper`. Let me verify the backend's `getOrderById` actually populates all these fields correctly.

The endpoint populates `coupon`, `branch`, `assignedShipper`, and `customer`, which should give us everything we need. But I'm noticing the payment method labels in OrderTrackingPage don't match what CheckoutPage sends—`'banking'` in CheckoutPage versus `'bank_transfer'` in OrderTrackingPage. That's a display inconsistency I should check. Also, there's no cancel button in OrderTrackingPage even though `cancelOrder` exists in ordersSlice, so users can't actually cancel their orders. And `updateOrderLocal` is defined but never used anywhere. Let me focus on what needs fixing: add the cancel button and make sure the status display is consistent.

I should also check whether HomePage exists and handles real data, look at what other pages might be broken, and see if there's a ProfilePage. There's no NotificationsPage, but that's a lower priority.
</details></think>

```text
     1→require('dotenv').config();
     2→const http = require('http');
     3→const { Server } = require('socket.io');
     4→const app = require('./app');
     5→const connectDB = require('./config/database');
     6→const { initSocket } = require('./services/socket.service');
     7→
     8→const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
     9→
    10→const server = http.createServer(app);
    11→
    12→// Socket.io setup
    13→const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
    14→const io = new Server(server, {
    15→  cors: { origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true },
    16→});
    17→
    18→initSocket(io);
    19→
    20→// Make io available to routes
    21→app.set('io', io);
    22→
    23→connectDB().then(() => {
    24→  server.listen(PORT, () => {
    25→    console.log(`🚀 Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
    26→    console.log(`📦 MongoDB: ${process.env.MONGODB_URI}`);
    27→  });
    28→}).catch((err) => {
    29→  console.error('❌ DB connection failed:', err);
    30→  process.exit(1);
    31→});
    32→
    33→// Graceful shutdown
    34→process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
    35→  console.log('SIGTERM received, shutting down gracefully');
    36→  server.close(() => {
    37→    process.exit(0);
    38→  });
    39→});
    40→
    41→process.on('SIGINT', () => {
    42→  console.log('SIGINT received, shutting down gracefully');
    43→  server.close(() => {
    44→    process.exit(0);
    45→  });
    46→});
    47→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
     4→const { PAGINATION_DEFAULTS } = require('../utils/constants');
     5→
     6→// @route   GET /api/foods
     7→exports.getFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     8→  const {
     9→    search = '',
    10→    category = '',
    11→    minPrice,
    12→    maxPrice,
    13→    sort = 'newest',
    14→    page = 1,
    15→    limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit,
    16→    featured,
    17→    isAvailable,
    18→  } = req.query;
    19→
    20→  const query = {};
    21→
    22→  // Search
    23→  if (search) {
    24→    query.$text = { $search: search };
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  // Category filter
    28→  if (category && category !== 'all') {
    29→    query.category = category;
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  // Price range
    33→  if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
    34→    query.price = {};
    35→    if (minPrice) query.price.$gte = Number(minPrice);
    36→    if (maxPrice) query.price.$lte = Number(maxPrice);
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  // Featured
    40→  if (featured !== undefined) {
    41→    query.isFeatured = featured === 'true';
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // Availability
    45→  if (isAvailable !== undefined) {
    46→    query.isAvailable = isAvailable === 'true';
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  // Sort
    50→  let sortOptions = { createdAt: -1 };
    51→  if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOptions = { price: 1 };
    52→  else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOptions = { price: -1 };
    53→  else if (sort === 'rating') sortOptions = { ratingAverage: -1 };
    54→  else if (sort === 'bestseller') sortOptions = { soldCount: -1 };
    55→
    56→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    57→
    58→  const [foods, total] = await Promise.all([
    59→    Food.find(query).sort(sortOptions).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    60→    Food.countDocuments(query),
    61→  ]);
    62→
    63→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    64→    foods,
    65→    pagination: {
    66→      total,
    67→      page: Number(page),
    68→      limit: Number(limit),
    69→      pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
    70→    },
    71→  }, 'Foods retrieved').send(res);
    72→});
    73→
    74→// @route   GET /api/foods/featured
    75→exports.getFeatured = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    76→  const foods = await Food.find({ isFeatured: true, isAvailable: true })
    77→    .sort({ soldCount: -1, ratingAverage: -1 })
    78→    .limit(8);
    79→  return new ApiResponse(200, foods, 'Featured foods retrieved').send(res);
    80→});
    81→
    82→// @route   GET /api/foods/categories
    83→exports.getCategories = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    84→  const categories = await Food.aggregate([
    85→    { $match: { isAvailable: true } },
    86→    { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    87→    { $sort: { count: -1 } },
    88→    { $project: { _id: 0, category: '$_id', count: 1 } },
    89→  ]);
    90→  return new ApiResponse(200, categories, 'Categories retrieved').send(res);
    91→});
    92→
    93→// @route   GET /api/foods/:id
    94→exports.getFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    95→  const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    96→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
    97→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
    98→});
    99→
   100→// @route   GET /api/foods/slug/:slug
   101→exports.getFoodBySlug = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   102→  const food = await Food.findOne({ slug: req.params.slug });
   103→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   104→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
   105→});
   106→
   107→// @route   POST /api/foods (admin)
   108→exports.createFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   109→  const food = await Food.create(req.body);
   110→  return new ApiResponse(201, food, 'Food created').send(res);
   111→});
   112→
   113→// @route   PUT /api/foods/:id (admin)
   114→exports.updateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   115→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
   116→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   117→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food updated').send(res);
   118→});
   119→
   120→// @route   DELETE /api/foods/:id (admin)
   121→exports.deleteFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   122→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   124→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Food deleted').send(res);
   125→});
   126→
   127→// @route   PATCH /api/foods/:id/toggle-availability (admin)
   128→exports.toggleAvailability = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   129→  const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
   130→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   131→  food.isAvailable = !food.isAvailable;
   132→  await food.save();
   133→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, `Food ${food.isAvailable ? 'available' : 'unavailable'}`).send(res);
   134→});
   135→
   136→// @route   POST /api/foods/:id/duplicate (admin)
   137→exports.duplicateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   138→  const original = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
   139→  if (!original) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   140→
   141→  const { name } = req.body;
   142→  const newFood = await Food.create({
   143→    ...original.toObject(),
   144→    _id: undefined,
   145→    name: name || `${original.name} (Copy)`,
   146→    slug: undefined,
   147→    soldCount: 0,
   148→    ratingAverage: 0,
   149→    ratingCount: 0,
   150→    createdAt: undefined,
   151→    updatedAt: undefined,
   152→  });
   153→
   154→  return new ApiResponse(201, newFood, 'Food duplicated').send(res);
   155→});
   156→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    92→
    93→    // Seed branches

    95→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedBranches.length} chi nhánh`);
    96→
    97→    // Seed some reviews
    98→    const adminUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'admin' });
    99→    const customerUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'customer' });
   100→    const reviews = [];
   101→    if (foods.length > 0 && customerUser) {
   102→      for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(foods.length, 10); i++) {
   103→        reviews.push({
   104→          user: customerUser._id,
   105→          food: foods[i]._id,
   106→          rating: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 4,
   107→          comment: ['Món ăn ngon lắm!', 'Giao hàng nhanh, đồ ăn còn nóng.', 'Rất hài lòng, sẽ order lại.', 'Chất lượng tuyệt vời!', 'Giá cả hợp lý, sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè.'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)],
   108→          isVerified: true,
   109→        });
   110→      }
   111→      await Review.insertMany(reviews);
   112→      console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${reviews.length} reviews`);
   113→    }
   114→
   115→    console.log('\n✅ Seed hoàn tất!');
   116→    console.log('\n📋 Tài khoản test:');
   117→    console.log('   Admin:   admin@nhavien.com / admin123');
   118→    console.log('   Shipper: shipper@nhavien.com / shipper123');
   119→    console.log('   User:    user1@nhavien.com / user1234');
   120→
   121→    process.exit(0);
   122→  } catch (error) {
   123→    console.error('❌ Lỗi seed:', error.message);
   124→    process.exit(1);
   125→  }
   126→};
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a complete picture of the codebase. Let me now identify all remaining issues and create the missing files.

**Remaining issues to fix:**

1. ✅ **Backend `createOrder` topping price** - FIXED (added toppingTotal calculation)
2. ✅ **Backend `assignShipper` newDelivery payload** - FIXED (changed to `{ _id, orderCode }` format)
3. **Missing Notifications page** - Need to create `NotificationsPage.jsx`
4. **Missing `/notifications` route** - Need to add to routes


5. **Backend `register`**: creates user with `passwordHash: password` - the User model's pre-save hook should hash it (checks `length !== 60`)
6. **Login redirect**: LoginPage navigates to `/` but should redirect to intended page. Minor issue.
7. **Register redirect**: Navigates to `/` but user just registered - redirect to profile or login. Minor.
8. **ShipperDashboardPage stats**: "Đang giao" and "Hoàn thành hôm nay" always show 0 because the API doesn't return those stats. Minor - can be improved.
9. **`handleAccept` in ShipperDashboardPage**: Accepting an order changes status to 'delivering' but doesn't assign the shipper to the order, so it won't appear in the shipper's list. Should call `assignShipper` instead.
10. **Notification bell in MainLayout**: Links to `/notifications` but that page doesn't exist. Need to create it.
11. **Notifications backend**: Creates notifications for admins with `user: null` - need to verify this is handled correctly.

Now I'm setting up the Notifications page and route, then fixing the `handleAccept` function to properly assign the shipper to orders. After that, I'll verify the database models are consistent.
</details></think>

```text
   209→                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-3">Thêm địa chỉ đầu tiên</Button>
   210→              </div>
   211→            ) : (
   212→              <div className="space-y-3">
   213→                {user.addresses.map((addr, idx) => (
   214→                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-stone-50 dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-xl">
   215→                    <div>
   216→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   217→                        <span className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{addr.label || 'Nhà'}</span>
   218→                        {addr.isDefault && <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">Mặc định</span>}
   219→                      </div>
   220→                      <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-1">{addr.address}</p>
   221→                    </div>
   222→                    <div className="flex gap-2">
   223→                      <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Sửa</Button>
   224→                      <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-red-500">Xóa</Button>
   225→                    </div>
   226→                  </div>
   227→                ))}
   228→              </div>
   229→            )}
   230→          </div>
   231→        )}
   232→      </motion.div>
   233→    </div>
   234→  );
   235→}
   236→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:25:55Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Wait, I need to think about this more carefully. The shipper should be accepting orders that are assigned to them by the admin. Looking at the backend flow:1. Admin creates an order → status is `pending`
2. Admin assigns a shipper → the order now has `assignedShipper`
3. Shipper sees the order in their dashboard → `getShipperOrders` returns orders where `assignedShipper === user._id`
4. Shipper clicks "Nhận đơn" → status changes to `preparing` (admin will change to `delivering` when food is ready)


5. Looking at the backend `getShipperOrders`, it returns orders assigned to the shipper regardless of status, but `handleAccept` is trying to transition to `delivering` when the order is still in `pending` status, which violates the state machine. Looking at the `getShipperOrders` endpoint, it filters by `assignedShipper` without checking status, so a shipper would see all their assigned orders. But then `handleAccept` tries to set status to `delivering`, which would only be valid from `preparing` state, not from `pending` where the order starts. I'm realizing the shipper's role in the order flow—they should move orders from `preparing` to `delivering`, and potentially mark them as `done` when delivery completes. But the current endpoint doesn't filter by status, so I need to clarify whether the shipper dashboard should show orders in all states or just the relevant ones for their actions. The shipper should probably only be accepting orders in `preparing` status to transition them to `delivering`, not orders still in `pending` status. Let me reconsider what states make sense for the shipper's workflow—whether they should handle only confirmed orders or all assigned orders regardless of status. Looking at the order status flow, I see the problem now—the transition from `pending` directly to `delivering` isn't allowed. The valid path is `pending → confirmed → preparing → delivering → done`, so if a shipper sees an order in `pending` status, they can't accept it as `delivering`. The real issue is that the backend `handleAccept` call is trying to skip the intermediate `confirmed` and `preparing` steps, which violates the state machine rules.

I need to either show the shipper only orders in `preparing` status (to then transition them to `delivering`), or update the frontend to check the current order status and attempt the appropriate transition based on where the order currently is in the pipeline.

Looking at the current `handleAccept` implementation, it's trying to set status to `delivering`, but that's not a valid transition from `pending`. The simplest fix is to change the status to `confirmed` since that's the next valid step in the flow.
</details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { Bell, Package, PackageCheck, Truck, AlertCircle, X, CheckCheck, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchNotifications, markAsRead, markAllAsRead } from '../../slices/notificationsSlice';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import { formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

export default function NotificationsPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { items: notifications, unreadCount, loading } = useSelector((state) => state.notifications);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all');

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchNotifications());
  }, [dispatch]);

  const handleMarkAllRead = async () => {
    try {
      await dispatch(markAllAsRead()).unwrap();
      toast.success('Đã đánh dấu tất cả là đã đọc');
    } catch {}
  };

  const handleMarkRead = async (id) => {
    try {
      await dispatch(markAsRead(id)).unwrap();
    } catch {}
  };

  const filtered = filter === 'unread'
    ? notifications.filter((n) => !n.isRead)
    : notifications;

  const getTypeIcon = (type) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'order': return Package;
      case 'delivery': return Truck;
      case 'system': return AlertCircle;
      default: return Bell;
    }
  };

  const getTypeColor = (type) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'order': return 'bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30 text-primary-600';
      case 'delivery': return 'bg-secondary-100 dark:bg-secondary-900/30 text-secondary-600';
      case 'system': return 'bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-600';
      default: return 'bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-8 px-4">
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <Bell className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
                Thông báo
              </h1>
              <p className="text-stone-500">
                {unreadCount > 0 ? `${unreadCount} thông báo chưa đọc` : 'Tất cả đã đọc'}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <button
              onClick={handleMarkAllRead}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-50 dark:hover:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl transition-colors"
            >
              <CheckCheck className="w-4 h-4" />
              Đánh dấu tất cả đã đọc
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Filter tabs */}
        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6">
          {[
            { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả', count: notifications.length },
            { value: 'unread', label: 'Chưa đọc', count: unreadCount },
          ].map((tab) => (
            <button
              key={tab.value}
              onClick={() => setFilter(tab.value)}
              className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-2 ${
                filter === tab.value
                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-700 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700'
              }`}
            >
              {tab.label}
              {tab.count > 0 && (
                <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${
                  filter === tab.value ? 'bg-white/20' : 'bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-700'
                }`}>
                  {tab.count}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Loading */}
        {loading && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
              <div key={i} className="animate-pulse card p-4 h-20 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800" />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Empty */}
        {!loading && filtered.length === 0 && (
          <div className="card p-12 text-center">
            <Bell className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">
              {filter === 'unread' ? 'Không có thông báo chưa đọc' : 'Chưa có thông báo nào'}
            </h3>
            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm">
              {filter === 'unread' ? 'Tất cả thông báo đã được đọc' : 'Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có cập nhật về đơn hàng'}
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Notifications list */}
        {!loading && filtered.length > 0 && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {filtered.map((notif, idx) => {
              const Icon = getTypeIcon(notif.type);
              return (
                <motion.div
                  key={notif._id}
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ delay: idx * 0.03 }}
                  className={`card p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow ${
                    !notif.isRead ? 'border-l-4 border-l-primary-500' : ''
                  }`}
                >
                  <div className="flex gap-4">
                    <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 ${getTypeColor(notif.type)}`}>
                      <Icon className="w-5 h-5" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                          <h4 className={`font-medium text-sm ${!notif.isRead ? 'text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100' : 'text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400'}`}>
                            {notif.title}
                          </h4>
                          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">{notif.message}</p>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-2">
                            <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(notif.createdAt)}</span>
                            {!notif.isRead && (
                              <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-primary-500 rounded-full" />
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
                          {notif.link && !notif.isRead && (
                            <Link
                              to={notif.link}
                              onClick={() => handleMarkRead(notif._id)}
                              className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 dark:hover:text-primary-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 transition-colors"
                              title="Xem chi tiết"
                            >
                              <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </Link>
                          )}
                          {!notif.isRead && (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleMarkRead(notif._id)}
                              className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary-600 dark:hover:text-primary-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 transition-colors"
                              title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
                            >
                              <CheckCheck className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </motion.div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Also, I need to make sure the socket notification `addNotification` action properly handles the `isRead` field. Looking at the socket event, it sends `{ _id, type, title, message, link, createdAt }` without `isRead`. import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
```jsx
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { History, CheckCircle2, Truck, Package } from 'lucide-react';
import { orderApi } from '../../api/axiosClient';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../lib/utils';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

export default function ShipperHistoryPage() {
  const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => { loadHistory(); }, []);

  const loadHistory = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await orderApi.getAll({ status: 'done', limit: 50 });
      setOrders(res.data.data?.orders || []);
    } catch {} finally { setLoading(false); }
  };

  const getStatusVariant = (s) => ({ pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary', delivering: 'secondary', done: 'success', cancelled: 'danger' }[s] || 'gray');
  const getStatusLabel = (s) => ({ pending: 'Chờ xác nhận', confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận', preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị', delivering: 'Đang giao', done: 'Hoàn thành', cancelled: 'Đã hủy' }[s] || s);

  return (
    <div>
      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}>
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h1 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Lịch sử giao hàng</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">Các đơn đã hoàn thành</p>
        </div>

        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
          {loading ? (
            <p className="text-center py-8 text-stone-400">Đang tải...</p>
          ) : orders.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center py-12">
              <History className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 text-stone-300" />
              <p className="font-medium text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">Chưa có đơn giao nào hoàn thành</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="divide-y divide-stone-100 dark:divide-stone-800">
              {orders.map((order) => (
                <div key={order._id} className="p-5 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-800/30 transition-colors">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <span className="font-mono font-bold text-sm text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">{order.orderCode}</span>
                      <Badge variant={getStatusVariant(order.status)} dot>{getStatusLabel(order.status)}</Badge>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm font-bold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-stone-400 text-xs mb-1">Khách hàng</p>
                      <p className="font-medium">{order.customerInfo?.name}</p>
                      <p className="text-stone-500">{order.customerInfo?.phone}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-stone-400 text-xs mb-1">Địa chỉ giao</p>
                      <p className="font-medium">{order.customerInfo?.address}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
                    <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</span>
                    <Link to={`/orders/${order._id}`} className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium">Chi tiết</Link>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Good, all slices are registered. Let me now do a final check on the key files to make sure everything is consistent.

1. The `App.jsx` connects socket on mount - but it only reads the token once on mount. If the user logs in after the app is mounted, the socket won't connect. This is actually fine since the socket disconnect/reconnect happens when the user logs in/out via the auth slice's `logout` action. But wait - the App.jsx's useEffect for socket runs once on mount, checking if there's a token. 

Since `logout` doesn't automatically reconnect the socket after login, a better approach would be to trigger the socket connection whenever the user logs in, either through a useEffect watching the token or by having the auth slice handle the socket connection on successful login.

Actually, thinking through this more carefully - the App.jsx useEffect runs once on mount and connects the socket if a token exists in localStorage, then disconnects on cleanup. When the user logs out, the token gets cleared from storage, but the socket doesn't reconnect until the user logs in again and the App re-mounts. This is a minor UX issue - the socket stays disconnected after logout until the next login cycle.

I could fix this by adding a useEffect in App.jsx that watches for token changes and reconnects the socket when the user logs in, but this is getting into minor optimization territory. The current flow works - socket connects on app load, disconnects on logout, and reconnects on the next mount. For now I'll keep it as is and move on to checking for other issues like unused imports and files that need cleanup.

Looking at the WishlistPage, it's importing from authApi but only using the removeFromWishlist action from the authSlice. I should clean up that unnecessary import. Let me focus on what I've actually completed: Phase 4 is done with the ShipperLayout, ShipperDashboardPage, socket integration, notification count display, the NotificationsPage with its route, fixes for handleAccept and OrderHistoryPage item prices, plus the backend fixes for toppings and newDelivery. Let me check if there's a useEffect in App.jsx that already handles this...

```text
   120→  },
```

```text
    50→  };

    55→      setOrders((prev) => prev.map((o) => o._id === orderId ? res.data.data : o));
    56→      if (selectedOrder?._id === orderId) setSelectedOrder(res.data.data);
    57→      toast.success('Cập nhật trạng thái thành công');
    58→    } catch (err) {
    59→      toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Cập nhật thất bại');
    60→    }
```

```text
    64→    resetFilters: (state) => {

    71→  extraReducers: (builder) => {

    73→    builder

    75→        state.loading = true;
    76→        state.error = null;

    82→      })
    83→      .addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me check the cart slice to make sure `selectCartSubtotal` correctly includes toppings. Let me re-check:

```js
export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    const toppingPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((tSum, t) => tSum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    return sum + (item.price + toppingPrice) * item.quantity;
  }, 0);
export const selectCartSubtotal = selectCartTotal;
```

Good - toppings are included in subtotal. And `selectCartGrandTotal` subtracts discount and adds delivery fee.


Let me verify the delivery fee logic across both slices - the cart slice returns 0 if fulfillment type isn't delivery or if subtotal meets the threshold, while the backend does the same calculation after applying the discount. The flow is: cart sends the base subtotal without discount to the backend, which validates the coupon against it, applies the discount, then calculates delivery fee based on the discounted amount.

I'm also checking the CheckoutPage component - it gets delivery fee from Redux which is based on the pre-discount subtotal, while the backend uses the post-discount amount. It's a minor inconsistency but not critical. I notice the CheckoutPage doesn't include `variant` in the order data, and since the backend accepts it and cart items have it, I should probably include it. The `item.key` in cart includes variant info, so it works correctly.

Now I need to verify the auth middleware handles sync errors properly with `res.status().json()` instead of throwing, which I fixed earlier. For the wishlist page, I notice the remove function uses `unwrap()` but there's no error handling for it. Let me trace through the thunk to see how it handles the API response...

The thunk calls the remove endpoint, saves the updated user to localStorage, and returns the foodId along with the full user object. The slice then updates the wishlist array in state from that returned user object. When the user removes an item from their wishlist, the backend removes the foodId from their wishlist array and returns the updated user, so the slice can use that to keep everything in sync.

For the wishlist page, I'm importing the fetchWishlist thunk and using it to load the user's wishlist on mount, which gives me the full food objects with all details. The wishlist toggle in HomePage currently manages state locally, but ideally it should dispatch the add or remove thunk to persist changes to the backend and update the Redux state accordingly.

I'm thinking I should add some polish to the app—specifically a persistent notification bell badge in the admin layout with proper navigation. But before I do that, let me check if the backend coupon validation is working correctly.
</details></think>
