 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\coupon.controller.js`

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
     4→
     5→// @route   POST /api/coupons/validate
     6→exports.validateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     7→  const { code, subtotal } = req.body;
     8→
     9→  if (!code) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code is required');
    10→
    11→  const coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: code.toUpperCase() });
    12→
    13→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    14→  if (!coupon.isActive) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is inactive');
    15→  if (coupon.startDate > new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is not yet active');
    16→  if (coupon.endDate < new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired');
    17→  if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
    18→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    19→  }
    20→  if (subtotal !== undefined && subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    21→    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  let discount = 0;
    25→  if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
    26→    discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    27→  } else {
    28→    discount = Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal || 0);
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    32→    coupon: { code: coupon.code, type: coupon.type, value: coupon.value },
    33→    discount: Math.round(discount),
    34→    message: 'Coupon is valid',
    35→  }, 'Coupon validated').send(res);
    36→});
    37→
    38→// Admin CRUD
    39→
    40→// @route   GET /api/admin/coupons
    41→exports.getAllCoupons = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    42→  const coupons = await Coupon.find().sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    43→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupons, 'Coupons retrieved').send(res);
    44→});
    45→
    46→// @route   POST /api/admin/coupons
    47→exports.createCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    48→  const existing = await Coupon.findOne({ code: req.body.code.toUpperCase() });
    49→  if (existing) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code already exists');
    50→
    51→  const coupon = await Coupon.create(req.body);
    52→  return new ApiResponse(201, coupon, 'Coupon created').send(res);
    53→});
    54→
    55→// @route   PUT /api/admin/coupons/:id
    56→exports.updateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    57→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
    58→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    59→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, 'Coupon updated').send(res);
    60→});
    61→
    62→// @route   DELETE /api/admin/coupons/:id
    63→exports.deleteCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    64→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
    65→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    66→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Coupon deleted').send(res);
    67→});
    68→
    69→// @route   PATCH /api/admin/coupons/:id/toggle
    70→exports.toggleCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    71→  const coupon = await Coupon.findById(req.params.id);
    72→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    73→  coupon.isActive = !coupon.isActive;
    74→  await coupon.save();
    75→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, `Coupon ${coupon.isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'}`).send(res);
    76→});
    77→
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I see an inconsistency! The coupon controller has routes like `/api/admin/coupons` but the route file maps to `/api/coupons`. This means:
- `GET /api/admin/coupons` → 404 (not in coupon.routes.js)
- `GET /api/coupons` → works (maps to getAllCoupons)

But the frontend axiosClient uses:
- `couponApi.getAll` → `GET /coupons` → this works ✓

And `AdminPromosPage` uses `couponApi.getAll()`. But looking at axiosClient:


- `couponApi.create` → `POST /coupons` maps to createCoupon ✓
- `couponApi.update` → `PUT /coupons/:id` maps to updateCoupon ✓
- `couponApi.delete` → `DELETE /coupons/:id` maps to deleteCoupon ✓
- `couponApi.toggle` → `PATCH /coupons/:id/toggle` maps to toggleCoupon ✓

So the frontend API calls are actually pointing to the right endpoints through the `/coupons` route, not the `/admin/coupons` paths that the controller defines.

Looking back at the axiosClient file, I can see the coupon API endpoints are set up correctly—getAll retrieves all coupons, create adds new ones, update modifies them, delete removes them, and toggle switches their active status.      1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');

     6→
     7→// @route   POST /api/reviews
     8→exports.createReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     9→  const { foodId, rating, comment } = req.body;
    10→
    11→  if (!foodId || !rating) {
    12→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID and rating are required');
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  if (rating < 1 || rating > 5) {
    16→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Rating must be between 1 and 5');
    17→  }
    18→
    19→  // Check if user has purchased this food
    20→  const hasPurchased = await Booking.findOne({
    21→    customer: req.user._id,
    22→    'items.foodId': foodId,
    23→    status: 'done',
    24→  });
    25→
    26→  const isVerified = !!hasPurchased;
    27→
    28→  // Check if user already reviewed this food
    29→  const existing = await Review.findOne({ user: req.user._id, food: foodId });
    30→  if (existing) {
    31→    existing.rating = rating;
    32→    existing.comment = comment || '';
    33→    existing.isVerified = isVerified || existing.isVerified;
    34→    await existing.save();
    35→    return new ApiResponse(200, existing.populate('user', 'fullName avatar'), 'Review updated').send(res);
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  const review = await Review.create({
    39→    user: req.user._id,
    40→    food: foodId,
    41→    rating,
    42→    comment: comment || '',
    43→    isVerified,
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  const populated = await Review.findById(review._id).populate('user', 'fullName avatar');
    47→
    48→  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Review created').send(res);
    49→});
    50→
    51→// @route   GET /api/reviews/food/:foodId
    52→exports.getFoodReviews = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    53→  const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;
    54→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    55→
    56→  const [reviews, total] = await Promise.all([
    57→    Review.find({ food: req.params.foodId })
    58→      .populate('user', 'fullName avatar')
    59→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    60→      .skip(skip)
    61→      .limit(Number(limit)),
    62→    Review.countDocuments({ food: req.params.foodId }),
    63→  ]);
    64→
    65→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    66→    reviews,
    67→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
    68→  }, 'Reviews retrieved').send(res);
    69→});
    70→
    71→// @route   DELETE /api/reviews/:id
    72→exports.deleteReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    73→  const review = await Review.findById(req.params.id);
    74→  if (!review) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Review not found');
    75→
    76→  if (req.user.role !== 'admin' && review.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
    77→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  await Review.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
    81→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Review deleted').send(res);
    82→});
    83→
```
</details></tool-use>

     8→export function formatPrice(price) {
     9→  if (price == null) return '0đ';
    10→  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(price);
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function formatDate(date) {
    14→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(new Date(date));
    15→}
    16→
    17→export function formatDateTime(date) {
    18→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }).format(new Date(date));
    19→}
    20→
    21→export function formatRelativeTime(date) {
    22→  const now = new Date();
    23→  const then = new Date(date);
    24→  const diff = now - then;
    25→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
    26→  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000);
    27→  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
    28→
    29→  if (minutes < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
    30→  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes} phút trước`;
    31→  if (hours < 24) return `${hours} giờ trước`;
    32→  if (days < 7) return `${days} ngày trước`;
    33→  return formatDate(date);
    34→}
    35→
    36→export function slugify(text) {
    37→  return text
    38→    .toLowerCase()
    39→    .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    40→    .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
    41→    .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
    42→    .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    43→    .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    44→    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    45→    .replace(/đ/g, 'd')
    46→    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    47→    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    48→    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function getImageUrl(path) {
    52→  if (!path) return null;
    53→  if (path.startsWith('http')) return path;
    54→  return `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'}${path}`;
    55→}
    56→
    57→export function generateStarRating(rating) {
    58→  const stars = [];
    59→  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    60→    if (rating >= i) {
    61→      stars.push('full');
    62→    } else if (rating >= i - 0.5) {
    63→      stars.push('half');
    64→    } else {
    65→      stars.push('empty');
    66→    }
    67→  }
    68→  return stars;
    69→}
    70→
    71→export function truncate(str, length = 100) {
    72→  if (!str) return '';
    73→  return str.length > length ? str.substring(0, length) + '...' : str;
    74→}
    75→
    76→export function debounce(func, wait) {
    77→  let timeout;
    78→  return function executedFunction(...args) {
    79→    const later = () => {
    80→      clearTimeout(timeout);
    81→      func(...args);
    82→    };
    83→    clearTimeout(timeout);
    84→    timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
    85→  };
    86→}

    92→    preparing: 'badge-primary',

    94→    done: 'badge-success',
    95→    cancelled: 'badge-danger',
    96→  };

## Tổng kết - Tất cả các phase đã hoàn thành

### Các lỗi đã fix trong session này:

**Backend (`backend/src/controllers/order.controller.js`):**
- **Topping prices ignored in subtotal**: `createOrder` không tính topping → coupon validation và delivery fee sai. Đã fix: `subtotal += (price + toppingTotal) * item.quantity`
- **Bug `populated` referenced before defined**: Trong `assignShipper`, đã đổi thứ tự `await order.save()` → `populate()` → socket emit

**Backend (`backend/src/controllers/coupon.controller.js`):**
- Discount calculation crash khi `subtotal` undefined. Đã fix với `effectiveSubtotal = subtotal || 0`
- Backend route comments ghi `/api/admin/coupons` nhưng routes dùng `/api/coupons` → đã clean up comments

**Backend (`backend/src/routes/branch.routes.js`):**
- Admin CRUD dùng path `/admin/list`, `/:id`, `/:id` nhưng frontend gọi `/branches/admin/list`, `/branches/admin`, `/branches/admin/:id` → đã align

**Backend (`backend/src/controllers/order.controller.js`):**
- `getShipperOrders` trả về mảng phẳng, không có stats → đã fix trả về `{ orders, stats }`

**Frontend (`frontend/src/slices/authSlice.js`):**
- Thiếu `changePassword` thunk → đã thêm
- Thiếu `fetchWishlist` thunk → đã thêm

**Frontend (`frontend/src/pages/user/ProfilePage.jsx`):**
- Gọi `dispatch({ type: 'auth/changePassword' })` thay vì dùng thunk → đã fix

**Frontend (`frontend/src/pages/shipper/ShipperDashboardPage.jsx`):**
- `handleAccept` gọi `status: 'delivering'` từ `pending` (invalid transition) → đã fix: `pending→confirmed→preparing→delivering`
- Stats hardcoded `0` → đã dùng stats từ API
- Load data không parse đúng response structure → đã fix

**Frontend (`frontend/src/pages/user/OrderHistoryPage.jsx`, `OrderTrackingPage.jsx`):**
- Item total không tính topping prices → đã fix

**Frontend (`frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.jsx`):**
- Dark mode không persist qua reload → đã fix
- Nav có `/admin/reports` nhưng không có route → đã xóa

**Frontend (`frontend/src/lib/utils.js`):**
- `formatCurrency` chưa được export (chỉ có `formatPrice`) → đã thêm alias

**Files mới tạo:**
- `NotificationsPage.jsx` - Trang thông báo với filter đã đọc/chưa đọc, mark read, link đến order
- `ShipperHistoryPage.jsx` - Trang lịch sử giao hàng cho shipper

**Routes thêm:**
- `/notifications` → `NotificationsPage`
- `/shipper/history` → `ShipperHistoryPage`

---

### Cách test:

```bash
# Terminal 1: Backend
cd backend
npm run seed   # Chạy lần đầu để seed dữ liệu
npm start      # Hoặc npm run dev

# Terminal 2: Frontend  
cd frontend
npm run dev
```

**Tài khoản test:**
| Role | Email | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Admin | admin@nhavien.com | admin123 |
| Shipper | shipper@nhavien.com | shipper123 |
| Customer | user1@nhavien.com | user1234 |

**Test flow đặt hàng:**
1. Login user → Thêm món vào giỏ (có topping) → Checkout → Áp coupon `WELCOME50` → Đặt hàng
2. Login admin → Kiểm tra dashboard analytics → Vào orders → Assign shipper
3. Login shipper → Dashboard hiển thị đơn → Nhận đơn → Cập nhật trạng thái
4. Notifications bell hiển thị badge số chưa đọc

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:42:16Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The `slug` field has `unique: true` in the schema definition (line 15), and then `foodSchema.index({ slug: 1 })` at line 59 also creates a unique index. Mongoose warns about duplicates but that's not the issue.

The actual error is: `E11000 duplicate key error collection: quanli_booking.foods index: slug_1 dup key: { slug: null }`

The problem is that when `Food.insertMany` is called with seed data, the `pre('save')` hook only runs on individual documents that are saved individually, NOT on `insertMany`. 

So the issue is that `seed.js` uses `Food.insertMany(seedFoods)` which bypasses the `pre('save')` hook entirely, meaning slugs won't be auto-generated. Even if they were generated, `insertMany` with multiple documents containing the same null/undefined slug value would trigger the duplicate key error.

I need to either create the foods one at a time in the seed script to trigger the hooks, or manually generate slugs before inserting. Let me go with the manual slug generation approach in the seed script itself.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:42:17Z)**_

The `Food.insertMany` bypasses the `pre('save')` hook, so slugs are `null` → duplicate key on unique index. Need to fix the seed script:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:48:16Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Looking at the LoginPage code again, the issue is with the input field positioning. The `leftIcon` in the Input component is positioned at `top-1/2` which aligns the icon vertically center. But the input text starts from the left padding. When the leftIcon is 40px wide (including padding), the input should start after 40px.

The issue is the Input component uses `leftIcon` className injection:
```jsx
leftIcon && 'pl-10',
```

But `pl-10` is `padding-left: 2.5rem` = 40px. The icon is positioned `left-3` which is `left: 0.75rem`. So the icon is at left:12px. The input padding starts at 40px. 

The real problem might be that the icon and input aren't vertically aligned properly. The icon is centered at 50% height, but the input text baseline doesn't match that. And looking at the actual page structure, I see the label is rendered in a div with the `input-label` class styling, then the input wrapper div contains the icon and the input field itself.

The issue is probably that the label div has the label styling applied, but then the label text is rendered inside it with the same class again, creating redundant nesting. Let me trace through what's actually happening with the layout—maybe the label isn't positioned correctly relative to the input, or the form fields are getting cut off by an overflow issue.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:48:40Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I can see the issue. Looking at line 138-142:

```jsx
<button
  type="button"
  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
  className="absolute right-3 top-[38px] text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600"
>
```

The `top-[38px]` is hardcoded. But the `Input` component has `py-2.5` (padding 10px top+bottom), `label` with `mb-1.5` (6px), `input-label` with `mb-1.5` (6px). So:


The label sits at the top, then the margin pushes the input down, then the input itself has vertical padding that adds to its height. With the standard input height of 40px plus the padding, the total height comes to around 52px, which means the label container plus margin plus input height gets me to that 38px positioning. So the left icon positioning uses a transform to center it vertically within the input's padding, which works reliably. But the right icon button placement is hardcoded at `top-[38px]` without accounting for whether there's a label or error message, and it doesn't account for the actual input height—it assumes a 40px input with `py-2.5`, but in dark mode the styling might differ. I need to make this positioning dynamic based on the input's actual dimensions.

The cleanest fix is to use a wrapper div around the input and icons, then position both icons relative to that wrapper with absolute positioning and vertical centering using `top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2`, which mirrors how the left icon is already handled. This way the icons stay aligned regardless of label presence or dark mode variations. I see the real issue now—the eye icon button needs to align with the input field itself, not the wrapper, since the label sits above it. The cleanest approach is to remove the hardcoded `top-[38px]` positioning and instead use the same centered alignment technique as the left icon, though that means restructuring the component since the toggle is in the parent wrapper rather than inside Input. Updating the password field structure to position the icon absolutely over the right side of the input, using flexbox on the parent div to layer the input and icon correctly. I also need to apply the same label styling approach to the RegisterPage.

Looking at the icon positioning in RegisterPage, I see it's using the same hardcoded `top-[38px]` offset that's causing the misalignment. Both the login and register pages have this positioning issue that needs fixing.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:49:16Z)**_

The root issue is the toggle button sits **outside** the Input's relative container. I need to add a `rightElement` prop to the Input component so the button renders inside the correct stacking context:


_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:49:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { forwardRef } from 'react';
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

const Input = forwardRef(({
  label,
  error,
  helper,
  className,
  leftIcon,
  rightIcon,
  rightElement,
  containerClassName,
  ...props
}, ref) => {
  return (
    <div className={cn('w-full', containerClassName)}>
      {label && (
        <label className="input-label">
          {label}
        </label>
      )}
      <div className="relative">
        {leftIcon && (
          <div className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 pointer-events-none">
            {leftIcon}
          </div>
        )}
        <input
          ref={ref}
          className={cn(
            'input-field',
            leftIcon && 'pl-10',
            (rightIcon || rightElement) && 'pr-10',
            error && 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-500/30',
            className
          )}
          {...props}
        />
        {rightIcon && (
          <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400">
            {rightIcon}
          </div>
        )}
        {rightElement && (
          <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
            {rightElement}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      {error && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{error}</p>}
      {helper && !error && <p className="text-stone-400 text-xs mt-1">{helper}</p>}
    </div>
  );
});

Input.displayName = 'Input';
export default Input;

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 05:50:45Z)**_

Vite đã hot-reload thành công tất cả các thay đổi. Refresh trình duyệt (F5) trang **http://localhost:5174/login** và **/register** để thấy kết quả.

**Tóm tắt fix:**

**Root cause:** Password toggle button nằm **ngoài** component Input, dùng hardcoded `top-[38px]` để căn chỉnh. Khi có label, button bị đẩy lên trên cùng div bao ngoài chứ không nằm trong relative context của input.

**Fix thực hiện:**

1. **`Input.jsx`** — Thêm prop `rightElement` cho phép render element bên trong relative container đúng vị trí (bên trong `Input`, không ngoài):
   ```jsx
   {rightElement && (
     <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
       {rightElement}
     </div>
   )}
   ```
   Thêm `pointer-events-none` vào `leftIcon` để click events không bị chặn.

2. **`LoginPage.jsx`** — Chuyển toggle button vào `rightElement` prop của Input.

3. **`RegisterPage.jsx`** — Chuyển toggle button vào `rightElement` prop của Input.

_**User (2026-03-24 05:53:58Z)**_

Bạn là senior frontend engineer chuyên React + Tailwind + UI polish.

Hãy fix lỗi UI của trang Login và Register trong project hiện tại của tôi.

========================
VẤN ĐỀ CẦN FIX
========================

Dựa trên giao diện hiện tại, form đăng nhập và đăng ký đang có các lỗi UI sau:

1. Icon trong input bị đè lên placeholder/text
- Placeholder đang chui vào vị trí icon bên trái
- Text nhập vào không có khoảng cách đủ với icon

2. Padding input chưa đúng
- Input cần có left padding đủ lớn khi có icon ở bên trái
- Input có icon mắt bên phải thì cần right padding đủ lớn
- Hiện tại text, placeholder, icon chưa cân đối

3. Căn chỉnh icon chưa chuẩn
- Icon bên trái cần nằm chính giữa theo chiều dọc
- Icon mắt toggle password bên phải cần căn giữa dọc tuyệt đối
- Không bị lệch lên/xuống

4. Label và khoảng cách form chưa đẹp
- Label cách input hợp lý
- Khoảng cách giữa các field đồng đều
- Helper text như “Ít nhất 6 ký tự...” không bị dính sát input

5. Button, checkbox, forgot password, social login cần cân hàng đẹp hơn
- Checkbox “Ghi nhớ” và link “Quên mật khẩu?” cùng 1 hàng, căn đều
- Social buttons có chiều cao đồng nhất
- Text trong button căn giữa chuẩn

6. Form card cần polish lại
- Border, shadow, radius đẹp hơn
- Khoảng cách trên dưới cân đối
- Responsive tốt

========================
MỤC TIÊU KẾT QUẢ
========================

Tôi muốn:
- Input có icon trái/phải hiển thị chuẩn
- Không còn đè placeholder
- UI login/register nhìn polished, sạch, sang hơn
- Không phá business logic đang có
- Chỉ refactor phần UI/form components nếu cần
- Ưu tiên reusable Input component

========================
YÊU CẦU THỰC HIỆN
========================

Hãy làm theo thứ tự:

1. Tìm các file liên quan đến:
- Login page
- Register page
- Input component dùng chung (nếu có)
- Form field wrapper
- Password input
- auth styles

2. Phân tích nguyên nhân lỗi
Ví dụ:
- icon đang absolute nhưng input chưa có pl-* phù hợp
- wrapper thiếu relative
- icon chưa dùng top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2
- input height chưa đồng bộ
- button mắt chưa absolute đúng cách

3. Refactor theo hướng reusable component:
Tạo hoặc sửa component kiểu:
- FormInput
- PasswordInput
- InputWithIcon

Yêu cầu component:
- wrapper `relative`
- icon trái:
  - `absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2`
- icon phải:
  - `absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2`
- input có:
  - nếu có icon trái => `pl-10` hoặc `pl-11`
  - nếu có icon phải => `pr-10` hoặc `pr-11`
- chiều cao input đồng nhất
- border, focus ring, hover đẹp
- disabled/error state rõ ràng

4. Chuẩn hóa style:
Gợi ý style Tailwind:
- input:
  `h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white pl-10 pr-4 text-sm text-stone-800 placeholder:text-stone-400 shadow-sm outline-none transition focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-orange-100`
- nếu có right icon:
  `pr-12`
- icon:
  `pointer-events-none absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400`
- right action button:
  `absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600`

5. Cải thiện spacing form:
- mỗi field cách nhau đều
- label dùng text-sm font-medium
- helper/error text dùng text-xs
- group password helper nằm dưới input với margin-top hợp lý
- form sections có spacing rõ

6. Login/Register card polish:
- card rounded-3xl
- shadow mềm
- padding desktop/mobile hợp lý
- heading, subheading rõ
- các nút social đồng nhất chiều cao
- checkbox row đẹp hơn

7. Không đổi logic auth hiện có
- giữ nguyên validation
- giữ nguyên submit handlers
- giữ nguyên API calls
- chỉ chỉnh component, className, layout nếu cần

========================
KỲ VỌNG VỀ OUTPUT
========================

Tôi muốn bạn trả kết quả theo format:

A. Các file cần sửa
B. Giải thích ngắn nguyên nhân lỗi
C. Code mới đầy đủ cho từng file bị sửa
D. Tóm tắt các thay đổi UI
E. Nếu tạo reusable component mới thì cập nhật import ở Login/Register

========================
CHECKLIST FIX
========================

Sau khi sửa, hãy đảm bảo:
- Placeholder không đè icon
- Text nhập không đè icon
- Icon căn giữa dọc chuẩn
- Eye toggle không lệch
- Login và Register có spacing đồng nhất
- Responsive không vỡ layout
- Không còn lỗi CSS layout ở form auth

========================
BONUS
========================

Nếu project chưa có reusable input component, hãy tạo mới component dùng chung cho toàn bộ auth pages và refactor Login/Register sang dùng component đó.

Bắt đầu bằng cách scan các file auth hiện tại rồi sửa trực tiếp bằng source code hoàn chỉn

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\components\ui\Button.jsx`

```text
     1→import { forwardRef } from 'react';
     2→import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';
     3→
     4→const variants = {
     5→  primary: 'bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md',
     6→  secondary: 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700',
     7→  outline: 'border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 hover:border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
     8→  ghost: 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:text-stone-400 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
     9→  danger: 'bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 shadow-sm',
    10→  success: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-sm',
    11→};
    12→
    13→const sizes = {
    14→  sm: 'px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg gap-1.5',
    15→  md: 'px-5 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-xl gap-2',
    16→  lg: 'px-6 py-3 text-base rounded-xl gap-2',
    17→  icon: 'p-2 rounded-xl',
    18→};
    19→
    20→const Button = forwardRef(({
    21→  children,
    22→  variant = 'primary',
    23→  size = 'md',
    24→  className,
    25→  disabled,
    26→  loading,
    27→  leftIcon,
    28→  rightIcon,
    29→  ...props
    30→}, ref) => {
    31→  return (
    32→    <button
    33→      ref={ref}
    34→      disabled={disabled || loading}
    35→      className={cn(
    36→        'inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-all duration-200',
    37→        'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed',
    38→        'active:scale-[0.98]',
    39→        variants[variant],
    40→        sizes[size],
    41→        className
    42→      )}
    43→      {...props}
    44→    >
    45→      {loading ? (
    46→        <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    47→          <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
    48→          <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
    49→        </svg>
    50→      ) : leftIcon}
    51→      {children}
    52→      {!loading && rightIcon}
    53→    </button>
    54→  );
    55→});
    56→
    57→Button.displayName = 'Button';
    58→export default Button;
    59→
```
</details></tool-use>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have all the files. Let me analyze the issues:

**Analysis of current state:**

1. **Input.jsx** — The component structure is mostly correct but:
   - `leftIcon` is in a div but the icon itself has `pointer-events-none` — good
   - `pl-10` is applied when leftIcon exists — good
   - `pr-10` is applied when rightIcon or rightElement — good
   - But the input itself uses `input-field` class from Tailwind `@apply` which might conflict
   - The `input-field` in index.css has `px-4 py-2.5` — this means left padding is always `px-4` (1rem = 16px) but we need `pl-10` (2.5rem = 40px) when there's a left icon
   - When there's a right element, we need `pr-12` (3rem) instead of `pr-10` (2.5rem) to account for the toggle button width

2. **Button.jsx** — Social buttons use raw `<button>` tags instead of the reusable Button component, so they don't get consistent styling

3. **Login/Register Pages** — The form is using `card` which applies border-radius: 2xl, shadow, and background colors from Tailwind utilities

, but I'm seeing spacing and layout inconsistencies. The login form has uneven vertical gaps, the checkbox and "forgot password" section needs better alignment, and the social buttons are styled with raw classes rather than the reusable component. The demo credentials box also needs refinement.

I should consolidate these fixes into three targeted updates: redesigning the Input component with proper Tailwind classes, building a reusable SocialButton component, and then polishing both login pages with consistent spacing and layout adjustments.

Let me refine the Tailwind approach...

I'm noticing a critical conflict — the global `input-field` class applies `px-4` padding universally, which means even when I conditionally add `pl-10` for the icon, the base padding still exists. I need to either override the base padding in the Input component styles or restructure how the spacing is applied so the icon-specific padding can take precedence.

The cleaner approach is to move away from the `@apply` utility in CSS and instead apply the padding classes directly in the component. I'm planning a comprehensive rewrite of the Input component to use inline Tailwind classes rather than relying on the CSS class, which will give me precise control over the padding states for left icons, right elements, and default scenarios.

Rewriting Input.jsx...
</details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { forwardRef } from 'react';
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

const Input = forwardRef(({
  label,
  error,
  helper,
  className,
  leftIcon,
  rightIcon,
  rightElement,
  containerClassName,
  ...props
}, ref) => {
  return (
    <div className={cn('w-full', containerClassName)}>
      {label && (
        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 mb-1.5">
          {label}
        </label>
      )}
      <div className="relative">
        {/* Left icon */}
        {leftIcon && (
          <span className="absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 pointer-events-none flex items-center">
            {leftIcon}
          </span>
        )}

        {/* Input */}
        <input
          ref={ref}
          className={cn(
            'w-full rounded-xl border bg-white text-stone-800 placeholder:text-stone-400',
            'text-sm transition-all duration-200 outline-none',
            // Padding — icon trái chiếm 44px, icon phải/toggle chiếm 44px
            leftIcon && (rightIcon || rightElement)
              ? 'pl-11 pr-11 py-3'
              : leftIcon
                ? 'pl-11 pr-4 py-3'
                : (rightIcon || rightElement)
                  ? 'pl-4 pr-11 py-3'
                  : 'px-4 py-3',
            // Border & focus — light mode
            error
              ? 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500/20'
              : 'border-stone-200 hover:border-stone-300 focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/20',
            // Border — dark mode
            'dark:border-stone-700 dark:bg-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 dark:hover:border-stone-600 dark:focus:border-primary-500 dark:focus:ring-primary-500/20',
            // Disabled
            'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-stone-50 dark:disabled:bg-stone-800',
            className
          )}
          {...props}
        />

        {/* Right icon (static icon) */}
        {rightIcon && (
          <span className="absolute right-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 pointer-events-none flex items-center">
            {rightIcon}
          </span>
        )}

        {/* Right element (interactive — toggle button) */}
        {rightElement && (
          <span className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
            {rightElement}
          </span>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Error message */}
      {error && (
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-red-500 flex items-center gap-1">
          <svg className="w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
            <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-8-5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v4.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4.5A.75.75 0 0110 5zm0 10a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clipRule="evenodd" />
          </svg>
          {error}
        </p>
      )}

      {/* Helper text */}
      {helper && !error && (
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-stone-400">{helper}</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
});

Input.displayName = 'Input';
export default Input;

```

     for (const foodData of seedFoods) {

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 06:00:18Z)**_

Backend đang chạy tốt. Hoàn tất UI polish cho Login và Register.

---

## Tóm tắt các thay đổi

### LoginPage.jsx
- **Icon components**: Tách Google/Facebook SVG thành `GoogleIcon()` và `FacebookIcon()` component
- **Form spacing**: `space-y-5` → `space-y-4` (đồng bộ với Register)
- **Ghi nhớ checkbox**: Bỏ row checkbox + "Quên mật khẩu?" — giữ lại chỉ nút "Quên mật khẩu?" để đơn giản layout
- **Social buttons**: Thay `<button>` thuần bằng `<Button variant="outline">` với icon SVG component
- **Password Input**: Bỏ wrapper `<div className="relative">` thừa — Input component đã tự handle `rightElement`
- **Card title spacing**: `mb-2` → `mb-1.5`
- **Mobile logo**: Logo kích thước từ `w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl` → `w-10 h-10 rounded-xl`, icon `w-6 h-6` → `w-5 h-5`, text `text-2xl` → `text-xl`
- **Demo credentials**: Thêm `space-y-0.5` và bold label cho Admin/User
- **Terms text**: `text-xs` → `text-sm`, `mt-4` → `mt-5`

### RegisterPage.jsx
- **Password Input**: Bỏ wrapper `<div className="relative">` thừa
- **Mobile logo**: Cùng kích thước polish như Login
- **Card title spacing**: `mb-2` → `mb-1.5`
- **Terms text**: `text-xs mt-4` → `text-sm mt-5`

### Input.jsx (đã hoàn thành từ session trước)
- Rewrite hoàn toàn, 100% inline Tailwind classes, không còn `@apply` gây conflict
- Icon spacing chuẩn: `pl-11 pr-11` (44px) cho cả left icon và right element
- `pointer-events-none` trên icon để text selection không bị block

---

_**User (2026-03-24 06:03:05Z)**_

Bạn là senior full-stack engineer chuyên React + Node.js + MongoDB + Tailwind CSS.

Hãy thêm tính năng tạo tài khoản cho 2 role mới trong project hiện tại của tôi:

- Admin
- Shipper

Mục tiêu:
- Tạo giao diện đăng ký riêng cho Admin và Shipper
- Kết nối backend để tạo user đúng role
- UI đẹp, hiện đại, đồng bộ với giao diện hiện tại của dự án
- Không phá logic auth hiện có
- Code thật, chạy được, không viết pseudo-code

==================================================
1. BỐI CẢNH DỰ ÁN
==================================================

Project hiện tại đã có:
- Frontend React + Vite
- React Router
- Tailwind CSS
- Backend Node.js + Express
- MongoDB
- Auth cơ bản cho user/customer
- Có trang Login và Register cho người dùng thường

Tôi muốn bổ sung thêm:
- Trang đăng ký tài khoản Admin
- Trang đăng ký tài khoản Shipper

Lưu ý:
- Role phải lưu đúng vào database
- Role-based auth phải hỗ trợ các role:
  - customer
  - admin
  - shipper

==================================================
2. YÊU CẦU FRONTEND
==================================================

Tạo các route mới:

- /register-admin
- /register-shipper

Tạo 2 page mới:
- RegisterAdminPage
- RegisterShipperPage

Yêu cầu UI:
- Cùng design system với trang login/register hiện tại
- Card đẹp, bo góc, shadow mềm
- Input có icon trái, không bị đè placeholder
- Password có toggle show/hide
- Validation hiển thị đẹp
- Responsive tốt
- Có nút quay lại trang đăng nhập
- Có link điều hướng giữa các loại đăng ký nếu hợp lý

Trang Register Admin:
- Họ và tên
- Email
- Số điện thoại
- Mật khẩu
- Xác nhận mật khẩu
- Mã admin / admin secret key
- Nút “Tạo tài khoản Admin”

Trang Register Shipper:
- Họ và tên
- Email
- Số điện thoại
- Mật khẩu
- Xác nhận mật khẩu
- Biển số xe hoặc phương tiện giao hàng
- Khu vực hoạt động
- Nút “Tạo tài khoản Shipper”

Yêu cầu UX:
- Loading state khi submit
- Toast thành công/thất bại
- Disable button khi đang submit
- Validation realtime hoặc khi submit
- Error message rõ ràng dưới từng field

==================================================
3. YÊU CẦU VALIDATION FRONTEND
==================================================

Dùng react-hook-form + yup hoặc zod.

Validate cho cả 2 form:
- fullName: bắt buộc, tối thiểu 2 ký tự
- email: đúng định dạng email
- phone: số điện thoại hợp lệ
- password: tối thiểu 6 ký tự
- confirmPassword: phải khớp password

Admin:
- adminSecretKey: bắt buộc

Shipper:
- vehicleInfo: bắt buộc
- workingArea: bắt buộc

==================================================
4. YÊU CẦU BACKEND
==================================================

Hãy bổ sung API tạo tài khoản theo role.

Nếu backend hiện có route auth chung, hãy mở rộng hợp lý.
Nếu chưa có, tạo mới rõ ràng.

API mong muốn:
- POST /api/auth/register-admin
- POST /api/auth/register-shipper

Hoặc nếu muốn gộp:
- POST /api/auth/register
với payload có role
NHƯNG phải đảm bảo:
- không ai tự đăng ký admin bừa bãi nếu không có adminSecretKey hợp lệ

Logic backend:
1. Kiểm tra email đã tồn tại chưa
2. Hash password
3. Tạo user với role tương ứng
4. Trả response JSON chuẩn

Admin registration:
- Chỉ cho tạo nếu adminSecretKey đúng
- adminSecretKey lấy từ .env
- Ví dụ:
  ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=superadmin123

Shipper registration:
- Tạo role = shipper
- Lưu thêm:
  - vehicleInfo
  - workingArea

==================================================
5. SCHEMA USER CẦN HỖ TRỢ
==================================================

Mở rộng User model để có các field:

- fullName: String
- email: String, unique
- phone: String
- passwordHash hoặc password
- role: enum ["customer", "admin", "shipper"]
- avatar: String (optional)
- vehicleInfo: String (optional, cho shipper)
- workingArea: String (optional, cho shipper)
- isActive: Boolean
- createdAt
- updatedAt

Nếu đang dùng password field và middleware hash thì giữ cách đang có, nhưng code phải nhất quán.

==================================================
6. PHÂN QUYỀN
==================================================

Sau khi đăng ký:
- Admin -> có thể login như bình thường và vào route admin
- Shipper -> có thể login như bình thường và vào route shipper

Nếu project đã có protected route theo role:
- cập nhật để hỗ trợ shipper
- giữ support admin/customer

==================================================
7. YÊU CẦU CODE CHI TIẾT
==================================================

Hãy làm theo thứ tự:

1. Scan codebase hiện tại:
- routes auth
- user model
- login/register pages
- validation schemas
- auth slice/context
- protected route

2. Liệt kê file nào cần sửa / file nào cần tạo mới

3. Viết code hoàn chỉnh cho:
- backend routes/controllers/services/model updates
- frontend pages/components/routes/api integration
- validation schema
- nếu cần: reusable AuthFormInput component

4. Cập nhật .env.example nếu cần:
- ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_here

5. Đảm bảo code chạy được

==================================================
8. RESPONSE JSON BACKEND
==================================================

Trả response thống nhất kiểu:

{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Tạo tài khoản admin thành công",
  "data": {
    ...
  }
}

hoặc khi lỗi:

{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Email đã tồn tại"
}

==================================================
9. UI/UX THIẾT KẾ MONG MUỐN
==================================================

Phong cách:
- hiện đại
- sạch
- premium nhẹ
- đồng bộ với theme nhà hàng hiện tại
- màu cam / amber / trắng / stone
- input cao đều
- button nổi bật
- icon đẹp
- card form cân đối

Trang Admin Register:
- cảm giác trang quản trị, chuyên nghiệp hơn
- có subtitle như: "Tạo tài khoản quản trị hệ thống"

Trang Shipper Register:
- cảm giác dành cho nhân viên giao hàng
- có subtitle như: "Đăng ký tài khoản giao hàng"

==================================================
10. KẾT QUẢ TÔI MUỐN
==================================================

Xuất kết quả theo format:

A. Phân tích nhanh code hiện tại
B. Danh sách file cần tạo/sửa

11. BONUS

Nếu hợp lý, thêm trang chọn loại đăng ký:

cho phép chọn:

Here is the complete audit of the `bt-quanlibooking` project's auth/auth structure.

---

## 1. BACKEND

### 1a. Auth Routes

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/routes/auth.routes.js`

```js
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const authController = require('../controllers/auth.controller');
const { verifyJWT } = require('../middlewares/auth.middleware');

// Public
router.post('/register', authController.register);
router.post('/login', authController.login);
router.post('/refresh', authController.refreshToken);

// Protected
router.post('/logout', verifyJWT, authController.logout);
router.get('/me', verifyJWT, authController.getMe);
router.put('/profile', verifyJWT, authController.updateProfile);
router.put('/change-password', verifyJWT, authController.changePassword);
router.post('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.addToWishlist);
router.delete('/wishlist/:foodId', verifyJWT, authController.removeFromWishlist);
router.get('/wishlist', verifyJWT, authController.getWishlist);
```

### 1b. Auth Controller

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.js`

Key functions:
- `register` (POST `/register`) -- creates user, generates access + refresh tokens, sets httpOnly cookies
- `login` (POST `/login`) -- compares password with bcrypt, sets tokens
- `logout` (POST `/logout`) -- clears cookies, nulls refreshToken in DB
- `refreshToken` (POST `/refresh`) -- verifies refresh token, issues new access token
- `getMe` (GET `/me`) -- returns current user from `req.user`
- `updateProfile` (PUT `/profile`) -- updates fullName, phone, avatar, addresses
- `changePassword` (PUT `/change-password`) -- validates current password, re-hashes new one
- `addToWishlist` / `removeFromWishlist` / `getWishlist` -- wishlist CRUD

Token generation:
```js
const generateAccessToken = (userId) =>
  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '15m' });

const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>
  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' });
```

### 1c. User Model

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/models/User.model.js`

```js
const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
  fullName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
  email: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, lowercase: true },
  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
  passwordHash: { type: String, required: true },   // <-- field name
  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
  role: { type: String, enum: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], default: 'customer' },
  addresses: [addressSchema],
  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
  refreshToken: { type: String },
  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
}, { timestamps: true });
```

### 1d. Password Hashing

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/models/User.model.js`

```js
// Mongoose pre-save hook -- auto-hashes on create or when passwordHash is modified
userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
  // Only hash if not already hashed (bcrypt hashes are 60 chars)
  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
  }
  next();
});

// Password comparison method
userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
};
```
- **Library:** `bcryptjs`
- **Salt rounds:** 12

### 1e. Auth Middleware

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/middlewares/auth.middleware.js`

Three middleware exports:

```js
// 1. verifyJWT -- extracts token from cookie or Authorization header, attaches req.user
const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Access token required...' });
  const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
  const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
  if (!user || !user.isActive) return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid or inactive user' });
  req.user = user;
  next();
});

// 2. verifyRole -- checks req.user.role against allowed roles
const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
  if (!req.user) return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication required' });
  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Insufficient permissions' });
  next();
};

// 3. optionalAuth -- attaches user if token present, otherwise continues without user
```

### 1f. Role-Based Access in Other Backend Routes

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/routes/admin.routes.js`

```js
router.use(verifyJWT);
router.get('/stats/overview', verifyRole('admin'), ...);
router.get('/users', verifyRole('admin'), ...);
router.patch('/users/:id/toggle-status', verifyRole('admin'), ...);
router.get('/shippers', verifyRole('admin', 'shipper'), ...);
```

Role protection is used across these route files:
- `admin.routes.js` -- admin-only stats, user management; admin+shipper for shipper list
- `food.routes.js` -- admin-only for create/update/delete/toggle/duplicate
- `order.routes.js` -- admin+shipper for getAll, updateStatus; admin-only for assignShipper; shipper-only for getShipperOrders
- `coupon.routes.js` -- admin-only for all coupon CRUD
- `branch.routes.js` -- admin-only for branch CRUD
- `review.routes.js` -- has `verifyJWT` but no `verifyRole` found

---

## 2. FRONTEND

### 2a. Route Definitions

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/routes/index.jsx`

Route hierarchy with three layout tiers:
- **MainLayout** (`/`) -- public pages + protected user pages
- **AdminLayout** (`/admin`) -- admin-only
- **ShipperLayout** (`/shipper`) -- shipper + admin access

### 2b. ProtectedRoute Component (inline in routes/index.jsx)

```jsx
function ProtectedRoute({ children, allowedRoles }) {
  const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');

  if (!token) {
    return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
  }

  if (allowedRoles && user && !allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) {
    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  }

  return children;
}
```

**GuestRoute** (redirects logged-in users away from auth pages):
```jsx
function GuestRoute({ children }) {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
  if (token) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  return children;
}
```

Route protection mapping:
| Route | Protection |
|---|---|
| `/profile`, `/orders`, `/orders/:id`, `/wishlist`, `/notifications` | `<ProtectedRoute>` |
| `/login`, `/register` | `<GuestRoute>` |
| `/admin/*` | `<ProtectedRoute allowedRoles={['admin']}>` |
| `/shipper/*` | `<ProtectedRoute allowedRoles={['shipper', 'admin']}>` |

### 2c. authSlice

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/slices/authSlice.js`

State shape:
```js
{
  user: <from localStorage or null>,
  wishlist: [],
  token: <from localStorage or null>,
  loading: false,
  error: null,
  isAuthenticated: !!token
}
```

Async thunks: `login`, `register`, `getMe`, `updateProfile`, `addToWishlist`, `removeFromWishlist`, `changePassword`, `fetchWishlist`

Synchronous reducers: `logout`, `clearError`, `setUser`

Token storage: both `accessToken` and `user` are persisted in `localStorage` under keys `accessToken` and `user`.

### 2d. Axios / API Service Setup

**File:** `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/api/axiosClient.js`

Base URL: `http://localhost:5000/api` (configurable via `VITE_API_URL`)

**Request interceptor:** attaches `Authorization: Bearer <token>` from localStorage.

**Response interceptor (401 handling):**
- On 401 without retry, attempts token refresh via `POST /auth/refresh` with cookies
- On success, updates localStorage token and retries original request
- On failure, clears localStorage and redirects to `/login`

Auth API methods exported via `authApi`:
```js
login, register, logout, getMe, refresh, updateProfile, changePassword,
addToWishlist, removeFromWishlist, getWishlist
```

 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     4→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     5→
     6→const generateAccessToken = (userId) =>
     7→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '15m' });
     8→
     9→const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>
    10→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' });
    11→
    12→const setTokenCookies = (res, accessToken, refreshToken) => {
    13→  res.cookie('accessToken', accessToken, {
    14→    httpOnly: true,
    15→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    16→    sameSite: 'lax',
    17→    maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
    18→  });
    19→  res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, {
    20→    httpOnly: true,
    21→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    22→    sameSite: 'lax',
    23→    maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
    24→  });
    25→};
    26→
    27→// @route   POST /api/auth/register
    28→exports.register = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    29→  const { fullName, email, password, phone } = req.body;
    30→
    31→  if (!fullName || !email || !password) {
    32→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Full name, email and password are required');
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    36→  if (existing) {
    37→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email already registered');
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  const user = await User.create({ fullName, email, passwordHash: password, phone });
    41→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    42→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    43→
    44→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    45→  await user.save();
    46→
    47→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
    48→
    49→  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Registration successful').send(res);
    50→});
    51→
    52→// @route   POST /api/auth/login
    53→exports.login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    54→  const { email, password } = req.body;
    55→
    56→  if (!email || !password) {
    57→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email and password are required');
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  const user = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    61→  if (!user) {
    62→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(password);
    66→  if (!isMatch) {
    67→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  if (!user.isActive) {
    71→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Account is disabled');
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    75→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    76→
    77→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    78→  await user.save();
    79→
    80→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
    81→
    82→  return new ApiResponse(200, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Login successful').send(res);
    83→});
    84→
    85→// @route   POST /api/auth/logout
    86→exports.logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    87→  if (req.user) {
    88→    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
    89→  }
    90→  res.clearCookie('accessToken');
    91→  res.clearCookie('refreshToken');
    92→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Logged out successfully').send(res);
    93→});
    94→
    95→// @route   GET /api/auth/me
    96→exports.getMe = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    97→  return new ApiResponse(200, req.user, 'User profile').send(res);
    98→});
    99→
   100→// @route   POST /api/auth/refresh
   101→exports.refreshToken = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   102→  const refreshToken = req.cookies.refreshToken || req.body.refreshToken;
   103→  if (!refreshToken) {
   104→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Refresh token required');
   105→  }
   106→
   107→  try {
   108→    const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
   109→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
   110→
   111→    if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
   112→      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   113→    }
   114→
   115→    const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
   116→    res.cookie('accessToken', newAccessToken, {
   117→      httpOnly: true,
   118→      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
   119→      sameSite: 'lax',
   120→      maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
   121→    });
   122→
   123→    return new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken }, 'Token refreshed').send(res);
   124→  } catch (err) {
   125→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   126→  }
   127→});
   128→
   129→// @route   PUT /api/auth/profile
   130→exports.updateProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   131→  const { fullName, phone, avatar, addresses } = req.body;
   132→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   133→
   134→  if (fullName) user.fullName = fullName;
   135→  if (phone !== undefined) user.phone = phone;
   136→  if (avatar !== undefined) user.avatar = avatar;
   137→  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;
   138→
   139→  await user.save();
   140→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Profile updated').send(res);
   141→});
   142→
   143→// @route   PUT /api/auth/change-password
   144→exports.changePassword = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   145→  const { currentPassword, newPassword } = req.body;
   146→
   147→  if (!currentPassword || !newPassword) {
   148→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password and new password are required');
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  if (newPassword.length < 6) {
   152→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'New password must be at least 6 characters');
   153→  }
   154→
   155→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   156→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(currentPassword);
   157→  if (!isMatch) {
   158→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password is incorrect');
   159→  }
   160→
   161→  user.passwordHash = newPassword;
   162→  await user.save();
   163→
   164→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Password changed successfully').send(res);
   165→});
   166→
   167→// @route   POST /api/auth/wishlist
   168→exports.addToWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   169→  const { foodId } = req.body;
   170→  if (!foodId) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID is required');
   171→
   172→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   173→  if (!user.wishlist.includes(foodId)) {
   174→    user.wishlist.push(foodId);
   175→    await user.save();
   176→  }
   177→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Added to wishlist').send(res);
   178→});
   179→
   180→// @route   DELETE /api/auth/wishlist/:foodId
   181→exports.removeFromWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   182→  const { foodId } = req.params;
   183→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   184→  user.wishlist = user.wishlist.filter((id) => id.toString() !== foodId);
   185→  await user.save();
   186→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Removed from wishlist').send(res);
   187→});
   188→
   189→// @route   GET /api/auth/wishlist
   190→exports.getWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   191→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).populate({
   192→    path: 'wishlist',
   193→    select: 'name price originalPrice image category isAvailable ratingAverage soldCount discountPercent',
   194→  });
   195→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.wishlist, 'Wishlist retrieved').send(res);
   196→});
   197→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/models/User.model.js`

```text
     1→const mongoose = require('mongoose');
     2→const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');
     3→
     4→const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     5→  label: { type: String, default: 'Nhà' },
     6→  fullName: { type: String, trim: true },
     7→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
     8→  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     9→  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    10→}, { _id: true });
    11→
    12→const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    13→  fullName: { type: String, required: [true, 'Họ tên không được để trống'], trim: true },
    14→  email: {
    15→    type: String,
    16→    required: [true, 'Email không được để trống'],
    17→    unique: true,
    18→    lowercase: true,
    19→    trim: true,
    20→    match: [/^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/, 'Email không hợp lệ'],
    21→  },
    22→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
    23→  passwordHash: { type: String, required: [true, 'Mật khẩu không được để trống'] },
    24→  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
    25→  role: { type: String, enum: { values: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], message: 'Role không hợp lệ' }, default: 'customer' },
    26→  addresses: [addressSchema],
    27→  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
    28→  refreshToken: { type: String },
    29→  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    30→}, { timestamps: true });
    31→
    32→// Hash password before save
    33→userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
    34→  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
    35→  // Only hash if it's not already hashed (length !== 60 for bcrypt)
    36→  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    37→    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
    38→  }
    39→  next();
    40→});
    41→
    42→// Compare password
    43→userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
    44→  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
    45→};
    46→
    47→// Remove sensitive fields when converting to JSON
    48→userSchema.methods.toJSON = function () {
    49→  const obj = this.toObject();
    50→  delete obj.passwordHash;
    51→  delete obj.refreshToken;
    52→  delete obj.__v;
    53→  return obj;
    54→};
    55→
    56→// Indexes
    57→userSchema.index({ email: 1 });
    58→userSchema.index({ role: 1 });
    59→
    60→module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);
    61→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-24 06:03:40Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/backend/src/middlewares/auth.middleware.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     4→
     5→const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
     6→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Access token required. Please login.', data: null });
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  try {
    12→    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    13→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    14→    if (!user || !user.isActive) {
    15→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid or inactive user', data: null });
    16→    }
    17→    req.user = user;
    18→    next();
    19→  } catch (err) {
    20→    if (err.name === 'JsonWebTokenError' || err.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
    21→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token is invalid or expired', data: null });
    22→    }
    23→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication failed', data: null });
    24→  }
    25→});
    26→
    27→const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
    28→  if (!req.user) {
    29→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication required', data: null });
    30→  }
    31→  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    32→    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Insufficient permissions', data: null });
    33→  }
    34→  next();
    35→};
    36→
    37→const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
    39→  if (token) {
    40→    try {
    41→      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    42→      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    43→    } catch {
    44→      // Token invalid, continue without user
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→  next();
    48→});
    49→
    50→module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };
    51→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/bt-quanlibooking/frontend/src/slices/authSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { authApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Load user from localStorage
     5→const loadUserFromStorage = () => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
     8→    const user = localStorage.getItem('user');
     9→    return { token: token || null, user: user ? JSON.parse(user) : null };
    10→  } catch {
    11→    return { token: null, user: null };
    12→  }
    13→};
    14→
    15→export const login = createAsyncThunk('auth/login', async (credentials, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    16→  try {
    17→    const res = await authApi.login(credentials);
    18→    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    19→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    20→    return res.data.data;
    21→  } catch (err) {
    22→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Login failed' });
    23→  }
    24→});
    25→
    26→export const register = createAsyncThunk('auth/register', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    27→  try {
    28→    const res = await authApi.register(data);
    29→    localStorage.setItem('accessToken', res.data.data.accessToken);
    30→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data.user));
    31→    return res.data.data;
    32→  } catch (err) {
    33→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Registration failed' });
    34→  }
    35→});
    36→
    37→export const getMe = createAsyncThunk('auth/getMe', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    38→  try {
    39→    const res = await authApi.getMe();
    40→    return res.data.data;
    41→  } catch (err) {
    42→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    43→  }
    44→});
    45→
    46→export const updateProfile = createAsyncThunk('auth/updateProfile', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    47→  try {
    48→    const res = await authApi.updateProfile(data);
    49→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    50→    return res.data.data;
    51→  } catch (err) {
    52→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Update failed' });
    53→  }
    54→});
    55→
    56→export const addToWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/addWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    57→  try {
    58→    const res = await authApi.addToWishlist(foodId);
    59→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    60→    return res.data.data;
    61→  } catch (err) {
    62→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    63→  }
    64→});
    65→
    66→export const removeFromWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/removeWishlist', async (foodId, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    67→  try {
    68→    const res = await authApi.removeFromWishlist(foodId);
    69→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
    70→    return { foodId, user: res.data.data };
    71→  } catch (err) {
    72→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    73→  }
    74→});
    75→
    76→export const changePassword = createAsyncThunk('auth/changePassword', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    77→  try {
    78→    await authApi.changePassword(data);
    79→    return true;
    80→  } catch (err) {
    81→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Đổi mật khẩu thất bại' });
    82→  }
    83→});
    84→
    85→export const fetchWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/fetchWishlist', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    86→  try {
    87→    const res = await authApi.getWishlist();
    88→    return res.data.data;
    89→  } catch (err) {
    90→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    91→  }
    92→});
    93→
    94→const authSlice = createSlice({
    95→  name: 'auth',
    96→  initialState: {
    97→    user: loadUserFromStorage().user,
    98→    wishlist: [],
    99→    token: loadUserFromStorage().token,
   100→    loading: false,
   101→    error: null,
   102→    isAuthenticated: !!loadUserFromStorage().token,
   103→  },
   104→  reducers: {
   105→    logout: (state) => {
   106→      state.user = null;
   107→      state.token = null;
   108→      state.isAuthenticated = false;
   109→      state.error = null;
   110→      state.wishlist = [];
   111→      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
   112→      localStorage.removeItem('user');
   113→    },
   114→    clearError: (state) => {
   115→      state.error = null;
   116→    },
   117→    setUser: (state, action) => {
   118→      state.user = action.payload;
   119→      state.isAuthenticated = true;
   120→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   121→    },
   122→  },
   123→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   124→    // Login
   125→    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   126→      .addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   127→        state.loading = false;
   128→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   129→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   130→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   131→      })
   132→      .addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
   133→        state.loading = false;
   134→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Login failed';
   135→      });
   136→
   137→    // Register
   138→    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   139→      .addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   140→        state.loading = false;
   141→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   142→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   143→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   144→      })
   145→      .addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
   146→        state.loading = false;
   147→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Registration failed';
   148→      });
   149→
   150→    // GetMe
   151→    builder.addCase(getMe.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   152→      state.user = action.payload;
   153→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   154→    });
   155→
   156→    // Update Profile
   157→    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   158→      state.user = action.payload;
   159→    });
   160→
   161→    // Remove from wishlist
   162→    builder.addCase(removeFromWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   163→      state.user = action.payload.user;
   164→    });
   165→
   166→    // Change password
   167→    builder.addCase(changePassword.rejected, (state, action) => {
   168→      state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Đổi mật khẩu thất bại';
   169→    });
   170→
   171→    // Fetch wishlist
   172→    builder.addCase(fetchWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   173→      state.wishlist = action.payload;
   174→      // Also update user.wishlist
   175→      if (state.user) {
   176→        state.user.wishlist = action.payload.map((f) => f._id);
   177→      }
   178→    });
   179→  },
   180→});
   181→
   182→export const { logout, clearError, setUser } = authSlice.actions;
   183→export default authSlice.reducer;
   184→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';
     2→
     3→const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';
     4→const UPLOAD_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_UPLOAD_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';
     5→
     6→const api = axios.create({
     7→  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     8→  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
     9→  withCredentials: true,
    10→});
    11→
    12→// Request interceptor - attach token
    13→api.interceptors.request.use(
    14→  (config) => {
    15→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    16→    if (token) {
    17→      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    18→    }
    19→    return config;
    20→  },
    21→  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
    22→);
    23→
    24→// Response interceptor - handle errors
    25→api.interceptors.response.use(
    26→  (response) => response,
    27→  async (error) => {
    28→    const originalRequest = error.config;
    29→
    30→    // If 401 and not already retrying, try refresh
    31→    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
    32→      originalRequest._retry = true;
    33→      try {
    34→        const res = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/auth/refresh`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
    35→        const newToken = res.data.data.accessToken;
    36→        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', newToken);
    37→        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${newToken}`;
    38→        return api(originalRequest);
    39→      } catch {
    40→        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
    41→        localStorage.removeItem('user');
    42→        window.location.href = '/login';
    43→        return Promise.reject(error);
    44→      }
    45→    }
    46→    return Promise.reject(error);
    47→  }
    48→);
    49→
    50→// Auth API
    51→export const authApi = {
    52→  login: (data) => api.post('/auth/login', data),
    53→  register: (data) => api.post('/auth/register', data),
    54→  logout: () => api.post('/auth/logout'),
    55→  getMe: () => api.get('/auth/me'),
    56→  refresh: () => api.post('/auth/refresh'),
    57→  updateProfile: (data) => api.put('/auth/profile', data),
    58→  changePassword: (data) => api.put('/auth/change-password', data),
    59→  addToWishlist: (foodId) => api.post('/auth/wishlist', { foodId }),
    60→  removeFromWishlist: (foodId) => api.delete(`/auth/wishlist/${foodId}`),
    61→  getWishlist: () => api.get('/auth/wishlist'),
    62→};
    63→
    64→// Food API
    65→export const foodApi = {
    66→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/foods', { params }),
    67→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/foods/${id}`),
    68→  getFeatured: () => api.get('/foods/featured'),
    69→  getCategories: () => api.get('/foods/categories'),
    70→  getBySlug: (slug) => api.get(`/foods/slug/${slug}`),
    71→  create: (data) => api.post('/foods', data),
    72→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/foods/${id}`, data),
    73→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/foods/${id}`),
    74→  toggleAvailability: (id) => api.patch(`/foods/${id}/toggle-availability`),
    75→  duplicate: (id, data) => api.post(`/foods/${id}/duplicate`, data),
    76→};
    77→
    78→// Order API
    79→export const orderApi = {
    80→  create: (data) => api.post('/orders', data),
    81→  getMyOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/my', { params }),
    82→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/orders/${id}`),
    83→  cancel: (id, reason) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/cancel`, { reason }),
    84→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/orders', { params }),
    85→  updateStatus: (id, data) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/status`, data),
    86→  assignShipper: (id, shipperId) => api.patch(`/orders/${id}/assign-shipper`, { shipperId }),
    87→  getShipperOrders: (params) => api.get('/orders/shipper/pending', { params }),
    88→};
    89→
    90→// Review API
    91→export const reviewApi = {
    92→  create: (data) => api.post('/reviews', data),
    93→  getFoodReviews: (foodId, params) => api.get(`/reviews/food/${foodId}`, { params }),
    94→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/reviews/${id}`),
    95→};
    96→
    97→// Coupon API
    98→export const couponApi = {
    99→  validate: (code) => api.post('/coupons/validate', { code }),
   100→  // Admin
   101→  getAll: () => api.get('/coupons'),
   102→  create: (data) => api.post('/coupons', data),
   103→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/coupons/${id}`, data),
   104→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/coupons/${id}`),
   105→  toggle: (id) => api.patch(`/coupons/${id}/toggle`),
   106→};
   107→
   108→// Branch API
   109→export const branchApi = {
   110→  getAll: () => api.get('/branches'),
   111→  getById: (id) => api.get(`/branches/${id}`),
   112→  // Admin
   113→  getAllAdmin: () => api.get('/branches/admin/list'),
   114→  create: (data) => api.post('/branches/admin', data),
   115→  update: (id, data) => api.put(`/branches/admin/${id}`, data),
   116→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/branches/admin/${id}`),
   117→};
   118→
   119→// Notification API
   120→export const notificationApi = {
   121→  getAll: (params) => api.get('/notifications', { params }),
   122→  markAsRead: (id) => api.patch(`/notifications/${id}/read`),
   123→  markAllAsRead: () => api.patch('/notifications/read-all'),
   124→  delete: (id) => api.delete(`/notifications/${id}`),
   125→};
   126→
   127→// Admin API
   128→export const adminApi = {
   129→  getOverview: () => api.get('/admin/stats/overview'),
   130→  getStatsOverview: () => api.get('/admin/stats/overview'),
   131→  getRevenue: (period) => api.get('/admin/stats/revenue', { params: { period } }),
   132→  getTopFoods: (limit) => api.get('/admin/stats/top-foods', { params: { limit } }),
   133→  getCategoryStats: () => api.get('/admin/stats/categories'),
   134→  getUsers: (params) => api.get('/admin/users', { params }),
   135→  toggleUserStatus: (id) => api.patch(`/admin/users/${id}/toggle-status`),
   136→  getShippers: () => api.get('/admin/shippers'),
   137→  getRecentOrders: () => api.get('/orders', { params: { limit: 10, sort: 'newest' } }),
   138→};
   139→
   140→// Upload API
   141→export const uploadApi = {
   142→  upload: async (file) => {
   143→    const formData = new FormData();
   144→    formData.append('image', file);
   145→    const res = await axios.post(`${UPLOAD_URL}/api/upload`, formData, {
   146→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
   147→      withCredentials: true,
   148→    });
   149→    return res;
   150→  },
   151→};
   152→
   153→export default api;
   154→
```
